title: 🌧️ बारिश वाला चिकन शोरबा | Monsoon spl Green Chicken Shorba recipe | Chef Ranveer Brar
description:
𝗛𝗘𝗔𝗟𝗧𝗛𝗬 𝗚𝗥𝗘𝗘𝗡 𝗖𝗛𝗜𝗖𝗞𝗘𝗡 𝗦𝗛𝗢𝗥𝗕𝗔 - (𝙎𝙚𝙚 𝙙𝙚𝙩𝙖𝙞𝙡𝙚𝙙 𝙩𝙚𝙭𝙩 𝙧𝙚𝙘𝙞𝙥𝙚 𝙗𝙚𝙡𝙤𝙬) Kisne कहा ki monsoon में non veg नहीं kha सकते? Aisa chicken शोरबा agar बने तो bilkul kha सकते हैं :) 

***********************
𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡  𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣
🛒RB Store - https://www.amazon.in/shop/chefranveer
📟Kitchen Appliances - https://bit.ly/KitchenAppliancesIUse
🔪Knives I use - https://amzn.to/4kzSJVe

***********************
𝗥𝗘𝗖𝗜𝗣𝗘 𝗙𝗢𝗥 𝗛𝗘𝗔𝗟𝗧𝗛𝗬 𝗚𝗥𝗘𝗘𝗡 𝗖𝗛𝗜𝗖𝗞𝗘𝗡 𝗦𝗛𝗢𝗥𝗕𝗔
Preparation time 10 minutes 
Cooking time 15-20 minutes 
Serve 2-4 

Ingredients
For Chicken Marination
1 kg Chicken Legs, चिकन
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
½ tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर
½ tsp Black Peppercorns (crushed), कुटी हुई काली मिर्च
1 tbsp Ginger Garlic paste, अदरक लहसुन का पेस्ट

For Paste
1 cup Spring Onion (roughly chopped), हरी प्याज
3 no. Green Chillies (roughly chopped), हरी मिर्च
1 inch Ginger (peeled & roughly chopped), अदरक
1 cup fresh Coriander leaves (roughly chopped), धनिया पत्ता

For Green Chicken Shorba
2-3 tbsp Oil, तेल
1 no. Bay leaf, तेज पत्ता
¼ inch Cinnamon stick, दालचीनी
4-5 no. Fenugreek seeds, मेथी दाना
¼ no. Star anise, चक्र फूल
½ tsp Cumin seeds, जीरा 
1 medium Onion (chopped), प्याज
1 tbsp Tender Coriander stems (finely chopped), धनिया के डंठल
Marinated Chicken, मैरिनेटेड चिकन
Prepared paste, तैयार किया हुआ पेस्ट
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
1 cup Water, पानी
1 heaped tbsp Coriander powder, धनिया पाउडर
1 tsp Cumin powder, जीरा पाउडर
1 tsp Black Peppercorns (crushed), कुटी हुई काली मिर्च
1-2 cups Hot water, गर्म पानी
1 ½ cups Water, पानी
Roasted Sweet Corn, भुना हुआ स्वीटकॉर्न

For Garnish 
Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता

Process:

For Chicken Marination
In a bowl, add chicken, salt to taste, turmeric powder, crushed black peppercorns, ginger garlic paste and marinate well.
Keep it aside for further use.


For Paste
In a bowl, add spring onion, green chillies, ginger, fresh coriander leaves and give it a good mix.

Transfer it into the mixer grinder jar and grind it into the smooth fine paste.
Keep it aside for further use.

For Green Chicken Shorba

In a sauce pot or handi, add oil, once it's hot, add bay leaf, cinnamon stick, fenugreek seeds, star anise, cumin seeds, onion and saute for 2-3 minutes.

Add tender coriander stems, marinated chicken and cook for a while.

Add prepared paste, salt to taste and cook for 4-5 minutes until oil separates from the masala.

Add water and give it a quick boil.
Now, add coriander powder, cumin powder, crushed black peppercorns, hot water, water and let it simmer for 10-12 minutes.

Take sweetcorn and place it onto the gas burner and roast for 2-3 minutes until corn gets light charred colour.

Put the roasted sweetcorn into the shorba, cover it with the lid and let it cook for a while or until it's cooked.

Transfer it into the serving bowl and garnish it with coriander sprig.
Serve hot.

title: '7 Star' Dal Makhani in 10 mins! एक नहीं 4 तड़के वाली spl दाल | Unique Dal Tadka | Chef Ranveer Brar
description:
𝟳 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗥 𝗗𝗔𝗟 - (𝙎𝙚𝙚 𝙙𝙚𝙩𝙖𝙞𝙡𝙚𝙙 𝙩𝙚𝙭𝙩 𝙧𝙚𝙘𝙞𝙥𝙚 𝙗𝙚𝙡𝙤𝙬)

***********************
𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡  𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣
🛒RB Store - https://www.amazon.in/shop/chefranveer
📟Kitchen Appliances - https://bit.ly/KitchenAppliancesIUse
🔪Knives I use - https://amzn.to/4kzSJVe

***********************
𝗥𝗘𝗖𝗜𝗣𝗘 𝗙𝗢𝗥 𝟳 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗥 𝗗𝗔𝗟
Preparation time 10 minutes
Cooking time 25-30 minutes 
Serve 2-4 

Ingredients
For Cooking Dal
2 tbsp Ghee, घी
½ inch Ginger (peeled, roughly crushed & chopped), अदरक
3 cups Mix Dals (soaked for 1hr), भीगी हुई मिक्स दालें
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
½ tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर
Water as required, पानी
Prepared 2nd Tadka, तैयार किया हुआ तड़का

For 2nd Tadka
2 tbsp Oil, तेल
2-3 sprig Curry leaves (roughly chopped), कड़ी पत्ते

For 3rd Tadka
1 tbsp Ghee, घी
1 tbsp Oil, तेल
2-3 no. Dry Kashmiri Red Chillies, सूखी कश्मीरी लाल मिर्च
2 medium Onions (roughly sliced), प्याज
1 large Tomato (chopped), टमाटर
Cooked Dal, पकी हुई दाल
1 cup Water, पानी
1 tbsp Tender Coriander stems (finely chopped), धनिया के डंठल
1-2 tbsp Ghee, घी
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
Prepared 4th Tadka, तैयार किया हुआ तड़का
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार

For 4th Tadka 
1 tbsp Ghee, घी
1 tbsp Oil, तेल
1 tsp Cumin seeds, जीरा
A pinch of Asafoetida, हींग
2 no. Green Chillies (chopped), हरी मिर्च
½ tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर
½ tsp Degi Red Chilli powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर
Little water, पानी

For Smoke
Coal, कोयला
1 tsp Ghee, घी

For Garnish
Chilli oil, मिर्च का तेल
Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता

Process
For Cooking Dal
● In a pressure cooker, add ghee, once it's hot, add ginger and cook for a minute.
● Add soaked mix dals, salt to taste, turmeric powder, water as required and give it a quick boil.
● Add prepared 2nd tadka, cover it with the lid and let it cook for 3-4 whistles or until it's cooked.
● Keep it aside for further use.

For 2nd Tadka
● In a pan, add oil, once it's hot, add curry leaves and let it splutter for a minute.
● Keep it aside for further use.

For 3rd Tadka
● In a handi or lagan, add ghee, oil, once it's hot, add dry kashmiri red chillies, onions and cook until onions get translucent in texture.
● Add tomato and cook for 2-3 minutes.
● Add cooked dal, water, tender coriander stems, ghee, salt to taste and let it simmer for 7-8 minutes or until it is cooked.
● Finish it with prepared 4th tadka, salt to taste and give it a good mix.
● Take a steel bowl, place burnt coal, add ghee, place the bowl into the handi and give it a smoke to the dal.
● Transfer it into the serving bowl, garnish it with chilli oil and coriander sprig.
● Serve hot with roti and steam rice.

For 4th Tadka
● In a pan, add ghee, oil, once it's hot, add cumin seeds, a pinch of asafoetida, green chillies and cook for a minute.
● Add turmeric powder, degi red chilli powder, little water and cook for another minute.
● Keep it aside for further use.

***********************

title: Rajputana Chicken Curry - चिकन करी | Rajputana Chicken curry | Chef Ranveer Brar
description:
𝗥𝗔𝗝𝗔𝗦𝗧𝗛𝗔𝗡𝗜 𝗖𝗛𝗜𝗖𝗞𝗘𝗡 𝗖𝗨𝗥𝗥𝗬 - (𝙎𝙚𝙚 𝙙𝙚𝙩𝙖𝙞𝙡𝙚𝙙 𝙩𝙚𝙭𝙩 𝙧𝙚𝙘𝙞𝙥𝙚 𝙗𝙚𝙡𝙤𝙬) Aisi chicken curry ki aapko weekend se प्यार हो जाए :) 

***********************
𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡  𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣
🛒RB Store - https://www.amazon.in/shop/chefranveer
📟Kitchen Appliances - https://bit.ly/KitchenAppliancesIUse
🔪Knives I use - https://amzn.to/4kzSJVe

***********************
𝗥𝗘𝗖𝗜𝗣𝗘 𝗙𝗢𝗥 𝗥𝗔𝗝𝗔𝗦𝗧𝗛𝗔𝗡𝗜 𝗖𝗛𝗜𝗖𝗞𝗘𝗡 𝗖𝗨𝗥𝗥𝗬
Preparation time 10-15 minutes
Cooking time 25-30 minutes
Serve 2-4 

Ingredients
For Paste
2-3 tbsp Mustard oil, सरसों का तेल
4-5 no. Garlic cloves, लहसुन
2 tsp Cumin seeds, जीरा
2 tbsp Coriander seeds, धनिया के बीज
1 ½ cups Water, पानी
12-15 no. Dry Kashmiri Red Chillies (deseeded), सूखी कश्मीरी लाल मिर्च
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
1 tsp Sugar, चीनी

For Chicken Marination
1 kg Chicken (thighs & drumsticks), चिकन 
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
1 heaped tbsp Ginger Garlic paste, अदरक लहसुन का पेस्ट
2-3 tbsp Curd (beaten), दही
1 tsp Oil, तेल

For Rajputana Chicken Curry
2-3 tbsp Mustard oil, सरसों का तेल
1 tsp Cumin seeds, जीरा
3 no. Garlic cloves (chopped), लहसुन
2-3 no. Black Cardamom, बड़ी इलायची
3-4 no. Green Chillies (roughly chopped), हरी मिर्च
1 medium Onions (roughly sliced), प्याज
Prepared paste, तैयार की हुई पेस्ट
Little Water, पानी
Little Water, पानी
Cooked Chicken, पका हुआ चिकन
2 tbsp Coriander powder, धनिया पाउडर
2 cups Hot Water, गर्म पानी
1 tbsp Tender Coriander stems (finely chopped), धनिया के डंठल
2 tbsp fresh Coriander leaves (finely chopped), धनिया पत्ता
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
1-2 tsp Lemon juice, नींबू का रस
2 tbsp Ghee, घी

For Searing Chicken
2 tbsp Oil, तेल
Marinated Chicken, मैरिनेटेड चिकन 

For Garnish
Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता  

Process 
For Paste
● In a saucepan, add mustard oil, once it's smoky hot, add garlic and cook until garlic gets light brown in colour.
● Add cumin seeds, coriander seeds, water, dry kashmiri red chillies, salt to taste, sugar and let it boil for 4-5 minutes.
● Transfer it into the mixer grinder jar and grind it into a smooth fine paste.
● Keep it aside for further use.

For Chicken Marination
● In a bowl, add chicken, salt to taste, ginger garlic paste, curd, oil and marinate well.
● Keep it aside for further use.

For Rajputana Chicken Curry
● In a handi, add mustard oil, once it's smoky hot, add cumin seeds, garlic, black cardamom, green chillies, onions and saute until it's translucent in texture.
● Add prepared paste, little water and cook for 4-5 minutes until oil separates from the masala.
● Add cooked chicken, coriander powder and let it cook for another 2-3 minutes.
● Add hot water to adjust the consistency, tender coriander stems, cover it with the lid and let it cook for a while or until it's cooked.
● Finish it with fresh coriander leaves, salt to taste, lemon juice, ghee and give it a good mix.
● Transfer it into the serving dish and garnish it with coriander sprig.
● Serve hot with roti or steam rice.

For Searing Chicken
● In a pan, add oil, once it's hot, add marinated chicken and cook for 4-5 minutes or until it's half cooked.
● Transfer it into the tray and leave it aside for further use.


***********************

title: Palak Patta Chaat | पालक पत्ता चाट | बारिश spl Kripsy snack | अमरुद chaat bonus | Chef RanveerBrar
description:
𝗣𝗔𝗟𝗔𝗞 𝗣𝗔𝗧𝗧𝗔 𝗖𝗛𝗔𝗔𝗧 - (𝙎𝙚𝙚 𝙙𝙚𝙩𝙖𝙞𝙡𝙚𝙙 𝙩𝙚𝙭𝙩 𝙧𝙚𝙘𝙞𝙥𝙚 𝙗𝙚𝙡𝙤𝙬) Monsoon में ये recipe नहीं banaya to आप khud ko माफ़ nahin kar paayenge! :) Watch this Palak Patta Chaat video for perfect pakoda batter tips too & a bonus Guava/ अमरुद chaat bonus.

***********************
𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡  𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣
🛒RB Store - https://www.amazon.in/shop/chefranveer
📟Kitchen Appliances - https://bit.ly/KitchenAppliancesIUse
🔪Knives I use - https://amzn.to/4kzSJVe

***********************
𝗥𝗘𝗖𝗜𝗣𝗘 𝗙𝗢𝗥 𝗣𝗔𝗟𝗔𝗞 𝗣𝗔𝗧𝗧𝗔 𝗖𝗛𝗔𝗔𝗧
Preparation time 10 minutes 
Cooking time 15-20 minutes 
Serve 2-4

Ingredients 
For Palak Patta Chaat
1 medium bunch Spinach leaves (clean & washed), पालक
4-5 no. Green Chillies (less spicy & slit), हरी मिर्च
½ cup Sweet Corn kernels, स्वीट कॉर्न के दाने

For Paste 
1 cup Rice flour, चावल का आटा
1 cup Gram flour, बेसन
5-6 no. Garlic cloves, लहसुन
2 no. Green Chillies (less spicy & roughly torn), हरी मिर्च
1 tbsp Ginger Garlic paste, अदरक लहसुन का पेस्ट
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
1 tsp Oil, तेल
Water as required, पानी
½ tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर

For Chutney Mixture
⅓ cup Dry Mango powder, आमचूर पाउडर
2-3 tbsp Water, पानी
1 cup Jaggery, गुड़

For Amchur Chutney
1 tbsp Oil, तेल
2 no. Dry Kashmiri Red Chillies (broken into half), सूखी कश्मीरी लाल मिर्च
¼ tsp Asafoetida, हींग
Prepared Chutney Mixture, तैयार किया हुआ चटनी का मिश्रण

For Batter 
Prepared Paste, तैयार की हुई पेस्ट
1 tbsp Coriander seeds (crushed), कुटे हुए धनिया के बीज
½ tsp Carom seeds, अजवाइन
½ tsp Baking powder, बेकिंग पाउडर
½ tsp Baking soda, बेकिंग सोडा
Water as required, पानी

Other Ingredients 
Oil for frying, तलने के लिए तेल

For Guava Chaat
1 large Guava (roughly chopped), अमरूद
2 tbsp Candied Mango (chopped), आम पापड
½ tsp Degi Red Chilli powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर
½ tsp Black Salt, काला नमक
A pinch of Chaat masala, चाट मसाला

For Assembling Chaat
Prepared Guava Chaat, तैयार की हुई अमरूद की चाट
Sweetened curd, मीठा दही
Fried palak patta, तले हुए पालक के पत्ते
Fried Sweet Corn & Green Chillies, तली हुई स्वीट कॉर्न के दाने और हरी मिर्च
Prepared Amchur chutney, तैयार की हुई आमचूर की चटनी
Pomegranate pearls, अनार के दाने
Nylon sev, नायलॉन सेव
Candid Mango (chopped), आम पापड
Namkeen dal moth, नमकीन दालमोठ
A pinch of Degi Red Chilli powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर
Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता 

Process
For Paste
● In a bowl, add rice flour, gram flour, garlic, green chillies, ginger garlic paste, salt to taste, oil, water as required, turmeric powder and give it a good mix.
● Transfer it into the mixer grinder jar and grind it into the smooth fine paste.
● Keep it aside for further use.

For Chutney Mixture
● In a bowl, add dry mango powder, water, jaggery and give it a good mix.
● Keep it aside for further use.

For Amchur Chutney
● In a saucepan, add oil, once it's hot, add dry kashmiri red chillies, asafoetida and cook for a minute.
● Add prepared chutney mixture and let it simmer for 15-20 minutes on medium flames.
● Transfer it into the bowl and keep it aside for further use.

For Batter
● In a bowl, add prepared paste, crushed coriander seeds, carom seeds, baking powder, baking soda, water as required and give it a good mix.
● Keep it aside for further use.

For Frying
● Take spinach leaves, dip it into the batter and coat it evenly on all sides.
● Drop the leaves into the hot oil and fry them until crispy on texture.
● Add green chillies, sweetcorn into batter and coat it evenly.
● Drop it into the hot oil and fry them until crispy texture and golden brown in colour.
● Transfer it into the absorbent sheet and leave it aside for further use.

For Guava Chaat
● In a bowl, add chopped guava, candied mango, degi red chilli powder, black salt, chaat masala and give it a good mix.
● Keep it aside for further use.

For Assembling Chaat
● In a serving dish or platter, add a spoonful of prepared guava chaat, sweetened curd, place fried palak patta, fried sweet corn & green chillies and drizzle some prepared amchur chutney.
● Garnish it with pomegranate pearls, nylon sev, namkeen dal moth, sprinkle a pinch of degi red chilli powder and coriander sprig.
● Serve warm.

***********************

title: Spicy Wonton Soup | आसानी से बनाएं वॉन्टन सूप | Kripsy Wonton Snack bonus | Chef Ranveer Brar
description:
WONTON SOUP-(𝙎𝙚𝙚 𝙙𝙚𝙩𝙖𝙞𝙡𝙚𝙙 𝙩𝙚𝙭𝙩 𝙧𝙚𝙘𝙞𝙥𝙚 𝙗𝙚𝙡𝙤𝙬) Jhatpat, फटाफट and full of flavour! 🌧️ This Wonton Soup is light, comforting, and exactly what you need on a rainy day. One bowl, endless comfort.

***********************
𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡  𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣
🛒RB Store - https://www.amazon.in/shop/chefranveer
📟Kitchen Appliances - https://bit.ly/KitchenAppliancesIUse
🔪Knives I use - https://amzn.to/4kzSJVe

***********************
𝗥𝗘𝗖𝗜𝗣𝗘 𝗙𝗢𝗥  Wonton Soup 
Preparation time 10 minutes 
Cooking time 20-25 minutes 
Serve 2-4 

Ingredients 
For Stock 
2 tbsp Oil, तेल
12-15 no. Black Peppercorns, काली मिर्च के दाने
1 inch Ginger (peeled & sliced), अदरक
1 tbsp Tender Coriander stem (roughly chopped), धनिये के डंठल
1 large Carrot (peeled & sliced), गाजर
2 no. Bay leaf, तेज पत्ता
½ medium Onion (sliced), प्याज
⅓ cup Cauliflower trimmings (roughly chopped), फूलगोभी
Water as required, पानी
4-5 no. French beans (roughly chopped) फ्रेंच बीन्स

For Wonton Dough 
2-3 cups Refined flour, मैदा
2 tsp Vinegar, सिरका 
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
Water as required, पानी
½ tsp Oil (after kneading), तेल
½ tsp Oil (after kneading), तेल

For Chicken Filling 
1 inch Ginger (peeled & finely chopped), अदरक
1 tbsp Tender Coriander stems (finely chopped), धनिया की डंठल
2 no. Green Chillies (finely chopped), हरी मिर्च
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
½ tsp Black Peppercorns (crushed), काली मिर्च के दाने
450 gms Chicken minced, चिकन कीमा

For Wonton Soup 
1 tbsp Oil, तेल
1 medium Onion (chopped), प्याज 
1 large Carrot (peeled & finely chopped), गाजर
Little water, पानी
½ tsp Soy sauce, सोया सॉस
Vegetable Stock, वेजिटेबल स्टॉक 
2 tbsp Coriander leaves (finely chopped), धनिया पत्ता
Prepared Wonton, तैयार किए हुए वॉन्टन
Salt to taste,  नमक स्वादअनुसार

Other Ingredients 
Cornstarch (for rolling), कॉर्नस्टार्च
Little Water, पानी
Prepared Chicken Filling, तैयार हुई चिकन की फिलिंग
Oil for frying, तलने के लिए तेल

For Garnish 
Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता
Chilli Oil, मिर्च का तेल

Process
For Stock
● In a saucepot, add oil, once it's hot, add black peppercorns, ginger, tender coriander stems, carrot, bay leaf, onion and saute for a minute.
● Add cauliflower trimmings, water as required, french beans, give it a good mix, and let it simmer for a while.
● Strain the stock and keep it aside for further use.

For Wonton Dough
● In a bowl or parat, add refined flour, vinegar, salt to taste, water as required and knead it into semi-soft dough.
● Add oil and knead it once again for a while.
● Apply oil to the dough, cover it with damp cloth and leave it aside for resting
● Divide the dough into small lemon sized balls.
● Dust with cornstarch, flatten it with the rolling pin to make wonton sheets.
● Trim the edges, cut into squares and fill them with the prepared chicken filling 
● Apply a little water to the edges, seal the edges tightly to make wontons.
● Leave it aside for further use.

For Chicken Filling 
● In a bowl, add ginger, tender coriander stems, green chillies, salt to taste, crushed black peppercorns, chicken minced and give it a good mix.
● Keep it aside for further use.

For Wonton Soup
● In a wok or saucepot, add oil, once it's hot, add onion, carrot and cook for a minute.
● Add little water, soy sauce, vegetable stock and simmer it for 4-5 minutes.
● Add coriander leaves, prepared wonton, salt to taste and cook for another 7-8 minutes or until it's cooked.
● Transfer it into the soup plate or bowl and garnish it with coriander sprig.
● Serve hot.

For Frying
● In a kadai, add oil for frying. Once it's hot, add prepared wontons and fry them until golden brown.
● Transfer it into the absorbent sheet and leave it aside for further use.


***********************

title: 10 mins में Paneer Lababdar | पनीर लबाबदार ढाबे जैसा | Dhaba style Paneer | Chef Ranveer Brar
description:
𝗗𝗛𝗔𝗕𝗔 𝗦𝗧𝗬𝗟𝗘 𝗣𝗔𝗡𝗘𝗘𝗥 𝗟𝗔𝗕𝗔𝗕𝗗𝗔𝗔𝗥 - (𝙎𝙚𝙚 𝙙𝙚𝙩𝙖𝙞𝙡𝙚𝙙 𝙩𝙚𝙭𝙩 𝙧𝙚𝙘𝙞𝙥𝙚 𝙗𝙚𝙡𝙤𝙬) Trust me, ye recipe बनेगी jhatpat, फटाफट and like never before! Your favourite Paneer masala, पनीर Lababdaar Dhaba style :)

***********************
𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡  𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣
🛒RB Store - https://www.amazon.in/shop/chefranveer
📟Kitchen Appliances - https://bit.ly/KitchenAppliancesIUse
🔪Knives I use - https://amzn.to/4kzSJVe

***********************
𝗥𝗘𝗖𝗜𝗣𝗘 𝗙𝗢𝗥 𝗗𝗛𝗔𝗕𝗔 𝗦𝗧𝗬𝗟𝗘 𝗣𝗔𝗡𝗘𝗘𝗥 𝗟𝗔𝗕𝗔𝗕𝗗𝗔𝗔𝗥
Preparation time 10 minutes
Cooking time 25-30 minutes
Serve 2-4 

Ingredients
For Dhaba Style Paneer Lababdar
2 tbsp Oil, तेल
1 large Onion (cut into cubes), प्याज
2-3 no. Green Chillies (less spicy & roughly chopped), हरी मिर्च
1 tbsp Ginger Garlic paste, अदरक लहसुन का पेस्ट
2 medium Tomatoes (roughly chopped), टमाटर
¾ cup Curd (beaten), दही
1 heaped tbsp Coriander powder, धनिया पाउडर
½ tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर
1 heaped tbsp Degi Red Chilli powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर
¼ tsp Cumin powder, जीरा पाउडर
2-3 medium Tomatoes (puree), टमाटर प्यूरी
1 inch Ginger (peeled & julienned), अदरक
1 cup Water, पानी
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
½ tsp Sugar, चीनी
1 cup Water, पानी
2-3 heaped tbsp Fresh cream, ताज़ा मलाई
Sauteed Paneer & Vegetables, भुना हुआ पनीर और सब्जियां

For Sauteing Paneer & Vegetables
2 tbsp Oil, तेल
800 gms Paneer (cut into dices), पनीर
1 medium Onion (cut into dices), प्याज
1 large Capsicum (cut into dices), शिमला मिर्च
2 medium Tomatoes (cut into dices), टमाटर
1 tbsp Degi Red Chilli powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर     
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
½ tbsp Dry Fenugreek leaves (crushed), कसूरी मेथी
1 tbsp Tender Coriander stems (finely chopped), धनिया के डंठल

For Garnish
Fresh cream, ताज़ा मलाई
Dry Fenugreek leaves (crushed), कसूरी मेथी
Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता

Process
For Dhaba Style Paneer Lababdar
● In a handi, add oil, once it's hot, add onion, green chillies and cook for 2-3 minutes.
● Add ginger garlic paste, tomato, curd, coriander powder, turmeric powder, degi red chilli powder, cumin powder and cook for another 4-5 minutes.
● Add tomato puree, ginger and let it cook for a while until oil separates from the masala.
● Add water, salt to taste, sugar, water and let it simmer for a while.
● Add fresh cream, sauteed paneer & vegetables and allow to cook for another 4-5 minutes.
● Transfer it into the serving dish and garnish it with fresh cream, crushed dry fenugreek leaves and coriander sprig.
● Serve hot with roti or naan.

For Sauteing Paneer & Vegetables
● In a pan, add oil, once it's hot, add paneer and fry the paneer on all sides until light brown in colour.
● Add onion, capsicum, tomatoes, degi red chilli powder, salt to taste, crushed dry fenugreek leaves, tender coriander stems and toss it on high flames for 2-3 minutes.
● Turn off the flames and keep it aside for further use.

***********************

title: UNIQUE Fish Curry | मच्छी करी ऑडीया style | Odia Machha Besara | Chef RanveerBrar
description:
𝗢𝗗𝗜𝗦𝗛𝗔 𝗦𝗧𝗬𝗟𝗘 𝗙𝗜𝗦𝗛 𝗖𝗨𝗥𝗥𝗬 (𝙊𝘿𝙄𝘼 𝙈𝘼𝘾𝙃𝙃𝘼 𝘽𝙀𝙎𝘼𝙍𝘼) - (𝙎𝙚𝙚 𝙙𝙚𝙩𝙖𝙞𝙡𝙚𝙙 𝙩𝙚𝙭𝙩 𝙧𝙚𝙘𝙞𝙥𝙚 𝙗𝙚𝙡𝙤𝙬) ये Fish Curry नहीं बनाई तो क्या बनाई! Odia Machha Besara में सरसों का तीखा स्वाद and desi style का ऐसा मेल है कि हर निवाला स्वाद से भर जाता है.

***********************
𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡  𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣
🛒RB Store - https://www.amazon.in/shop/chefranveer
📟Kitchen Appliances - https://bit.ly/KitchenAppliancesIUse
🔪Knives I use - https://amzn.to/4kzSJVe

***********************
𝗥𝗘𝗖𝗜𝗣𝗘 𝗙𝗢𝗥 𝗢𝗗𝗜𝗦𝗛𝗔 𝗦𝗧𝗬𝗟𝗘 𝗙𝗜𝗦𝗛 𝗖𝗨𝗥𝗥𝗬
Preparation time 10 minutes 
Cooking time 15-20 minutes 
Serve 2-4

Ingredients
For Mustard Paste
2-3 no. Green Chillies (roughly chopped), हरी मिर्च
4-5 no. Garlic cloves, लहसुन
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
¼ cup Yellow Mustard seeds (soak for 1hr), भिगोए हुए सरसों के बीज
2 tsp Degi Red Chilli powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर
1 tsp Cumin seeds, जीरा

For Fish Marination
1 kg Rohu Fish (cleaned & cut into darne), रोहू मछली
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
½ tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर
A pinch of Degi Red Chilli powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर

For Frying Fish
2-3 tbsp Mustard oil, सरसों का तेल
Marinated Fish, मैरिनेटेड मछली

For Odisha Style Fish Curry
Remaining oil, बचा हुआ तेल
½ tsp Fennel seeds, सौंफ
½ tsp Cumin seeds, जीरा
¼ tsp Fenugreek seeds, मेथी दाना
½ tsp small Mustard seeds, छोटी राई
½ tsp Nigella seeds, कलौंजी
1 ½ medium Onions (roughly sliced), प्याज
¼ cup Prepared Paste, तैयार की हुई पेस्ट
½ no. Raw Mango (peeled & cut into thick wedges), कच्चा आम
1 heaped tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर
½ tbsp Degi Red Chilli powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर
2 cups Water, पानी
1 tbsp Tender Coriander stems (finely chopped), धनिया के डंठल
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
½ tsp Sugar, चीनी
Fried Fish, तली हुई मछली
1 large Tomato (cut into dices), टमाटर

For Garnish
Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता    

Process
For Mustard Paste
● In a bowl, add green chillies, garlic, salt to taste, soaked yellow mustard seeds, degi red chilli powder, cumin seeds and mix it well.
● Transfer it into the mixer grinder jar and grind it into the smooth fine paste.
● Keep it aside for further use.

For Fish Marination
● In a tray or plate, add fish pieces, sprinkle salt to taste, turmeric powder, degi red chilli powder and marinate well.
● Keep it aside for further use.

For Frying Fish
● In a kadhai or handi, add mustard oil, once it's smoky hot, place marinated fish pieces and fry them until it's half cooked.
● Transfer it into the tray or absorbent sheet and keep it aside for further use.

For Odisha Style Fish Curry
● In the same kadhai or handi, add remaining oil, once it's hot, add fennel seeds, cumin seeds, fenugreek seeds, small mustard seeds, nigella seeds and splutter well.
● Add onions and cook it for 2-3 minutes or until it's translucent in texture.
● Add prepared mustard paste and cook for a while until oil separates from the masala.
● Now, add raw mango, turmeric powder, degi red chilli powder, water, tender coriander stems and let it simmer for 7-8 minutes.
● Add salt to taste, sugar, fried fish, tomato and cook for another 4-5 minutes or until it's cooked.
● Transfer it into the serving dish and garnish it with coriander sprig.
● Serve hot with steam rice.


***********************

small Onion (sliced), प्याज

title: Chilli Chicken | मशहूर कश्मीरी चिल्ली चिकन कांति | Kashmiri Chicken Kanti Starter | Chef Ranveer
description:
𝗞𝗔𝗦𝗛𝗠𝗜𝗥𝗜 𝗖𝗛𝗜𝗖𝗞𝗘𝗡 𝗞𝗔𝗔𝗡𝗧𝗜 - (𝙎𝙚𝙚 𝙙𝙚𝙩𝙖𝙞𝙡𝙚𝙙 𝙩𝙚𝙭𝙩 𝙧𝙚𝙘𝙞𝙥𝙚 𝙗𝙚𝙡𝙤𝙬) ऐसे बनाएं Spicy Kashmiri Chicken 65 कि बाकी सारे चिकन स्टार्टर्स भूल जाएंगे, guarantee! Crispy chicken, bold Kashmiri flavors, and a fiery masala make this starter absolutely irresistible.

***********************
𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡  𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣
🛒RB Store - https://www.amazon.in/shop/chefranveer
📟Kitchen Appliances - https://bit.ly/KitchenAppliancesIUse
🔪Knives I use - https://amzn.to/4kzSJVe

***********************
𝗥𝗘𝗖𝗜𝗣𝗘 𝗙𝗢𝗥 Kashmiri Chicken Kaanti
Preparation time 10 minutes 
Cooking time 15- 20 minutes 
Serve 2-4 

Ingredients
For Chicken Marination
1 kg Chicken Thighs, चिकन
1 tbsp Ginger Garlic paste, अदरक लहसुन का पेस्ट
1 tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर
1 heaped tbsp Degi Red Chilli powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर
1 tsp Garam Masala powder, गरम मसाला पाउडर
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
2 tsp Mustard oil, सरसों का तेल
1 tsp Fennel powder, सौंफ पाउडर
1 tsp Dried Ginger powder, सौंठ का पाउडर
¼ cup Cornstarch, कॉर्नस्टार्च
1-2 tbsp Rice flour, चावल का आटा
Little water, थोड़ा पानी

For Frying Chicken,
Oil for frying, तलने के लिए तेल
Marinated Chicken, मैरिनेटेड चिकन

For Onion Tomato Salad
1-2 large Onions (sliced), प्याज
1 tbsp Tender Coriander stems (finely chopped), धनिया के डंठल
1 tbsp Vinegar,सिरका
2-4 no. Green Chillies (less spicy & roughly chopped), हरी मिर्च
1 large Tomato (sliced), टमाटर
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
½ tbsp Degi Red Chilli powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर
1 tsp Fennel powder, सौंफ पाउडर
1 tsp Dried Ginger powder, सौंठ का पाउडर
1 tsp Mint leaves (roughly torn), पुदीने का पत्ता
1-2 tsp Coriander powder, धनिया पाउडर
1-2 tbsp Fresh Coriander leaves (roughly chopped), धनिया पत्ता
 2-3 no. Garlic cloves (sliced), लहसुन

For Chicken Kaanti
Remaining Oil, बचा हुआ तेल
Prepared Onion Tomato Salad, तैयार किया हुआ प्याज टमाटर का सलाद
1-2 tsp Tomato Ketchup, टमाटर केचप
Fried Chicken, तला हुआ चिकन
1-2 tbsp Fresh Coriander leaves (roughly chopped), धनिया पत्ता

For Garnish
Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता

Process
For Chicken Marination
• In a bowl, add chicken, ginger garlic paste, turmeric powder, degi red chilli powder, garam masala powder.
• Add salt to taste, mustard oil, fennel powder, dried ginger powder, cornstarch, rice flour, little water and marinate well.
• Keep it aside for further use.

For Frying Chicken
• In a kadai, add oil for frying. Once it's hot, add marinated chicken pieces and fry them until otis cooked.
• Transfer it into the absorbent sheet and keep it aside for further use.

For Onion Tomato Tomato Salad
• In a bowl, add onions, tender coriander stems, vinegar, green chillies, tomato, salt to taste.
• Add degi red chilli powder, fennel powder, dried ginger powder, mint leaves, coriander powder, fresh coriander leaves, garlic and give it a good mix.

For Chicken Kaanti
• In a wok or kadai, add remaining oil, once it's hot, add prepared onion tomato salad and cook for 4-5 minutes on high flames.
• Add tomato ketchup, fried chicken, give it a good mix and cook for another 2-3 minutes.
• Finish it with fresh coriander leaves and give it a good mix.
• Transfer it into the serving dish and garnish it with coriander sprig.
• Serve hot.

title: ऐसी चटपटी गोभी कि रोटी कम पढ़ जाए! Unique Banarasi Gobi | spl Gobhi masala | Chef Ranveer Brar
description:
𝗕𝗔𝗡𝗔𝗥𝗔𝗦𝗜 𝗚𝗢𝗕𝗛𝗜 - (𝙎𝙚𝙚 𝙙𝙚𝙩𝙖𝙞𝙡𝙚𝙙 𝙩𝙚𝙭𝙩 𝙧𝙚𝙘𝙞𝙥𝙚 𝙗𝙚𝙡𝙤𝙬) Lost recipes are our pride! Like this Banarasi style Gobi that I bet you didn't know before :) ऐसे बनाएं गोभी ki बाकी सब भूल jayenge, guarantee.

***********************
𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡  𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣
🛒RB Store - https://www.amazon.in/shop/chefranveer
📟Kitchen Appliances - https://bit.ly/KitchenAppliancesIUse
🔪Knives I use - https://amzn.to/4kzSJVe

***********************
𝗥𝗘𝗖𝗜𝗣𝗘 𝗙𝗢𝗥 𝗕𝗔𝗡𝗔𝗥𝗔𝗦𝗜 𝗚𝗢𝗕𝗛𝗜
Preparation time 10 minutes 
Cooking time 15-20 minutes 
Serve 2-4

Ingredients 
For Cleaning Cauliflower
1 large Cauliflower (washed), फूलगोभी
Water as required, पानी
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
ya
For Soaking Tamarind
Warm Water, गर्म पानी
½ cup Tamarind, इमली

For Roasting Cauliflower
2 tbsp Oil, तेल
2-3 tbsp Ghee, घी 
1 large Cauliflower (washed & cleaned), फूलगोभी
2 tbsp Ghee, घी

For Banarasi Gobhi 
Remaining Oil & Ghee, बचा हुआ तेल और घी
1 inch Ginger (peeled & julienned), अदरक 
4-5 no. Green Chillies (less spicy & chopped), हरी मिर्च
1 tbsp Tender Coriander stem (chopped), धनिये के डंठल
½ tsp small Mustard seeds, सरसों के बीज
½ tsp Nigella seeds, कलौंजी
2 tbsp Coriander powder, धनिया पाउडर
½ tbsp Degi Red Chilli powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर
A pinch of Asafoetida, हींग
1 tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
1 cup Water, पानी
Roasted Cauliflower, भुनी हुई फूलगोभी
8-10 no. Raisins, किशमिश
½ tbsp Dry Fenugreek leaves (crushed), कसूरी मेथी
1 cup Soaked Tamarind water, भीगी हुई इमली का पानी
1-2 tsp Sugar, चीनी
Prepared tadka, तैयार किया हुआ तड़का

For Tadka
2 tbsp Ghee, घी
2 tbsp Oil, तेल 
3-4 no. Dry Kashmiri Red Chillies (roughly chopped), सूखी कश्मीरी लाल मिर्च
A pinch of Asafoetida, हींग
¼ tsp each Fennel & Cumin seeds, सौंफ और जीरा
8-10 no. Cashew Nuts, काजू

For Garnish
Namkeen Boondi, नमकीन बूंदी
Green Chillies (sliced), हरी मिर्च
Ginger (julienned), अदरक 
Curd (beaten), दही
Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता
A pinch of Degi Red Chilli powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर

Process 
For Cleaning Cauliflower
● In a bowl, add water as required, salt to taste and mix well.
● Add cauliflower and keep it aside for a while.

For Soaking Tamarind
● In a bowl, add warm water and tamarind, give it a good mix and let it soak for a while.
● Keep it aside for further use.

For Roasting Cauliflower
● In a handi or pan, add oil, ghee, once it is hot, add cauliflower and cook for 4-5 minutes or until it's half cooked.
● Add ghee, cover it with the lid and let it cook for 2-3 minutes.
● Transfer it to a plate or absorbent sheet and keep it aside for further use.

For Banarasi Gobhi
● In the same handi, add remaining oil & ghee, once hot, add ginger, green chillies, tender coriander stems, small mustard seeds, nigella seeds and cook for 2 minutes.
● Add coriander powder, degi red chilli powder, a pinch of asafoetida, turmeric powder, salt to taste and cook for a minute.
● Add water and give it a quick boil.
● Add roasted cauliflower, raisins, cover it with the lid and let it cook for 4-5 minutes.
● Now, add crushed dry fenugreek leaves, soaked tamarind water, sugar, cover it with the lid and cook for a while or until it's cooked.
● Finish it with prepared tadka and give it a good mix.
● Transfer it into the serving platter, garnish it with namkeen boondi, green chilli, ginger, curd, coriander sprig and a pinch of degi red chilli powder.
● Serve hot with poori.

For Tadka
● In a pan, add ghee, oil, once it's hot, add dry kashmiri red chillies, a pinch of asafoetida, fennel & cumin seeds, cashew nuts and cook for 1-2 minutes.
● Turn off the flames and keep it aside for further use.

title: unseen Kathi Roll recipe! नायाब चिकन काठी रोल | kashmiri Chutney bonus Chicken Roll | Ranveer Brar
description:
𝗞𝗔𝗦𝗛𝗠𝗜𝗥𝗜 𝗖𝗛𝗜𝗖𝗞𝗘𝗡 𝗞𝗔𝗧𝗛𝗜 𝗥𝗢𝗟𝗟 - (𝙎𝙚𝙚 𝙙𝙚𝙩𝙖𝙞𝙡𝙚𝙙 𝙩𝙚𝙭𝙩 𝙧𝙚𝙘𝙞𝙥𝙚 𝙗𝙚𝙡𝙤𝙬) नरम रोटी, juicy चिकन aur कश्मीरी मसालों का भरपूर स्वाद 🌯 प्याज़ aur मूली की chutney ke saath yeh roll har bite mein flavour ka ek naya surprise lekar aata hai!

***********************
𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡  𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣
🛒RB Store - https://www.amazon.in/shop/chefranveer
📟Kitchen Appliances - https://bit.ly/KitchenAppliancesIUse
🔪Knives I use - https://amzn.to/4kzSJVe

***********************
𝗥𝗘𝗖𝗜𝗣𝗘 𝗙𝗢𝗥  Kashmiri Chicken Kathi Roll 
Preparation time 10-15 minutes 
Cooking time 15-20 minutes 
Serve 2-4

Ingredients 
For Dough 
1 cup Whole Wheat flour, गेहूं का आटा
1 cup Refined flour, मैदा
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
1 tsp Sugar, चीनी
½ tsp Vinegar, सिरका
Water as required, पानी
1 tsp Oil, तेल
¼ tsp Baking soda, बेकिंग सोडा
¼ tsp Baking powder, बेकिंग पाउडर

For Chicken Marination 
1kg Chicken Thighs, चिकन 
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
½ tbsp Ginger Garlic paste, अदरक लहसुन का पेस्ट
1 tsp Coriander powder, धनिया पाउडर
½ tsp Cumin powder, जीरा पाउडर
A pinch of Garam masala, गरम मसाला
1 tsp Degi Red Chilli powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर
½ tsp Fennel powder, सौंफ पाउडर
1 tbsp Gram flour, बेसन
½ tsp Vinegar, सिरका
2-3 tbsp Mustard oil, सरसों का तेल

For Pyaz Ki Chutney
2 medium Onion (sliced), प्याज
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
½ tsp Vinegar, सिरका
1 tsp Degi Red Chilli powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर
½ tsp Cumin powder, जीरा पाउडर

For Mooli Ki Chutney
1 no. Radish (peeled, sliced & crushed), मूली
1 no. Radish (peeled & grated), मूली
1 cup Radish Leaves (chopped), मूली के पत्ते
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
¼ cup Walnuts (crushed), अखरोट
¼ tsp Degi Red Chilli powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर
1 no. Green Chilli (chopped), हरी मिर्च
2 tbsp fresh Coriander leaves (finely chopped), धनिया पत्ता
1 tbsp Oil, तेल
½ tsp Cumin seeds, जीरा
¾ cup Curd (beaten), दही
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार

For Cooking Chicken
1-2 tbsp Oil, तेल
Marinated Chicken, मैरिनेटेड चिकन

For Assembling Kathi Roll
Prepared roti, तैयार की हुई रोटी
Prepared Mooli Ki Chutney, तैयार है की हुई मूली की चटनी
Cooked Chicken, पका हुआ चिकन
Prepared Pyaz Ki Chutney, तैयार की हुई प्याज की चटनी

Process 
For Dough 
• In a bowl, add whole wheat flour, refined flour, salt to taste, sugar, vinegar, and water as required.
• Knead into a semi-soft dough.
• Flatten the dough, make a well in the center, add oil, baking soda, and baking powder, then knead until smooth.
• Divide the dough into lemon-sized balls.
• Roll each ball into a semi-thick roti.
• Heat tawa on medium flame, place the roti on it, and cook well on both sides.
• Transfer to a plate and keep aside for further use.

For Chicken Marination 
• In a bowl, add chicken thighs, salt to taste, ginger garlic paste, coriander powder, cumin powder, garam masala powder, degi red chilli powder, fennel powder, gram flour, vinegar, hot mustard oil and marinate well. 
• Keep aside for further use. 

For Cooking Chicken 
• Heat oil in a pan,  once hot, add the marinated chicken pieces one by one and cook until tender. 
• Transfer to a tray and keep aside for further use. 

For Pyaz ki Chutney 
• In a bowl, add onions, salt to taste, vinegar, degi red chilli powder, and cumin powder, mix well. 
• Keep it aside for further use.

For Mooli ki Chutney 
• In a bowl, add sliced radish, grated radish, radish leaves, salt to taste, walnuts, degi red chilli powder. 
• Add green chilli, fresh coriander leaves, oil, cumin seeds, curd, salt to taste and mix well. 

For Assembling Kathi Roll. 
• Place the cooked roti on a flat surface.
• Add mooli ki chutney, cooked chicken, and pyaz ki chutney.
• Roll tightly to form a kathi roll.
• Transfer to a serving platter and garnish with a coriander sprig.
• Serve hot with pyaz ki chutney and mooli ki chutney.

title: 4 types of cold Coffee| कैफ़े cold coffee secrets | quick and easy Summer spl | Chef Ranveer Brar

𝗥𝗘𝗖𝗜𝗣𝗘 𝗙𝗢𝗥  4 Types of Coffee 
Preparation time 10 minutes
Cooking time 10 minutes
Serve 2-4 

Ingredients
For Caramel Sauce
100 gms Sugar, चीनी
2 tbsp Water, पानी
¼ cup Fresh cream, ताज़ा क्रीम

For Classic Cold Coffee
2-3 tbsp Hot water, गर्म पानी
2 tbsp Sugar, चीनी
1 tbsp Instant Coffee powder, इंस्टेंट कॉफ़ी पाउडर
2-3 no. Iced cubes, बर्फ के टुकड़े
1 cup Milk, दूध
2-3 tbsp Fresh cream, ताज़ा क्रीम
1 scoop Vanilla ice cream, वेनिला आइसक्रीम

For Banana Cold Coffee
2 no. Ripe Bananas, केले
2-3 heaped tbsp Prepared Caramel sauce, तैयार किया हुआ कैरामल सॉस
2 tbsp Instant Coffee powder, इंस्टेंट कॉफ़ी पाउडर
1 cup Milk, दूध
2-3 no. Iced cubes, बर्फ के टुकड़े
2-3 no. Iced cubes, बर्फ के टुकड़े

For Dalgona Cold Coffee
45 gms Instant Coffee powder, इंस्टेंट कॉफ़ी पाउडर
90 ml Hot water, गर्म पानी
45 gms Sugar, चीनी
1 cup Milk, दूध
2-3 no. Iced cubes, बर्फ के टुकड़े
Prepared Dalgona foam, तैयार किया हुआ डालगोना फोम

For Caramel Dalgona Cold Coffee
2-3 no. Iced cubes, बर्फ के टुकड़े
1 tbsp Prepared Caramel sauce, तैयार किया हुआ कैरामल सॉस
1 cup Milk, दूध
Prepared Dalgona foam, तैयार किया हुआ डालगोना फोम

For Garnish
Vanilla ice cream, वेनिला आइसक्रीम
A pinch of Instant Coffee powder, इंस्टेंट कॉफ़ी पाउडर
Prepared Caramel sauce, तैयार किया हुआ कैरामल सॉस

Process
For Caramel Sauce
• In a saucepan, add sugar, water, give it a good mix and cook for 4-5 minutes until sugar gets caramelized.
• Turn off the flames, add fresh cream and give it a good mix.
• Transfer it into the bowl and leave it aside for further use.

For Cold Coffee
• In a blender jar, add hot water, sugar, instant coffee powder, ice cubes, milk and blend for a minute or until it's frothy.
• Add fresh cream, ice creams and blend it once again for a minute.
• Transfer it into the serving glass and top up with a scoop of vanilla ice cream and sprinkle some instant coffee powder.
• Serve cold.
For Banana Cold Coffee
• In a blender jar, add bananas, prepared caramel sauce, instant coffee powder, milk, ice cubes and blend for a minute or until it's frothy.
• Transfer it into the serving glass, add ice cubes and sprinkle some instant coffee powder.
• Serve cold.

For Dalgona Cold Coffee
• In a bowl, add instant coffee powder, hot water, sugar and whisk it with the help of a hand blender to form foamy and frothy texture.
• Transfer it into any flat container and keep it in a freezer for 4-5 hrs.
• In a serving glass, add milk, ice cubes, top it up with prepared dalgona foam.
• Serve cold.

For Caramel Dalgona Cold Coffee
• In a serving bowl, add ice cubes, prepared caramel sauce, milk and give it a good mix.
• top it up with prepared dalgona foam.
• Serve cold.
    
***********************

title: Viral Bang Bang Chicken | 2 ज़बरदस्त चिली चिकन | crisy spicy chicken recipe |Chef Ranveer Brar
description:
𝗕𝗔𝗡𝗚 𝗕𝗔𝗡𝗚 𝗖𝗛𝗜𝗖𝗞𝗘𝗡 - (𝙎𝙚𝙚 𝙙𝙚𝙩𝙖𝙞𝙡𝙚𝙙 𝙩𝙚𝙭𝙩 𝙧𝙚𝙘𝙞𝙥𝙚 𝙗𝙚𝙡𝙤𝙬) Crispy चिकन, bold flavours aur 2 ज़बरदस्त सॉस का combo. हर bite mein crunch, spice aur flavour ka perfect balance. चिकन lovers ke liye एकदम must-try! 

***********************
𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡  𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣
🛒RB Store - https://www.amazon.in/shop/chefranveer
📟Kitchen Appliances - https://bit.ly/KitchenAppliancesIUse
🔪Knives I use - https://amzn.to/4kzSJVe

***********************
𝗥𝗘𝗖𝗜𝗣𝗘 𝗙𝗢𝗥  Bang Bang Chicken 
Preparation time 10-15 minutes 
Cooking time 10-15 minutes 
Serve 2-4 

Ingredients 
For Chicken Marination
500 gms Chicken thighs, चिकन
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
1 heaped tsp Ginger Garlic paste, अदरक लहसुन का पेस्ट
1 tsp Oil, तेल
1 tbsp Degi Red Chilli powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर
1 tbsp Prepared American sauce, तैयार किया हुआ अमेरिकन सॉस
½ tsp Black Peppercorns (crushed), कुटी हुई काली मिर्च
2-3 no. Garlic cloves (grated), लहसुन

For American Style Sauce
2-3 heaped tbsp Mayonnaise, मेयोनेज़
2 tbsp Hot sauce, हॉट सॉस
1 heaped tbsp Sweet Chilli sauce, स्वीट चिली सॉस
1 tbsp Tomato ketchup, टमाटर केचप

For Schezwan Style Sauce
2 tbsp White Sesame seeds, सफेद तिल
1-2 tsp Chilli Oil, मिर्च का तेल
⅓ cup Roasted Peanuts, भुनी हुई मूंगफली
1-2 tsp Dark soy sauce, डार्क सोया सॉस
Little water, पानी
1 no. Green Chilli (roughly chopped), हरी मिर्च
1-2 tbsp Spring Onion bulbs (roughly chopped), हरी प्याज
2 tbsp fresh Coriander leaves (finely chopped), धनिया पत्ता
2 tbsp Spring Onion (chopped), हरी प्याज
1-2 no. Green Chillies (chopped), हरी मिर्च
½ inch Ginger (peeled & finely chopped), अदरक
1-2 tsp Malt Vinegar, मॉल्ट सिरका
1-2 tsp Dark soy sauce, डार्क सोया सॉस
1-2 tbsp Chilli oil, मिर्च का तेल
2 tbsp Remaining excess oil, बचा हुआ तेल
1 heaped tbsp Prepared Paste, तैयार किया हुआ पेस्ट
1-2 tbsp Water, पानी
1 tsp White Sesame seeds, सफेद तिल

For Cooking Chicken
Oil for shallow frying, तलने के लिए तेल
Marinated Chicken, मैरिनेटेड चिकन

For Garnish
Cucumber (sliced), खीरा
White Sesame seeds, सफेद तिल
Chilli oil, मिर्च का तेल
Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता 

Process
For Chicken Marination
 • In a bowl, add chicken, salt to taste, ginger garlic paste, oil, degi red chilli powder, prepared american sauce, crushed black peppercorns, garlic and marinate well.
 • Keep it aside for further use.

For American Style Sauce
 • In a bowl, add mayonnaise, hot sauce, sweet chilli sauce, tomato ketchup and give it a good mix.
 • Keep it aside for further use.

For Schezwan Style Sauce
 • In a bowl, add white sesame seeds, chilli oil, roasted peanuts, dark soy sauce and a little water.
 • Add green chilli, spring onion bulbs, spring onion, green chilli, ginger, malt vinegar, dark soy sauce, chilli oil, remaining excess oil and give it a good mix.
 • Transfer it into the mixer grinder jar and grind it into a smooth fine paste.
 • In a bowl, add prepared paste, water, white sesame seeds and give it a good mix.
 • Keep it aside for further use.

For Cooking Chicken
 • In a pan, add oil, once it's hot, add marinated chicken pieces and cook for 4-5 minutes on each side.
 • Flip the chicken and cook once again for a while or until it's cooked.
 • Transfer it into the serving dish, garnish it with sliced cucumber, white sesame seeds, chilli oil and coriander sprig.
 • Serve hot with prepared american & schezwan sauce.

title: 10 mins में Paneer Pepper Fry🌶️ | काली मिर्च पनीर | झटपट Paneer recipe | Chef Ranveer Brar
description:
𝗣𝗔𝗡𝗘𝗘𝗥 𝗣𝗘𝗣𝗣𝗘𝗥 𝗙𝗥𝗬 - (𝙎𝙚𝙚 𝘿𝙚𝙩𝙖𝙞𝙡𝙚𝙙 𝙍𝙚𝙘𝙞𝙥𝙚 𝘽𝙚𝙡𝙤𝙬) Simple ingredients, but flavours एक दम bold. Kali mirch का warmth, curry patta का aroma & perfectly tossed paneer. And best part, 10 mins में ready!

***********************
𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡  𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣
🛒RB Store - https://www.amazon.in/shop/chefranveer
📟Kitchen Appliances - https://bit.ly/KitchenAppliancesIUse
🔪Knives I use - https://amzn.to/4kzSJVe

***********************
𝗥𝗘𝗖𝗜𝗣𝗘 𝗙𝗢𝗥 𝗣𝗔𝗡𝗘𝗘𝗥 𝗣𝗘𝗣𝗣𝗘𝗥 𝗙𝗥𝗬
Preparation time 10 minutes 
Cooking time 20-25 minutes 
Serve 2-4

Ingredients 
For Paste

3-4 medium Onions,  प्याज
4-5 no. Green Chillies (less spicy & roughly chopped), हरी मिर्च
5-6 no. Garlic cloves, लहसुन 
1 inch Ginger (peeled & roughly sliced), अदरक
1 tbsp Tender Coriander stems (roughly chopped), धनिया के डंठल
2-3 sprig Curry leaves, कडी पत्ते
6-7 no. Cloves, लौंग
1-2 no. Black Cardamom, बड़ी इलायची
3-4 no. Green Cardamom, हरी इलायची
¼ inch Cinnamon stick, दालचीनी
2-3 tbsp Oil, तेल
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार

For Paneer Pepper Fry 

2-3 tbsp Oil, तेल
2 no. Garlic cloves (chopped), लहसुन
2 sprig Curry leaves, कडी पत्ते
1 medium Onion (sliced), प्याज
2 no. Green Chillies (less spicy & sliced), हरी मिर्च
Prepared Paste, तैयार की हुई पेस्ट
1 tsp Black Peppercorns (crushed), कुटी हुई काली मिर्च
1 tbsp Coriander powder, धनिया पाउडर
½ tsp Degi Red Chilli powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर
½ cup Water, पानी
2 sprig Curry leaves, कडी पत्ते
1 large Tomato (cut into quarters), टमाटर 
Fried Paneer, तला हुआ पनीर
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
1 tsp Black peppercorns (crushed), कुटी हुई काली मिर्च
1 tsp Lemon juice, नींबू का रस
1 sprig Curry leaves (roughly torn), कडी पत्ते
2 tbsp fresh Coriander leaves (finely chopped), धनिया पत्ता


For Frying Paneer

800 gms Paneer (cut into cubed), पनीर
Oil for frying, तलने के लिए तेल

For Garnish
Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता

Process

For Paste

In a bowl, add onions, green chillies, garlic, ginger, tender coriander stems and curry leaves.
Add cloves, black cardamom, green cardamom, cinnamon stick, oil, salt to taste and mix it well.
Transfer it into the mixer grinder jar and grind it into the smooth fine paste.
Keep it aside for further use.

For Paneer Pepper Fry

In a handi, add oil, once it's hot, garlic, curry leaves, onion and cook for 2-3 minutes.
Add green chillies, prepared paste and cook for a while until oil separates from the masala.
Add crushed black peppercorns, coriander powder, degi red chilli powder, water and cook for a minute.
Add curry leaves, tomato, fried paneer, salt to taste and let it cook for another 4-5 minutes on medium flames.

Finish it with crushed black peppercorns, lemon juice, curry leaves, fresh coriander leaves and give it a good mix.

Transfer it into the serving dish and garnish it with coriander sprig.

Serve hot with malabari parotta.

For Frying Paneer

In a kadhai, add oil for frying. Once it's hot, add paneer and cook for 5-6 minutes until it's light brown in colour.

Transfer it into the absorbent sheet and keep it aside for further use.
***********************

title: Punjabi Meat pulao | देसी मटन वाले चावल | Punjabi Mutton biryani recipe | Chef Ranveer Brar
description:
𝗣𝗨𝗡𝗝𝗔𝗕𝗜 𝗠𝗘𝗔𝗧 𝗪𝗔𝗟𝗘 𝗖𝗛𝗔𝗪𝗔𝗟 - (𝙎𝙚𝙚 𝙙𝙚𝙩𝙖𝙞𝙡𝙚𝙙 𝙩𝙚𝙭𝙩 𝙧𝙚𝙘𝙞𝙥𝙚 𝙗𝙚𝙡𝙤𝙬) Garma garam चावल, juicy मटन aur देसी घी ki woh khushboo… पंजाबी घरों mein Meat Wale चावल sirf khaana nahi, poora comfort emotion hai. 

***********************
𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡  𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣
🛒RB Store - https://www.amazon.in/shop/chefranveer
📟Kitchen Appliances - https://bit.ly/KitchenAppliancesIUse
🔪Knives I use - https://amzn.to/4kzSJVe

***********************
𝗥𝗘𝗖𝗜𝗣𝗘 𝗙𝗢𝗥 𝗣𝗨𝗡𝗝𝗔𝗕𝗜 𝗠𝗘𝗔𝗧 𝗪𝗔𝗟𝗘 𝗖𝗛𝗔𝗪𝗔𝗟
Preparation time 10 minutes 
Cooking time 35-40 minutes 
Serve 2-4 

Ingredients
For Cooking Mutton
2-3 tbsp Oil, तेल
2 tbsp Ghee, घी
3 medium Onions (sliced), प्याज
1 ½ kg Mutton with bones, मटन
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
1 heaped tbsp Ginger Garlic paste, अदरक लहसुन का पेस्ट
3-4 no. Green Cardamom, हरी इलायची
3-4 no. Cloves, लौंग
½ no. Mace, जावित्री
2 no. Black Cardamom, बड़ी इलायची
3-4 no. Green Chillies (less spicy & roughly chopped), हरी मिर्च
Prepared Curd Mixture, तैयार किया हुआ दही का मिश्रण
2-3 heaped tbsp Fried Onions, तले हुए प्याज
¼ cup fresh Coriander leaves (finely chopped), धनिया पत्ता

For Curd Mixture
2 cups Curd (beaten), दही
2 heaped tsp Degi Red Chilli powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर
1 tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर
½ tsp Cumin powder, जीरा पाउडर
1 heaped tbsp Coriander powder, धनिया पाउडर

For Punjabi Meat Wale Chawal
2-3 tbsp Oil, तेल
2 tbsp Ghee, घी
2 medium Onion (sliced), प्याज
½ inch Cinnamon stick, दालचीनी
2-3 no. Bay leaf, तेज पत्ता
4-5 no. Cloves, लौंग
7-8 no. Black Peppercorns, काली मिर्च के दाने
2 no. Black Cardamom, बड़ी इलायची
Cooked Mutton, पका हुआ मटन
1 tbsp Tender Coriander stems with roots (chopped), धनिया के डंठल और जड़ें
1 tbsp Mint leaves (chopped), पुदीने का पत्ता
1 tbsp Black Peppercorns (crushed), कुटी हुई काली मिर्च
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
2-3 cups Water, पानी
700 gms Sella Basmati Rice (soak for ½ hr), भीगे हुए सेला बासमती चावल
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
2-3 cups Water, पानी

For Raita
½ tsp Fennel seeds, सौंफ
¼ tsp Fenugreek seeds, मेथी दाना
1 tsp Cumin seeds, जीरा
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
1 tbsp Chilli flakes, कुटी हुई लाल मिर्च
2 cups Curd (beaten), दही
Prepared Masala, तैयार किया हुआ मसाला

For Garnish
Fried onions, तले हुए प्याज
Mint sprig, पुदीने का पत्ता
Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता

Process
For Cooking Mutton
 • In a pressure cooker, add oil, ghee, once it's hot, add onions, mutton with bones and cook for a while.
 • Add salt to taste, ginger garlic paste, green cardamom, cloves, mace, black cardamom and cook for 2-3 minutes.
 • Now, add green chillies, prepared curd mixture and cook for another 4-5 minutes until oil separates from the masala.
 • Add fried onion, fresh coriander leaves, give it a good mix, cover it with the lid and cook for 7-8 whistles or until mutton gets 80-90% cooked.
 • Leave it aside to depressurize the cooker for a while.

For Curd Mixture
 • In a bowl, add curd, degi red chili powder, turmeric powder, cumin powder, coriander powder and give it a good mix.
 • Keep it aside for further use.

For Punjabi Meat Wale Chawal
 • In a handi, add oil, ghee, once it's hot, add onion and cook for 4-5 minutes until onions turn light brown in colour.
 • Add cinnamon stick, bay leaf, cloves, black peppercorns, black cardamom and cook for a minute.
 • Add cooked mutton, tender coriander stems, mint leaves, crushed black peppercorns, salt to taste, water and give it a quick boil.
 • Add soaked sella basmati rice, salt to taste, water, give it a good mix, cover it with the lid and let it cook for 12-15 minutes until it's cooked.
 • Transfer the pulao into the serving dish, garnish it with fried onions, mint sprig and coriander sprig.
 • Serve hot with prepared raita.

For Raita
 • In a pan, add fennel seeds, cumin seeds, fenugreek seeds, salt to taste, roast for 2-3 minutes until it's aromatic.
 • Add chilli flakes and roast for a minute.
 • Transfer it into the mortar pestle and grind it into the coarse powder.
 • Transfer the powder into the bowl, add curd and give it a good mix.
 • Keep it aside for further use.


***********************

title: Best Chaat for Summers | चटपटा रगड़ा पापड़ी चाट घर पे | Viral Ragda Papdi Chaat | Chef Ranveer Brar
description:
𝗥𝗔𝗚𝗗𝗔 𝗣𝗔𝗣𝗗𝗜 𝗖𝗛𝗔𝗔𝗧 - (𝙎𝙚𝙚 𝙙𝙚𝙩𝙖𝙞𝙡𝙚𝙙 𝙩𝙚𝙭𝙩 𝙧𝙚𝙘𝙞𝙥𝙚 𝙗𝙚𝙡𝙤𝙬) Elders say Chaats are best for summers! Why not?? हमें तो बस बहाना चाहिए :) Aur aapko?

***********************
𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡  𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣
🛒RB Store - https://www.amazon.in/shop/chefranveer
📟Kitchen Appliances - https://bit.ly/KitchenAppliancesIUse
🔪Knives I use - https://amzn.to/4kzSJVe

***********************
𝗥𝗘𝗖𝗜𝗣𝗘 𝗙𝗢𝗥 𝗥𝗔𝗚𝗗𝗔 𝗣𝗔𝗣𝗗𝗜 𝗖𝗛𝗔𝗔𝗧
Preparation time 10 minutes
Cooking time 20-25 minutes
Serve 2-4 

Ingredients 
For Ragda
2 tbsp Ghee, घी
500 gms White Peas (soaked overnight), भिगोए हुए सफेद वटाना
3-4 cups Water, पानी
1 tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर
½ tsp Degi Red Chilli powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर
A pinch of Asafoetida, हींग
2 medium Potatoes (peeled & diced), आलू
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
1-2 tbsp Ghee, घी

For Dough 
1 cup Refined flour, मैदा
1 cup Wheat flour, गेहूं का आटा
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
¼ tsp Carom seeds, अजवाइन
2 tbsp Semolina, सूजी
2-3 tbsp Oil, तेल
Water as required, पानी
1 tbsp Semolina, सूजी

For Flour & Ghee Mixture
1-2 tbsp Ghee, घी
2-3 tbsp Refined flour, मैदा

For Salad
3-4 no. Green Chillies (less spicy & finely chopped), हरी मिर्च
1 ½ medium Onions (chopped), प्याज
1 large Tomato (chopped), टमाटर
½ inch Ginger (peeled & grated), अदरक
⅓ cup fresh Coriander leaves (chopped), धनिया पत्ता
1-2 tsp Lemon juice, नींबू का रस
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार

Other Ingredients 
Oil for frying, तेल तलने के लि
For Assembling Ragda Papdi Chaat
Cooked Ragda, पका हुआ रगड़ा
Tamarind Chutney, इमली की चटनी
Green Chutney, हरी चटनी
Prepared Salad, तैयार किया हुआ सलाद
Pomegranate pearls, अनार के दाने
Nylon sev, सेव
Namkeen Chana dal, नमकीन चना दाल
Ladi pav, लादी पाव

For Garnish 
Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता
Lemon wedge, नींबू की फांक

Process 
For Ragda
● In a pressure cooker, add ghee, once it's hot, add soaked white peas, water, turmeric powder, degi red chilli powder, a pinch of asafoetida, potatoes and give it a good mix.
● Cover it with the lid and let it cook for 3-4 whistles or until it's cooked.
● Leave it aside to depressurize the cooker.
● Open the lid and mash the ragda until it's mushy in texture.
● Add salt to taste, ghee and give it a good mix.

For Dough
● In a bowl or parat, add refined flour, wheat flour, salt to taste, carom seeds, semolina, oil, water and knead it into semisoft dough.
● Add semolina and knead it well.
● Cover it with the damp cloth and leave it aside for resting.
● Divide the dough into small lemon size balls and flatten it with a rolling pin to make thin roti into it.
● Apply flour & ghee mixture evenly and fold into half to form moon shape.
Once again, apply flour & ghee mixture evenly and fold it into another half to make papdi.
● Drop one by one prepared papdis into the moderately hot oil and fry them until nice golden brown in colour and crispy in texture.
● Transfer it into the absorbent sheet and leave it aside for a while.

For Flour & Ghee Mixture
● In a bowl, add ghee, refined flour and give it a good mix.
● Keep it aside for further use.

For Salad
● In a bowl, add green chillies, onions, tomato, ginger, fresh coriander leaves, lemon juice, salt to taste and mix everything well.
● Keep it aside for further use.

For Assembling Ragda Papdi Chaat
● In a serving dish, add cooked ragda, spoonful of tamarind chutney, green chutney, prepared salad, pomegranate pearls, nylon sev and namkeen chana dal.
● Garnish it with coriander sprig.
● Serve warm with fried papdi and ladi pav.

title: Street Style Veg Chowmein | आसान चाउमीन घर पर | easy Chowmein recipe | Chef Ranveer Brar
description:
Veg Chowmein (𝙎𝙚𝙚 𝙙𝙚𝙩𝙖𝙞𝙡𝙚𝙙 𝙩𝙚𝙭𝙩 𝙧𝙚𝙘𝙞𝙥𝙚 𝙗𝙚𝙡𝙤𝙬) The perfect Noodles, crunchy veggies, सही choice of sauces and that “bas एक और bite” वाली feeling. Masterchow brings back the Street-style Veg Chowmein jaisa comfort.

***********************
𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡  𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣
🛒RB Store - https://www.amazon.in/shop/chefranveer
📟Kitchen Appliances - https://bit.ly/KitchenAppliancesIUse
🔪Knives I use - https://amzn.to/4kzSJVe

***********************
𝗥𝗘𝗖𝗜𝗣𝗘 𝗙𝗢𝗥  Veg Chowmein 
Preparation time 5-10 minutes
Cooking time 10-15 minutes
Serve 2

Ingredients 
For Boiling Noodles 
Water as required 
Salt to taste 
MasterChow Whole Wheat Noodles 
1 tsp Oil 
1 tsp Oil (after boiling) 

For Chowmein 
1 tbsp Oil 
½ medium Cabbage (shredded) 
1 large Carrot (peeled & julienned) 
1 large Capsicum (julienned) 
1 large Onion (sliced) 
4-5 tbsp MasterChow Chowmein sauce 
Boiled Noodles 
2-3 tbsp Spring onion (roughly chopped) 

For Garnish 
Spring onion (diagonally cut) 
MasterChow Chilli oil 

Process
For Boiling Noodles
● In a saucepot, add water as required, salt to taste, give it a good mix and give it a boil until its roaring boil.
● Add MasterChow Whole Wheat Noodles, oil and boil it for 6-7 minutes or until 80% cooked.
● Strain the noodles, add oil and toss it very gently.
● Leave it aside for further use.

For Chowmein
● In a wok, add oil, once it's hot, add cabbage, carrot, capsicum, onion and saute it for 2-3 minutes on high flames.
● Add MasterChow Chowmein sauce, boiled noodles and toss it on high flames for a minute.
● Finish it with spring onion and give it a good mix.
● Transfer it into the serving bowl, garnish it with spring onion and drizzle some MasterChow Chilli oil. 
● Serve hot.

title: Achaari Chicken Curry | चटपटा अचारी मैंगो चिकन | Achari Raw mango Chicken recipe | Chef Ranveer Brar
description:
Mango Chicken Curry (𝙎𝙚𝙚 𝙙𝙚𝙩𝙖𝙞𝙡𝙚𝙙 𝙩𝙚𝙭𝙩 𝙧𝙚𝙘𝙞𝙥𝙚 𝙗𝙚𝙡𝙤𝙬) कच्चे आम ki खटास aur chicken ka rich swaad।Mango Chicken Curry, ekdum balanced khatta-teekha flavour।
Har bite mein गर्मियों ka ek naya twist

***********************
𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡  𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣
🛒RB Store - https://www.amazon.in/shop/chefranveer
📟Kitchen Appliances - https://bit.ly/KitchenAppliancesIUse
🔪Knives I use - https://amzn.to/4kzSJVe

***********************
*DISCLAIMER 
All diet and nutrition-related claims shared here are personal opinions and may not be scientific or medical facts. Please verify independently with a qualified health professional or trusted scientific source.

यहाँ साझा किए गए आहार और पोषण से संबंधित सभी दावे व्यक्तिगत विचार हैं और आवश्यक नहीं कि वे वैज्ञानिक या चिकित्सीय तथ्य हों। कृपया स्वतंत्र रूप से किसी योग्य स्वास्थ्य विशेषज्ञ या विश्वसनीय वैज्ञानिक स्रोत से सत्यापित करें।

𝗥𝗘𝗖𝗜𝗣𝗘 𝗙𝗢𝗥  Mango Chicken Curry 
Preparation time 10 minutes
Cooking time 25-30 minutes
Serve 2-4 

Ingredients
For Chicken Marination
1 kg Chicken (thighs & drumsticks), चिकन
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
1 tbsp Ginger Garlic paste, अदरक लहसुन का पेस्ट
1 tbsp Oil, तेल
Remaining Raw Mango (grated), कच्चा आम

For Mango Chicken Curry 
2-3 tbsp Oil, तेल
2 no. Green Cardamom, हरी इलायची
2 no. Black Cardamom, बड़ी इलायची
2-3 no. Cloves, लौंग
2 ½ medium Onions (roughly sliced), प्याज
2 medium Tomatoes (roughly diced), टमाटर
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
1 heaped tsp Degi Red Chilli powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर
1 tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर
1 tbsp Coriander powder, धनिया पाउडर
½ tsp Cumin powder, जीरा पाउडर
3-4 large Tomatoes (puree), टमाटर प्यूरी
1 tbsp Tender Coriander stems (chopped), धनिया के डंठल
Cooked Chicken, पका हुआ चिकन
Little Water, पानी
Prepared Tadka, तैयार किया हुआ तड़का
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
A pinch of Sugar, चीनी

For Searing Chicken 
1-2 tbsp Oil, तेल  
Marinated Chicken, मैरिनेटेड चिकन

For Tadka
1-2 tbsp Ghee, घी
½ tsp Cumin seeds, जीरा 
½ tsp Fennel seeds, सौंफ
¼ tsp Dry Fenugreek seeds, मेथी दाना
½ tsp small Mustard seeds, छोटी राई
½ no. Raw Mango (peeled & roughly diced), कच्चा आम
½ medium Onion (roughly diced), प्याज
1 tsp Black Peppercorns (crushed), कुटी हुई काली मिर्च
½ tbsp Sugar, चीनी

For Garnish
Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता

Process
For Chicken Marination
• In a bowl, add chicken, salt to taste, ginger garlic paste, oil, grated raw mango and marinate well.
• Keep it aside for a while.

For Mango Chicken Curry
• In a handi, add oil, once it's hot, add green cardamom, black cardamom, cloves, onions and cook for 4-5 minutes or until onion turns light golden in colour.
• Add tomatoes, salt to taste and cook for a while until tomatoes get mushy in texture.
• Add degi red chilli powder, turmeric powder, coriander powder, cumin powder and cook for a minute.
• Add tomato puree, tender coriander stems and cook for another 4-5 minutes until oil separates from the masala.
• Now, add cooked chicken, little water and cook for a while.
• Finish it with the prepared tadka, salt to taste, a pinch of sugar and give it a good mix.
• Transfer it into the serving dish and garnish it with coriander sprig.
• Serve hot with roti and steam rice.

For Searing Chicken
• In a pan, add oil, once it's hot, place marinated chicken and cook for 5-6 minutes or until it's half cooked.
• Transfer it into the tray and keep it aside for further use.

For Tadka
• In a pan, add ghee, once it's hot, add cumin seeds, fennel seeds, dry fenugreek seeds, small mustard seeds and splutter well.
• Add raw mango, onion and saute it on high flames for 2-3 minutes.
• Add crushed black peppercorns, sugar and toss it for a minute.
• Turn off the flames and keep it aside for further use.

Prepared Curd Rice mixture, तैयार किया हुआ दही चावल का मिश्रण

title: Lunchbox spl Sandwich | 'फ्लाइट' वाला सैंडविच 2 तरह से | Paneer Tikka/Chicken Tikka | Chef Ranveer
description:
𝗣𝗔𝗡𝗘𝗘𝗥 𝗧𝗜𝗞𝗞𝗔/ 𝗖𝗛𝗜𝗖𝗞𝗘𝗡 𝗧𝗜𝗞𝗞𝗔  𝗦𝗔𝗡𝗗𝗪𝗜𝗖𝗛- (𝙎𝙚𝙚 𝙙𝙚𝙩𝙖𝙞𝙡𝙚𝙙 𝙩𝙚𝙭𝙩 𝙧𝙚𝙘𝙞𝙥𝙚 𝙗𝙚𝙡𝙤𝙬) Perfect snacks for the weekend, lunchbox, match time or just about anytime!! And not one, but 2 types of filling :)

***********************
𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡  𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣
🛒RB Store - https://www.amazon.in/shop/chefranveer
📟Kitchen Appliances - https://bit.ly/KitchenAppliancesIUse
🔪Knives I use - https://amzn.to/4kzSJVe

***********************
𝗥𝗘𝗖𝗜𝗣𝗘 𝗙𝗢𝗥 𝗣𝗔𝗡𝗘𝗘𝗥 𝗧𝗜𝗞𝗞𝗔/ 𝗖𝗛𝗜𝗖𝗞𝗘𝗡 𝗧𝗜𝗞𝗞𝗔 𝗦𝗔𝗡𝗗𝗪𝗜𝗖𝗛
Preparation time 15-20 minutes 
Cooking time 10-12 minutes
Serve 2-4

Ingredients 
For Marination 
1 cup Hung curd, टंगा हुआ दही
2 tsp Degi Red Chilli powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर
1 tsp Garam masala powder, गरम मसाला पाउडर
1 tsp Roasted Cumin powder, जीरा पाउडर 
1 heaped tbsp Mayonnaise, मेयोनेज़
1 tsp Oil, तेल
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
1 tsp Roasted Gram flour, भुने चने का बेसन
1 tsp Dry Fenugreek leaves, कसूरी मेथी
1 tsp Ginger Garlic paste, अदरक लहसुन का पेस्ट

For Paneer Marination 
500 gms Paneer (cut into thick slab), पनीर
Prepared Marination, तैयार किया हुआ मैरिनेशन

For Chicken Marination 
500 gms Chicken (thigh boneless), चिकन
Prepared Marination, तैयार किया हुआ मैरिनेशन

For Vegetable Mixture
½ medium Cabbage (shredded & chopped), पत्ता गोभी
3-4 no. Green chillies (less spicy & finely chopped), हरी मिर्च
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
1 tsp Vinegar, सिरका
½ medium Carrot (peeled & finely chopped), गाजर
⅓ cup Mayonnaise, मेयोनेज़
2 tbsp fresh Mint leaves (roughly chopped), पुदीने का पत्ता
¼ cup Processed Cheese (grated), चीज
½ inch Ginger (peeled & grated), अदरक

For Searing Paneer & Chicken 
1-2 tbsp Oil, तेल
Marinated Paneer slabs, मैरिनेटेड पनीर
Marinated Chicken Tikka, मैरिनेटेड चिकन टिक्का

For Paneer Tikka Filling
Grilled Paneer Tikka (chopped), ग्रिल्ड पनीर टिक्का
Prepared Salad, तैयार किया हुआ सलाद
Remaining Excess Oil, बचा हुआ तेल

For Chicken Tikka Filling
Grilled Chicken Tikka (chopped), ग्रिल्ड चिकन टिक्का
Prepared Salad, तैयार किया हुआ सलाद

For Assembling Paneer Tikka Sandwich
4 no. Triangle Brown Bread slice, ब्रेड स्लाइस
1-2 tbsp Softened Butter (cubed), मक्खन
1-2 tbsp Mayonnaise, मेयोनेज़
Prepared Paneer Tikka Filling, तैयार की हुई पनीर टिक्का फिलिंग
Black peppercorns (crushed), कुटी हुई काली मिर्च

For Assembling Chicken Tikka Sandwich
4 no. Triangle White Bread slice, ब्रेड स्लाइस
1-2 tbsp Softened Butter (cubed), मक्खन
Prepared Chicken Tikka Filling, तैयार की हुई चिकन टिक्का फिलिंग
Black peppercorns (crushed), कुटी हुई काली मिर्च  

Process
For Marination
● In a bowl, add hung curd, degi red chilli powder, garam masala powder, roasted cumin powder, mayonnaise, oil.
● Add salt to taste, roasted gram flour, dry fenugreek leaves, ginger garlic paste and give it a good mix to make a lumps free marinade.
● Keep it aside for further use.

For Paneer Marination
● In a bowl, add paneer slabs, prepared marination and marinate well.
● Keep it aside for further use.

For Chicken Marination
● In a bowl, add chicken, prepared marination and marinate well.
● Keep it aside for further use.

For Vegetable Mixture
● In a bowl, add cabbage, green chillies, salt to taste, vinegar, carrot and mix it well.
● Leave it aside for a while until vegetables lose their moisture.
● Squeeze out the extra moisture and transfer the vegetables into the bowl.
● Add mayonnaise, chopped mint leaves, grated cheese, ginger and mix it well.
● Keep it aside for further use.

For Searing Paneer & Chicken
● In a pan, add oil, once it's hot, place marinated paneer slabs and cook for 4-5 minutes or until it's cooked.
● In the same pan, add oil, once it's hot, place marinated chicken tikka and cook for 5-6 minutes on each side.
● Now, flip the chicken onto the other side and cook for a while.
● Transfer it into the tray or plate and keep it aside for further use.

● For Paneer Tikka Filling
In a bowl, add chopped paneer tikka, prepared salad, remaining excess oil and give it a good mix.
● Keep it aside for further use.

For Chicken Tikka Filling
● In a bowl, add chopped chicken tikka, prepared salad and give it a good mix.
● Keep it aside for further use.

For Assembling Paneer Tikka Sandwich
● Take triangle brown bread slices, trim the edges, apply softened butter, mayonnaise, add prepared paneer tikka filling and crushed black peppercorns.
● Now, cover it with another bread slice and transfer it into the serving platter.
● Serve warm with french fries and tomato ketchup.

For Assembling Chicken Tikka Sandwich
● Take triangle brown bread slices, trim the edges, apply softened butter, add prepared chicken tikka filling and crushed black peppercorns.
● Now, cover it with another bread slice and transfer it into the serving platter.
● Serve warm with french fries and tomato ketchup.

title: दाल ऐसी कि Dal Makhani भूल जाएंगे! Lucknowi Dal Falaknuma | फ़लकनुमा दाल | Chef Ranveer Brar
description:
𝗟𝗨𝗖𝗞𝗡𝗢𝗪𝗜 '𝗙𝗔𝗟𝗔𝗞𝗡𝗨𝗠𝗔' 𝗗𝗔𝗟 - (See Detailed Recipe Below) Very rare for me to say this, but this Dal that I learnt from my Ustad will make you forget Dal Makhani! No, sachi :) Try ज़रूर कीजिएगा 😎

***********************
𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡  𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣
🛒RB Store - https://www.amazon.in/shop/chefranveer
📟Kitchen Appliances - https://bit.ly/KitchenAppliancesIUse
🔪Knives I use - https://amzn.to/4kzSJVe

***********************
𝗥𝗘𝗖𝗜𝗣𝗘 𝗙𝗢𝗥 𝗟𝗨𝗖𝗞𝗡𝗢𝗪𝗜 '𝗙𝗔𝗟𝗔𝗞𝗡𝗨𝗠𝗔' 𝗗𝗔𝗟
Preparation time 10 minutes 
Cooking time 30-35 minutes 
Serve 2-4 

Ingredients
For Cooking Dal
1-2 tbsp Ghee, घी
3-4 no. Dry Kashmiri Red Chillies (roughly torn), सूखी कश्मीरी लाल मिर्च
1 cup Whole Urad dal (soak for 4-5 hrs), भिगोई हुई साबुत उड़द दाल
1 cup Whole Moong dal (soak for 4-5 hrs), भिगोई हुई साबुत मूंग दाल
1 cup Chana dal (soak for 1-2 hrs), भिगोई हुई चने की दाल
1 tsp Degi Red Chilli powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर
½ tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर
1-2 tbsp Ghee, घी
3-4 cups Water, पानी
½ small bunch Spinach (washed & roughly chopped), पालक
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार

For Frying Onions
Oil for frying, तलने के लिए तेल
2 medium Onions (sliced), प्याज़

For Dal Falaknuma
Remaining excess oil, बचा हुआ तेल
1 no. Bay leaf, तेज पत्ता
¼ inch Cinnamon stick, दालचीनी
3-4 no. Cloves, लौंग
7-8 no. Black Peppercorns, काली मिर्च के दाने
2 tsp Cumin seeds, जीरा
½ portion of Fried Onions, तले हुए प्याज
3-4 large Tomatoes (puree), टमाटर की प्यूरी
½ cup Curd (beaten), दही
1 heaped tbsp Ginger Garlic paste, अदरक लहसुन का पेस्ट
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
2 heaped tsp Degi Red Chilli powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर
½ tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर
1 tsp Coriander powder, धनिया पाउडर
Little water, पानी
Cooked Dal, पकी हुई दाल
2-3 cups Water, पानी
1 tbsp Tender Coriander stems (chopped), धनिया के डंठल
1 cup Water, पानी
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
Prepared Tadka, तैयार किया हुआ तड़का

For Tadka
1 tbsp Jaggery (chopped), गुड़
1-2 tbsp Ghee, घी
1-2 tbsp Dry Fenugreek leaves (soaked), भिगोई हुई कसूरी मेथी
1 tsp Degi Red Chilli powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर

For Garnish
Fried Onions, तले हुए प्याज
Chilli Oil, मिर्च का तेल
Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता

Process
For Cooking Dal
In a pressure cooker, add ghee, once it's hot, add dry kashmiri red chillies, soaked urad dal, moong dal, chana dal, degi red chilli powder, turmeric powder and cook for a minute.
Add ghee, water, spinach leaves, salt to taste, give it a good mix, cover it with the lid and let it cook for 3-4 whistles or until it's cooked.
Once dal gets cooked then keep it aside for further use.

For Frying Onions
In a pan or handi, add oil for frying. Once it's hot, add sliced onions and cook for 8-10 minutes until onion gets crispy texture and light brown in colour.
Transfer it into an absorbent sheet and leave it aside for further use.

For Dal Falknuma
In a handi, add remaining excess oil, once it's hot, add bay leaf, cinnamon stick, cloves, black peppercorns, cumin seeds and splutter well.
Add half portion of fried onions, fresh tomato puree, curd, ginger garlic paste, salt to taste and cook for 10-12 minutes until oil separates from the masala.
Add degi red chilli powder, turmeric powder, coriander powder, little water to allow further cooking.
Now, add cooked dal, water, tender coriander stems and let it simmer for a while.
Add water, salt to taste and give it a good mix.
Finish it with prepared tadka and give it a quick boil.
Transfer it into the serving bowl, garnish it with fried onions, chilli oil and coriander sprig.
Serve hot with roti or steam rice.

For Tadka
In a pan, add jaggery, once it melts, add ghee, soaked dry fenugreek leaves, degi red chilli powder and and cook for a minute.
Turn off the flames and keep it aside for further use.
***********************

title: Kolhapuri Chicken curry | झणझणीत🌶️कोल्हापुरी चिकन करी | 'Magic' Vatan/paste Bonus | Chef RanveerBrar
description:
𝗝𝗛𝗔𝗡𝗝𝗛𝗔𝗡𝗜𝗧 (𝗦𝗣𝗜𝗖𝗬) 𝗞𝗢𝗟𝗛𝗔𝗣𝗨𝗥𝗜 𝗖𝗛𝗜𝗖𝗞𝗘𝗡 - (Detailed recipe below) Kolhapuri style Chicken Curry with authentic masala 🌶️ एकदम तिखट, खमंग आणि full of flavour! Secret Vatan paste recipe inside 🤫 don’t miss!

***********************
𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡  𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣
🛒RB Store - https://www.amazon.in/shop/chefranveer
📟Kitchen Appliances - https://bit.ly/KitchenAppliancesIUse
🔪Knives I use - https://amzn.to/4kzSJVe

***********************
𝗥𝗘𝗖𝗜𝗣𝗘 𝗙𝗢𝗥 𝗝𝗛𝗔𝗡𝗝𝗛𝗔𝗡𝗜𝗧 (𝗦𝗣𝗜𝗖𝗬) 𝗞𝗢𝗟𝗛𝗔𝗣𝗨𝗥𝗜 𝗖𝗛𝗜𝗖𝗞𝗘𝗡
Preparation time 10 minutes
Cooking time 30-35 minutes
Serves 2-4

Ingredients 
For Vatan   

2 tbsp Oil, तेल
3 tbsp Coriander seeds, धनिया की बीज 
1 ½ tbsp Cumin seeds, जीरा   
20-25 no. Dry Kashmiri Red Chillies, सूखी लाल मिर्च
1 tsp Poppy seeds, खसखस
¾ tbsp White Sesame seeds, सफेद तिल 
¼ tsp Asafoetida, हींग
19-20 no. Black Peppercorns, काली मिर्च के दाने
3-4 no. Cloves, लौंग
5-6 no. Black Cardamom, बड़ी इलायची 
10-12 no. Green Cardamom, हरी इलायची
1 tsp Stone flower, पत्थर फूल
1 ½ Mace, जावित्री
½ inch Nutmeg, जायफल 
¼ tsp Dry Fenugreek leaves, कसूरी मेथी
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
2 tbsp Dry Coconut (sliced), सूखा नारियल 
¼ no. Star Anise, चक्र फूल
¼ inch Cinnamon stick, दालचीनी

For Vatan

2 tbsp Ghee, घी
3-4 no. Garlic cloves, लहसुन
½ inch Ginger (peeled & roughly sliced), अदरक
2 ½ medium Onions (sliced), प्याज
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
1-2 no. Green Chillies (roughly torn), हरी मिर्च
2 medium Tomatoes (roughly diced), टमाटर
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
1-2 tbsp Tender Coriander Stems (roughly chopped), धनिया के डंठल

For Chicken Marination

1 kg Chicken (thigh & drumstick), चिकन
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
1 tsp Degi Red Chilli powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर
½ tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर
1 tbsp Ginger Garlic paste, अदरक लहसुन का पेस्ट

For Cooking Chicken
2-3 tbsp Ghee, घी
Marinated Chicken, मैरिनेटेड चिकन
Little water, पानी

For Kolhapuri Chicken

1-2 tbsp Ghee, घी
½ medium Onion (finely chopped), प्याज
Prepared Vatan, तैयार तैयार किए हुए पेस्ट
1 tbsp Ghee, घी
Cooked Chicken, पका हुआ चिकन
2-3 cups Hot Water, गर्म पानी
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
1 tsp Lemon juice, नींबू का रस

For Garnish

Lemon wedge, नींबू की फांक
Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता

Process 
For Vatan

In a pan or handi, add oil, once it's hot, add coriander seeds, cumin seeds, dry kashmiri red chillies, poppy seeds, white sesame seeds, asafoetida.
Black peppercorns, cloves, black cardamom, green cardamom, stone flower, mace, nutmeg, dry fenugreek leaves and roast for a minute.
Add salt to taste, dry coconut, star anise, cinnamon stick and roast again for 2-3 minutes on medium flames.
Transfer it into the bowl, add prepared vegetable mixture and give it a good mix.
Transfer the mixture into the mixer grinder jar and grind it into the smooth fine paste.
Keep it aside for further use.

For Vatan

In a handi, add ghee, once it's hot, add garlic, ginger, onion, salt to taste and cook for 4-5 minutes until onion gets translucent in texture.

Add green chillies, tomatoes, salt to taste, tender coriander stems, give it a good mix, cover it with the lid and cook for 5-6 minutes until tomatoes get mushy in texture.

Transfer it into the bowl and keep it aside for further use.

For Chicken Marination

In a bowl, add chicken, salt to taste, degi red chilli powder, turmeric powder, ginger garlic paste and marinate well.

Keep it aside for further use.

For Cooking Chicken

In a pan, add ghee, once it's hot, place marinated chicken pieces and cook for 2-3 minutes.

Flip the chicken on the other side, add little water, cover it with the lid and cook for another 4-5 minutes or until it's half cooked.

Transfer it into the bowl or tray and leave it aside for further use.

For Kolhapuri Chicken

In the same handi, add ghee, once its hot, add onion and cook for 2-3 minutes,

Add prepared vatan, ghee and cook for a while until oil separates from the masala.

Now, add cooked chicken, hot water, salt to taste and let it simmer for 7-8 minutes or until it's cooked.

Finish it with lemon juice and give it a good mix.

Transfer it into the serving dish and garnish it with lemon wedges and coriander sprig.

Serve hot with chapati, bhakri and steam rice.

***********************

title: Kathal Shami Kebab | कटहल के लाजवाब शामी कबाब | Bun Kabab recipe bonus | Chef Ranveer Brar
description:
𝗞𝗔𝗧𝗛𝗔𝗟/𝗝𝗔𝗖𝗞𝗙𝗥𝗨𝗜𝗧 𝗦𝗛𝗔𝗠𝗜 𝗞𝗘𝗕𝗔𝗕 & '𝗕𝗨𝗡 𝗞𝗔𝗕𝗔𝗕' - (𝙎𝙚𝙚 𝙙𝙚𝙩𝙖𝙞𝙡𝙚𝙙 𝙩𝙚𝙭𝙩 𝙧𝙚𝙘𝙞𝙥𝙚 𝙗𝙚𝙡𝙤𝙬) 
Kathal ka texture, मसालों का गहरा स्वाद aur purani dastaan.
Jackfruit Shami Kebab, बिना गोश्त के भी utna hi nawabi ehsaas.
Har bite mein veg hone ka ek नया अंदाज़।

***********************
𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡  𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣
🛒RB Store - https://www.amazon.in/shop/chefranveer
📟Kitchen Appliances - https://bit.ly/KitchenAppliancesIUse
🔪Knives I use - https://amzn.to/4kzSJVe

***********************
𝗥𝗘𝗖𝗜𝗣𝗘 𝗙𝗢𝗥 𝗞𝗔𝗧𝗛𝗔𝗟/𝗝𝗔𝗖𝗞𝗙𝗥𝗨𝗜𝗧 𝗦𝗛𝗔𝗠𝗜 𝗞𝗘𝗕𝗔𝗕
Preparation time 10 minutes
Cooking time 20-25 minutes 
Serve 2-4

Ingredients
For Cutting Jackfruit
1-2 tbsp Mustard oil, सरसों का तेल
1kg Jackfruit (peeled & diced), कटहल

For Kebab Mixture
2-3 tbsp Mustard oil, सरसों का तेल
½ tbsp Coriander seeds, धनिये के बीज
1 tbsp Black Peppercorns, काली मिर्च के दाने
1 tsp Cumin seeds, जीरा
4-5 no. Cloves, लौंग
1 ½ inch Ginger (peeled & roughly sliced), अदरक
3-4 no. Green Chillies (less spicy & roughly chopped), हरी मिर्च
3-4 no. Garlic cloves, लहसुन
1kg Jackfruit (peeled & diced), कटहल
1 cup Chana dal (washed), धुली हुई चना दाल
3 no. Black Cardamom, बड़ी इलायची
5-6 no. Green Cardamom, हरी इलायची
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
1 heaped tsp Degi Red Chilli powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर
1 tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर
2-3 cups Water, पानी
1 tbsp Tender Coriander stems (chopped), धनिया के डंठल

For Kathal Ke Kebab
Cooked Kebab Mixture (paste), पके हुए कबाब मिश्रण का पेस्ट
3-4 no. Green Chillies (less spicy & finely chopped), हरी मिर्च
½ inch Ginger (peeled & finely chopped), अदरक
2-3 tbsp fresh Coriander leaves (finely chopped), धनिया पत्ता
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
Cooked Kebab Mixture (shredded), पके हुए कबाब का मिश्रण
¾ cup Roasted Gram flour, भुने चने का बेसन
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
1 tsp Garam masala powder, गरम मसाला

For Cooking Kebab
1-2 tbsp Ghee, घी
Prepared Kebabs, तैयार किए हुए कबाब

For Salad
1 medium Onion (sliced), प्याज
1 tsp Lemon juice, नींबू का रस
1 tsp Mint leaves (finely chopped), पुदीने का पत्ता
1 no. Green Chilli (less spicy & finely chopped), हरी मिर्च
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार

For Bun Kebab
Ladi Pav, लादी पाव
Green Chutney, हरी चटनी
Fried Kebabs, तले हुए कबाब
Prepared Salad, तैयार किया हुआ सलाद

For Garnish
Lemon wedges, नींबू की फांक
Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता
Green Chutney, हरी चटनी 

Process 
For Cutting Jackfruit
● Apply mustard oil on a knife, take jackfruit, cut into half, peel the skin and cut into diced shapes.
● Keep it aside for further use.

For Kebab Mixture
● In a pressure cooker, add mustard oil, once it's smoky hot, add coriander seeds, cumin seeds, cloves, ginger, green chillies, garlic, jackfruit and cook for a minute.
● Add washed chana dal, black cardamom, green cardamom, salt to taste, degi red chilli powder, turmeric powder, water, tender coriander stems,.
● Now, give it a good mix, cover it with the lid and cook for 4-5 whistles or until it's cooked.
● Keep it aside to depressurize the cooker.
● Once the mixture cools down then transfer it into the mixer grinder jar and grind it into smooth paste.
● Keep it aside for further use.

For Kathal Ke Kebab
● In a bowl, add cooked kebab mixture, green chillies, ginger, fresh coriander leaves, salt to taste and give it a good mix.
● Add some shredded cooked kebab mixture, roasted gram flour, salt to taste, garam masala powder and mix everything well.
● Take a spoonful of prepared mixture, shape it into lemon size balls, press it a little to form kebabs.
● Leave it aside for further use.

For Cooking Kebab
● In a pan, add ghee, once it's hot, place one by one prepared kebabs and fry them on both slides until crisp texture and light golden in colour.
● Transfer it into the serving platter, garnish it with lemon wedge and coriander sprig.
● Serve hot with green chutney.

For Salad
● In a bowl, add onions, lemon juice, fresh mint leaves, green chilies, salt to taste and mix it well.
● Transfer it into the serving bowl and serve with fried kebabs.

For Bun Kebab
● Take, ladi pav, cut into the middle, apply green chutney, place fried kebab, add a spoonful of prepared salad and transfer it into the serving platter.
● Serve hot with green chutney.

title: 3 Summer Spl Drinks गर्मी के लिए रामबाण ड्रिंक्स | Ayurveda Amla Tanka Torani Millet drink | Ranveer
description:
𝟯 𝗦𝗨𝗠𝗠𝗘𝗥 𝗦𝗣𝗟 𝗗𝗥𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦 (𝙎𝙚𝙚 𝙙𝙚𝙩𝙖𝙞𝙡𝙚𝙙 𝙩𝙚𝙭𝙩 𝙧𝙚𝙘𝙞𝙥𝙚 𝙗𝙚𝙡𝙤𝙬) Garmi ke din, thandi si rahat aur bachpan ki yaadein. 3 tarah ke summer drinks, 𝘼𝙢𝙡𝙖 𝙎𝙝𝙖𝙧𝙗𝙖𝙩, 𝙏𝙖𝙣𝙠𝙖 𝙏𝙤𝙧𝙖𝙣𝙞 & 𝙍𝙖𝙜𝙞 𝘾𝙤𝙤𝙡𝙚𝙧...स्वाद अलग, recipe Simple and सेहत bharpoor!

***********************
𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡  𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣
🛒RB Store - https://www.amazon.in/shop/chefranveer
📟Kitchen Appliances - https://bit.ly/KitchenAppliancesIUse
🔪Knives I use - https://amzn.to/4kzSJVe

***********************
𝗥𝗘𝗖𝗜𝗣𝗘 𝗙𝗢𝗥 𝟯 𝗦𝗨𝗠𝗠𝗘𝗥 𝗦𝗣𝗟 𝗗𝗥𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦
Preparation time 10 minutes 
Cooking time 15-20 minutes 
Serve 2-4 

Ingredients
For Amla Paste
250 gms Gooseberries (roughly chopped), आंवला
¼ inch Mango Ginger (roughly chopped), आंबेहळद
1 ½ cups Sugar, चीनी
1-2 cups Water, पानी
¼ inch Ginger (peeled & roughly chopped), अदरक
1 tsp Fennel Seeds, सौंफ
1 cup Jaggery, गुड़
   
For Ragi Mixture
2 cups Water, पानी
¾ cup Ragi flour, रागी का आटा

For Cooking Rice
1 cup Kolam Rice, कोलम चावल
2-3 cups Water, पानी

For Ragi Ambala
1 medium Onion (chopped), प्याज
2 no. Green Chillies (less spicy & finely chopped), हरी मिर्च
2 tbsp fresh Coriander leaves (finely chopped), धनिया पत्ता
Cooked Ragi mixture, पका हुआ रागी का मिश्रण
4-5 no. Ice cubes, बर्फ के टुकड़े
1-2 cups Curd (beaten), दही
1-2 cups Water, पानी
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
1 tsp Lemon juice, नींबू का रस

For Torani Paste
3-4 no. Lemon leaves (roughly torn),
½ inch Mango Ginger (peeled & sliced), आंबेहळद
1 no. Green Chilli (chopped), हरी मिर्च

For Fermentation 
Cooked Rice, पका हुआ चावल
4-5 cups Water, पानी

For Tanka Torani
Fermented Rice Water, खमीरी चावल का पानी
1 cup Curd (beaten), दही
Prepared Torani Paste, तैयार की हुई तोरानी का पेस्ट
1-2 sprig Curry leaves (roughly torn), कड़ी पत्ता
1 no. fresh Red Chilli (chopped), ताज़ी लाल मिर्च
2 no. Lemon (sliced), नींबू
1 tsp Lemon juice, नींबू का रस
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
½ tsp Cumin powder, जीरा पाउडर

For Amla Sharbat
1 no. Gooseberry (grated), आंवला
¼ inch Ginger (peeled & grated), अदरक
½ tsp Black Peppercorns (crushed), कुटी हुई काली मिर्च
Prepared Amla Paste, तैयार की हुई आंवला पेस्ट
4-5 no. Ice cubes, बर्फ के टुकड़े
Water as required, पानी
A pinch of Salt, नमक 
1-2 tbsp fresh Mint leaves (roughly torn), पुदीने का पत्ता

For Garnish
Lemon slices, नींबू
Mint sprig, पुदीने का पत्ता
Ice cubes, बर्फ के टुकड़े

Process 
For Amla Paste
• In a sauce pot, add gooseberries, mango ginger, sugar, water, ginger, fennel seeds, jaggery, cover it with the lid and cook for 12-15 minutes or until everything is cooked.
• Transfer it into the bowl and leave it aside to cool down the temperature.
• Transfer it into the mixer grinder jar and grind it into a smooth fine paste.
• Keep it aside for further use.

For Ragi Mixture
• In a sauce pan, add water, ragi flour and cook it on low flames for a while until it is properly cooked.
• Transfer it into the bowl and keep it aside for further use.

For Cooking Rice
• In a saucepot or handi, add kolam rice, water, cover it with the lid and cook for 20-25 minutes until rice gets mushy in texture.
• Transfer it to a bowl and leave it aside for further use.

For Ragi Ambala
• In a serving bowl, add onion, green chillies, fresh coriander leaves, cooked ragi mixture and give it a good mix.
• Add ice cubes, curd, water, salt to taste, lemon juice and give it a good mix.
• Transfer it into the serving glass and serve chilled.

For Torani Paste
• In a mortar pestle, add lemon leaves, mango ginger, green chilli and grind it into a coarse paste.
• Keep it aside for further use.

For Fermentation 
• In a clay pot, add cooked rice, sufficient water and cover it with a muslin cloth and keep it aside for fermentation for 1 day or at least 18-20 hours.

For Tanka Torani
• In a clay pot, add fermented rice water, curd, prepared torani paste, curry leaves, fresh red chilli, lemon, lemon juice, salt to taste, cumin powder and give it a good mix.
• Transfer it into the serving glass or clay glass and serve chilled.

For Amla Sharbat
• In a serving bowl or jar, add grated gooseberry, ginger, crushed black peppercorns.
• Add prepared amla paste, ice cubes, water as required, a pinch of salt, fresh mint leaves and mix everything well.
• Transfer it into the serving glass, garnish it with lemon slices, mint sprig and ice cubes.Serve chilled.
