title: 'Viral' Smashed Tacos🌮 | मज़ेदार 'ट्रेंडींग' टाको घर पर | Paneer/Chicken Tacos | Chef Ranveer Brar
description:
'𝗩𝗜𝗥𝗔𝗟' 𝗦𝗠𝗔𝗦𝗛𝗘𝗗 𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗢𝗦 (𝗣𝗔𝗡𝗘𝗘𝗥 /𝗖𝗛𝗜𝗖𝗞𝗘𝗡) - (See Detailed recipe below) Here's my take on the trending Tacos recipe! I've given methods for both Chicken & Paneer variants in normal Enchilada and Smashed types. Enjoy it this weekend!

***********************
𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡  𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣
🛒RB Store - https://www.amazon.in/shop/chefranveer
📟Kitchen Appliances - https://bit.ly/KitchenAppliancesIUse
🔪Knives I use - https://amzn.to/4kzSJVe

***********************
𝗥𝗘𝗖𝗜𝗣𝗘 𝗙𝗢𝗥 '𝗩𝗜𝗥𝗔𝗟' 𝗦𝗠𝗔𝗦𝗛𝗘𝗗 𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗢𝗦 (𝗣𝗔𝗡𝗘𝗘𝗥 /𝗖𝗛𝗜𝗖𝗞𝗘𝗡)
Preparation time 10-15 minutes 
Cooking time 15-20 minutes 
Serve 2-4

Ingredients 
For Paneer Rajma Filling 
500 gms Paneer, पनीर
2 cups Boiled Rajma, उबला हुआ राजमा
1 tbsp Chilli flakes, चिली फ्लेक्स 
½ tbsp Oregano (optional), ऑरेगैनो
1 tsp Tender Coriander stems (finely chopped), धनिया के डंठल 
½ tbsp Ginger Garlic paste, अदरक लहसुन का पेस्ट
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार

For Chicken Filling 
2 large Boiled Potatoes, उबले हुए आलू
1 cup Chicken mince, चिकन कीमा
1 tbsp Ginger Garlic paste, अदरक लहसुन का पेस्ट
2 no. Green Chillies (less spicy & finely chopped), हरी मिर्च
1 heaped tbsp fresh Coriander leaves (finely chopped), धनिया पत्ता
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
¼ tsp Garam masala powder, गरम मसाला पाउडर
¼ tsp Coriander powder, धनिया पाउडर
1 tbsp Degi Red Chilli powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर

For Sauce 
4 no. Green Chillies (less spicy & roughly chopped), हरी मिर्च
¼ cup fresh Mint leaves, पुदीने का पत्ता
½ inch Ginger (peeled & julienned), अदरक
2 no. Garlic cloves (crushed), लहसुन 
1 heaped tbsp Mayonnaise, मेयोनेज़
¼ cup Tomato ketchup, टोमेटो केचप
2 tbsp fresh Coriander leaves (roughly torn), धनिया पत्ता
1 tsp Oil, तेल

For Salad 
½ cup Hung curd, टंगा हुआ दही
1 heaped tbsp Mayonnaise, मेयोनेज़
1 heaped tbsp Chilli flakes, चिली फ्लेक्स
2-3 tbsp Processed Cheese (grated), चीज
1 large Capsicum (thinly julienned), शिमला मिर्च
½ medium Cucumber (thinly julienned), खीरा
½ medium Onion (thinly sliced), प्याज 
3-4 no. Green Chillies (less spicy & chopped), हरी मिर्च
2-3 tbsp fresh Coriander leaves (roughly chopped), धनिया पत्ता

Other Ingredients 
Prepared Dough, गूंथा हुआ आटा
½ tsp Ghee, घी

For Assembling 
½ tbsp Butter (cubed), मक्खन
Prepared Roti, तैयार की हुई रोटी
Chicken Filling, तैयार की हुई चिकन फिलिंग
Processed Cheese (grated), चीज
Prepared Sauce, तैयार किया हुआ सॉस
Prepared Salad, तैयार किया हुआ सलाद
Prepared Roti, तैयार की हुई रोटी
Paneer Rajma Filling, तैयार की हुई पनीर और राजमा की फिलिंग
Prepared Sauce, तैयार किया हुआ सॉस
Prepared Salad, तैयार किया हुआ सलाद

For Garnish 
Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता

Process 
For Paneer & Rajma Filling
In a bowl, add paneer, boiled rajma, chilli flakes, oregano, tender coriander stems, ginger garlic paste, salt to taste and give it a good mix.
Transfer it into the mixer grinder jar and grind it into the coarsely paste.
Keep it aside for further use.

For Chicken Filling
In a bowl, add chicken mince, boiled potatoes, ginger garlic paste, green chillies, fresh coriander leaves, salt to taste, garam masala powder, coriander powder, degi red chili powder and give it a good mix.
Leave it aside for further use.

For Sauce
In a bowl, add green chillies, fresh mint leaves, ginger, garlic, mayonnaise, tomato ketchup, fresh coriander leaves, oil and give it a good mix.
Transfer it into the mixer grinder jar and grind it into the smooth fine paste.
Keep it aside for further use.
For Salad
In a bowl, add hung curd, mayonnaise, chilli flakes, cheese, capsicum, cucumber, onion, green chillies, fresh coriander leaves and give it a good mix.
Keep it aside for further use.

For Cooking Roti
Take prepared dough, divide into small lemon size balls and flatten it with a rolling pin to make roti.
Add ghee on tawa, place prepared roti and cook it on both sides for 2-3 minutes or until it's half cooked.
Remove it into the dish and keep it aside for further use.

For Assembling
Take cooked roti, add chicken filling and spread it evenly, transfer it into the pan, add butter and cook for 4-5 minutes or until it's cooked.
Remove it into the dish, apply prepared sauce, add a spoonful of prepared salad and fold it well to make taco.
Take cooked roti, add paneer rajma filling and spread it evenly, transfer it into the pan, add butter and cook for 2-3 minutes or until it's cooked.
Remove it into the dish, apply prepared sauce, add a spoonful of prepared salad, add grated cheese and fold it well to make taco.
Transfer it into the serving dish and garnish it with coriander sprig.
Serve hot with prepared sauce and prepared salad.

***********************

title: नाश्ते में झटपट इडली साम्बार | Instant Ragi Idli-Sambar | Secret Sambaar Paste | Chef Ranveer Brar
description:
𝗥𝗔𝗚𝗜 𝗜𝗗𝗟𝗜 & 𝗦𝗔𝗠𝗕𝗔𝗔𝗥 (𝗪𝗶𝘁𝗵 𝗦𝗲𝗰𝗿𝗲𝘁 𝗦𝗮𝗺𝗯𝗮𝗿 𝗣𝗮𝘀𝘁𝗲) - (𝙎𝙚𝙚 𝙙𝙚𝙩𝙖𝙞𝙡𝙚𝙙 𝙩𝙚𝙭𝙩 𝙧𝙚𝙘𝙞𝙥𝙚 𝙗𝙚𝙡𝙤𝙬) Looking for a healthy twist to your breakfast? Try this Ragi Idli & Sambar recipe – nutritious, स्वादिष्ट and super easy to make at home.

Preparation time 10 minutes

title: Spicy Tawa Mutton 🔥 | दावत में बनाएं तवा अचारी मटन | Achaari Gosht/ Mutton Curry | Chef Ranveer Brar
description:
TAWA ACHARI MUTTON (𝙎𝙚𝙚 𝙙𝙚𝙩𝙖𝙞𝙡𝙚𝙙 𝙩𝙚𝙭𝙩 𝙧𝙚𝙘𝙞𝙥𝙚 𝙗𝙚𝙡𝙤𝙬) Tawa ki tez aanch, achari masalon ka khatta-teekha jadoo. Tawa Achari Mutton, bold flavours aur desi andaaz ka perfect mel. Har bite mein woh swaad jo yaad reh jaaye.

***********************
𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡  𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣
🛒RB Store - https://www.amazon.in/shop/chefranveer
📟Kitchen Appliances - https://bit.ly/KitchenAppliancesIUse
🔪Knives I use - https://amzn.to/4kzSJVe

***********************
𝗥𝗘𝗖𝗜𝗣𝗘 𝗙𝗢𝗥  TAWA ACHARI MUTTON
Preparation time 10 minutes
Cooking time 40-45 minutes
Serve 2-4 

For Cooking Mutton
½ cup Mustard oil, सरसों का तेल
1 no. Bay leaf, तेज पत्ता
3 no. Black Cardamom, बड़ी इलायची
1 kg Mutton with bones, मटन
½ tsp Nigella seeds, कलौंजी
½ tsp Fennel seeds, सौंफ
½ tsp Cumin seeds, जीरा
¼ tsp Fenugreek seeds, मेथी दाना
½ tsp Small Mustard seeds, छोटी राई
3-4 large Onions (roughly sliced), प्याज
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
Prepared Curd Mixture, तैयार किया हुआ दही का मिश्रण
¾ cup Water, पानी
 
For Achari Masala
1 heaped tbsp Degi Red Chilli powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर
1 tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर
5-6 no. Black Cardamom, बड़ी इलायची
7-8 no. Green Cardamom, हरी इलायची
1 heaped tbsp Black Peppercorns, काली मिर्च के दाने
2 tbsp Coriander seeds, धनिये के बीज
1 tbsp Coriander powder, धनिया पाउडर
½ tsp Cumin seeds, जीरा
½ tsp Fennel seeds, सौंफ
¼ tsp Fenugreek seeds, मेथी दाना
½ tsp Small Mustard seeds, छोटी राई
1 tsp Dry Mango powder, आमचूर पाउडर
½ tsp Nigella seeds, कलौंजी

For Curd Mixture
2 cups Curd (beaten), दही
2 ½ heaped tbsp Prepared Achari Masala, तैयार किया हुआ अचारी मसाला
2 ½ tbsp Ginger Garlic Paste, अदरक लहसुन का पेस्ट

For Tawa Achari Mutton
2-3 tbsp Ghee, घी
1 medium Onion (finely chopped), प्याज
2 no. Green Chillies (less spicy & finely chopped), हरी मिर्च
1 tbsp Tender Coriander stems (finely chopped), धनिया के डंठल
3-4 large Tomatoes (puree), टमाटर प्यूरी
1 inch Ginger (peeled & julienned), अदरक
1 heaped tbsp Prepared Achari Masala, तैयार किया हुआ अचारी मसाला
1 large Onion (roughly diced), प्याज
¼ cup Water, पानी
Cooked Mutton, पका हुआ मटन
10-12 no. Bhavnagri Chillies (cut into halves), भावनगरी मिर्च
2 large Tomatoes (cut into quarters), टमाटर
1-2 tsp Prepared Achari Masala, तैयार किया हुआ अचारी मसाला
2-3 tbsp fresh Coriander leaves (finely chopped), धनिया पत्ता

For Garnish
Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता

Process
For Cooking Mutton
• In a pressure cooker, add mustard oil, once it's smoky hot, add bay leaf, black cardamom, mutton and saute for a minute.
• Add nigella seeds, fennel seeds, cumin seeds, small mustard seeds and give it a good mix.
• Add onions, salt to taste and let it cook for 7-8 minutes or until onion gets light brown in colour.
• Add prepared curd mixture and cook for another 4-5 minutes until oil separates from the masala.
• Add water to adjust the consistency, give it a good mix, cover it with the lid and allow to cook for 7-8 whistles or until it's tender.
• Once mutton gets cooked then keep it aside to depressurize the cooker.

For Achari Masala
• In a tray, add degi red chilli powder, turmeric powder, black cardamom, green cardamom, black peppercorns, coriander seeds, coriander powder.
• Add cumin seeds, fennel seeds, fenugreek seeds, small mustard seeds, dry mango powder, nigella seeds and give it a good mix.
• Transfer it into the mixer grinder jar and grind it into the smooth fine powder.
• Keep it aside for further use.

For Curd Mixture
• In a bowl, add curd, prepared achari masala, ginger garlic paste and give it a good mix.
• Keep it aside for further use.

For Tawa Achari Mutton
• In a tawa, add ghee, once it's hot, add onion, green chillies, tender coriander stems and cook for 2-3 minutes until onion gets translucents in texture.
• Add tomato puree, ginger and cook for another 4-5 minutes or until it's cooked.
• Add prepared achari masala, onion and cook for a while.
• Add water, cook mutton and let it cook for 7-8 minutes.
• Now, add bhavnagri chillies, tomatoes, prepared achari masala, cover it with cooking foil or lid and let it cook for a while.
• Open the lid and finish it with fresh coriander leaves and give it a good mix.
• Transfer it into the serving dish and garnish it with coriander sprig.
• Serve hot with roti.

title: Aloo Matar Tehri | आसान तरीके से बनाएं आलू मटर तहरी | Lucknowi Aloo Matar Pulao | Chef Ranveer Brar
description:
𝗔𝗟𝗢𝗢 𝗠𝗔𝗧𝗔𝗥 𝗧𝗘𝗛𝗥𝗜 / 𝗟𝗨𝗖𝗞𝗡𝗢𝗪𝗜 𝗔𝗟𝗢𝗢 𝗠𝗔𝗧𝗔𝗥 𝗣𝗨𝗟𝗔𝗢 / (𝙎𝙚𝙚 𝙙𝙚𝙩𝙖𝙞𝙡𝙚𝙙 𝙩𝙚𝙭𝙩 𝙧𝙚𝙘𝙞𝙥𝙚 𝙗𝙚𝙡𝙤𝙬) Halka masala, एक handi और ghar ki khushboo.
Aloo Matar Tehri, simple ingredients se bana pure comfort food.
Jitna asaan, utna ही दिल ke kareeb.

***********************
𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡  𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣
🛒RB Store - https://www.amazon.in/shop/chefranveer
📟Kitchen Appliances - https://bit.ly/KitchenAppliancesIUse
🔪Knives I use - https://amzn.to/4kzSJVe

***********************
𝗥𝗘𝗖𝗜𝗣𝗘 𝗙𝗢𝗥 𝗔𝗟𝗢𝗢 𝗠𝗔𝗧𝗔𝗥 𝗧𝗘𝗛𝗥𝗜
Preparation time 10 minutes
Cooking time 25-30 minutes
Serve 2-4 

Ingredients
For Aloo Matar Ki Tehri
2-3 tbsp Ghee, घी
2-3 no. Green Cardamom, हरी इलायची
1 no. Black Cardamom, बड़ी इलायची
2-3 no. Cloves, लौंग
4-5 no. Black Peppercorns, काली मिर्च के दाने
¼ no. Mace, जावित्री
¼ inch Cinnamon stick, दालचीनी
1 no. Bay leaf, तेज पत्ता
10-12 no. Cashew Nuts, काजू
10-12 no. Raisins, किशमिश
3-4 large Potatoes (peeled & cut into diced), आलू
1 cup Water, पानी
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
1 medium Cauliflower (cut into florets), फूलगोभी
1 cup Fresh Green peas, हरे मटर
Prepared Curd Mixture, तैयार किया हुआ दही का मिश्रण
2-3 tbsp fresh Coriander leaves (chopped), धनिया पत्ता
650 gms Sella Basmati rice (soaked for ½ hr), भिगोए हुए सेला बासमती चावल
2-3 cups Water, पानी
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
1-2 tsp Ghee (for finishing), घी

For Curd Mixture
1 cup Curd (beaten), दही
1 tbsp Ginger Garlic paste, अदरक-लहसुन का पेस्ट
1 tbsp Coriander powder, धनिया पाउडर
1 tsp Degi Red Chilli powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर
1 tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर

For Alsi Ki Chutney
Salt, नमक 
¼ cup Flax Seeds, अलसी के बीज
3-4 no. Garlic cloves, लहसुन
2 no. Green Chillies (less spicy & roughly chopped), हरी मिर्च
2-3 tbsp fresh Coriander leaves (chopped), धनिया पत्ता
Toasted Flax seeds, भुने हुए अलसी के बीज
¾ cup Curd (beaten), दही

For Garnish
Mint Sprig, पुदीने का पत्ता
Green Chilli (slit into half), हरी मिर्च
Coriander Sprig, धनिया पत्ता

Process 
For Aloo Matar Ki Tehri
• In a handi, add ghee, once it's hot, add green cardamom, black cardamom, black peppercorns, cloves, mace, cinnamon stick, bay leaf, cashew nuts, raisins and saute for a minute.
• Add potatoes, water, cover it with the lid and let it cook for 4-5 minutes.
• Add salt to taste, cauliflower, fresh green peas, prepared curd mixture and cook for a while or until oil separates from the masala.
• Add fresh coriander leaves, soaked sella basmati rice, water, salt to taste, cover it with the lid and cook for 12-15 minutes on low flames or until it's cooked.
• Once tehri gets cooked properly then transfer it into the parat and add ghee for finishing and give it a good mix.
• Transfer it into the serving dish and garnish it with mint sprig, green chilli and coriander sprig.
• Serve hot with prepared alsi ki chutney.

For Curd Mixture
• In a bowl, add curd, ginger garlic paste, coriander powder, degi red chilli powder, turmeric powder and give it a good mix.
• Keep it aside for further use.

For Alsi Ki Chutney
• In a pan, add salt, flax seeds and roast for 2-3 minutes or until it splutters well.
• Transfer it into the tray and keep it aside for further use.
• In a mortar pestle, add garlic cloves, green chillies, fresh coriander leaves, toasted flax seeds and grind it into the coarsely paste.
• Transfer the paste into the bowl, add curd and give it a good mix.
• Keep it aside for further use.

title: Asli Dhaba Chicken | ढाबे वाली चिकन करी | Highway chicken curry recipe at home | Chef Ranveer Brar
description:
𝗗𝗛𝗔𝗕𝗔 𝗖𝗛𝗜𝗖𝗞𝗘𝗡 𝗖𝗨𝗥𝗥𝗬🔥 (𝙎𝙚𝙚 𝙙𝙚𝙩𝙖𝙞𝙡𝙚𝙙 𝙩𝙚𝙭𝙩 𝙧𝙚𝙘𝙞𝙥𝙚 𝙗𝙚𝙡𝙤𝙬) Tez आंच, bhuna masala aur ढाबे wali khushboo. Here's my recipe for a classic Dhaba Chicken Curry, bold flavours aur seedha dil tak swaad. Har bite में highway का asli maza.

***********************
𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡  𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣
🛒RB Store - https://www.amazon.in/shop/chefranveer
📟Kitchen Appliances - https://bit.ly/KitchenAppliancesIUse
🔪Knives I use - https://amzn.to/4kzSJVe

***********************
𝗥𝗘𝗖𝗜𝗣𝗘 𝗙𝗢𝗥 𝗗𝗛𝗔𝗕𝗔 𝗖𝗛𝗜𝗖𝗞𝗘𝗡 𝗖𝗨𝗥𝗥𝗬
Preparation time 10 minutes
Cooking time 25-30 minutes
Serve 2-4

Ingredients 
For Chicken Marination 
1 kg Chicken (thigh & drumstick), चिकन
Salt to taste,  नमक स्वादअनुसार
1 heaped tbsp Ginger Garlic paste, अदरक-लहसुन का पेस्ट
1 tbsp Degi Red Chilli powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर
2 tsp Mustard oil, सरसों का तेल

For Dhaba Style Chicken Curry
⅓ cup Mustard oil, सरसों का तेल
2-3 no. Green Cardamom, हरी इलायची
4-5 no. Black Peppercorns,  काली मिर्च के दाने
2-3 no. Cloves, लौंग
2 large Onions (roughly sliced), प्याज
2 medium Tomatoes (roughly chopped), टमाटर
4 large Tomatoes (puree), टमाटर प्यूरी
2 tbsp Ginger Garlic paste, अदरक-लहसुन का पेस्ट
1 tbsp Ghee, घी
1 heaped tbsp Degi Red Chilli powder,  देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर
1 heaped tbsp Coriander powder, धनिया पाउडर
½ tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
Marinated Chicken, मैरिनेटेड चिकन
3-4 cups Hot Water, गर्म पानी
5 no. Green Chillies (less spicy & chopped), हरी मिर्च
½ inch Ginger (peeled & julienned), अदरक
¼ cup fresh Coriander leaves (chopped), धनिया पत्ता
1 tbsp Tender Coriander stems (chopped), धनिया के डंठल
1 tsp Black Pepper powder, काली मिर्च पाउडर
½ tsp Garam masala, गरम मसाला

For Garnish 
Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता

Process
For Chicken Marination
• In a bowl, add chicken, salt to taste, ginger garlic paste, degi red chilli powder, mustard oil and marinate well.
• Keep it aside for further use.

For Dhaba Style Chicken Curry
• In a handi, add mustard oil, once it's smoky hot, add green cardamom, black peppercorns, cloves and splutter well.
• Add onions and cook for 5-6 minutes or until it's light golden in colour.
•Add tomatoes, tomato puree and cook for a while.
• Add ginger garlic paste, ghee and cook for another 4-5 minutes.
• Now, add degi red chilli powder, coriander powder, turmeric powder, salt to taste and cook for a minute.
• Add marinated chicken, hot water, give it a good mix, cover it with lid and let it simmer for 12-15 minutes or until chicken gets tender.
• Finish it with green chillies, ginger, fresh coriander leaves, black pepper powder, garam masala and give it a quick boil.
• Transfer it into the serving dish and garnish it with coriander sprig.
• Serve hot with roti and steam rice.

title: Forget your usual Paneer Gravy & try this! सूरति पनीर घोटाला | Paneer Pav Bhaji | Chef Ranveer Brar
description:
𝗦𝗨𝗥𝗔𝗧𝗜 𝗣𝗔𝗡𝗘𝗘𝗥 𝗚𝗛𝗢𝗧𝗔𝗟𝗔 - (𝙎𝙚𝙚 𝙙𝙚𝙩𝙖𝙞𝙡𝙚𝙙 𝙩𝙚𝙭𝙩 𝙧𝙚𝙘𝙞𝙥𝙚 𝙗𝙚𝙡𝙤𝙬) Surti Paneer Ghotala, a bold, buttery street-style dish from Surat, packed with spicy flavours and soft paneer. You can say, it's Paneer Bhurji meets Pav Bhaji! Made with rich masala, butter, and a hint of sweetness, this amazing Paneer gravy recipe pairs perfectly with pav. गुजराती स्ट्रीट फूड और दमदार स्वाद पसंद करने वालों के लिए एकदम परफेक्ट।

***********************
𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡  𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣
🛒RB Store - https://www.amazon.in/shop/chefranveer
📟Kitchen Appliances - https://bit.ly/KitchenAppliancesIUse
🔪Knives I use - https://amzn.to/4kzSJVe

***********************
𝗥𝗘𝗖𝗜𝗣𝗘 𝗙𝗢𝗥 𝗦𝗨𝗥𝗧𝗜 𝗣𝗔𝗡𝗘𝗘𝗥 𝗚𝗛𝗢𝗧𝗔𝗟𝗔
Preparation time 10 minutes
Cooking time 20-25 minutes
Serve 2-4 

Ingredients
For Paste
1 inch Ginger (peeled & roughly sliced), अदरक
1-2 tbsp Tender Coriander stems (chopped), धनिया के डंठल
5-6 no. Garlic cloves, लहसुन
3-4 no. Green Chillies (roughly chopped), हरी मिर्च
⅓ cup fresh Coriander leaves (chopped), धनिया पत्ता
1 tsp Degi Red Chilli powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर
½ tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर
1 tbsp Coriander powder, धनिया पाउडर
1 tsp Cumin seeds, जीरा
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार

For Surati Paneer Ghotala
2 tbsp Ghee, घी
1-2 tbsp Oil, तेल
Prepared paste, तैयार किया हुआ पेस्ट
1 ½ medium Onions (chopped), प्याज
1 large Capsicum (chopped), शिमला मिर्च
1 ½ medium Tomatoes (chopped), टमाटर
1 tbsp Butter (cubed), मक्खन
Marinated Paneer, मैरिनेटेड पनीर
1 cup Water, पानी
⅓ cup Water, पानी
Fried Paneer (chopped), तला हुआ पनीर
2-3 tbsp fresh Coriander leaves (chopped), धनिया पत्ता
½ cup Cheese (grated), चीज़

For Paneer Marination
200 gms Paneer (cut into thin slabs), पनीर
1-2 tsp Garam masala, गरम मसाला
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
½ tsp Oil 
600 gms Paneer (grated), पनीर
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
1 heaped tbsp Degi Red Chilli powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर

For Frying Paneer
2-3 heaped tbsp Oil, तेल
Marinated Paneer, मैरिनेटेड पनीर

For Garnish  
Fried Paneer, तला हुआ पनीर
Butter (cubed), मक्खन
Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता

Process 
For Paste
● In a bowl, add ginger, tender coriander stems, garlic, green chillies, fresh coriander leaves.
● Add degi red chilli powder, turmeric powder, coriander powder, cumin seeds and salt to taste.
● Transfer it into the mixer grinder jar and grind it into the smooth fine paste.
● Keep it aside for further use.

For Surati Paneer Ghotala
● In a shallow tawa or handi, add ghee, oil, once it's hot, add prepared paste and cook for 7-8 minutes until oil separates from the masala.
● Add onions, capsicum, tomatoes, butter and let it cook for another 4-5 minutes or until it's cooked.
● Add water to adjust the consistency, add fried paneer and cook for a while until it's cooked.
● Finish it with fresh coriander leaves, cheese and give it a good mix.
● Transfer it into the serving dish, garnish it with fried paneer, butter and coriander sprig.
● Serve hot with ladi pav and roti.

For Paneer Marination
● In a tray, place paneer slabs, sprinkle some garam masala, salt to taste, oil and marinate well.
● In a separate bowl, add grated paneer, salt to taste, degi red chilli powder and give it a good mix.
● Keep it aside for further use.

For Frying Paneer
● In a pan, add oil, once it's hot, add marinated paneer slabs and fry them until it's light golden in color and crispy on texture.
● Remove it into the absorbent sheet and keep it aside for further use.
   
***********************

title: No Onion-Garlic Jammu spl Rajma | आसान राजमा बीना प्याज़/ लहसुन | easy Rajma | Chef Ranveer Brar
description:
JAMMU STYLE RAJMA - (𝙎𝙚𝙚 𝙙𝙚𝙩𝙖𝙞𝙡𝙚𝙙 𝙩𝙚𝙭𝙩 𝙧𝙚𝙘𝙞𝙥𝙚 𝙗𝙚𝙡𝙤𝙬) Kabhi try kiya bina onion-garlic wala Rajma?  Yeh Jammu style special Rajma aapko surprise kar dega apne rich aur balanced flavours se.

***********************
𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡  𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣
🛒RB Store - https://www.amazon.in/shop/chefranveer
📟Kitchen Appliances - https://bit.ly/KitchenAppliancesIUse
🔪Knives I use - https://amzn.to/4kzSJVe

***********************
𝗥𝗘𝗖𝗜𝗣𝗘 𝗙𝗢𝗥 Jammu Style Rajma 
Preparation time 10 minutes
Cooking time 25-30 minutes
Serve 2-4 

Ingredients 
For Jammu Style Rajma 
500 gms Kidney beans (soaked overnight), भिगोया हुआ राजमा
Remaining Water, बचा हुआ पानी
Water as required, पानी
3 no. Green Chillies (less spicy & roughly chopped), हरी मिर्च
½ inch Ginger (peeled & roughly chopped), अदरक
2 no. Black Cardamom, बड़ी इलायची
1 tbsp Black Peppercorns, काली मिर्च के दाने
1 tsp Sugar, चीनी
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
1 tbsp Tender Coriander stems (chopped), धनिया के डंठल
1 tsp Degi Red Chilli powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर
½ tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर
A pinch of Asafoetida, हींग
2 tbsp Ghee, घी
Prepared Tadka, तैयार किया हुआ तड़का
1 ½ tsp Prepared masala, तैयार किया हुआ मसाला
1 tsp Lemon juice, नींबू का रस

For Dry Masala
Salt, नमक 
2 tbsp Black Peppercorns, काली मिर्च के दाने
¼ tsp Fenugreek seeds, मेथी दाना
1 ½ tsp Cumin seeds, जीरा
1 tbsp Fennel seeds, सौंफ
4-5 no. Black Cardamom, बड़ी इलायची
3-4 no. Cloves, लौंग
1 tbsp dry Fenugreek leaves, कसूरी मेथी

For Tadka
3-4 tbsp Butter (cubed), मक्खन
1 tbsp Ghee, घी
1 tbsp Oil, तेल
1 inch Ginger (peeled & finely chopped), अदरक
3-4 no. Green chillies (less spicy & chopped), हरी मिर्च
2 medium Tomatoes (chopped), टमाटर
¼ cup fresh Coriander leaves (finely chopped), धनिया पत्ता
2 tbsp Butter (cubed), मक्खन
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार

For Garnish
Butter (cubed), मक्खन
Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता

Process  
For Jammu Style Rajma 
● In a cooker, add the soaked kidney beans along with the remaining soaking water, additional water as required, green chillies, and ginger.
● Add black cardamom, black peppercorns, sugar, salt to taste, tender coriander stems. 
● Add degi red chilli powder, turmeric powder, a pinch of asafoetida, ghee, give it a good mix, cover it with the lid and cook for 5-6 whistles or until it's 80-90% cooked.
● Now, add prepared tadka, prepared masala, and cook for a while until it's cooked.
● Finish it with lemon juice and give it a good mix.
● Transfer it into the serving dish and garnish with butter and coriander sprig.
● Serve hot with roti, naan and steam rice.

For Dry Masala 
● In a pan, add salt , black peppercorns, fenugreek seeds, cumin seeds, fennel seeds,and  black cardamom. 
● Add Cloves, dry fenugreek leaves and dry roast them for 2-3 minutes.
● Transfer to a mixer grinder jar and grind into a fine powder.
● Keep it aside for further use.

For Tadka
● In a pan, add butter, ghee, oil, once it's hot, add ginger, green chillies, tomatoes and cook for 4-5 minutes or until tomatoes get mushy in texture.
● Add fresh coriander leaves, butter, salt to taste and let it cook for another 2-3 minutes.
● Keep it aside for further use.

title: Best & Easy Paneer Recipe | झटपट आसान तरी वाला पनीर | Punjabi Tari wala Paneer | Chef Ranveer Brar
description:
𝗣𝗨𝗡𝗝𝗔𝗕𝗜 𝗧𝗔𝗥𝗜 𝗪𝗔𝗟𝗔 𝗣𝗔𝗡𝗘𝗘𝗥 - (𝙎𝙚𝙚 𝙙𝙚𝙩𝙖𝙞𝙡𝙚𝙙 𝙩𝙚𝙭𝙩 𝙧𝙚𝙘𝙞𝙥𝙚 𝙗𝙚𝙡𝙤𝙬) Mehmaan जो भी हों , Paneer ki gravy sabji, vo भी tari wali paneer is mandatory!! This Paneer recipe is close to every Punjabi Mumma's heart :)

***********************
𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡  𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣
🛒RB Store - https://www.amazon.in/shop/chefranveer
📟Kitchen Appliances - https://bit.ly/KitchenAppliancesIUse
🔪Knives I use - https://amzn.to/4kzSJVe

***********************
𝗥𝗘𝗖𝗜𝗣𝗘 𝗙𝗢𝗥  Punjabi Style Tari Wala Paneer
Preparation time 10 minutes
Cooking time 20-25 minutes
Serve 2-4 

Ingredients
For Ginger Garlic Green Chilli Paste
3 no. Green chillies (less spicy & roughly chopped), हरी मिर्च
1 inch Ginger (peeled & roughly chopped), अदरक
3-4 no. Garlic cloves (roughly chopped), लहसुन   
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार

For Punjabi Style Tari Wala Paneer
2-3 tbsp Ghee, घी
A pinch of Fenugreek seeds, मेथी दाना
1 tsp Cumin seeds, जीरा
Prepared Ginger Garlic Green Chilli paste, अदरक लहसुन हरी मिर्च का पेस्ट
1 no. each Black & Green Cardamom (crushed), बड़ी और हरी इलायची
1 tbsp Tender Coriander stems (finely chopped), धनिया के डंठल
2 medium Onions (grated), प्याज़
1 tbsp Ghee, घी
1 tbsp Oil, तेल
1 tbsp Coriander powder, धनिया पाउडर
1 tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर
1 heaped tsp Degi Red Chilli powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर
Little Water, पानी
2-3 large Tomatoes (puree), टमाटर की प्यूरी
2 cups Hot Water, गर्म पानी
2 tbsp dry Fenugreek leaves (soaked) भिगोई हुई कसूरी मेथी
Paneer (soaked), भिगोया हुआ पनीर
Salt to taste,  नमक स्वादअनुसार

For Frying Paneer
Oil for frying, तलने के लिए तेल
800 gms Paneer (cut into medium size cubed), पनीर

For Soaking Paneer
Warm Water, गर्म पानी
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
Fried Paneer, तला हुआ पनीर

For Garnish
Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता

Process
For Ginger Garlic Green Chilli Paste
• In a mortar and pestle, add green chillies, ginger, garlic, salt to taste and grind it into the coarsely paste.
• Keep it aside for further use.

For Punjabi Style Tari Wala Paneer
• In a handi, add ghee, once it's hot, add fenugreek seeds, cumin seeds, prepared ginger garlic green chilli paste and saute for a minute.
• Add black & green cardamom, tender coriander stems, onion, ghee, oil and cook for 4-5 minutes until onion gets light golden in colour.
• Add coriander powder, turmeric powder, degi red chili powder and let it cook for 2 minutes.
• Add little water, tomato puree and cook for another 4-5 minutes until oil separates from the masala.
• Now, add hot water, soaked dry fenugreek leaves, cover it with the lid and let it simmer for a while.
• Add soaked paneer, salt to taste and cook for 5-6 minutes or until it's cooked.
• Transfer it into the serving dish and garnish it with coriander sprig.
• Serve hot with roti or naan.

For Frying Paneer
• In a pan, add oil for frying, once it's hot, add paneer and fry them until light golden in colour.
• Transfer the paneer into the absorbent sheet and keep it aside for further use.

For Soaking Paneer
• In a bowl, add warm water, salt to taste and give it a good mix.
• Add fried paneer and leave it aside for a while until the paneer gets softs texture.

title: ढाबे जैसा अंडा करी घर पर | Palak Anda Curry 🔥 | spl साग Egg Curry | Chef Ranveer Brar
description:
𝗣𝗔𝗟𝗔𝗞/ 𝗦𝗔𝗔𝗚 𝗔𝗡𝗗𝗔 𝗖𝗨𝗥𝗥𝗬 
(𝙎𝙚𝙚 𝙙𝙚𝙩𝙖𝙞𝙡𝙚𝙙 𝙩𝙚𝙭𝙩 𝙧𝙚𝙘𝙞𝙥𝙚 𝙗𝙚𝙡𝙤𝙬) Palak और anda, ek unexpected जोडी, lekin taste ऐसा कि seedha dil jeet ले! Silky saag/Palak gravy में doobe हुए ande, simple, & flavour standout.

***********************
𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡  𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣
🛒RB Store - https://www.amazon.in/shop/chefranveer
📟Kitchen Appliances - https://bit.ly/KitchenAppliancesIUse
🔪Knives I use - https://amzn.to/4kzSJVe

***********************
𝗥𝗘𝗖𝗜𝗣𝗘 𝗙𝗢𝗥 𝗣𝗔𝗟𝗔𝗞/ 𝗦𝗔𝗔𝗚 𝗔𝗡𝗗𝗔 𝗖𝗨𝗥𝗥𝗬
Preparation time 10 minutes 
Cooking time 25-30 minutes 
Serve 2-4

Ingredients
For Anda Saag Curry
2-3 tbsp Ghee, घी
1-2 tbsp Oil, तेल
1 no. Bay leaf, तेज पत्ता
1 tsp Cumin seeds, जीरा
1-2 no. dry Red chillies (roughly torn), सूखी लाल मिर्च
2 medium Onions (roughly sliced), प्याज
Salt to taste, नमक स्वाद अनुसार
1 heaped tbsp Coriander powder, धनिया पाउडर
1 tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर
1 tbsp Degi red chilli powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर
2 large Tomatoes (roughly diced), टमाटर
1 heaped tbsp Ginger Garlic paste, अदरक लहसुन का पेस्ट
¼ cup Curd (beaten), दही
1 tbsp Tender Coriander stems (finely chopped), धनिया के डंठल
2 medium bunch Spinach leaves (cleaned, washed & roughly chopped), पालक
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
1 tsp Sugar, चीनी
1 cup Water, पानी
1 ½ cups Water, पानी
2 heaped tbsp Prepared dry masala, तैयार किया हुआ मसाला
1 tsp Sugar, चीनी
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
10-12 no. Hard boiled eggs, उबले हुए अंडे
1 tbsp dry fenugreek leaves (crushed), कसूरी मेथी
1 tbsp Prepared dry masala, तैयार किया हुआ मसाला
1 tsp Ghee, घी
½ cup Water, पानी

For Dry Masala
4-5 no. Cloves, लौंग
3 no. Black cardamom, बड़ी इलायची
2 heaped tbsp Black peppercorns, काली मिर्च के दाने
1 tsp small Mustard seeds, छोटी राई
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
For Chutney
½ tbsp Cumin seeds, जीरा
2-3 tbsp Flax seeds, अलसी के बीज
2 no. Green chillies (less spicy & roughly chopped), हरी मिर्च
1 inch Ginger (peeled & roughly chopped), अदरक
1 ½ medium Onions (sliced), प्याज
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
⅓ cup Curd (beaten), दही
2-3 tbsp fresh Coriander leaves (finely chopped), धनिया पत्ता

For Garnish
Prepared chutney, तैयार की हुई चटनी
Chilli oil, मिर्च का तेल
Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता

Process
For Anda Saag Curry
 • In a handi, add ghee, oil, once it's hot, add bay leaf, cumin seeds, dry red chillies and saute for a minute.
 • Add onions, salt to taste and cook for a while until onion gets light golden in colour.
 • Add coriander powder, turmeric powder, degi red chilli powder and let it cook for a minute.
 • Add tomatoes, ginger garlic paste, curd, tender coriander stems and cook for 4-5 minutes until oil separates from the masala.
 • Add spinach leaves, salt to taste, sugar and cook for another 4-5 minutes until it's cooked.
 • Now, add water, give it a good mix, cover it with the lid and let it cook for a while until the base of the gravy gets cooked.
 • Once it's cooked, use a hand blender and blend the gravy into the coarse paste.
 • Add water to adjust the consistency, prepare dry masala, sugar, salt to taste, hard boiled eggs, give it a good mix, cover it with the lid and let it simmer for 7-8 minutes or until it's cooked.
 • Finish it with crushed dry fenugreek leaves, prepared dry masala, ghee, water and give it a quick boil.
 • Transfer to a serving dish and garnish with prepared chutney, chilli oil and coriander sprig.
 • Serve hot with roti and steam rice.

For Dry Masala
 • In a pan, add cloves, black cardamom, black peppercorns, small mustard seeds, salt to taste and dry roast them on low flames for at least 2-3 minutes or until it's aromatic.
 • Transfer it into the mixer grinder jar and grind it into the smooth fine powder.
 • Keep it aside for further use.

For Chutney
 • In a pan, add cumin seeds, flax seeds and roast them until they splutter and release its aroma.
 • Transfer it into the mortar pestle and grind it into coarse powder.
 • Transfer it into the bowl and add, green chillies, ginger, onions, salt to taste, curd, fresh coriander leaves and give it a good mix and keep it aside for further use.

title: Home Style Dal Makhani | दाल मखनी ऐसी जो घर की याद दिलाए | best Dal Makhani | Chef Ranveer Brar
description:
𝗛𝗢𝗠𝗘 𝗦𝗧𝗬𝗟𝗘 𝗗𝗔𝗟 𝗠𝗔𝗞𝗛𝗔𝗡𝗜
(𝙎𝙚𝙚 𝙙𝙚𝙩𝙖𝙞𝙡𝙚𝙙 𝙩𝙚𝙭𝙩 𝙧𝙚𝙘𝙞𝙥𝙚 𝙗𝙚𝙡𝙤𝙬) Dheemi आंच पर pakti dal aur ghar ki यादें.
Home Style Dal Makhani, saadgi mein hi asli swaad. Every bite feels like home.

***********************
𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡  𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣
🛒RB Store - https://www.amazon.in/shop/chefranveer
📟Kitchen Appliances - https://bit.ly/KitchenAppliancesIUse
🔪Knives I use - https://amzn.to/4kzSJVe

***********************
𝗥𝗘𝗖𝗜𝗣𝗘 𝗙𝗢𝗥 𝗛𝗢𝗠𝗘 𝗦𝗧𝗬𝗟𝗘 𝗗𝗔𝗟 𝗠𝗔𝗞𝗛𝗔𝗡𝗜
Preparation time 10 minutes 
Cooking time 30-35 minutes
Serve 2-4 

Ingredients
For Washing & Soaking Dal 
500 gms Whole Black Gram, साबुत उड़द की दाल
Water as required, पानी
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
Water as required, पानी

For Cooking Dal
1-2 tbsp Ghee, घी
1 no. Green chilli (less spicy & cut into half), हरी मिर्च
1 tsp Cumin seeds, जीरा
1-2 tbsp Tender Coriander stems (finely chopped), धनिया के डंठल
Soaked urad dal, भीगी हुई उड़द दाल
1 tsp Degi red chilli powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर
½ tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
4-5 cups Water, पानी

For Home Style Dal Makhani
2-3 tbsp Ghee, घी
3-4 no. Garlic cloves (finely chopped), लहसुन
1 inch Ginger (peeled & finely chopped), अदरक
1 large Onion (finely chopped), प्याज
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
3 no. Green chillies (less spicy & finely chopped), हरी मिर्च
1 large Tomato (finely chopped), टमाटर
1 tsp Degi red chilli powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर
1 tsp Coriander powder, धनिया पाउडर
¼ tsp Cumin powder, जीरा पाउडर
2-3 medium Tomatoes (puree), टमाटर प्यूरी
1 tsp Ghee, घी
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
2-3 cups Water, पानी
Cooked dal, पकी हुई दाल
2 tbsp Butter (cubed), मक्खन
Prepared tadka, तैयार किया हुआ तड़का

For Tadka
3-4 tbsp Butter (cubed), मक्खन
1 tbsp dry Fenugreek leaves (crushed), कसूरी मेथी
1 heaped tsp Degi red chilli powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर
2-3 tbsp fresh Coriander leaves (finely chopped), धनिया पत्ता

For Garnish
Fresh cream, ताज़ा मलाई
Butter (cubed), मक्खन
Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता

Process
For Washing & Soaking Dal
 • In a bowl, add whole urad dal, salt to taste and rub the dal well.
 • Add water as required and wash well.
 • Rinse the dal, add water, and keep it aside overnight.

For Cooking Dal
 • In a pressure cooker, add ghee, once it's hot, add green chilli, cumin seeds, tender coriander stems and saute for a minute.
 • Add soaked urad dal, degi red chilli powder, turmeric powder, salt to taste, water, cover it with the lid and let it cook for 4-5 whistles or until it's cooked.
 • Once dal gets cooked, leave it aside to depressurize the cooker.

For Home Style Dal Makhni
 • In a handi, add ghee, once it's hot, add garlic, cook for a minute.
 • Add ginger, onion, salt to taste and let it cook for a while until onion gets light golden in colour.
 • Add green chillies, tomato and cook for another 4-5 minutes until tomatoes get mushy in texture.
 • Add degi red chilli powder, coriander powder, cumin powder, fresh tomato puree, ghee and cook for a while until oil separates from the masala.
 • Now, add salt to taste, water, cooked dal and let it simmer for at least 15-20 minutes on low to medium flames.
 • Finish it with butter, prepared tadka and give it a quick boil.
 • Transfer it into the serving dish, garnish it with fresh cream, butter and coriander sprig.
 • Serve hot with naan and steam rice.

For Tadka
 • In a pan, add butter, once it melts, add crushed dry fenugreek leaves, degi red chilli powder, fresh coriander leaves and cook for a minute until it's aromatic.
 • Turn off the flames and keep it aside for further use.

title: ऐसा सोया कीमा कि मटन भूल जाएंगे! Juicy Soya Keema | Veg Keema Pav | Chef Ranveer Brar
description:
𝗝𝗨𝗜𝗖𝗬 𝗦𝗢𝗬𝗔 𝗞𝗘𝗘𝗠𝗔 - (𝙎𝙚𝙚 𝙙𝙚𝙩𝙖𝙞𝙡𝙚𝙙 𝙩𝙚𝙭𝙩 𝙧𝙚𝙘𝙞𝙥𝙚 𝙗𝙚𝙡𝙤𝙬) Best Keema Pav recipe! This Soya/ soy Keema is so juicy and flavourful that you just won't miss your favourite Mutton Keema :) try this today and don't forget to get some Pav!

***********************
𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡  𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣
🛒RB Store - https://www.amazon.in/shop/chefranveer
📟Kitchen Appliances - https://bit.ly/KitchenAppliancesIUse
🔪Knives I use - https://amzn.to/4kzSJVe

***********************
𝗥𝗘𝗖𝗜𝗣𝗘 𝗙𝗢𝗥 𝗝𝗨𝗜𝗖𝗬 𝗦𝗢𝗬𝗔 𝗞𝗘𝗘𝗠𝗔
Preparation time 10 minutes 
Cooking time 25-30 minutes 
Serve 2-4 

Ingredients 
For Cooking Soya Keema
7-8 no. Garlic cloves, लहसुन
1-2 tbsp Ghee, घी
1 tsp Cumin seeds, जीरा
300 gms Soya granules, सोया कीमा
1 tbsp Tender Coriander stems (finely chopped), धनिये के डंठल
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
2 cups Curd (beaten), दही
2 ½ medium Tomatoes (cut into quarters), टमाटर
2-3 cups Water, पानी
1 tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर
½ tsp Sugar, चीनी

For Soya Keema
¼ cup Ghee, घी
2 large Onions (roughly sliced), प्याज
1 heaped tbsp Coriander powder, धनिया पाउडर 
1 tbsp Ginger Garlic paste, अदरक लहसुन का पेस्ट
1 cup fresh Green peas, हरे मटर
1 tbsp Degi red chilli powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर
½ cup Dill leaves (finely chopped), सोआ के पत्ते
¼ cup Water, पानी
Cooked soya keema, पका हुआ सोया कीमा
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
1 tsp Sugar, चीनी
½ tsp Garam masala, गरम मसाला
⅓ cup Dill leaves (finely chopped), सोआ के पत्ते
3 no. Green chillies (less spicy & finely chopped), हरी मिर्च
2-3 tbsp fresh Coriander leaves (finely chopped), धनिया पत्ता
1 medium Tomato (chopped), टमाटर
2-3 tbsp Ghee, घी

For Garnish
Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता
Lemon wedge, नींबू की फांक

Process   
For Cooking Soya Keema
● In a pressure cooker, add garlic, ghee, cumin seeds and cook for a minute.
● Add soya granules, tender coriander stems, salt to taste and cook for a while or until the soya granules get light golden in colour.
● Add curd, tomatoes, water, turmeric powder, sugar and give it a quick boil.
● Now, cover it with the lid and let it cook for 1-2 whistles or until it's cooked.
● Keep it aside to depressurize the cooker.

For Soya Keema
● In a handi, add ghee, once it's hot, add onions and cook for 4-5 minutes or until onions get translucent in texture.
● Add coriander powder, ginger garlic paste and cook for another 2-3 minutes.
● Add fresh green peas, degi red chili powder, dill leaves and cook for a minute.
● Now, add water, give it a quick boil and add cooked soya keema, salt to taste, sugar and let it cook for 5-6 minutes or until it's cooked.
● Finish it with garam masala, dill leaves, green chillies, fresh coriander leaves, tomato, ghee, give it a good mix and cook for a minute.
● Transfer it into the serving dish and garnish it with coriander sprig and lemon wedges.
● Serve hot with roti and ladi pav.

title: Butter Soft Murgh Malai Kofta | मक्खन जैसा मुर्ग़ कोफ्ता | softest chicken kofta | Chef Ranveer Brar
description:
MURGH MALAI KOFTA CURRY - (𝙎𝙚𝙚 𝙙𝙚𝙩𝙖𝙞𝙡𝙚𝙙 𝙩𝙚𝙭𝙩 𝙧𝙚𝙘𝙞𝙥𝙚 𝙗𝙚𝙡𝙤𝙬) This Creamiest Murgh Malai Kofta is smooth, rich and absolutely flavour packed! मलाईदार चिकन कोफ्ता करी जो हर bite में melt हो जाती है. Learn the secret tips to make perfect chicken kofta curry at home.

***********************
𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡  𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣
🛒RB Store - https://www.amazon.in/shop/chefranveer
📟Kitchen Appliances - https://bit.ly/KitchenAppliancesIUse
🔪Knives I use - https://amzn.to/4kzSJVe

***********************
𝗥𝗘𝗖𝗜𝗣𝗘 𝗙𝗢𝗥 Murgh Malai Kofta Curry
Preparation time 10 minutes
Cooking time 25-30 minutes
Serve 2-4 

Ingredients
For Keema Marination
1 kg Chicken minced, चिकन कीमा
1 tbsp Tender Coriander stems (finely chopped), धनिया के डंठल
4-5 no. Green chillies (less spicy & finely chopped), हरी मिर्च
1 tbsp Ginger Garlic paste, अदरक लहसुन का पेस्ट
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
1 cup Breadcrumbs, ब्रेडक्रम्ब्स
1-2 tbsp Butter (cubed), मक्खन

For Frying Kofta
1-2 tbsp Oil for shallow frying, तेल
Prepared koftas, तैयार किये हुए कोफ्ते

For Gravy
2-3 tbsp Ghee, घी
2 large Onions (sliced), प्याज
10-12 no. Cashew Nuts, काजू
2 cups Curd (beaten), दही
1 heaped tbsp Ginger Garlic paste, अदरक लहसुन का पेस्ट
2-3 cups Hot water, गर्म पानी

For Dry Masala
2-3 heaped tbsp Black peppercorns, काली मिर्च के दाने
7-8 no. Cloves, लौंग
10-12 no. Green cardamom, हरी इलायची
2 no. Mace, जावित्री
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार

For Kofta Curry
Prepared gravy, तैयार की हुई ग्रेवी
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
2 no. Green chillies (slit into half), हरी मिर्च
Fried koftas, तले हुए कोफ्ते
A pinch of sugar, चीनी
1 tbsp Ghee, घी
¼ cup Fresh cream, ताज़ा मलाई

For Tadka
1-2 tbsp Ghee, घी
3 no. dry Kashmiri red chillies, सूखी कश्मीरी लाल मिर्च
1 tsp Degi red chili powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर
Little water, पानी

For Garnish
Prepared dry masala, तैयार किया हुआ मसाला
Prepared tadka, तैयार किया हुआ तड़का
Silver vark, चांदी का वर्क
Dry fenugreek leaves (crushed), कसूरी मेथी
Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता

Process
For Keema Marination
● In a bowl, add chicken minced, tender coriander stems, green chillies, ginger garlic paste, salt to taste, breadcrumbs and marinate well.
● Add butter and give it a good mix.
● Divide the mixture into medium size lemon balls to make a kofta shape.
● Place them on a tray or dish and keep it aside for further use.

For Frying Kofta
● In a pan, add oil for frying. Once it's hot, add one by one prepared koftas and cook them for 5-6 minutes or until it's half cooked.
● Transfer them to a tray or dish and keep it aside for further use.

For Gravy
● In a handi, add ghee. Once it's hot, add onions and cook them until onions get translucent in texture.
● Add cashew nuts, curd, ginger- garlic paste, and cook for a while or until oil separates from the masala.
● Add hot water, cover it with the lid and let it cook for 10-12 minutes on low to medium flames.
● Once it's cooked then keep it aside to cool down the temperature.
● Transfer the mixture into the mixer grinder or blend it with the hand blender to make a smooth fine paste.
● Keep it aside for further use.

For Dry Masala
● Heat a pan, add black peppercorns, cloves, green cardamom, mace, salt to taste and roast for 2-3 minutes until it's aromatic.
● Transfer it into the mixer grinder jar and grind it into fine powder.
● Keep it aside for further use.

For Kofta Curry
● In a handi, add prepared gravy, salt to taste, green chillies and give it a quick boil.
● Add fried koftas, a pinch of sugar and cook for another 4-5 minutes.
● Finish it with ghee, fresh cream and give it a good mix.
● Transfer to a serving dish and garnish with prepared dry masala, prepared tadka, silver vark, crushed dry fenugreek leaves and coriander sprig.
● Serve hot with roti or naan.

title: Jodhpuri Kabuli Pulao | दावत में बनाएं जोधपुरी काबुली पुलाव | Royal Veg Pulao | Chef Ranveer Brar
description:
𝗝𝗢𝗗𝗛𝗣𝗨𝗥𝗜 𝗞𝗔𝗕𝗨𝗟𝗜 𝗣𝗨𝗟𝗔𝗢 - (𝙎𝙚𝙚 𝙙𝙚𝙩𝙖𝙞𝙡𝙚𝙙 𝙩𝙚𝙭𝙩 𝙧𝙚𝙘𝙞𝙥𝙚 𝙗𝙚𝙡𝙤𝙬) This pulao is fit for a feast! It's rich, flavoursome and स्वाद एक दम कमाल, but iske cooking mein no Dum :) Try my recipe for this special royal Jodhpuri Pulao today.

***********************
𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡  𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣
🛒RB Store - https://www.amazon.in/shop/chefranveer
📟Kitchen Appliances - https://bit.ly/KitchenAppliancesIUse
🔪Knives I use - https://amzn.to/4kzSJVe

***********************
𝗥𝗘𝗖𝗜𝗣𝗘 𝗙𝗢𝗥 𝗝𝗢𝗗𝗛𝗣𝗨𝗥𝗜 𝗞𝗔𝗕𝗨𝗟𝗜 𝗣𝗨𝗟𝗔𝗢 
Preparation time 10 minutes
Cooking time 30-35 minutes
Serve 2-4 

Ingredients
For Cooking Rice
650 gms Sella basmati rice (soaked for ½ hr), भीगे हुए सेला बासमती चावल
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
2 tbsp Ghee, घी
2-3 cups Water, पानी
¾ cup fresh Green peas, ताज़ी हरी मटर

For Curd Mixture
1 ½ cups Curd (beaten), दही
1 tbsp Ginger Garlic paste, अदरक लहसुन का पेस्ट
½ tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर
1 tsp Degi red chilli powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर
1 tsp Coriander powder, धनिया पाउडर

For Gravy
2 tbsp Ghee, घी
1 tsp Cumin seeds, जीरा
2 no. dry Kashmiri red chillies, सूखी कश्मीरी लाल मिर्च
Prepared curd mixture, तैयार किया हुआ दही का मिश्रण
1 tbsp Coriander powder, धनिया पाउडर
½ cup Fresh cream, ताज़ा मलाई
Fried vegetables, तली हुई सब्जियां
2-3 tbsp fresh Coriander leaves (finely chopped), धनिया पत्ता
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार

For Frying Vegetables & Nuts
Oil for frying, तलने के लिए तेल
½ medium Purple yam (washed, peeled & cut into thick slices) कंद
2-3 medium Potatoes (peeled & cut into thick slices), आलू
½ cup Cashew nuts, काजू
2-3 large Onions (cut into thick roundels), प्याज
5-6 no. Bread slices (trimmed edges & diced), ब्रेड के टुकड़े
½ medium Cauliflower (cut into florets), फूलगोभी

For Assembling Pulao
Cooked rice, पके हुए चावल
Fried cashew nuts, तले हुए काजू  
Fried bread, तली हुई ब्रेड
Cooked rice, पके हुए चावल
Prepared gravy, तैयार की हुई ग्रेवी
Fried cashew nuts, तले हुए काजू
Fried bread, तली हुई ब्रेड
Cooked rice, पके हुए चावल
Saffron milk, केसर का दूध
fresh Coriander leaves (finely chopped), धनिया पत्ता

For Garnish
Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता

Process
For Cooking Rice
• In a handi, add soaked sella basmati rice, salt to taste, ghee, water and give it a good mix.
• Cover it with the lid and cook for 4-5 minutes until it's half cooked.
• Open the lid and add fresh green peas, give it a good mix and let it cook for another 5-6 minutes or until it's cooked.
• Transfer the rice into the parat or tray and keep it aside for further use.

For Curd Mixture
• In a bowl, add curd, ginger garlic paste, turmeric powder, degi red chilli powder, coriander powder and give it a good mix.
• Keep it aside for further use.

For Gravy
• In a handi, add ghee, once it's hot, add cumin seeds, dry kashmiri red chillies and cook for a minute.
• Add prepared curd mixture, coriander powder and let it cook for 7-8 minutes or until oil separates from the gravy.
• Add fresh cream, fried vegetables, fresh coriander leaves, salt to taste and give it a good mix.
• Keep it aside for further use.

For Frying Vegetables
• In a kadai, heat oil for frying, add one by one batches of vegetables, nuts, bread slices and fry them until crisp in texture and light golden in colour.
• Remove onto an absorbent sheet and keep it aside for further use.

For Assembling Pulao
• In a handi, add a layer of cooked rice, add fried cashewnuts, fried bread and layer evenly.
• Repeat the layers with cooked rice, prepared gravy, fried cashew nuts, fried bread, cooked rice and layer it nicely.
• Add saffron milk, fresh coriander leaves and spread it evenly on top.
• Heat the tawa and place the handi on the tawa, cover it with the lid and allow to cook for 2-3 minutes on high flame.
• Reduce the flame and cook it  for 15-20 minutes.
• Once pulao gets cooked well, turn off the flame and keep it aside for resting for 10-12 minutes.
• Serve it on a serving plate and garnish it with coriander sprig.
• Serve hot.

title: Mumbai Masala Egg Curry | मुंबई मसाला अंडा करी | Mirch Pulao | Mumbai Egg Masala | Chef RanveerBrar
description:
𝗠𝗨𝗠𝗕𝗔𝗜 𝗦𝗧𝗬𝗟𝗘 𝗠𝗔𝗦𝗔𝗟𝗔 𝗘𝗚𝗚 𝗖𝗨𝗥𝗥𝗬 𝘄𝗶𝘁𝗵 𝗟𝗔𝗟 𝗠𝗜𝗥𝗖𝗛 𝗣𝗨𝗟𝗔𝗢 (𝙎𝙚𝙚 𝙙𝙚𝙩𝙖𝙞𝙡𝙚𝙙 𝙩𝙚𝙭𝙩 𝙧𝙚𝙘𝙞𝙥𝙚 𝙗𝙚𝙡𝙤𝙬) Mumbai spl मसाला Anda/egg curry, seedhi दिल से bani. Saath में halka sa laal mirch🌶️ ka pulao, that perfectly complements the gravy. Simple khana, lekin swaad poora Bambaiya. 

***********************
𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡  𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣
🛒RB Store - https://www.amazon.in/shop/chefranveer
📟Kitchen Appliances - https://bit.ly/KitchenAppliancesIUse
🔪Knives I use - https://amzn.to/4kzSJVe

***********************
𝗥𝗘𝗖𝗜𝗣𝗘 𝗙𝗢𝗥 𝗠𝗨𝗠𝗕𝗔𝗜 𝗦𝗧𝗬𝗟𝗘 𝗠𝗔𝗦𝗔𝗟𝗔 𝗘𝗚𝗚 𝗖𝗨𝗥𝗥𝗬 𝘄𝗶𝘁𝗵 𝗟𝗔𝗟 𝗠𝗜𝗥𝗖𝗛 𝗣𝗨𝗟𝗔𝗢
Preparation time 10 minutes
Cooking time 25-30 minutes 
Serve 2-4

Ingredients 
For Paste 
7-8 no. Garlic cloves, लहसुन
1 inch Ginger (peeled & julienned), अदरक
1 cup fresh Coriander leaves (roughly torn), धनिया पत्ता
5-6 no. Green chillies (less spicy & roughly chopped), हरी मिर्च
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
1 tbsp Oil, तेल

For Mumbai Style Masala Egg Curry 
2-3 heaped tbsp Oil, तेल
7-8 no. Black peppercorns, काली मिर्च के दाने
2-4 no. Cloves, लौंग
1 tsp Cumin seeds, जीरा
2 medium Onions (sliced), प्याज
Prepared Paste, तैयार किया हुआ पेस्ट
½ cup Curd (beaten), दही
2 heaped tbsp Coriander powder, धनिया पाउडर
½ tbsp Degi red chilli powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर
1 tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर
1 cup Water, पानी
2 tbsp Pav bhaji masala, पाव भाजी मसाला
1 cup Water, पानी
8 no. hard Boiled Eggs, उबले हुए अंडे
1 tsp Sugar, चीनी

For Laal Mirch ka Pulao
2-3 tbsp Ghee, घी
1 tsp Cumin seeds, जीरा
2-3 no. dry Kashmiri red chillies (broken into half), सूखी कश्मीरी लाल मिर्च
1 heaped tbsp Degi red chilli powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर
1 cup Water, पानी
600 gms Sella basmati rice (soaked for ½ hr), भीगे हुए सेला बासमती चावल
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
4-5 cups Water, पानी
2 tbsp Ghee, घी

For Salad 
1 tsp Tender Coriander stem (finely chopped), धनिये के डंठल
1 no. Green chilli (finely chopped), हरी मिर्च
½ small Onion (roughly sliced), प्याज
1 tsp Lemon juice, नींबू का रस
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार

For Garnish 
Dry fenugreek leaves (crushed), कसूरी मेथी
Prepared Salad, सलाद 
Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता

Process
For Paste
 • In a bowl, add garlic, ginger, fresh coriander leaves, green chillies, salt to taste, oil and mix well.
 • Transfer it into the mixer grinder jar and grind it into the smooth fine paste.
 • Keep it aside for further use.

For Mumbai Style Masala Egg Curry
 • In a handi, add oil, once it's hot, add black peppercorns, cloves, cumin seeds and let it splutter well.
 • Add onions and cook for 2-3 minutes or until onion gets translucent in texture.
 • Add prepared paste, curd, coriander powder, degi red chilli powder, turmeric powder and cook for another 7-8 minutes or until oil separates from the masala.
 • Add water, pav bhaji masala and give it a quick boil.
 • Now, add boiled eggs, water, sugar and let it simmer for 4-5 minutes on medium flames.
 • Transfer it into the serving dish and garnish it with prepared salad and coriander sprig.
 • Serve hot with prepared lal mirch ka pulao.

For Laal Mirch Ka Pulao
• In a handi, add ghee, once it's hot, add cumin seeds, dry kashmiri red chillies and saute for a minute.
• Add degi red chilli powder, cook for a minute and then add water to prevent the discoloration of chilli powder and give it a quick boil.
• Add sella basmati rice, salt to taste, water, cover it with the lid and cook for 12-15 minutes on low flames or until it's cooked.
• Finish it with ghee and give it a good mix.
• Transfer it into the serving dish and garnish it with crushed dry fenugreek leaves and coriander sprig.
• Serve hot with prepared egg curry.

For Salad
• In a bowl, add tender coriander stems, green chilli, onion, lemon juice, salt to taste and give it a good mix.
• Keep it aside for further use.

title: मज़ेदार ठेचा आलू मेथी पूरी | Thecha Aloo with Methi Puri | बिना प्याज लहसुन Puri Aloo | Chef Ranveer
description:
𝗧𝗛𝗘𝗖𝗛𝗔 𝗔𝗟𝗢𝗢 & 𝗠𝗘𝗧𝗛𝗜 𝗣𝗢𝗢𝗥𝗜 - (𝙎𝙚𝙚 𝙙𝙚𝙩𝙖𝙞𝙡𝙚𝙙 𝙩𝙚𝙭𝙩 𝙧𝙚𝙘𝙞𝙥𝙚 𝙗𝙚𝙡𝙤𝙬) Maharashtrian style Thecha Aloo Puri is here! Bold flavours, spicy punch aur garma-garam phooli hui puriyan.
Ek बार try करेंगे तो baar-baar banayenge 😎!

***********************
𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡  𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣
🛒RB Store - https://www.amazon.in/shop/chefranveer
📟Kitchen Appliances - https://bit.ly/KitchenAppliancesIUse
🔪Knives I use - https://amzn.to/4kzSJVe

***********************
𝗥𝗘𝗖𝗜𝗣𝗘 𝗙𝗢𝗥 𝗧𝗛𝗘𝗖𝗛𝗔 𝗔𝗟𝗢𝗢 & 𝗠𝗘𝗧𝗛𝗜 𝗣𝗢𝗢𝗥𝗜
Preparation time 10 minutes 
Cooking time 20-25 minutes 
Serve 2-4

Ingredients 
For Boiling Potatoes 
2-3 tbsp Oil, तेल
9-10 large Potatoes (cut into quarters), आलू
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
A pinch of sugar, चीनी
½ tsp Asafoetida, हींग
½ tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर
4 no. Green chilli (slightly crushed), हरी मिर्च
2 cups Water, पानी

For Dough 
3 cups Whole wheat flour, गेहूं का आटा
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
½ tsp Oil, तेल
2 tsp Dry fenugreek leaves (crushed), कसूरी मेथी
1 tsp Ghee, घी 
½ tsp Carom seeds, अजवाइन
Water as required, पानी

For Thecha 
4-5 no. Green chillies (less spicy & roughly chopped), हरी मिर्च
few Tender Coriander stem (roughly chopped), धनिया के डंठल
¼ cup fresh Coriander leaves (roughly torn), धनिया पत्ता

For Thecha Aloo 
2-3 heaped tbsp Ghee, घी 
1 tsp Cumin seeds, जीरा
Prepared Thecha, तैयार किया हुआ ठेचा
1 inch Ginger (peeled & finely chopped), अदरक
Boiled potatoes, उबले हुआ आलू
1 tbsp Ghee, घी 
⅓ cup Water, पानी

Other Ingredients 
Oil for frying, तलने के लिए तेल
¼ tsp Ghee (for rolling puri), घी 

For Garnish 
Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता
Lemon wedge, नींबू की फांक
 
Process 
For Boiling Potatoes 
● In a cooker, add oil once it's hot, add potatoes, salt to taste, a pinch of sugar, and asafoetida.
● Now, add turmeric powder, green chilli, water and mix well. 
● Cover it with a lid and cook for 2-3 whistles or until it's cooked.  
● Keep it aside for further use.

For Dough 
● In a parat or a bowl add whole wheat flour, salt to taste, oil, dry fenugreek leaves, ghee, carom seeds and water.
● Knead it into smooth tight dough, cover it with a damp cloth and keep it aside for further use.
● Divide the dough into small lemon size balls and roll it with the help of a rolling pin to make poori.
● Heat oil in a kadhai, add one by one prepared rolled pooris and fry them until light golden in colour.
● Transfer it into an absorbent sheet and keep it aside for further use.

For Thecha 
● In a mortar pestle, add green chillies, tender coriander stems, coriander leaves and grind it into a coarse paste.
● Keep it aside for further use.

For Thecha Aloo 
● In a handi, add ghee, once it's hot, add cumin seeds, prepare thecha, ginger and saute for 2-3 minutes. 
● Add boiled potatoes, ghee and cook for another 4-5 minutes.
● Add water to adjust the consistency and give it a quick boil.
● Transfer it into the serving dish, garnish it with coriander sprig and lemon wedge.
● Serve hot with prepared pooris.

title: Dubai's Trending Iffa Chicken Curry | दुबई की मशहूर चिकन करी | Cheesy creamy Chicken | Chef Ranveer
description:
𝗗𝗨𝗕𝗔𝗜'𝗦 𝗧𝗥𝗘𝗡𝗗𝗜𝗡𝗚 𝗜𝗙𝗙𝗔 𝗖𝗛𝗜𝗖𝗞𝗘𝗡 𝗖𝗨𝗥𝗥𝗬 - (𝙎𝙚𝙚 𝙙𝙚𝙩𝙖𝙞𝙡𝙚𝙙 𝙩𝙚𝙭𝙩 𝙧𝙚𝙘𝙞𝙥𝙚 𝙗𝙚𝙡𝙤𝙬) नाम तो सुना होगा, ab taste भी mehsoos कीजिए :) Masaledaar, bold aur thoda sa dramatic. Recreating the super popular Dubai style Chicken curry that's Cheesy, creamy and weekend ke liye perfect!

***********************
𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡  𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣
🛒RB Store - https://www.amazon.in/shop/chefranveer
📟Kitchen Appliances - https://bit.ly/KitchenAppliancesIUse
🔪Knives I use - https://amzn.to/4kzSJVe

***********************
𝗥𝗘𝗖𝗜𝗣𝗘 𝗙𝗢𝗥 𝗗𝗨𝗕𝗔𝗜'𝗦 𝗧𝗥𝗘𝗡𝗗𝗜𝗡𝗚 𝗜𝗙𝗙𝗔 𝗖𝗛𝗜𝗖𝗞𝗘𝗡 𝗖𝗨𝗥𝗥𝗬
Preparation time 10 minutes
Cooking time 20-25 minutes
Serve 2-4 

Ingredients
For 1st Marination
1 kg Chicken legs (slit), चिकन
2 heaped tbsp Ginger Garlic green chili paste, अदरक लहसुन हरी मिर्च का पेस्ट
2 heaped tbsp Mayonnaise, मेयोनेज़
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
Prepared second marination, तैयार किया हुआ मेरिनेशन

For 2nd Marination
1 ½ cups Curd (beaten), दही
2 heaped tbsp Degi red chilli powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर
1 tbsp Coriander powder, धनिया पाउडर
1 tsp Cumin powder, जीरा पाउडर
1 heaped tbsp Cornstarch, कॉर्नस्टार्च
2 tbsp Mayonnaise, मेयोनेज़
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार

For Dressing
6-7 no. Garlic cloves, लहसुन
½ cup Fresh cream, ताज़ा मलाई
1 cup Processed cheese (grated), चीज़
6 no. Boiled egg whites, उबले अंडे का सफेद भाग
2-3 tbsp Fresh cream, ताज़ा मलाई
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार

For Cooking Chicken
2 tbsp Oil, तेल
Marinated chicken, मैरीनेट किया हुआ चिकन
Prepared dressing, तैयार की हुई ड्रेसिंग

For Salad
3-4 no. Green chillies (less spicy & finely chopped), हरी मिर्च
½ inch Ginger (peeled & julienned), अदरक
2-3 tbsp Mint leaves (roughly torn), पुदीना पत्ता
1 tbsp Tender Coriander stems (finely chopped), धनिया के डंठल

For Garnish
Prepared salad, तैयार किया हुआ सलाद
Dry Fenugreek leaves (crushed), कसूरी मेथी
Black pepper powder, काली मिर्च पाउडर
Boiled egg (sliced), उबला हुआ अंडा
Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता

Process 
For 1st Marination
● In a bowl, add chicken legs, ginger garlic green chilli paste, mayonnaise, salt to taste and marinate well.
● Keep it aside for 10-15 minutes.
● Now, add prepared second marination to the chicken and marinate well.
● Keep it aside for 10-15 minutes.

For 2nd Marination
● In a bowl, add curd, degi red chilli powder, coriander powder, cumin powder, cornstarch, mayonnaise, salt to taste and give it a good mix.
● Keep it aside for further use.

For Dressing
● In a bowl, add garlic, processed cheese, boiled egg whites, fresh cream, salt to taste and mix well.
● Transfer the mixture to a mixer grinder jar and grind it into the smooth fine paste.
● Keep it aside for further use.

For Cooking Chicken
● In a pan, add oil, once it's hot, place marinated chicken and cook for 10-15 minutes.
● Flip the chicken in intervals, add the prepared dressing and spread it evenly over the chicken.
● Cover it with the lid and cook for another 4-5 minutes or until the chicken is fully cooked and tender.
● Transfer to a serving dish and garnish with prepared salad, crushed dry fenugreek leaves, black pepper powder, boiled egg and coriander sprig.
● Serve hot.

For Salad
● In a bowl, add green chillies, ginger, mint leaves, tender coriander stems and give it a good mix.
● Keep it aside for further use.

title: होटल जैसे गोभी चिली बनाएं Dry & Gravy | Kripsy Chili Gobi | Gobhi Chilli Gravy bonus | Chef Ranveer
description:
𝗥𝗘𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗨𝗥𝗔𝗡𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗬𝗟𝗘 𝗚𝗢𝗕𝗜 𝗖𝗛𝗜𝗟𝗟𝗜 - 𝟮 𝗪𝗔𝗬𝗦 - (𝙎𝙚𝙚 𝙙𝙚𝙩𝙖𝙞𝙡𝙚𝙙 𝙩𝙚𝙭𝙩 𝙧𝙚𝙘𝙞𝙥𝙚 𝙗𝙚𝙡𝙤𝙬) It's cricket season!!Snack to बनता है :) Here are my tried & tested recipes for Gobi Chilli or Chilli Gobhi, dry and gravy.

***********************
𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡  𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣
🛒RB Store - https://www.amazon.in/shop/chefranveer
📟Kitchen Appliances - https://bit.ly/KitchenAppliancesIUse
🔪Knives I use - https://amzn.to/4kzSJVe
***********************

𝗥𝗘𝗖𝗜𝗣𝗘 𝗙𝗢𝗥 𝗥𝗘𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗨𝗥𝗔𝗡𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗬𝗟𝗘 𝗚𝗢𝗕𝗜 𝗖𝗛𝗜𝗟𝗟𝗜
Preparation time 10 minutes 
Cooking time 25-30 minutes 
Serve 2-4 

Ingredients 
For Gobhi chilli 
1 large Cauliflower (florets), फूलगोभी

For Batter 
3 cups Refined flour, मैदा
½ cup Cornstarch, कॉर्नस्टार्च
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
1 tsp Sugar, चीनी
1 tsp Vinegar, सिरका
Water as required, पानी
½ tsp Oil, तेल

For Sauce 
½ cup Tomato ketchup, टमाटर केचप
2 tbsp Red chilli sauce, रेड चिली सॉस
2 tbsp Green chilli sauce, ग्रीन चिली सॉस
1 tbsp Vinegar, सिरका
1 tsp Soy sauce, सोया सॉस

For Gobhi Chilli Gravy 
1 tbsp Oil, तेल
2 no. Dry kashmiri red chillies (roughly cut), सूखी कश्मीरी लाल मिर्च
1 tsp Tender Coriander stem, finely chopped, धनिये के डंठल
1 tsp Ginger (peeled & finely chopped), अदरक
1 medium Onion (diced), प्याज
1 tsp Ginger Garlic paste, अदरक लहसुन का पेस्ट
½ cup Mixed bell peppers (diced), शिमला मिर्च
2 heaped tbsp Prepared sauce, तैयार किया हुआ सॉस का मिश्रण
½ cup Water, पानी
½ tsp Soy sauce, सोया सॉस
1 tsp Chilli oil, चिल्ली ऑइल
1 tbsp Cornstarch slurry, कॉर्नस्टार्च घोल
Fried cauliflower, तली हुई फूलगोभी

For Gobhi Chilli Dry
1 tbsp Oil, तेल
2 no. Dry kashmiri red chillies (roughly cut), सूखी कश्मीरी लाल मिर्च
1 tsp Tender Coriander stem, finely chopped, धनिये के डंठल
1 tsp Ginger (peeled & finely chopped), अदरक
1 medium Onion (diced), प्याज
¼ cup Spring onion bulbs (roughly chopped), हरा प्याज़
1 cup Mixed bell peppers (diced), शिमला मिर्च
2-3 heaped tbsp Prepared sauce, तैयार किया हुआ सॉस का मिश्रण
Fried cauliflower, तली हुई फूलगोभी
1 tsp Chilli Oil, चिली ऑइल
½ tsp Black Pepper powder, काली मिर्च पाउडर
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार

Other Ingredients 
Oil for frying, तलने के लिए तेल

For Garnish 
Spring onion, chopped, प्याज़ पत्ता 
Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता

Process 
For Batter 
● In a bowl, add refined flour, cornstarch, salt to taste, sugar, vinegar, water, oil and give it a good mix.
● Add cauliflower florets into the batter and coat well.
● Add cauliflower into hot oil and fry them until light golden in colour and crispy in texture.
● Transfer it into the absorbent sheet and keep it aside for further use.

For Sauce 
● In a bowl, add tomato sauce, red chilli sauce, green chilli sauce, vinegar, soy sauce, mix everything well and keep aside. 

For Gobhi Chilli Gravy 
● In a wok, add oil, once it's smoky hot, add dry red chillies, tender coriander stems, ginger and saute for a minute.
● Add onion, ginger garlic paste, mixed bell peppers and toss it everything for 2-3 minutes on high flames.
● Now, add prepared sauce, water, soy sauce, chilli oil and give it a quick boil.
● Add cornstarch slurry, chilli oil, fried cauliflower and cook it on high flames for another 2-3 minutes.
● Transfer it into the serving bowl and garnish it with spring onion and coriander sprig.
● Serve hot.

For Gobhi Chilli Dry
● In a wok, add oil, once it's smoky hot, add dry red chillies, tender coriander stems, ginger and saute for a minute.
● Add onion, spring onion bulbs, mixed bell peppers and toss it everything for 2-3 minutes on high flames.
● Now, add prepared sauce, fried cauliflower and toss it for another 2-3 minutes on high flames.
● Finish it with chilli oil, black pepper powder, salt to taste and saute for a minute.
● Transfer it into the serving bowl and garnish it with spring onion and coriander sprig.
● Serve hot.

title: बाहर से Kripsy🍗 अंदर से Juicy Chatkara Chicken | शादी वाला चिकन चटकारा | Chef Ranveer Brar
description:
𝟭𝟬 𝗠𝗜𝗡𝗦 में 𝗖𝗛𝗜𝗖𝗞𝗘𝗡 𝗖𝗛𝗔𝗧𝗞𝗔𝗥𝗔 - (𝙎𝙚𝙚 𝙙𝙚𝙩𝙖𝙞𝙡𝙚𝙙 𝙩𝙚𝙭𝙩 𝙧𝙚𝙘𝙞𝙥𝙚 𝙗𝙚𝙡𝙤𝙬) When we talk about weddings and esp शादी wala khaana, one dish that definite comes to mind is Chicken Chatkara. Kripsy from outside and juicy from within, this Chicken 🍗 starter has taken the net by storm. This video shows my special recipe for Chatkare wala Chicken.

***********************
𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡  𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣

𝗥𝗘𝗖𝗜𝗣𝗘 𝗙𝗢𝗥 𝟭𝟬 𝗠𝗜𝗡𝗦 में 𝗖𝗛𝗜𝗖𝗞𝗘𝗡 𝗖𝗛𝗔𝗧𝗞𝗔𝗥𝗔
Preparation time 10 minutes 
Cooking time 25-30 minutes 
Serve 2-4 

Ingredients
For Chicken Marination

1 heaped tbsp Ginger Garlic paste, अदरक लहसुन का पेस्ट
2-3 tbsp fresh Coriander leaves (chopped), धनिया पत्ता
1 tbsp Chilli flakes, चिली फ्लेक्स
1 tsp Black peppercorns (crushed), कुटी हुई काली मिर्च
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
1 tbsp Lemon juice, नींबू का रस
1 tbsp Oil, तेल

For Chatkara Gravy
1 tbsp Oil, तेल
1 tbsp Chilli flakes, चिली फ्लेक्स
1 tsp Black peppercorns (crushed), कुटी हुई काली मिर्च
1 heaped tbsp Dark soy sauce, सोया सॉस
⅓ cup Tomato ketchup, टमाटर केचप
½ tsp Ginger Garlic paste, अदरक लहसुन का पेस्ट
1 tbsp Vinegar, सिरका
1 tbsp Honey, शहद
Marinated chicken, मैरीनेटेड चिकन
1 cup Water, पानी
1 tsp Oregano, ओरेगैनो

For Dry Masala
2 tbsp Degi red chilli powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर
1 tbsp Black pepper powder, काली मिर्च पाउडर
1 tsp Coriander powder, धनिया पाउडर
2 tsp dry Mango powder, अमचूर पाउडर
A pinch of Asafoetida, हींग
1 tsp Cumin powder, जीरा पाउडर
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार

For Egg Mixture
4-5 no. Eggs, अंडे
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार

For Dry Coating
2 cups Refined flour, मैदा
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
1 tsp Black peppercorns (crushed), कुटी हुई काली मिर्च

For Coating Chicken
Cooked chicken, पका हुआ चिकन
Prepared dry coating, तैयार किया हुआ सूखा मिश्रण
Prepared egg mixture, तैयार किया हुआ अंडे का मिश्रण
2-3 cups Cornflakes (crushed), कॉर्नफ्लेक्स

For Finishing Gravy

1 no. Green chilli (less spicy & cut diagonally), हरी मिर्च
Prepared chatkara gravy, तैयार की हुई चटकारा ग्रेवी
½ cup Water, पानी
Fried chicken, फ्रायड चिकन

For Chicken Chatkara 
Fried chicken, फ्रायड चिकन
Prepared dry masala, तैयार किया हुआ मसाला

Other Ingredients
Oil for frying, तलने के लिए तेल

For Garnish
Lemon wedges, नींबू की फांक   
Prepared masala, तैयार किया हुआ मसाला
Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता

title: बिना प्याज़-लहसून ऐसा बाल्टी पनीर कभी खाया है? Balti Paneer /Paneer Peshawari | Chef Ranveer Brar
description:
𝗕𝗔𝗟𝗧𝗜/ 𝗣𝗘𝗦𝗛𝗔𝗪𝗔𝗥𝗜 𝗣𝗔𝗡𝗘𝗘𝗥 (𝗡𝗢 𝗢𝗡𝗜𝗢𝗡-𝗚𝗔𝗥𝗟𝗜𝗖) - (𝙎𝙚𝙚 𝙙𝙚𝙩𝙖𝙞𝙡𝙚𝙙 𝙩𝙚𝙭𝙩 𝙧𝙚𝙘𝙞𝙥𝙚 𝙗𝙚𝙡𝙤𝙬) Paneer जब masalon के साथ  sahi वक़्त पर bhuna jaata hai, tab बनती है Balti Paneer. This Paneer Peshawari/Balti Paneer recipe is a perfect mix of flavour, texture and patience :)
To बनाइए, khilaiye & experience ghar ka khana, that's heart-warming too!

***********************
𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡  𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣
🛒RB Store - https://www.amazon.in/shop/chefranveer
📟Kitchen Appliances - https://bit.ly/KitchenAppliancesIUse
🔪Knives I use - https://amzn.to/4kzSJVe

***********************
𝗥𝗘𝗖𝗜𝗣𝗘 𝗙𝗢𝗥 𝗕𝗔𝗟𝗧𝗜/ 𝗣𝗘𝗦𝗛𝗔𝗪𝗔𝗥𝗜 𝗣𝗔𝗡𝗘𝗘𝗥 (𝗡𝗢 𝗢𝗡𝗜𝗢𝗡-𝗚𝗔𝗥𝗟𝗜𝗖) 
Preparation time 10 minutes
Cooking time 20-25 minutes
Serve 2-4 

Ingredients 
For Gravy
2-3 tbsp Ghee, घी
1 no. Bay leaf, तेज पत्ता
1 inch Ginger (peeled & julienned), अदरक
2 no. Dry kashmiri red chillies (broken into half), सूखी कश्मीरी लाल मिर्च
6-7  large Tomatoes, टमाटर
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
½ tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर
1 tsp Degi red chili powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर
2 tsp Coriander powder, धनिया पाउडर
1-2 cups Water, पानी 
1 tbsp Tender Coriander stems with roots (finely chopped), धनिया के डंठल
1 tbsp Ghee, घी

For Masala
2 heaped tbsp Coriander seeds, धनिये के बीज
1 heaped tbsp Black peppercorns, काली मिर्च के दाने
4-5 no. Cloves, लौंग
3-4 no. Black cardamom, बड़ी इलायची
7-8 no. Green cardamom, हरी इलायची
7-8 no. Cashew Nuts, काजू

For Frying Paneer
1 kg Paneer (cut into large slabs), पनीर
Oil for frying, तलने के लिए तेल

For Paneer Marination
Fried paneer, तला हुआ पनीर
2 tbsp Prepared masala, तैयार किया हुआ मसाला

For Paneer Peshawari
2-3 tbsp Ghee, घी
Prepared gravy, तैयार की हुई ग्रेवी
1 tbsp Prepared masala, तैयार किया हुआ मसाला
1 cup Water, पानी
Marinated paneer, मैरीनेट किया हुआ पनीर
2 no. Green chillies (less spicy & cut diagonally), हरी मिर्च
2 tbsp fresh Coriander leaves (finely chopped), धनिया पत्ता
½ tsp Sugar, चीनी

For Garnish
Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता
Green chillies (less spicy & cut into diagonally), हरी मिर्च

Process
For Gravy
● In a pressure cooker, add ghee, once it's hot, add bay leaf, ginger, dry kashmiri red chillies and saute for a minute.
● Add tomatoes, salt to taste, and cook for 4-5 minutes.
● Remove the skin of tomatoes, add turmeric powder, degi red chili powder, coriander powder and saute for another 2 minutes.
● Add water, tender coriander stem, ghee, give it a quick boil, cover it with the lid and let it cook for 3-4 whistles or until it's cooked.
● Once gravy is cooked then grind the gravy into a smooth fine paste.
● Keep it aside for further use.

For Masala
● In a pan, add coriander seeds, black peppercorns, cloves, black cardamom, green cardamom, cashew nuts and dry roast them for 2-3 minutes.
● Transfer it into the mixer grinder jar and grind it into the smooth fine powder.
● Keep it aside for further use.

For Frying Paneer
● In a kadai, add oil, once it's hot, add paneer slabs in hot oil and fry them until light brown in colour.
● Remove it into the absorbent sheet and keep it aside for further use.

For Paneer Marination
● In a bowl, add fried paneer, prepared masala and marinate well.
● Keep it aside for further use.

For Paneer Peshawari
● In a handi, add ghee, once it's smoky hot, add prepared gravy and cook on high flames for 4-5 minutes.
● Add prepared masala, water and let it simmer for a while.
● Add marinated paneer, green chillies, fresh coriander leaves, sugar and let it cook for 2-3 minutes on high flames.
● Turn off the flames and transfer it into the serving dish and garnish it with coriander sprig and green chillies.
● Serve hot with roti or naan.

title: Chili Garlic Tawa Chicken & Pulao | पटाका तवा चिकन & पुलाव | Ultimate Weekend combo | Chef Ranveer
description:
𝗖𝗛𝗜𝗟𝗜 𝗚𝗔𝗥𝗟𝗜𝗖 𝗧𝗔𝗪𝗔 𝗖𝗛𝗜𝗖𝗞𝗘𝗡 & 𝗣𝗨𝗟𝗔𝗢 - (𝙎𝙚𝙚 𝙙𝙚𝙩𝙖𝙞𝙡𝙚𝙙 𝙩𝙚𝙭𝙩 𝙧𝙚𝙘𝙞𝙥𝙚 𝙗𝙚𝙡𝙤𝙬) Jab बात हो weekend combo की, then इस Tawa chicken & Pulao का koi jawaab nahin! Try my favourite Spicy Chilli Garlic Chicken—tawa-cooked for that perfect smoky flavour, bold garlic heat & just the right kick of spice.
Paired with a fiery pulao, this is one of those meals where every bite builds character—simple technique, big flavour, no shortcuts.

***********************
𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡  𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣
🛒RB Store - https://www.amazon.in/shop/chefranveer
📟Kitchen Appliances - https://bit.ly/KitchenAppliancesIUse
🔪Knives I use - https://amzn.to/4kzSJVe

***********************
𝗥𝗘𝗖𝗜𝗣𝗘 𝗙𝗢𝗥 𝗖𝗛𝗜𝗟𝗜 𝗚𝗔𝗥𝗟𝗜𝗖 𝗧𝗔𝗪𝗔 𝗖𝗛𝗜𝗖𝗞𝗘𝗡 & 𝗣𝗨𝗟𝗔𝗢
Preparation time 10 minutes 
Cooking time 25-30 minutes 
Serve 2

Ingredients 
For Chilli Garlic Paste
10-12 no. dry Bedgi red chillies (soaked for 2 hrs) भिगोई हुई बेडगी लाल मिर्च
7-8 no. Garlic cloves, लहसुन

For 1st Marination
1 kg Chicken thighs (boneless) चिकन
1 heaped tbsp Ginger Garlic paste, अदरक लहसुन का पेस्ट
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
1 tbsp Lemon juice, नींबू का रस

For 2nd Marination
Marinated chicken, मैरीनेटेड चिकन
2-3 tbsp fresh Mint leaves (finely chopped), पुदीना पत्ता
2 tbsp Tender Coriander stems (finely chopped), धनिया के डंठल
3-4 heaped tbsp Prepared Chilli Garlic paste, तैयार की हुई मिर्च लहसुन की पेस्ट
1 tsp Lemon juice, नींबू का रस
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार

For Chutney
2-3 no. Green chillies (less spicy & roughly chopped), हरी मिर्च
½ cup Walnuts, अखरोट
2 tbsp fresh Mint leaves, पुदीना पत्ता
1 tbsp Tender Coriander stems with roots (roughly chopped), धनिया के डंठल
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
1 tbsp Oil, तेल
½ inch Ginger (peeled & sliced) अदरक

For Cooking Chicken
1-2 tbsp Oil, तेल
Marinated chicken, मैरीनेटेड चिकन

For Pulao
Remaining excess oil, बचा हुआ तेल
1 heaped tbsp Prepared Chilli Garlic paste, तैयार की हुई मिर्च लहसुन की पेस्ट
2-3 cups Water, पानी
2 cups Sella basmati rice (soaked for 30 minutes) भिगोए हुए सेला बासमती चावल
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
Prepared roasted garlic oil, भुना हुआ लहसुन का तेल

For Roasting Garlic
2-3 tbsp Oil, तेल
¼ cup Garlic cloves (finely chopped), लहसुन

For Finishing Chicken
2-3 tbsp Butter (cubed), मक्खन
Cooked chicken, पका हुआ चिकन

For Garnish
Roasted garlic, भुना हुआ लहसुन
Lemon wedges, नींबू की फांक
Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता   

Process 
For Chilli Garlic Paste
● In a bowl, add soaked bedgi red chillies, garlic, transfer it into the mixer grinder jar and grind it into the smooth fine paste.
● Keep it aside for further use.

For 1st Marination
● In a bowl, add chicken, ginger garlic paste, salt to taste, lemon juice and marinate well.
● Keep it aside for a while.

For 2nd Marination
● In a bowl, add marinated chicken, fresh mint leaves, tender coriander stems, prepared chilli garlic paste, lemon juice, salt to taste and marinate well.
● Keep it aside for a while.

For Chutney
● In a bowl, add green chillies, walnuts, fresh mint leaves, tender coriander stems with roots, salt to taste, oil and ginger.
● Transfer it into the mixer grinder jar and grind into the smooth fine paste.
● Keep it aside for further use.

For Cooking Chicken
● In a shallow tawa or pan, add oil, once it's hot, add marinated chicken and cook for 10-12 minutes or until it's tender.
● Flip the chicken in intervals and cook well.
● Transfer it into the tray and keep it aside for further use.
For Pulao
● In a shallow tawa or pan, add remaining excess oil, once it's hot, add prepared chilli garlic paste and cook for 2-3 minutes.
● Add water and give it a quick boil.
● Add soaked sella basmati rice, salt to taste, give it a good mix and cover it with the cooking wrap or lid.
● Now, cook the pulao for 15-20 minutes or until it's cooked.
● Finish it with roasted garlic oil and give it a good mix.
● Transfer it into the serving dish and garnish it with lemon wedge and coriander sprig.
● Serve hot with prepared tawa chilli garlic chicken and chutney.

For Roasting Garlic
● In a pan, add oil, once it's hot, add garlic and cook for 2 minutes on high flames or until garlic turns light brown in colour.
● Transfer it into the bowl and keep it aside for further use.

For Finishing Chicken
● In a pan, add butter, once it melts, add cooked chicken and sear it on high flames for 2-3 minutes.
● Transfer it into the serving dish and garnish it with roasted garlic, lemon wedges and coriander sprig.
● Serve hot with prepared pulao and chutney.

***********************

title: Rajasthani Dal Tadka | घर जैसा राजस्थानी चना दाल तड़का | Unique Chana Dal Recipe | Chef Ranveer Brar
description:
𝗥𝗔𝗝𝗔𝗦𝗧𝗛𝗔𝗡𝗜 𝗖𝗛𝗔𝗡𝗔 𝗗𝗔𝗟 𝗦𝗔𝗕𝗝𝗜 - (𝙎𝙚𝙚 𝙙𝙚𝙩𝙖𝙞𝙡𝙚𝙙 𝙩𝙚𝙭𝙩 𝙧𝙚𝙘𝙞𝙥𝙚 𝙗𝙚𝙡𝙤𝙬) Chana dal jab Rajasthan के रंग में rang jaaye, then swaad का क्या ही कहना!! Rajasthani Chana Dal swaad aur parampara ka perfect मेल है. One of the best comfort and healthy foods you can have in winters :)

***********************
𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡  𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣
🛒RB Store - https://www.amazon.in/shop/chefranveer
📟Kitchen Appliances - https://bit.ly/KitchenAppliancesIUse
🔪Knives I use - https://amzn.to/4kzSJVe

***********************
𝗥𝗘𝗖𝗜𝗣𝗘 𝗙𝗢𝗥 𝗥𝗔𝗝𝗔𝗦𝗧𝗛𝗔𝗡𝗜 𝗖𝗛𝗔𝗡𝗔 𝗗𝗔𝗟 𝗦𝗔𝗕𝗝𝗜
Preparation time 10 minutes
Cooking time 20-25 minutes
Serve 2-4

Ingredients
For Boiling Dal
2 cups Chana dal (soaked 3-4 hrs), भिगोई हुई चना दाल
3-4 cups Water, पानी
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
¼ tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर

For Ginger Garlic Paste
2 no. Green chillies (less spicy & roughly chopped), हरी मिर्च
3-4 no. Garlic cloves, chopped, लहसुन
2 inch Ginger (peeled & roughly sliced), अदरक

For Rajasthani Chana Dal Sabji
2-3 tbsp Oil, तेल
1 tsp Cumin seeds, जीरा
1 tsp White sesame seeds, सफेद तिल    
Prepared ginger garlic paste, अदरक लहसुन का पेस्ट
4 medium Onions (cut into quarters), प्याज
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
¼ tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर
2 tsp Degi red chili powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर
¼ cup Dal water, दाल का पानी
1 cup Curd (beaten), दही
2 tbsp fresh Coriander leaves (chopped), धनिया पत्ता
Boiled dal, उबली हुई दाल
¼ tsp Carom seeds, अजवाइन
½ cup Dal water, दाल का पानी
Prepared tadka, तैयार किया हुआ तड़का
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार

For Tadka
2-3 tbsp Ghee, घी
1 no. Black cardamom, बड़ी इलायची
4 no. dry Kashmiri red chillies (roughly chopped), सूखी कश्मीरी लाल मिर्च
1 tsp Degi red chilli powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर
1 tsp Black peppercorns (crushed), कुटी हुई काली मिर्च
2 tbsp fresh Coriander leaves (chopped), धनिया पत्ता

For Garnish
Ghee, घी
Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता
Chilli oil, चिल्ली ऑइल

Process 
For Boiling Dal
● In a handi, add soaked chana dal, water, salt to taste, and turmeric powder mix well.
● Cover it with the lid and cook for 15-20 minutes or until it is cooked.
● Switch off the flames and keep it aside for further use.

For Ginger Garlic Paste
● In a mortar pestle, add green chillies, garlic, ginger and grind it into coarsely paste.
● Keep it aside for further use.

For Rajasthani Chana Dal Sabji
● In a handi, add oil. Once it's hot, add cumin seeds, white sesame seeds, prepared ginger-garlic paste and cook for a minute.
● Add onions and salt to taste and cook for a while until onion becomes translucent in texture.
● Add turmeric powder and degi red chili powder and cook for a minute.
● Add dal water, curd, fresh coriander leaves and cook for 4-5 minutes until oil separates from the masala.
● Now, add boiled dal, carom seeds, and dal water to adjust the consistency and let it cook for another 5-6 minutes.
● Finish it with prepared tadka, add salt to taste and give it a good mix.
● Transfer it to a serving dish and garnish it with ghee, coriander sprig and chilli oil.
● Serve hot with roti.

For Tadka
● In a pan, add ghee. Once it's hot, add black cardamom, dry kashmiri red chillies, degi red chili powder, crushed black peppercorns, fresh coriander leaves and cook for 2 minutes.
● Switch off the flames and keep it aside for further use.


***********************

title: Mutton Do Pyaza | ढाबे जैसा मटन दो प्याजा | spicy Mutton Curry | Chef Ranveer Brar
description:
(𝙎𝙚𝙚 𝙙𝙚𝙩𝙖𝙞𝙡𝙚𝙙 𝙩𝙚𝙭𝙩 𝙧𝙚𝙘𝙞𝙥𝙚 𝙗𝙚𝙡𝙤𝙬) Do pyaaza ka matlab sirf do baar pyaaz nahi, do guna pyaar.
Mutton Do Pyaaza mein swaad, patience aur ghar ki khushboo ek saath milti hai.
Dheere pakao, dil se khao.

***********************
𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡  𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣
🛒RB Store - https://www.amazon.in/shop/chefranveer
📟Kitchen Appliances - https://bit.ly/KitchenAppliancesIUse
🔪Knives I use - https://amzn.to/4kzSJVe

***********************
𝗥𝗘𝗖𝗜𝗣𝗘 𝗙𝗢𝗥 Mutton Do Pyaza
Preparation time 10 minutes
Cooking time 35-40 minutes 
Serve 2-4

Ingredients 
For Cooking Mutton
¼ cup Mustard oil, सरसों का तेल
½ inch Cinnamon stick, दालचीनी
1 no. Bay leaf, तेज पत्ता
3 no. Black cardamom, बड़ी इलायची
9-10 no. Black peppercorns, काली मिर्च के दाने
2-3 no. Cloves, लौंग
2 medium Onions (roughly sliced), प्याज
1 kg Mutton with bones, मटन
1 heaped tbsp Ginger Garlic paste, अदरक लहसुन का पेस्ट
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
2 heaped tbsp Coriander powder, धनिया पाउडर
1 tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर
1 heaped tbsp Degi red chilli powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर
½ tsp Cumin powder, जीरा पाउडर
3 large Tomatoes (cut into half), टमाटर
½ cup Curd (beaten), दही
2 tbsp Tender Coriander stems with roots (finely chopped), धनिया के डंठल

For Sauteing  Veggies
2 tbsp Ghee, घी
3-4 no. dry Kashmiri red chillies (roughly torn), सूखी कश्मीरी लाल मिर्च
3 medium Onions (cut into quarters), प्याज
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
3 no. Green chillies (less spicy & roughly chopped), हरी मिर्च

For Mutton Do Pyaza
Cooked mutton, पका हुआ मटन
1 tbsp Ghee, घी
1 cup Hot water, गर्म पानी
Sauteed Veggies, पकी हुई सब्जियां
½ cup fresh Coriander leaves (finely chopped), धनिया पत्ता
1 tsp Fenugreek leaves (crushed), कसूरी मेथी

For Garnish
Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता

Process 
For Cooking Mutton
● In a pressure cooker, add mustard oil, once it's smoky hot, add cinnamon stick, bay leaf, black cardamom, black peppercorns, cloves, onions and cook for 2-3 minutes until onion gets translucent in texture.
Add mutton with bones, ginger garlic paste, salt to taste and cook for a minute.
● Add coriander powder, turmeric powder, degi red chili powder, cumin powder and cook for another minute.
● Now, add tomatoes, curd, tender coriander stems and cook for 5-6 minutes.
● Cover it with the lid and let it cook for 8-10 whistles or until it's cooked.
● Keep it aside to depressurize the cooker.

For Sauteing Veggies
● In a pan, add ghee, once it's hot, add dry kashmiri red chillies, onions, salt to taste, green chillies and let it cook on high flames for 2-3 minutes.
● Transfer it into a tray and keep it aside for further use.

For Mutton Do Pyaza
● In a handi, add cooked mutton, ghee, hot water and give it a quick boil.
Add sauteed veggies and cook for 2-3 minutes.
● Finish it with fresh coriander leaves, crushed fenugreek leaves.
● Transfer it into the serving dish and garnish it with coriander sprig.
● Serve hot with roti.

title: Methi matar - मज़ेदार मेथी मटर पकोड़े की कढ़ी | Winter spl recipe - no fry पकोड़ा | Chef Ranveer Brar
description:
(𝙎𝙚𝙚 𝙙𝙚𝙩𝙖𝙞𝙡𝙚𝙙 𝙩𝙚𝙭𝙩 𝙧𝙚𝙘𝙞𝙥𝙚 𝙗𝙚𝙡𝙤𝙬) Bina taley pakode, phir bhi wahi ghar ka swaad. No-Fry Methi Pakora Kadhi sehat aur comfort ka ek santulit mel hai. Roz ke khane ke liye, dil se bani kadhi.

***********************
𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡  𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣
🛒RB Store - https://www.amazon.in/shop/chefranveer
📟Kitchen Appliances - https://bit.ly/KitchenAppliancesIUse
🔪Knives I use - https://amzn.to/4kzSJVe

***********************
𝗥𝗘𝗖𝗜𝗣𝗘 𝗙𝗢𝗥 Methi Matar Ki Kadhi
Preparation time 10 minutes 
Cooking time 20-25 minutes
Serve 2-4 

Ingredients
For Methi Matar Ki Kadhi
2 tbsp Ghee, घी
1 inch Ginger (peeled & julienned), अदरक
3 no.dry Kashmiri red chillies, सूखी कश्मीरी लाल मिर्च
1 cup fresh Fenugreek leaves (chopped), ताज़ा मेथी
2 cups fresh Green peas, हरे मटर
A pinch of Asafoetida, हींग
1 tsp Turmeric powder,  हल्दी पाउडर
½ tsp Degi red chilli powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर
½ tsp Coriander powder, धनिया पाउडर
Prepared curd mixture, तैयार किया हुआ दही का मिश्रण
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
1 cup Water, पानी
Prepared pakoda, तैयार किए हुए पकोड़े
2 tbsp Ghee, घी
1 tbsp Tender Coriander stems (finely chopped), धनिया के डंठल
1 tbsp Jaggery, गुड़
2 no. Green chillies (cut into halves), हरी मिर्च

For Pakoda Batter
1 cup fresh Fenugreek leaves (chopped), ताज़ा मेथी
1 tbsp Ginger Green chilli paste, अदरक हरी मिर्च का पेस्ट
¼ tsp Carom seeds, अजवाइन
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
1 cup Gram flour, बेसन
2 tbsp Gram flour, बेसन
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
½ tsp Ghee, घी

For Curd Mixture
2 cups Curd (beaten), दही
2 cups Water, पानी
1 tbsp Ginger Green chilli paste, अदरक हरी मिर्च का पेस्ट
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
1 tsp Sugar, चीनी
1 tbsp Gram flour, बेसन

For Frying Makhana
1-2 tbsp Ghee, घी
A pinch of degi red chilli powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर
1 cup Foxnuts, मखाने

For Garnish
Fried foxnuts, तले हुए मखाने
Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता

Process
For Methi Matar Ki Kadhi
● In a handi, add ghee, once it's hot, add ginger, dry kashmiri red chillies, fresh fenugreek leaves and cook for 5-6 minutes.
● Add fresh green peas, a pinch of asafoetida, turmeric powder, degi red chilli powder, coriander powder and let it cook for a while.
● Add prepared curd mixture, salt to taste, water and adjust the consistency, let it simmer for 10-12 minutes.
● Once the kadhi starts boiling, make small balls from the batter and drop them gently into the boiling kadhi.
● Cook on medium flame until the dapkas start floating on the top. 
● Now, add ghee, tender coriander stems and boil it for a while.
● Finish it with jaggery, green chillies and give it a quick boil.
● Transfer it into the serving dish, garnish it with fried foxnuts and coriander sprig.
● Serve hot with roti or steam rice.

For Pakoda Batter
● In a bowl, add fresh fenugreek leaves, ginger green chilli paste, carom seeds, salt to taste, gram flour, salt to taste, ghee and mix everything well. 
● Make sure the batter is semi thick

For Curd Mixture
● In a bowl, add curd, water, ginger green chilli paste, salt to taste, sugar, gram flour and give it a good mix.
● Keep it aside for further use.

For Frying Makhana
● In a pan, add ghee, once it's hot, add a pinch of degi red chilli powder, foxnuts and toss it on high flames for a minute.
● Transfer it into the tray and keep it aside for further use.
