title: Chicken Seekh Dum Biryani | मख़मली मलाई सीख़ बिरयानी | Tawa Seekh bonus recipe | Chef Ranveer Brar
description:
𝗖𝗛𝗜𝗖𝗞𝗘𝗡 𝗠𝗔𝗟𝗔𝗜 𝗦𝗘𝗘𝗞𝗛 𝗕𝗜𝗥𝗬𝗔𝗡𝗜 - (𝙎𝙚𝙚 𝙙𝙚𝙩𝙖𝙞𝙡𝙚𝙙 𝙩𝙚𝙭𝙩 𝙧𝙚𝙘𝙞𝙥𝙚 𝙗𝙚𝙡𝙤𝙬) Kabhi  सोचा था, ki malai ki narmi & seekh kebab ka dhuaan ek hi Handi में milegi? Try this trending recipe of Malai Seekh Biryani this weekend.

***********************
𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡  𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣
🛒RB Store - https://www.amazon.in/shop/chefranveer
📟Kitchen Appliances - https://bit.ly/KitchenAppliancesIUse
🔪Knives I use - https://amzn.to/4kzSJVe

***********************
𝗥𝗘𝗖𝗜𝗣𝗘 𝗙𝗢𝗥 𝗖𝗛𝗜𝗖𝗞𝗘𝗡 𝗠𝗔𝗟𝗔𝗜 𝗦𝗘𝗘𝗞𝗛 𝗕𝗜𝗥𝗬𝗔𝗡𝗜
Preparation time 10-15 minutes 
Cooking time 30-35 minutes 
Serve 2-4

Ingredients 
For Marination
1 kg Chicken minced, चिकन कीमा
1 heaped tbsp Ginger Garlic paste, अदरक लहसुन का पेस्ट
1 tbsp Tender Coriander stems (finely chopped), धनिये के डंठल
1 tbsp Mint leaves (chopped), पुदीने के पत्ते
¼ cup Fried onions, तले हुए प्याज
2 no. Green chillies (less spicy & finely chopped), हरी मिर्च
1 tsp Ghee, घी
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
1 tsp Oil (for greasing), तेल

For Frying Seekh
2 tbsp Ghee, घी
Prepared chicken seekhs, तैयार किए हुए चिकन सीख

For Boiling Rice
Water as required, पानी
1 tbsp Ghee, घी
2 no. Bay leaf, तेज पत्ता
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
650 gms Sella basmati rice (soaked for 1hr), भिगोए हुए सेला बासमती चावल

For Malai Seekh Biryani
2-3 tbsp Ghee, घी
2 no. Bay leaf, तेज पत्ता
½ inch Cinnamon stick, दालचीनी
2 medium Onions (sliced), प्याज
10-12 no. Cashew Nuts, काजू
4 no. Green chillies (less spicy & chopped), हरी मिर्च
2 cups Curd (beaten), दही
Few mint leaves (roughly torn), पुदीने के पत्ते
1 cup Fresh cream, ताज़ा मलाई
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
1 tbsp Fried onions, तले हुए प्याज
Fried chicken seekhs, तले हुए चिकन सीख
2 tbsp Fresh Coriander leaves (finely chopped), धनिया पत्ता
1 tbsp Fried onions, तले हुए प्याज
⅓ cup Cheese (grated), चीज़
1st batch of Boiled rice, उबले हुए चावल
Saffron water, केसर का पानी
2 tbsp Fresh Coriander leaves (finely chopped), धनिया पत्ता
2 tbsp Fried onions, तले हुए प्याज
Few mint leaves (roughly torn), पुदीने के पत्ते
3 no. Green chillies (less spicy & chopped), हरी मिर्च
1 inch Ginger (julinned), अदरक
2nd batch of Boiled rice, उबले हुए चावल

For Masala
2 heaped tbsp Black peppercorns, काली मिर्च के दाने
7 no. Black cardamom, बड़ी इलायची
4-5 no. Cloves, लौंग
½ no. Mace, जावित्री
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार

For Garnish
Silver vark, चांदी का वर्क
Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता
Prepared masala, तैयार किया हुआ मसाला
Fried onions, तले हुए प्याज

Process
For Marination
● In a bowl, add chicken minced, ginger garlic paste, tender coriander stems, mint leaves, fried onion, green chillies, ghee, salt to taste and marinate well.
● Take a zip lock bag and place a large spoonful of marinated chicken minced in the centre.
● Then cover it with the remaining part of the zip lock bag, apply gentle pressure with a knife towards the other side to form a seekh kebab.
● Transfer it into the tray and keep it aside for further use.

For Frying Seekh
● In a pan, add ghee, once it's hot, place one by one prepared chicken sikhs and cook them until it's half cooked.
● Transfer it into the tray and keep it aside for further use.

For Boiling Rice
● In a handi, add water as required, ghee, bay leaf, salt to taste, once its roaring boiled then add soaked sella basmati rice..
● Cover it with the lid and allow to cook for at least 4-5 minutes on high flame.
● Strain the 60% cooked rice and transfer it into a tray for resting.
● Strain the remaining rice and transfer it into another tray and allow it to rest.
● Keep it aside for further use.

For Malai Seekh Biryani
● In a handi, add ghee, once it's hot, add bay leaf, cinnamon stick, onions and cook it for 4-5 minutes until onion gets light brown in colour.
● Add cashew nuts, green chillies, curd and a few mint leaves and cook for a while  or until it's cooked.
● Add fresh cream, salt to taste, fried onions, fried chicken seekh and cook it well.
● Turn off the flames, layer it with fresh coriander leaves, fried onions, grated cheese, 1st batch of boiled rice.
● Now, add saffron water, fresh coriander leaves, fried onions, few mint leaves, green chillies, ginger and a 2nd batch of boiled rice and spread the rice evenly.
● Cover it with cooking wrap, seal it properly on all sides, cover it with the lid.
● Now, cook on slow flame for at least 15-20 minutes.
● Transfer the biryani into the serving dish and garnish it with silver vark, coriander sprig, sprinkle some prepared masala and fried onions.
● Serve hot with raita.

For Masala
● In a tray or plate, add black peppercorns, black cardamom, cloves, mace and salt to taste.
● Transfer it into the mixer grinder jar and grind it into smooth fine powder.
● Keep it aside for further use.



***********************

title: Palak Soup | सर्दियों के लिए पालक & मटर सूप | Methi Muthiya bonus recipe | Chef Ranveer Brar
description:
PALAK MATAR SOUP (𝙎𝙚𝙚 𝙙𝙚𝙩𝙖𝙞𝙡𝙚𝙙 𝙩𝙚𝙭𝙩 𝙧𝙚𝙘𝙞𝙥𝙚 𝙗𝙚𝙡𝙤𝙬) Sardi ki shaam, ek garam bowl aur thoda sa sukoon. Palak ki hari taazgi aur matar ki natural mithaas ka simple sa balance.
Ye Palak Matar Soup, halka bhi hai aur dil se bana hua bhi.

***********************
𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡  𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣
🛒RB Store - https://www.amazon.in/shop/chefranveer
📟Kitchen Appliances - https://bit.ly/KitchenAppliancesIUse
🔪Knives I use - https://amzn.to/4kzSJVe

***********************
𝗥𝗘𝗖𝗜𝗣𝗘 𝗙𝗢𝗥  Palak Matar Soup 
Preparation time 10 minutes 
Cooking time 20-25 minutes 
Serve 2-4 

Ingredients 
For Cooking Green peas & spinach
2 heaped tbsp Ghee, घी
2-4 no. Garlic cloves (peeled & crushed), लहसुन
2-4 no. Black peppercorns, काली मिर्च के दाने
1 tsp Cumin seeds, जीरा
2 cups fresh Green peas, हरे मटर
1 large bunch Spinach (roughly chopped), पालक
2 tbsp Ghee, घी
½ inch Ginger (peeled & sliced) अदरक
1 tbsp Ghee, घी
4-5 cups Water, पानी
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
A pinch of sugar, चीनी
½ cup Water, पानी

For Tadka 
2 tbsp Ghee, घी
1 tbsp Oil, तेल
¼ tsp Fennel seeds, सौंफ
A pinch of asafoetida, हींग
¼ tsp Cumin seeds, जीरा
⅓ cup fresh Green peas, हरे मटर
2-3 no. Green chilli (less spicy & chopped), हरी मिर्च
1 tsp Degi red chilli powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर
½ tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर
2 tsp Coriander powder, धनिया पाउडर 
½ tsp Cumin powder, जीरा पाउडर
Cooked peas & spinach mixture, पकी हुई मटर और पालक का मिश्रण
2 tbsp Ghee (for finishing), घी

For Muthiya 
½ cup Fresh Fenugreek leaves (washed & finely chopped), ताज़ी मेथी की पत्तियाँ
¼ cup Jowar flour, ज्वार का आटा
½ cup Gram flour, बेसन
½ tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर 
½ tsp Degi red chilli powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर
½ tsp Cumin powder, जीरा पाउ   डर
½ tsp Black pepper powder, काली मिर्च का पाउडर
A pinch of asafoetida, हींग
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
2 tsp Ghee, घी
Water as required, पानी

Other Ingredients 
Oil for frying, तलने के लिए तेल

For Garnish 
Fresh cream, ताज़ा मलाई
Chilli oil, मिर्च का तेल
Prepared muthiya (crumble), तैयार की हुई मुठिया
Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता

Process 
For Cooking Green peas & Spinach
 • In a pressure cooker, add ghee, once it's hot, add garlic and cook for a minute.
 • Add black peppercorns, cumin seeds, green peas, spinach, ghee, ginger and cook for 2 minutes.
 • Add water, salt to taste, a pinch of sugar, cover it with the lid and let it cook for 2-3 whistles or until it's cooked.
 • Once the mixture gets cooked then leave it aside for a while.
 • Add water and grind the mixture into a smooth paste with the help of a hand blender.
 • Keep it aside for further use.

For Tadka
 • In a handi, add ghee, oil, once it's hot, add fennel seeds, a pinch of asafoetida, cumin seeds and let it splutter.
 • Add fresh green peas, degi red chili powder, turmeric powder, coriander powder, cumin powder and cook for a minute.
 • Add cooked peas & spinach mixture and let it simmer for 10-12 minutes on medium flames.
 • Finish it with ghee and mix well.
 • Transfer it into the soup bowls and garnish it with fresh cream, chili oil, prepared muthiya and coriander sprig.
 • Serve hot with prepared muthiya.

For Muthiya
 • In a bowl, add fresh fenugreek leaves, jowar flour, gram flour, turmeric powder, cumin powder, black pepper powder, a pinch of asafoetida, salt to taste, ghee and water as required.
 • Now mix well the mixture and knead it into semisoft dough.
 • Divide the dough into small lemon size balls and make muthiya into it or any desired shape.
 • Transfer the muthiya into hot oil and fry them until its cooked perfectly.
 • Transfer it into the absorbent sheet and keep it aside for further use.



***********************

title: Restaurant Style Chicken Jalfrezi | चिकन जालफ्रेजी बेस्ट रेसिपी | spicy Chicken Curry | Chef Ranveer
description:
CHICKEN JALFREZI (𝙎𝙚𝙚 𝙙𝙚𝙩𝙖𝙞𝙡𝙚𝙙 𝙩𝙚𝙭𝙩 𝙧𝙚𝙘𝙞𝙥𝙚 𝙗𝙚𝙡𝙤𝙬) Jalfrezi ka asli raaz hai tez aanch aur veggies ka wo perfect crunch. 🌶️ Ye sirf recipe nahi, balki swaad aur technique ki ek khoobsurat kahani hai. Chaliye, milkar banate hain ye restaurant style Chicken Jalfrezi!

***********************
𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡  𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣
🛒RB Store - https://www.amazon.in/shop/chefranveer
📟Kitchen Appliances - https://bit.ly/KitchenAppliancesIUse
🔪Knives I use - https://amzn.to/4kzSJVe

***********************
𝗥𝗘𝗖𝗜𝗣𝗘 𝗙𝗢𝗥  Chicken Jalfrezi
Preparation time 10 minutes
Cooking time 20-25 minutes
Serve 2-4 

Ingredients
For Chicken Marination
600 gms Chicken breast (cut into large size strips), चिकन
1 tsp Degi red chilli powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर
½ tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर
½ tsp Coriander powder, धनिया पाउडर
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
2 tsp Curd (beaten), दही

For Chicken Jalfrezi
2 tbsp Ghee, घी
1 tbsp Oil, तेल
1 no. Bay leaf, तेज पत्ता
½ tsp Fennel seeds, सौंफ
½ tsp Cumin seeds, जीरा
1 large Onion (finely chopped), प्याज
1 tsp Black peppercorns (crushed), कुटी हुई काली मिर्च
2 large Tomatoes (puree), ताज़ा टमाटर की प्यूरी
½ tbsp Ginger Garlic paste, अदरक लहसुन का पेस्ट
1 tsp Degi red chilli powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर  
2 tsp Coriander powder, धनिया पाउडर
½ tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर
Little water, पानी
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
Marinated chicken, मैरीनेट किया हुआ चिकन
Little water, पानी
1 ½ tbsp Ghee, घी
1 large Onion (cut into half petals), प्याज
1 tbsp Tender Coriander stems (finely chopped), धनिया के डंठल
2 tbsp fresh Coriander leaves (finely chopped), धनिया पत्ता
2 large Capsicum (cut into strips), शिमला मिर्च
2 medium Tomatoes (cut into strips), टमाटर 
2-3 tbsp Fresh cream, ताज़ा मलाई
1 tbsp Ghee, घी

For Garnish
Fresh cream, ताज़ा मलाई
Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता


Process
For Chicken Marination
 • In a bowl, add chicken, degi red chili powder, turmeric powder, coriander powder, salt to taste, curd and mix it well.
 • Keep it aside to marinate for a while. 

For Chicken Jalfrezi
 • In a handi, add ghee, oil, once it's hot, add bay leaf, fennel seeds, cumin seeds, onion and saute until onions are translucent.
 • Add crushed black peppercorns and mix it well.
 • Add tomato puree, ginger garlic paste and cook it for 4-5 minutes until oil is separated from the masala.
 • Add degi red chili powder, coriander powder, turmeric powder and cook it for a minute.
 • Add little water, salt to taste and give it a quick boil.
 • Add marinated chicken, water, ghee, cover it with a lid and let it cook for a while until cooked well.
 • Add onion, tender coriander stems, fresh coriander leaves and give it a good mix.
 • Add capsicum, tomatoes and toss it well. 
 • Finish it with fresh cream, ghee and give it a good mix.
 • Transfer it to a serving dish, garnish it with fresh cream and coriander sprig.
 • Serve hot with roti or naan.

title: Old Delhi Famous Chole | पुरानी दिल्ली के मशहूर छोले | Old Delhi कुल्हड़ छोले | Chef Ranveer Brar
description:
𝗢𝗟𝗗 𝗗𝗜𝗟𝗟𝗜 𝗙𝗔𝗠𝗢𝗨𝗦 𝗞𝗨𝗟𝗛𝗔𝗗 𝗖𝗛𝗢𝗟𝗘 - (𝙎𝙚𝙚 𝙙𝙚𝙩𝙖𝙞𝙡𝙚𝙙 𝙩𝙚𝙭𝙩 𝙧𝙚𝙘𝙞𝙥𝙚 𝙗𝙚𝙡𝙤𝙬) Chole recipes ka sartaaj! ये नहीं try kiya तो you are missing a fantastic chole dish! Try my recipe for the Purani Dilli style Palak Chole.

***********************
𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡  𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣
🛒RB Store - https://www.amazon.in/shop/chefranveer
📟Kitchen Appliances - https://bit.ly/KitchenAppliancesIUse
🔪Knives I use - https://amzn.to/4kzSJVe

***********************
𝗥𝗘𝗖𝗜𝗣𝗘 𝗙𝗢𝗥 𝗢𝗟𝗗 𝗗𝗜𝗟𝗟𝗜 𝗙𝗔𝗠𝗢𝗨𝗦 𝗞𝗨𝗟𝗛𝗔𝗗 𝗖𝗛𝗢𝗟𝗘
Old Delhi Style Chole 
Preparation time 10 minutes 
Cooking time 25-30 minutes
Serve 2-4

Ingredients
For Cooking Chole
2 tbsp Ghee, घी
1 kg Soaked chickpeas, भीगे हुए छोले
Prepared bouquet garni, मसालों की पोटली
Water as required, पानी
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
3 no. Bay leaf, तेज पत्ता
2-3 no. dry Kashmiri red chillies (roughly torn), सूखी कश्मीरी लाल मिर्च
 
For Bouquet Garni
1 tbsp Tea leaves, चायपत्ती
4-5 no. Black cardamom, बड़ी इलायची
1 heaped tbsp Black peppercorns, काली मिर्च के दाने
3-4 no. Cloves, लौंग

For Boiling Spinach
Water as required, पानी
3 medium bunch Spinach (cleaned & washed), पालक

For Old Delhi Style Chole 
2-3 tbsp Oil, तेल
1 no. Bay leaf, तेज पत्ता
¼ inch Cinnamon stick, दालचीनी
4 no. dry Kashmiri red chillies, सूखी कश्मीरी लाल मिर्च
2 tsp Cumin seeds, जीरा
3 medium Onions (finely chopped), प्याज
1 tbsp Coriander powder, धनिया पाउडर
1 tbsp Degi red chilli powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर
½ tsp Cumin powder, जीरा पाउडर
¼ tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर
1 heaped tbsp Ginger Garlic paste, अदरक लहसुन का पेस्ट
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
3 medium Tomatoes (chopped), टमाटर
Prepared Spinach paste, तैयार किया हुआ पालक का पेस्ट
1 tbsp Tender Coriander stems (finely chopped), धनिये के डंठल
1 tbsp Ghee, घी
2 tbsp Ghee, घी
3 cups Hot water, गर्म पानी
1 large Tomato (cut into diced), टमाटर
Prepared masala mixture, तैयार किया हुआ मसालों का मिश्रण
½ tsp Garam masala, गरम मसाला
1 cup Hot water, गर्म पानी
Cooked chole, पके हुए छोले
250 gms Paneer, cut into cubed, पनीर
2 tsp dry Fenugreek leaves, crushed, कसूरी मेथी
Prepared tadka, तैयार किया हुआ तड़का
 
For Masala Mixture
1 tbsp Degi red chilli powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर
1 tbsp Garam masala, गरम मसाला
½ tbsp Black pepper powder, काली मिर्च का पाउडर

4-5 no. dry Kashmiri red chillies, सूखी कश्मीरी लाल मिर्च

Other Ingredients

title: Egg Ghee Roast Masala | अंडा घी रोस्ट मसाला | Mangalore Egg Curry | Chef Ranveer Brar
description:
EGG GHEE ROAST (𝙎𝙚𝙚 𝙙𝙚𝙩𝙖𝙞𝙡𝙚𝙙 𝙩𝙚𝙭𝙩 𝙧𝙚𝙘𝙞𝙥𝙚 𝙗𝙚𝙡𝙤𝙬) Agar aapko spicy aur flavorful khana pasand hai, toh ye 15-20 minutes mein tayyar hone wala ye Anda Ghee Roast aapke liye perfect hai! 🌶️🥚


***********************
𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡  𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣
🛒RB Store - https://www.amazon.in/shop/chefranveer
📟Kitchen Appliances - https://bit.ly/KitchenAppliancesIUse
🔪Knives I use - https://amzn.to/4kzSJVe

***********************
𝗥𝗘𝗖𝗜𝗣𝗘 𝗙𝗢𝗥  EGG GHEE ROAST
Preparation time 10 minutes
Cooking time 25-30 minutes 
Serve 2-4

Ingredients 
For Stock 
2 -3 tbsp Ghee, घी 
2 medium Onions (sliced), प्याज 
½ tbsp Tender Coriander stem (chopped), धनिया के डंठल
10-12 no. Black peppercorns, काली मिर्च के दाने
1 no. Black cardamom, बड़ी इलायची 
3-4 cups Water, पानी
7-8 no. Cashew Nuts, काजू
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
1 tbsp Tamarind, इमली 

For Paste 
10-12 no. dry Bedgi red chillies (seedless & soaked overnight) बेडगी मिर्च 
4-5 no. Garlic cloves, लहसुन

For Anda Ghee Roast 
3-4 heaped tbsp Ghee, घी 
1 inch Cinnamon stick, दालचीनी
Prepared paste, तैयार किया हुआ पेस्ट
Prepared stock, तैयार किया हुआ स्टॉक
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
2 sprig Curry leaves, कडी पत्ते
Prepared stock, तैयार किया हुआ स्टॉक
2-3 tbsp Ghee, घी 
2 tbsp jaggery, गुड़
6-7 no. hard Boiled Eggs, उबले हुए अंडे
½ cup Hot water, गर्म पानी
½ tbsp Tender Coriander stem (finely chopped) धनिया के डंठल

For Garnish 
Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता

Process 
For Stock 
● In a stock pot, add ghee, once it's hot, add onions and saute for 2-4 minutes. 
● Add tender coriander stem, black peppercorn, black cardamom, water, cashewnut, salt to taste, tamarind and simmer it for a while. 
● Blend the mixture with the help of a hand blender and grind it to smooth puree. 
● Strain the stock and keep it aside for further use. 

For Paste 
● In a bowl, add soaked bedgi dry red chillies and garlic cloves. 
● Transfer it to a grinder jar and grind into a smooth paste. 
● Keep it aside for further use. 

For Anda Ghee Roast 
● In a handi, add ghee, once it's hot, add cinnamon stick, prepared paste and saute it for 4-5 minutes. 
● Gradually add stock, salt to taste, curry leaves and cook it on medium flames for a while.
● Add ghee and let it simmer until oil is separated.
● Add boiled eggs and cook it well.
● Transfer it to a serving dish and garnish it with coriander sprig.
● Serve hot with lachha paratha or neer dosa. 




***********************

title: Winter spl Mooli Paratha | Best मूली के पराठे | Instant गाजर Achaar | Chef Ranveer Brar
description:
MOOLI PARATHA (𝙎𝙚𝙚 𝙙𝙚𝙩𝙖𝙞𝙡𝙚𝙙 𝙩𝙚𝙭𝙩 𝙧𝙚𝙘𝙞𝙥𝙚 𝙗𝙚𝙡𝙤𝙬) Aaj ki recipe hai winter ki jaan, Punjabi Mooli Paratha aur Chatpata Gajar ka Achaar. ❄️ Thand ke mausam mein taza mooli aur spicy achar ka combination sabka favorite hota hai.🥕🌶️

***********************
𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡  𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣
🛒RB Store - https://www.amazon.in/shop/chefranveer
📟Kitchen Appliances - https://bit.ly/KitchenAppliancesIUse
🔪Knives I use - https://amzn.to/4kzSJVe

***********************
𝗥𝗘𝗖𝗜𝗣𝗘 𝗙𝗢𝗥  MOOLI PARATHA WITH GAJAR ACHAAR  
Preparation time 10-15 minutes
Cooking time 15 minutes 
Serve 2-4

Ingredients 
For Stuffing
2 medium Radish (grated), मूली
½ cup Radish Leaves (chopped), मूली के पत्ते
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
½ tsp Carom seeds, अजवाइन
1 no. Green chilli (chopped), हरी मिर्च
½ tsp Degi red chilli powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर
¼ tsp Oil, तेल
¼ tsp Lemon juice, नींबू का रस
A pinch of cumin powder, जीरा पाउडर

For Dough 
2 cups Whole wheat flour, गेहूं का आटा
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
1 tsp Ghee, घी
Chilled water as required, ठंडा पानी
1 tsp Oil (after kneading) तेल

For Gajar ka Achar 
2 cups Water, पानी
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
1 tsp Sugar, चीनी
2 medium Carrots (peeled & cut into batons) गाजर
4-5 no. Green chillies (less spicy & cut into half), हरी मिर्च
2-3 tbsp Prepared masala, तैयार किया हुआ मसाला
½ cup Vinegar, सिरका
2 tbsp Jaggery, गुड़
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
2-3 heaped tbsp smoked Mustard oil, सरसों का तेल

For Masala  
1 tbsp Coriander seeds, धनिये के बीज
½ tbsp Fennel seeds, सौंफ
½ tbsp Cumin seeds, जीरा
¼ tsp Fenugreek seeds, मेथी दाना
10-12 no. Black peppercorns, काली मिर्च के दाने
1 tsp small Mustard seeds, छोटी राई
1 tbsp Yellow mustard seeds, पीले सरसों के बीज
¼ tsp Nigella seeds, कलौंजी
1 heaped tbsp Degi red chili powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर
½ tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार

For Mooli Ka Raita
Prepared mooli mixture तैयार किया हुआ मूली मिश्रण
2 cups Curd (beaten), दही
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार

Other Ingredients 
Ghee for greasing, घी

For Garnish
Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता
Butter (cubed), मक्खन   

Process
For Stuffing 
● In a medium bowl, add grated radish, radish leaves, salt to taste and leave it for 5-10 minutes. 
● Squeeze out the excess water from the radish and transfer it to a bowl.
● In the same bowl, add carom seeds, green chilli, degi red chilli powder, oil, lemon juice and cumin powder. 
● Mix it well and keep it aside for further use.

For Dough 
● In a bowl, add whole wheat flour, salt to taste, ghee, chilled water and knead it into a semisoft dough.
●  Add oil and knead it nicely. 
●  Cover it with damp cloth and keep it aside to rest for a while.

For Cooking Paratha
● Divide the dough into medium lemon size balls and make a cavity in the middle.
● Add a spoonful of prepared stuffing in the cavity, seal the edges and roll it with the help of a rolling pin.
● Keep it aside for further use.
● On a tawa, add ghee, once it's hot, place prepared rolled paratha and cook it on both the sides.
● Transfer it to a serving dish and garnish it with butter.
● Serve hot with gajar ka achar. 

For Gajar ka Achar 
● In a pan, heat water, add salt to taste, sugar, carrots and boil it for 2-3minutes on medium heat. 
● In another pan, add vinegar, jaggery and cook it for 2 minutes. Keep aside for further use. 
● In a bowl, add green chillies, cooked carrots, prepared masala, cooked vinegar & jaggery mixture along with smoked mustard oil, salt and give it a good stir.
● Transfer it to an airtight container and store it well.

For Masala 
● In a tray, add coriander seeds, fennel seeds, cumin seeds, fenugreek seeds, black peppercorns, mustard seeds, yellow mustard seeds, nigella seeds, degi red chilli powder, turmeric powder and salt.
● Transfer the spice into a mixer grinder jar and grind it into a fine powder.
● Keep it aside for further use.

For Mooli ka Raita 
● In a bowl, add prepared mooli mixture, curd and salt to taste. 
● Mix it well and keep aside for further use. 



***********************

title: Best Chicken Keema recipe | कढ़ाई कीमा | हरा मसाला kadhai keema Pav | Chef Ranveer Brar
description:
𝗞𝗔𝗗𝗛𝗔𝗜 𝗖𝗛𝗜𝗖𝗞𝗘𝗡 𝗞𝗘𝗘𝗠𝗔 𝗣𝗔𝗩 (𝙎𝙚𝙚 𝙙𝙚𝙩𝙖𝙞𝙡𝙚𝙙 𝙩𝙚𝙭𝙩 𝙧𝙚𝙘𝙞𝙥𝙚 𝙗𝙚𝙡𝙤𝙬) Jab kuch chatpata khane ka mann ho aur time kam ho, toh banayein ye Kadhai Chicken Keema Pav. ⏱️🍗 Ye recipe bachelors aur beginners ke liye perfect hai kyunki ye sirf ek Kadhai mein ban jati hai.

***********************
𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡  𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣
🛒RB Store - https://www.amazon.in/shop/chefranveer
📟Kitchen Appliances - https://bit.ly/KitchenAppliancesIUse
🔪Knives I use - https://amzn.to/4kzSJVe

***********************
𝗥𝗘𝗖𝗜𝗣𝗘 𝗙𝗢𝗥  𝗞𝗔𝗗𝗛𝗔𝗜 𝗖𝗛𝗜𝗖𝗞𝗘𝗡 𝗞𝗘𝗘𝗠𝗔 𝗣𝗔𝗩
Preparation time 10 minutes 
Cooking time 20-25 minutes 
Serve 2-4

Ingredients 
For Kadhai Keema
2-3 heaped tbsp Oil, तेल
3 medium Onions (roughly sliced), प्याज
Prepared masala, तैयार किया हुआ मसाला
1 tbsp Chilli flakes, चिली फ्लेक्स
1 inch Ginger (peeled & chopped), अदरक
3-4 no. Green chillies (less spicy & chopped), हरी मिर्च
4 large Tomatoes (puree), ताजे टमाटर की प्यूरी
½ cup Green garlic (finely chopped), हरी लहसुन
2 tbsp Tender Coriander stems (finely chopped), धनिये के डंठल
1 cup Spinach (finely chopped), पालक
1 cup Curd (beaten), दही
1 cup fresh Green peas, हरे मटर
Marinated chicken minced, मैरीनेट किया हुआ चिकन कीमा
1 tbsp Green chilli pickle, हरी मिर्च का अचार
½ cup fresh Coriander leaves (finely chopped), धनिया पत्ता

For Dry Masala
1 no. Mace, जावित्री
1 tbsp Black peppercorns, काली मिर्च के दाने
5-6 no. Green cardamom, हरी इलायची
2-3 no. Cloves, लौंग
2 no. Black cardamom, बड़ी इलायची
½ inch Cinnamon stick, दालचीनी
1 no. Bay leaf, तेज पत्ता

For Keema Marination
1 kg Chicken (minced), चिकन कीमा
1 heaped tbsp Coriander powder, धनिया पाउडर 
1 tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर
1 heaped tbsp Degi red chilli powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार  

For Garnish
Green chilli (cut into halves), हरी मिर्च
Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता
Lemon wedge, नींबू की फांक

Process
For Kadhai Keema
● In a handi, add oil, once it's hot, add onions and saute it for a while until golden in colour.
● Add prepared masala, chilli flakes, ginger, green chillies and cook it for a minute.
● Add tomato puree and let it cook for another 5-6 minutes until oil separates from the masala.
● Add green garlic, tender coriander stems, spinach, curd, fresh green peas and cook it for a while.
● Add marinated chicken minced, give it a good mix, cover it with the lid and let it cook it for 10-12 minutes on medium flames or until cooked well.
● Finish it with green chilli pickle, fresh coriander leaves and give it a good mix.
● Transfer it to a serving dish, garnish it with green chilli, coriander sprig and lemon wedge.
● Serve hot with ladi pav or khameer roti.

For Dry Masala
● In a mortar pestle, add mace, black peppercorns, green cardamom, cloves, black cardamom, cinnamon stick, bay leaf and grind it to coarse powder.
● Keep it aside for further use.

For Keema Marination
● In a bowl, add chicken minced, coriander powder, turmeric powder, degi red chili powder, salt to taste and mix it well
● Leave it aside to marinate for a while.




***********************

title: 10 mins में Malai Pyaaz Sabji | ऐसी मलाईदार सब्जी कभी ना बनाई होगी | Winter spl | Chef Ranveer Brar
description:
𝗠𝗔𝗟𝗔𝗜 𝗣𝗬𝗔𝗔𝗭 𝗞𝗜 𝗦𝗔𝗕𝗝𝗜 /मारवाड़ी स्टाइल मलाई प्याज की सब्जी - (𝙎𝙚𝙚 𝙙𝙚𝙩𝙖𝙞𝙡𝙚𝙙 𝙩𝙚𝙭𝙩 𝙧𝙚𝙘𝙞𝙥𝙚 𝙗𝙚𝙡𝙤𝙬) Kitchen mein koi sabzi nahi hai? Don't worry! 🧅✨ आज हम banayenge Rajasthani style Malai Pyaaz ki Sabji जो sirf 10 minutes mein bankar taiyar.

***********************
𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡  𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣
🛒RB Store - https://www.amazon.in/shop/chefranveer
📟Kitchen Appliances - https://bit.ly/KitchenAppliancesIUse
🔪Knives I use - https://amzn.to/4kzSJVe

***********************
𝗥𝗘𝗖𝗜𝗣𝗘 𝗙𝗢𝗥  MALAI PYAAZ KI SABJI 
Preparation time 10 minutes 
Cooking time 20-25 minutes 
Serve 2-4 

Ingredients 
For Smoked Onions
3 large Onions (cut into quarters), प्याज

For Curd Mixture
600 gms Curd (beaten), दही
Prepared ginger green chilli paste, तैयार की हुई अदरक हरी मिर्च का पेस्ट
2 tbsp Coriander powder, धनिया पाउडर
½ tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर
1 tbsp Degi red chilli powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर

For Ginger Green chilli Paste
5 no. Green chillies (less spicy & roughly chopped), हरी मिर्च
2 inch Ginger (peeled & roughly chopped), अदरक

For Malai Pyaaz ke sabji 
2-3 tbsp Oil, तेल
½ tsp Cumin seeds, जीरा
½ tsp Fennel seeds, सौंफ
3 no. Black cardamom, बड़ी इलायची
3 no. Bay leaf, तेज पत्ता
6-7 no. Button chillies, बटन मिर्च
Prepared curd mixture, तैयार किया हुआ दही का मिश्रण
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
Smoked Onions, स्मोक्ड प्याज
2 large Onions (cut into quarters), प्याज
Little water, पानी
¼ cup Fresh cream, ताज़ा मलाई
Fried Cashew nuts, तले हुए काजू

For Frying Nuts
2 tbsp Oil, तेल
¼ cup Cashewnuts, काजू

For Garnish
Fried cashew nuts, तले हुए काजू
Ratlami sev, रतलामी सेव
Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता

Process
For Smoked Onions
● Take a cooking rack, add onions and place onto the gas range.
● Cook it for 2-3 minutes on high flames until onions get charred and brown in colour.
● Keep it aside for further use.

For Curd Mixture
● In a bowl, add curd, prepared ginger green chili paste, coriander powder, degi red chili powder, turmeric powder and give it a good mix.
● Keep it aside for further use.

For Ginger Green Chilli Paste
● In a mortar pestle, add green chillies, ginger and grind it into a coarse paste.
● Keep it aside for further use.

For Malai Pyaz Ki Sabji
● In a kadai or handi, add oil, once it's hot, add cumin seeds, fennel seeds, black cardamom, bay leaf, button chillies, prepared curd mixture and cook it for 5-6 minutes until oil is separated from the gravy.
● Add salt to taste, smoked onions, onions, little water, cover it with the lid and let it cook for a while.
● Finish it with fresh cream, fried cashew nuts and give it a good mix.
● Transfer it to a serving dish, garnish it with fried cashewnuts, ratlami sev and coriander sprig.
● Serve hot with roti.          

For Frying Nuts
● In a pan, add oil, once it's hot, add cashew nuts and fry them until golden in colour.
● Transfer it to an absorbent sheet and keep it aside for further use.



***********************

title: Lucknowi Aloo Dum | मज़ेदार आलू कोरमा अवधी अंदाज़ में | Awadhi Aloo Dum Korma | Chef Ranveer Brar
description:
𝗟𝗨𝗖𝗞𝗡𝗢𝗪𝗜 𝗔𝗟𝗢𝗢 𝗞𝗢𝗥𝗠𝗔 - (𝙎𝙚𝙚 𝙙𝙚𝙩𝙖𝙞𝙡𝙚𝙙 𝙩𝙚𝙭𝙩 𝙧𝙚𝙘𝙞𝙥𝙚 𝙗𝙚𝙡𝙤𝙬) लीजिए, pesh है ekdum authentic Lucknowi Aloo Korma! 🥔✨ Quick, easy and  bilkul nawabi style Aloo Dum or Lucknow style Aloo Korma/ sabji

***********************
𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡  𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣
🛒RB Store - https://www.amazon.in/shop/chefranveer
📟Kitchen Appliances - https://bit.ly/KitchenAppliancesIUse
🔪Knives I use - https://amzn.to/4kzSJVe

***********************
𝗥𝗘𝗖𝗜𝗣𝗘 𝗙𝗢𝗥 𝗟𝗨𝗖𝗞𝗡𝗢𝗪𝗜 𝗔𝗟𝗢𝗢 𝗞𝗢𝗥𝗠𝗔
Preparation time 10 minutes 
Cooking time 20-25 minutes 
Serve 2-4 

Ingredients
For Lucknowi Aloo Korma
¼ cup Oil, तेल
3 medium Onions (roughly sliced), प्याज
4 no. Green cardamom, हरी इलायची
2 no. Black cardamom, बड़ी इलायची 
Prepared curd mixture, तैयार किया हुआ दही का मिश्रण
2 cups Water, पानी
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
4-5 no. Dried apricots, खुबानी
Prepared rice flour slurry, चावल के आटे का घोल
1 heaped tbsp Tender Coriander stems (finely chopped), धनिया के डंठल
4-5 Dried apricots, खुबानी
Fried potatoes, तले हुए आलू
Little water, पानी
½ tsp Sugar, चीनी
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
1 tsp dry Fenugreek leaves (crushed), कसूरी मेथी
1 tsp Black peppercorns (crushed), कुटी हुई काली मिर्च
2-3 tbsp fresh Coriander leaves (finely chopped), धनिया पत्ता

For Curd Mixture
2 cups Curd (beaten), दही
1 tsp Degi red chili powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर
2 tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर
1 tbsp Coriander powder, धनिया पाउडर
¼ tsp Cumin powder, जीरा पाउडर
1 tbsp Ginger Garlic paste, अदरक लहसुन का पेस्ट

For Frying Potatoes
Oil for frying, तलने के लिए तेल
3-4 large Potatoes (peeled & cut into wedges), आलू

For Rice Flour Slurry
1 tbsp Rice flour, चावल का आटा
½ tbsp Ghee, घी 
Water as required, पानी

For Garnish
Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता

Process
For Lucknowi Aloo Korma
● In a handi, add oil, once it's hot, add onions and saute it for 5-6 minutes until golden in colour.
● Add green cardamom, black cardamom, prepared curd mixture and cook until oil separates from the masala.
● Add water, salt to taste, dried apricots and let it simmer for a while.
● Add prepared rice flour slurry, tender coriander stems, dried apricots, fried potatoes, little water and cook it for 7-8 minutes on medium flames.
● Add sugar, salt to taste and mix it well.
● Finish it with crushed dry fenugreek leaves, black peppercorns and fresh coriander leaves.
● Transfer it to a serving dish and garnish it with coriander sprig.
● Serve hot with roti and naan.

For Curd Mixture
● In a bowl, add curd, degi red chili powder, turmeric powder, coriander powder, cumin powder, ginger garlic paste and give it a good mix.
● Keep it aside for further use.

For Frying Potatoes
● In a kadai, heat oil for frying, add potatoes and fry them until crispy and golden in colour.
● Transfer it to an absorbent sheet and keep it aside for further use.

For Rice Flour Slurry
● In a bowl, add rice flour, ghee, water as required and give it a good mix.
● Keep it aside for further use.

title: Winter spl Bajra Khichdi | बाजरे की खिचड़ी ख़ास सर्दियों के लिए | Easy Millet Khichdi | Chef Ranveer
description:
(𝙎𝙚𝙚 𝙙𝙚𝙩𝙖𝙞𝙡𝙚𝙙 𝙩𝙚𝙭𝙩 𝙧𝙚𝙘𝙞𝙥𝙚 𝙗𝙚𝙡𝙤𝙬) सर्दियों की दोपहर हो और गरमा-गरम Bajra Khichdi aur Kadhi मिल जाए, तो बात ही कुछ और है! No time to cook a 5-course meal? Try this Easy One-Pot Bajra Khichdi!

***********************
𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡  𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣
🛒RB Store - https://www.amazon.in/shop/chefranveer
📟Kitchen Appliances - https://bit.ly/KitchenAppliancesIUse
🔪Knives I use - https://amzn.to/4kzSJVe

***********************
𝗥𝗘𝗖𝗜𝗣𝗘 𝗙𝗢𝗥 BAJRA KHICHDI
Preparation time 10 minutes
Cooking time 30-35minutes
Serve 2-4 

Ingredients
For Cooking Bajra & Dals
2-3 heaped tbsp Ghee, घी
2 cups Bajra (soaked overnight), भिगोया हुआ बाजरा
½ cup Moong dal (washed), धुली हुई मूंग दाल
½ cup Chana dal (washed), धुली हुई चना दाल
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
1 no. Green chilli (less spicy & roughly torn), हरी मिर्च
Water as required, पानी

For Ginger Garlic Paste
4-5 no. Garlic cloves, लहसुन
1 inch Ginger (peeled & sliced), अदरक
2 no. Green chillies (less spicy & roughly chopped), हरी मिर्च
 
For Curd Mixture
2 cups Curd (beaten), दही
½ tbsp Prepared ginger garlic paste, अदरक लहसुन का पेस्ट
2 tbsp Bajra flour, बाजरा का आटा
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
2-3 cups Water, पानी

For Kadhi
1-2 tbsp Ghee, घी
Prepared curd mixture, तैयार किया हुआ दही का मिश्रण

For Bajra Khichdi
1 tbsp Oil, तेल
1 tbsp Ghee, घी
1 tsp Cumin seeds, जीरा
Prepared ginger garlic green chilli paste, अदरक लहसुन और हरी मिर्च का पेस्ट
2 medium Onions (roughly chopped), प्याज
2 medium Carrots (peeled & cut into small diced), गाजर
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
Cooked Bajra & Dals, पका हुआ बाजरा और दाल
1 fresh Green peas, हरे मटर
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
2 tbsp Ghee, घी

For Garnish
Ghee, घी
Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता

Process 
For Cooking Bajra & Dals
● In a pressure cooker, add ghee, once it's hot, add soaked bajra, moong dal, chana dal, salt to taste, green chili, water as required and mix it well.
● Cover it with a lid and cook it for 10-12 whistles until cooked well.
● Keep it aside to depressurize the cooker.

For Ginger Garlic Paste
● In a mortar pestle, add garlic ginger, green chillies and grind it into a coarse paste.
● Keep it aside for further use.

For Curd Mixture
● In a bowl, add curd, prepared ginger garlic paste, bajra flour, salt to taste, water and give it a good mix.
● Keep it aside for further use.

For kadhi
● In a kadai or handi, add ghee, once it's hot, add prepared curd mixture and simmer it for 20-25 minutes on medium flames.
● Transfer it to a serving bowl and garnish it with coriander sprig.
● Serve hot with prepared bajra khichdi.

For Bajra Khichdi
● In a handi, add oil, ghee, once it's hot, add cumin seeds, prepared ginger garlic green chilli paste and saute it for a minute.
● Add onions, carrots, salt to taste and let it cook until onions are golden in colour.
● Add cooked bajra & dals, fresh green peas, salt to taste and give it a good mix.
● Cover it with a lid and let it cook for 10-12 minutes on low to medium flames.
● Finish it with ghee and mix it well.
● Transfer it to a serving dish, garnish it with ghee and coriander sprig.
● Serve hot with prepared kadhi.



***********************

title: Winter spl Chicken Curry | सर्दियों में बनाएँ मज़ेदार पालक चिकन | Saag Chicken | Chef Ranveer Brar
description:
𝗪𝗜𝗡𝗧𝗘𝗥 𝗦𝗣𝗟 𝗣𝗔𝗟𝗔𝗞 𝗖𝗛𝗜𝗖𝗞𝗘𝗡 𝗖𝗨𝗥𝗥𝗬 - (𝙎𝙚𝙚 𝙙𝙚𝙩𝙖𝙞𝙡𝙚𝙙 𝙩𝙚𝙭𝙩 𝙧𝙚𝙘𝙞𝙥𝙚 𝙗𝙚𝙡𝙤𝙬) Looking for the perfect winter comfort food? This Palak Chicken (Saag Chicken) is the only recipe you’ll ever need. Made with fresh winter spinach and juicy chicken, this restaurant-style curry is healthy, easy, and packed with flavor. 

***********************
𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡  𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣
🛒RB Store - https://www.amazon.in/shop/chefranveer
📟Kitchen Appliances - https://bit.ly/KitchenAppliancesIUse
🔪Knives I use - https://amzn.to/4kzSJVe

***********************
𝗥𝗘𝗖𝗜𝗣𝗘 𝗙𝗢𝗥 𝗪𝗜𝗡𝗧𝗘𝗥 𝗦𝗣𝗟 𝗣𝗔𝗟𝗔𝗞 𝗖𝗛𝗜𝗖𝗞𝗘𝗡 𝗖𝗨𝗥𝗥𝗬
Preparation time 10 minutes
Cooking time 20-25 minutes
Serve 2-4

Ingredients 
For Paste
1 cup Coriander leaves (roughly torn), धनिया पत्ता
2 large bunch Spinach, (roughly torn), पालक
3 no. Green chillies (less spicy & chopped), हरी मिर्च
1 large Tomato (diced), टमाटर
 
For Chicken Marination  
900 gms Chicken legs, चिकन
1 tsp Degi red chilli powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर
½ tsp dry Mango powder, आमचूर पाउडर
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
1 tbsp Ginger Garlic paste, अदरक लहसुन का पेस्ट
3 tbsp Mustard oil, सरसों का तेल

For Garam Masala
2 heaped tbsp Black peppercorns, काली मिर्च के दाने
5-6 no. Cloves, लौंग
10-12 no. Black cardamom, बड़ी इलायची
2 tbsp Coriander seeds, धनिये के बीज
½ tsp Fenugreek seeds, मेथी दाना
½ tbsp Cumin seeds, जीरा
3 no. Mace, जावित्री
2-3 no. Green cardamom, हरी इलायची
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार

For Winter Chicken Curry
¼ cup Mustard oil, सरसों का तेल
Little water, पानी
2 no. Cloves, लौंग
1 no. Black cardamom, बड़ी इलायची
2 medium Onions (chopped), प्याज
Prepared paste, तैयारी की हुई पेस्ट
½ cup Curd (beaten), दही
Marinated chicken, मैरीनेट किया हुआ चिकन
2 tbsp Prepared garam masala, तैयार किया हुआ गरम मसाला
Smoked ghee, स्मोक्ड घी
2 cups Water, पानी
2 tbsp prepared garam masala, तैयार किया हुआ गरम मसाला
2 tsp Fenugreek leaves, कसूरी मेथी
2-3 tbsp Ghee, घी

Other Ingredients
Coal, कोयला
1 tbsp Ghee, घी

For Garnish 
Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता
Lemon wedge, नींबू की फांक

Process
For Winter Paste
● In a bowl, add coriander leaves, spinach, green chillies and tomato.
● Transfer it to a mixer grinder jar and grind into a smooth paste.
● Keep it aside for further use.
 
For Chicken Marination  
● In a bowl, add chicken legs, degi red chilli powder, dry mango powder, salt to taste, ginger garlic paste, mustard oil and mix it well.
● Keep it aside to marinate for a while.

For Garam Masala
● In a kadai, add black peppercorns, cloves, black cardamom, coriander seeds, mace, green cardamom, salt to taste and dry roast it for a minute.
● Transfer it to a mixer grinder jar and grind it into a smooth powder.
● Keep it aside for further use.

For Winter Chicken Curry
● In a kadai, add mustard oil, once it's smoky hot, add cloves, black cardamom and let it splutter.
● Add onion and saute it for a while until golden in color.
● Add winter paste and cook it for 2-3 minutes.
● Add curd and cook it for 5-6 minutes until cooked well.
● Add marinated chicken and cook it until tender.
● Heat a coal on a gas range and place it in a steel bowl.
● Add prepared garam masala, place the bowl in the kadai, add ghee and cover it with a lid.
● Add the same smoked ghee, water, prepared garam masala and let it simmer for a while until oil is separated.
● Finish it with fenugreek leaves, ghee and mix it well.
● Transfer it to a serving dish, garnish it with coriander sprig and lemon wedge.
● Serve hot with roti or rice.

title: Kripsy Paneer Tikka Samosa | पनीर टिक्के का समोसा | bonus Potli Samosa recipe | Chef Ranveer Brar
description:
𝗣𝗔𝗡𝗘𝗘𝗥 𝗧𝗜𝗞𝗞𝗔 𝗦𝗔𝗠𝗢𝗦𝗔 & 𝗣𝗢𝗧𝗟𝗜 𝗦𝗔𝗠𝗢𝗦𝗔 - (𝙎𝙚𝙚 𝙙𝙚𝙩𝙖𝙞𝙡𝙚𝙙 𝙩𝙚𝙭𝙩 𝙧𝙚𝙘𝙞𝙥𝙚 𝙗𝙚𝙡𝙤𝙬) Paneer Tikke ka mazaa in a Samosa! Plus I've shown how to make the famous Potli Samosa too :)

***********************
𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡  𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣
🛒RB Store - https://www.amazon.in/shop/chefranveer
📟Kitchen Appliances - https://bit.ly/KitchenAppliancesIUse
🔪Knives I use - https://amzn.to/4kzSJVe

***********************
𝗥𝗘𝗖𝗜𝗣𝗘 𝗙𝗢𝗥 𝗣𝗔𝗡𝗘𝗘𝗥 𝗧𝗜𝗞𝗞𝗔 𝗦𝗔𝗠𝗢𝗦𝗔 & 𝗣𝗢𝗧𝗟𝗜 𝗦𝗔𝗠𝗢𝗦𝗔
Preparation time 10 minutes
Cooking time 20-25 minutes
Serve 2-4

Ingredients 
For 1st Marination 
400 gms Paneer (cut into thick slabs), पनीर
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
½ tsp Degi red chilli powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर
1 ½ tsp Lemon juice, नींबू का रस

For 2nd Marination 
2 heaped tbsp Mayonnaise, मेयोनेज़
2 heaped tbsp Curd (beaten), दही
1 tsp Gram flour, बेसन
1 tsp Degi red chilli powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर
A pinch of turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर
A pinch of garam masala, गरम मसाला
½ tsp Coriander powder, धनिया पाउडर
1 tbsp Ginger Garlic paste, अदरक लहसुन का पेस्ट
1 tsp Lemon juice, नींबू का रस
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
1 tsp Mustard oil, सरसों का तेल
Marinated Paneer, मैरीनेट किया हुआ पनीर

For Dough 
2 cups Refined flour, मैदा
½ tsp Carom seeds, अजवाइन
1 tbsp Oil, तेल
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
Water as required, पानी

For Dry Masala 
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
1 heaped tbsp Cumin seeds, जीरा
½ tbsp Fennel seeds, सौंफ
1 heaped tbsp Black peppercorns, काली मिर्च के दाने
5-6 no. Black cardamom, बड़ी इलायची

For Frying Paneer
2 tbsp Oil, तेल
Marinated paneer, मैरीनेट किया हुआ पनीर

For Samosa Stuffing
Remaining marination, बचा हुआ मैरिनेशन
1 cup fresh Green peas, हरे मटर
Water as required, पानी
Cooked paneer (roughly chopped), पका हुआ पनीर
4-5 no. Green chillies (less spicy & finely chopped), हरी मिर्च
2-3 tbsp fresh Coriander leaves (finely chopped), धनिया पत्ता
¼ cup Nylon sev, नायलॉन सेव
2-3 tbsp Prepared masala, तैयार किया हुआ मसाला

For Making Samosa
Prepared dough, तैयार किया हुआ आटा
Little water, पानी
Prepared stuffing, तैयार की हुई स्टफिंग
Samosa patti, समोसा पट्टी
Prepared stuffing, तैयार की हुई स्टफिंग
Refined flour slurry, मैदा का घोल

Other Ingredients
1-2 tsp Oil (for rolling dough), तेल
Oil for frying, तलने के लिए तेल

For Garnish
Fried chillies, तली हुई मिर्च
Lemon wedges, नींबू की फांक

title: Famous Chicken Ghotala | चिकन घोटाला / कीमा पाव | Mumbai Street Style Keema Pav | Chef Ranveer Brar
description:
𝗠𝗨𝗠𝗕𝗔𝗜 𝗙𝗔𝗠𝗢𝗨𝗦 𝗖𝗛𝗜𝗖𝗞𝗘𝗡 𝗚𝗛𝗢𝗧𝗔𝗟𝗔 - (𝙎𝙚𝙚 𝙙𝙚𝙩𝙖𝙞𝙡𝙚𝙙 𝙩𝙚𝙭𝙩 𝙧𝙚𝙘𝙞𝙥𝙚 𝙗𝙚𝙡𝙤𝙬) Street style Keema Pav, but with Chicken this time. Try my recipe for this mazedaar Chicken Ghotala and impress your family/ guests this weekend!

***********************
𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡  𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣
🛒RB Store - https://www.amazon.in/shop/chefranveer
📟Kitchen Appliances - https://bit.ly/KitchenAppliancesIUse
🔪Knives I use - https://amzn.to/4kzSJVe

***********************
𝗥𝗘𝗖𝗜𝗣𝗘 𝗙𝗢𝗥 𝗖𝗛𝗜𝗖𝗞𝗘𝗡 𝗚𝗛𝗢𝗧𝗔𝗟𝗔
Preparation time 10 minutes 
Cooking time 25-30 minutes 
Serve 2-4 

Ingredients 
For Cooking Chicken
¼ cup Oil, तेल
1 tsp Cumin seeds, जीरा
1 large Onion (roughly sliced), प्याज
2 cups Curd (beaten), दही
1 heaped tsp Degi red chilli powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर
½ tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर
2 tsp Coriander powder, धनिया पाउडर
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
1 tsp dry Fenugreek leaves (crushed), कसूरी मेथी
900 gms Chicken breast (cut into large cubes), चिकन
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार

For Chicken Ghotala 
2-3 tbsp Oil, तेल
½ tsp Cumin seeds, जीरा
½ inch Ginger (peeled & chopped), अदरक
4 large Onion (finely chopped), प्याज
5-6 no. Green chillies (less spicy & chopped), हरी मिर्च
1 heaped tbsp Ginger Garlic paste, अदरक लहसुन का पेस्ट
1 heaped tbsp Coriander powder, धनिया पाउडर
½ tbsp Degi red chilli powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर
1 tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर
½ cup Water, पानी
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
3 large Tomatoes (finely chopped), टमाटर
2-3 tbsp fresh Coriander leaves (finely chopped), धनिया पत्ता
¾ cup Water, पानी
Cooked chicken (mashed), पका हुआ चिकन
2 tbsp Ghee, घी
2-3 tbsp Fresh cream, ताज़ा मलाई
½ tbsp dry Fenugreek leaves (crushed), कसूरी मेथी

For Garnish
Green chilli (finely chopped), हरी मिर्च
Onion (finely chopped), प्याज
Lemon wedges, नींबू की फांक
Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता

Process 
For Cooking Chicken
● In a handi, add oil, once it's hot, add cumin seeds, onion and cook it for 2-3 minutes until onions are translucent.
● Add curd, degi red chilli powder, turmeric powder, coriander powder, salt to taste and cook it for a while until oil separates from the masala.
● Add dry fenugreek leaves, chicken, salt to taste and cook it for 10-12 minutes on medium flames until chicken gets cooked.
● Mash the chicken with the help of a masher and keep it aside for further use.

For Chicken Ghotala
● In a handi, add oil, once it's hot, add cumin seeds, ginger, onions, green chillies and cook until onion translucent..
● Add ginger garlic paste and mix it well.
● Add coriander powder, degi red chili powder, turmeric powder and cook it for a minute.
● Add water, salt to taste, tomatoes and let it cook for a while until tomatoes are mushy.
● Add fresh coriander leaves, water, cooked chicken and give it a quick boil.
● Finish it with ghee, fresh cream, crushed dry fenugreek leaves and give it a good mix.
● Transfer it to a serving dish, garnish it with green chilli, onion, lemon wedges and coriander sprig.
● Serve hot with ladi pav.

title: Chicken Shawarma Bao | होटल जैसा चिकन शावरमा | चिकन बाओ | Perfect Chicken Bao | Chef Ranveer Brar
description:
𝗖𝗛𝗜𝗖𝗞𝗘𝗡 𝗕𝗔𝗢 & 𝗦𝗛𝗔𝗪𝗔𝗥𝗠𝗔-  (𝙎𝙚𝙚 𝙙𝙚𝙩𝙖𝙞𝙡𝙚𝙙 𝙩𝙚𝙭𝙩 𝙧𝙚𝙘𝙞𝙥𝙚 𝙗𝙚𝙡𝙤𝙬) Calling all Bao & Shawarma fans.. If you've been waiting for the perfect recipe for the perfect Bao & street style Shawarma at home, then this video is for you 😎

***********************
𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡  𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣
🛒RB Store - https://www.amazon.in/shop/chefranveer
📟Kitchen Appliances - https://bit.ly/KitchenAppliancesIUse
🔪Knives I use - https://amzn.to/4kzSJVe

***********************
𝗥𝗘𝗖𝗜𝗣𝗘 𝗙𝗢𝗥  𝗖𝗛𝗜𝗖𝗞𝗘𝗡 𝗕𝗔𝗢 & 𝗦𝗛𝗔𝗪𝗔𝗥𝗠𝗔 
Preparation time 10 minutes
Cooking time 20-25 minutes 
Serve 2-4 

Ingredients 
For Dough 
2 tbsp Milk, दूध
1 tsp Yeast, यीस्ट
Water as required, पानी
1 tsp Sugar, चीनी
500 gms Refined flour, मैदा
½ tsp Oil, तेल

For Cooking Chicken
1 ½ tbsp Oil, तेल
7-8 large Tomatoes (puree), टमाटर प्यूरी
1 tbsp Ghee, घी
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
3-4 no. Green chillies (less spicy & finely chopped) हरी मिर्च
1 tbsp Tender Coriander stems (finely chopped), धनिये के डंठल
3-4 no. Garlic cloves (chopped), लहसुन
600 gms Chicken thighs, चिकन
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
1 tbsp Degi red chilli powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर
1 heaped tsp Coriander powder, धनिया पाउडर
3 heaped tbsp Curd (beaten), दही
1 tbsp Oregano, ओरिगेनो
½ tbsp Chilli flakes, चिल्ली फ्लेक्स
 
For Garlic Mayonnaise 
15-18 no. Garlic cloves, लहसुन
1 cup Mayonnaise, मेयोनेज़

For Salad 
2 medium Tomatoes, sliced, टमाटर 
2 ½ medium Onions, sliced, प्याज
 4 no. Green chillies (less spicy & finely chopped) हरी मिर्च
⅓ cup fresh Coriander leaves (finely chopped), धनिया पत्ता
1 tsp Lemon juice, नींबू का रस
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार

For Assembling Shawarama
Prepared roti, तैयार की हुई रोटी
Prepared garlic mayonnaise, तैयार किया हुआ गार्लिक मेयोनिज
Prepared salad, तैयार किया हुआ सलाद
Cooked chicken (cut into thin strips), पका हुआ चिकन
1 tbsp Butter, मक्खन

For Assembling Bao
Cooked bao, पका हुआ बाओ
Prepared garlic mayonnaise,  तैयार किया हुआ गार्लिक मेयोनिज
Prepared salad, तैयार किया हुआ सलाद
Cooked chicken (cut into thin strips), पका हुआ चिकन

For Garnish
Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता
Chilli oil, चिल्ली ऑइल
Tomato ketchup, टमाटर केचप

Process 
For Dough
● In a bowl, add milk, yeast, water as required, sugar and give it a good mix until sugar gets dissolved.
● Add refined flour and make it a semisoft dough.
● Apply oil on dough, cover it with damp cloth and leave it aside for fermenting.
● Knock back the dough and knead it again for a minute.
● Divide the dough into medium lemon size balls and leave it aside for a while.
● Take dough balls and make a thin roti of it.
● Heat tawa, place prepared roti and cook it on both sides.
● Take another dough ball for bao, make it a thick roti like pizza base.
● Fold the roti from the middle and place parchment sheet pieces in between to prevent layers from sticking to each other.
● Transfer the prepared baos into a steamer and cook it for 10-12 minutes on medium flames or until cooked well.
● Transfer the cooked baos to a tray and keep it aside for further use.

For Cooking Chicken
● In a handi or kadai, add oil, once it's hot, add tomato puree, ghee, salt to taste and cook it for 2-3 minutes on high flames.
● Add green chillies, tender coriander stems, garlic and let it cook for a while until oil separates from the masala.
● Add chicken, salt to taste, degi red chili powder, coriander powder, curd and cook it for 7-8 minutes on medium flames.
● Finish it with oregano, chilli flakes and give it a good mix.
● Transfer the chicken to a tray and keep it aside for further use.

For Garlic Mayonnaise
● In a mixer grinder jar, add garlic, mayonnaise and grind it into a smooth paste.
● Keep it aside for further use.

For Salad
● In a bowl, add tomatoes, onions, green chillies, fresh coriander leaves, lemon juice, salt to taste and give it a good mix.
● Keep it aside for further use.

For Assembling Shawarama
● Take prepared roti, spread some prepared garlic mayonnaise, place prepared salad, add cooked chicken and roll it like a roll.
● In a pan, add butter, once it melts, place prepared shawarma roll and cook it on all sides.
● Transfer it to a serving platter and serve hot with prepared garlic mayonnaise.
● Serve hot.

For Assembling Bao
● Take cooked bao buns, spread some prepared garlic mayonnaise, place prepared salad and cooked chicken.
● Garnish it with coriander sprig, chilli oil and tomato ketchup.
● Transfer it to a serving platter and serve hot with prepared garlic mayonnaise.
● Serve hot.

title: Pahadi Dal | गढ़वाली काली दाल | Uttarakhand famous Chains| Dal Chawal | Chef Ranveer Brar
description:
𝗣𝗔𝗛𝗔𝗗𝗜 𝗖𝗛𝗔𝗨𝗡𝗦𝗔 𝗗𝗔𝗟 - (𝙎𝙚𝙚 𝙙𝙚𝙩𝙖𝙞𝙡𝙚𝙙 𝙩𝙚𝙭𝙩 𝙧𝙚𝙘𝙞𝙥𝙚 𝙗𝙚𝙡𝙤𝙬) Fresh air of the hills, simple food and peace of mind. Perfect combination isn't it? Just like the famous Uttarakhand/ Garhwali Black Urad Chaunsa or Chainsoo Dal with rice. After all, Dal-Chawal is the best combo, right?

***********************
𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡  𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣
🛒RB Store - https://www.amazon.in/shop/chefranveer
📟Kitchen Appliances - https://bit.ly/KitchenAppliancesIUse
🔪Knives I use - https://amzn.to/4kzSJVe

***********************
𝗥𝗘𝗖𝗜𝗣𝗘 𝗙𝗢𝗥 𝗣𝗔𝗛𝗔𝗗𝗜 𝗖𝗛𝗔𝗨𝗡𝗦𝗔 𝗗𝗔𝗟 
Preparation time 10 minutes
Cooking time 25-30 minutes
Serve 2-4 

Ingredients 
For Washing & Roasting Dal
500 gms Whole urad dal (washed), साबुत उड़द दाल
1 tbsp Ghee, घी

For Cooking Dal
2-3 ltr. Water, पानी
Roasted dal, powdered, भुनी हुई दाल

For Paste
1 ½ inch Ginger (peeled & sliced), अदरक
7-8 no. Garlic cloves, लहसुन
4-5 no. Green chillies (roughly chopped), हरी मिर्च
¾ cup fresh Coriander leaves (roughly torn), धनिया पत्ता

For Roasting Cumin & Sesame
1 heaped tbsp Cumin seeds, जीरा
2 heaped tbsp White sesame seeds, सफेद तिल
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार

For Chutney
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
Prepared paste, तैयार की हुई पेस्ट
1 medium Radish (peeled & chopped), मूली
Prepared paste, तैयार की हुई पेस्ट
Roasted cumin & sesame, powdered, भुना हुआ जीरा और तिल
1 tsp Lemon juice, नींबू का रस

For Chaunsa Dal
2-3 heaped tbsp Oil, तेल
1 tsp Cumin seeds (optional), जीरा 
7-8 no. Garlic cloves (chopped), लहसुन
8 no. dry Red chillies (roughly chopped), सूखी लाल मिर्च
½ inch Ginger (peeled & finely chopped), अदरक
1 tbsp Tender Coriander stems (inely chopped), धनिये के डंठल
A pinch of Asafoetida, हींग
Little water, पानी 
Cooked dal, पकी हुई दाल
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
1 heaped tbsp dry Mango powder, आमचूर पाउडर
1 tbsp Ghee, घी

For Garnish
Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता

Process 
For Washing & Roasting Dal
● In a bowl, add whole urad dal, water as required and rinse it thoroughly. 
● Transfer it to a kadai or handi and dry roast the dal for 15-20 minutes on low flames.
● Add ghee and roast it for another 4-5 minutes.
● Transfer the dal into a tray and leave it aside to cool down at room temperature.
● Add dal to a mixer grinder jar and grind it coarsely.
● Keep it aside for further use.

For Cooking Dal
● In a handi, add water, roasted dal, cover it with a lid and let it cook for 30-35 minutes until cooked well on medium flames.
● Keep it aside for further use.

For Paste
● In a bowl, add ginger, garlic cloves, green chillies and fresh coriander leaves.
● Transfer it to a mixer grinder jar and grind it into a smooth paste.
● Keep it aside for further use.

For Roasted Cumin & Sesame
● In a pan, add cumin seeds, white sesame seeds, salt to taste and dry roast them for a while until golden in colour.
● Transfer it to a mixer grinder jar and grind it into a fine powder.
● Keep it aside for further use.

For Chutney
● In a bowl, add salt to taste, prepared paste, radish, prepared paste, roasted cumin & sesame powder, lemon juice and give it a good mix.
● Keep it aside for further use.

For Chaunsa Dal
● In a handi, add oil, once it's hot, add cumin seeds, garlic, dry red chillies, ginger, tender coriander stems, a pinch of asafoetida and cook it for a minute.
● Add little water, cooked dal, salt to taste and simmer it for 10-12 minutes on low flames.
● Finish it with dry mango powder, ghee and give it a quick boil.
● Transfer the dal to a serving bowl and garnish it with coriander sprig.
● Serve hot with steam rice.

***********************

title: Thalapakatti Dindigul Chicken Biryani | डिंडीगुल चिकन बिरयानी | Famous Chicken Biryani |Chef Ranveer
description:
𝗗𝗜𝗡𝗗𝗜𝗚𝗨𝗟 𝗖𝗛𝗜𝗖𝗞𝗘𝗡 𝗕𝗜𝗥𝗬𝗔𝗡𝗜 - (𝙎𝙚𝙚 𝙙𝙚𝙩𝙖𝙞𝙡𝙚𝙙 𝙩𝙚𝙭𝙩 𝙧𝙚𝙘𝙞𝙥𝙚 𝙗𝙚𝙡𝙤𝙬) Finally, after your numerous requests, here's my recipe for the famous Thalapakatti Dindigul Chicken Biryani :) Yes, you can now make this popular Chicken Biryani at home like a pro!

***********************
𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡  𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣
🛒RB Store - https://www.amazon.in/shop/chefranveer
📟Kitchen Appliances - https://bit.ly/KitchenAppliancesIUse
🔪Knives I use - https://amzn.to/4kzSJVe

***********************
𝗥𝗘𝗖𝗜𝗣𝗘 𝗙𝗢𝗥 𝗗𝗜𝗡𝗗𝗜𝗚𝗨𝗟 𝗖𝗛𝗜𝗖𝗞𝗘𝗡 𝗕𝗜𝗥𝗬𝗔𝗡𝗜
Preparation time 10 minutes
Cooking time 25-30 minutes
Serve 2-4 

Ingredients
For Paste
10-12 no. Garlic cloves, लहसुन
2 inch Ginger (peeled & sliced), अदरक
4-5 no. Green chillies (less spicy & roughly chopped), हरी मिर्च
15-20 Shallots (peeled), सांबर प्याज
⅓ cup fresh Coriander leaves (finely chopped), धनिया पत्ता

For Masala
2 heaped tbsp Coriander seeds, धनिया के बीज
1 tsp Fennel seeds, सौंफ
1 tbsp Cumin seeds, जीरा
1 heaped tbsp Black peppercorns, काली मिर्च के दाने
1 no. Star anise, चकरीफुल
5-6 no. Green cardamom, हरी इलायची
Few Black cardamom seeds, बड़ी इलायची के दाने
4-5 no. Cloves, लौंग
2 no. Mace, जावित्री
2 inch Cinnamon stick, दालचीनी
10-12 no. Cashew Nuts, काजू
1 heaped tbsp Degi red chilli powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर
1 heaped tbsp Coriander powder, धनिया पाउडर

For Dindigul Biryani
2-3 heaped tbsp Oil, तेल
2 tbsp Ghee, घी
½ cup fresh Mint leaves, पुदीना पत्ता
1 large Onions (sliced), प्याज
Prepared paste, तैयार किया हुआ पेस्ट
1 kg Chicken leg (cut into half), चिकन 
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
⅓ cup Curd (beaten), दही
3 heaped tbsp Prepared masala, तैयार किया हुआ मसाला
1 tbsp Ghee, घी
Water as required, पानी
3 no. Green chillies (cut into diagonally), हरी मिर्च
2-3 tbsp fresh Coriander leaves (roughly chopped), धनिया पत्ता
Few mint leaves, पुदीना पत्ता
650 gms Ambemohar rice (soaked for 20 minutes), भीगे हुए अम्बेमोहर चावल
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
2 tbsp Ghee, घी

For Salad
1 medium Tomato (chopped), टमाटर
1 medium Onion (chopped), प्याज
2 no. Green chillies (less spicy & finely chopped), हरी मिर्च
2-3 tbsp fresh Coriander leaves (chopped), धनिया पत्ता
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
1 cup Curd (beaten), दही

For Garnish
Mint sprig, पुदीना पत्ता
Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता

Process
For Paste
● In a bowl, add garlic, ginger, green chillies, shallots and fresh coriander leaves.
● Transfer it to a mixer grinder jar and grind it into a smooth paste.
● Keep it aside for further use.

For Masala
● In a tray, add coriander seeds, fennel seeds, cumin seeds, black peppercorns, star anise, green cardamom, black cardamom seeds, cloves, mace, cinnamon stick, cashewnuts, degi red chilli powder, coriander powder and mix it well.
● Transfer it to a mixer grinder jar and grind it into a smooth powder.
● Keep it aside for further use.

For Dindigul Biryani
● In a handi, add oil, ghee, once it's hot, add fresh mint leaves and saute it for a minute.
● Add onions and saute it until  translucent.
● Add prepared paste and cook it for a while until oil is separated.
● Add chicken, salt to taste, curd and allow it to cook for 4-5 minutes on medium flames.
● Add prepared masala, ghee and cook it for a minute.
● Add water as required, green chillies, fresh coriander leaves, few mint leaves and give it a quick boil.
● Add soaked ambemohar rice, salt to taste, ghee and give it a good mix.
● Cover it with a lid and cook it on low flames for 15-20 minutes.
● Transfer it to a serving dish, garnish it with mint sprig and coriander sprig.
● Serve hot with prepared salad.

For Salad
● In a bowl, add tomato, onion, green chillies, fresh coriander leaves, salt to taste, curd and give it a good mix.
● Keep it aside for further use.

***********************

title: Stuffed Gatte ki Sabji | नायाब गट्टे की सब्जी | No Onion/Garlic 'Laxmi' Gatte | Chef Ranveer Brar
description:
'𝗟𝗔𝗞𝗦𝗛𝗠𝗜' 𝗚𝗔𝗧𝗧𝗘 𝗞𝗜 𝗦𝗔𝗕𝗝𝗜 - (𝙎𝙚𝙚 𝙙𝙚𝙩𝙖𝙞𝙡𝙚𝙙 𝙩𝙚𝙭𝙩 𝙧𝙚𝙘𝙞𝙥𝙚 𝙗𝙚𝙡𝙤𝙬) Have you tried Gatte ki Sabji like this? Not your regular besan ke gatte, but these are stuffed with a rich filling fit for Goddess Lakshmi!

***********************
𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡  𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣
🛒RB Store - https://www.amazon.in/shop/chefranveer
📟Kitchen Appliances - https://bit.ly/KitchenAppliancesIUse
🔪Knives I use - https://amzn.to/4kzSJVe

***********************
𝗥𝗘𝗖𝗜𝗣𝗘 𝗙𝗢𝗥 '𝗟𝗔𝗞𝗦𝗛𝗠𝗜' 𝗚𝗔𝗧𝗧𝗘 𝗞𝗜 𝗦𝗔𝗕𝗝𝗜
Preparation time 10-15 minutes 
Cooking time 25-30 minutes 
Serve 2-4 

Ingredients 
For Dough
3 cups Gram flour, बेसन
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
⅓ cup Curd (beaten), दही
½ tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर
2 tbsp Oil, तेल
1 tsp Oil (for greasing), तेल

For Stuffing
1 tbsp Ghee, घी 
7-8 no. Cashewnuts (chopped), काजू
2 tbsp Sesame seeds (roasted), तिल
1 tsp Carom seeds, अजवाइन
¼ cup Peanuts (coarsely), मूंगफली 
1 tsp Degi red chilli powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर
¼ tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर
¼ tsp Asafoetida, हींग
½ tsp dry Mango powder, आमचूर पाउडर
1 tsp Coriander powder, धनिया पाउडर
½ cup Jaggery, गुड़
2 heaped tbsp Tamarind pulp, इमली का गूदा
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
½ tsp Black peppercorns (crushed), कुटी हुई काली मिर्च

For Laxmi Gatte
2-3 tbsp Oil, तेल
1 no. Bay leaf, तेज पत्ता
¼ tsp Fenugreek seeds, मेथी दाना
½ tsp Fennel seeds, सौंफ
½ tsp Cumin seeds, जीरा
¼ tsp small Mustard seeds, छोटी राई
A pinch of Asafoetida, हींग
2-3 no. dry Kashmiri red chillies (roughly chopped), सूखी कश्मीरी लाल मिर्च
1 inch Ginger (peeled & chopped), अदरक 
1 tbsp Tender coriander stems (finely chopped), धनिये के डंठल
Prepared curd mixture, तैयार किया हुआ दही का मिश्रण
½ cup Water, पानी
1 large Tomato (cut into diced), टमाटर
1 ½ cups Water, पानी
Fried gatte, तले हुए गट्टे
Remaining ghee & oil, बचा हुआ घी और तेल
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार

For Curd Mixture
1 cup Curd, beaten, दही
2 heaped tbsp Coriander powder, धनिया पाउडर
1 tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर
2 tbsp Degi red chilli powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर

For Frying Gatte
1 tbsp Ghee, घी
2 tbsp Oil, तेल
Prepared gatte, तैयार किए हुए गट्टे

Other Ingredients
Oil for greasing, तेल

For Garnish
Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता

Process
For Dough
● In a bowl, add gram flour, salt to taste, curd, turmeric powder, oil, mix well and knead it into semisoft dough.
● Apply oil on dough and leave it aside for a while.
● Divide the dough into medium lemon size balls and make a thin roti.
● Spread prepared stuffing evenly and roll it like swiss roll.
● Transfer the gatte into a greased plate and place it into a steamer.
● Cook it for 10-12 minutes on medium flames until cooked well.
● Cut it into any desired shape and keep it aside for further use.

For Stuffing
● In a pan, add ghee, once it's hot, cashew nuts, sesame seeds, carom seeds, peanuts and roast them for a while.
● Add degi red chili powder, turmeric powder, asafoetida, dry mango powder, coriander powder and cook it for 2-3 minutes on low flames.
● Add jaggery, tamarind pulp and cook it well for 4-5 minutes.
● Add salt to taste, crushed black peppercorns and give it a good mix.
● Transfer it to a bowl and keep it aside for further use.

For Laxmi Gatte
● In a kadai or handi, add oil, once it's hot, add bay leaf, fenugreek seeds, fennel seeds, cumin seeds, small mustard seeds, a pinch of asafoetida, dry kashmiri red chillies and let it splutter well..
● Add ginger, tender coriander stems and saute it for a minute.
● Add prepared curd mixture and cook it for 4-5 minutes on medium flames until cooked well.
● Add water to adjust the consistency and give it a quick boil.
● Add tomato, water, fried gatte and let it simmer for a while.
● Finish it with remaining ghee, oil, salt to taste and give it a good mix.
● Transfer it to a serving dish and garnish it with coriander sprig.
● Serve hot with roti or rice.

For Curd Mixture
● In a bowl, add curd, coriander powder, turmeric powder, degi red chili powder and give it a good mix.
● Keep it aside for further use.

For Frying gatte
● In a pan, add ghee, oil, once it's hot, add prepared gatte, fry them until crispy and golden in colour.
● Transfer it to an absorbent sheet and keep it aside for further use.


***********************

description:

𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡  𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣
🛒RB Store - https://www.amazon.in/shop/chefranveer
📟Kitchen Appliances - https://bit.ly/KitchenAppliancesIUse
🔪Knives I use - https://amzn.to/4kzSJVe

***********************
𝗥𝗘𝗖𝗜𝗣𝗘 𝗙𝗢𝗥 𝟰 𝗧𝗬𝗣𝗘𝗦 𝗠𝗔𝗦𝗢𝗢𝗥 𝗗𝗔𝗟 𝗡𝗔𝗦𝗛𝗧𝗔
Preparation time 10-15 minutes 
Cooking time 20-25 minutes 
Serve 2-4 

Ingredients 
For Paste
3 cups Whole Masoor dal (washed & soaked overnight) भीगी हुई मसूर दाल
4-5 no. Garlic cloves, लहसुन
2-3 no. Green chillies (less spicy & broken into half) हरी मिर्च
½ inch Ginger (peeled & roughly chopped) अदरक
⅓ cup Semolina, सूजी
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
¼ cup Curd, beaten, दही
2-3 tbsp Water, पानी

For Masoor Dal Tikki 
4 medium Potato (boiled & diced) आलू
¼ cup Whole masoor dal (washed & soaked) भीगी हुई मसूर दाल
2 tbsp fresh Coriander leaves, chopped, धनिया पत्ता                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            
1 tsp Degi red chilli powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर
½ tsp Cumin powder, जीरा पाउडर
¼ tsp Coriander powder, धनिया पाउडर
2 sprig Curry leaves, chopped, कड़ी पत्ते
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
4 no. Green chillies (less spicy & chopped) हरी मिर्च
1 medium Onion, chopped, प्याज
1 tbsp Oil, तेल 

For Tadka 
1 ½ tbsp Oil, तेल 
½ tsp each small Mustard seeds & cumin seeds, छोटी राई और जीरा
2 sprig Curry leaves, कड़ी पत्ते
2-3 no. dry Red chillies, broken into half, सूखी लाल मिर्च

For Masoor Dal Dhokla 
Prepared Tadka, तैयार किया हुआ तड़का
Prepared Batter, तैयार किया हुआ बैटर
½ tsp Lemon juice, नींबू का रस
1 tsp Baking soda, बेकिंग सोडा
1 tsp Oil, तेल 
1 tbsp Butter, cubed, मक्खन

For Appe 
Prepared Batter, तैयार किया हुआ बैटर
½ tsp each Baking soda & oil, बेकिंग सोडा और तेल
1-2 tbsp Butter, cubed,  मक्खन

Other Ingredients 
½ tsp Oil for greasing, तेल 
1 tsp Coriander leaves, chopped, धनिया  पत्ता

For Garnish 
Lemon wedge, नींबू की फांक
Coriander sprig, धनिया  पत्ता

Process
For paste
● In a bowl, add soaked whole masoor dal, garlic, green chillies, ginger. Semolina, salt to taste, curd, water and mix it well.
● Transfer it to a mixer grinder jar and grind it into a smooth paste.
● Keep it aside for further use.

For Masoor Dal Tikki
● In a bowl, add boiled potatoes, soaked whole masoor dal, coriander leaves, degi red chili powder, cumin powder, coriander powder, curry leaves, salt to taste, green chillies, onion, oil and give it a good mix.
● Divide the mixture into small lemon size balls and them a tikki shape or ant desired shapes.
● Heat oil in a pan, place prepared tikkis and shallow fry them until golden in colour.
● Transfer it to a serving dish, garnish it with coriander sprig and lemon wedge.
● Serve hot with green chutney and tomato ketchup.

For Tadka
● In a pan, add oil, once it's hot, add small mustard seed, cumin seeds and let it splutter.
● Add curry leaves, dry red chillies and gently toss it for a minute.
● Keep it aside for further use.

For Masoor Dal Dhokla
● In a bowl, add prepared tadka, prepared batter, lemon juice, baking soda, oil and give it a good mix.
● Pour the batter into a greased plate or tray and top it up with fresh coriander leaves.
● Place the plate in a steamer and cook it for 15-20 minutes on medium flames.
● Once the dhokla is cooked, transfer it to a plate and leave it aside for a while.
● Demold the dhokla and cut into desired shape.
● Transfer it to a serving dish, garnish it with coriander sprig and lemon wedge.
● Serve hot with green chutney.

For Dosa 
● Heat a nonstick tawa or pan and season it with oil.
● Pour a ladleful of prepared batter into a nonstick pan and spread it evenly.
● Apply butter and cook it for 3-4 minutes on medium flames until it's cooked.
● Transfer it into a serving dish and serve hot with green chutney.

For Appe
● In a bowl, add prepared batter, baking soda, oil and give it a good mix. 
● Take appe chetti, add butter, once it melts, add a spoonful of batter in the cavity and cook it for a while.
● Transfer the appe into the serving dish and serve hot with green chutney.

title: फिश कटलेट | Perfect Fish Cutlet | easy kolkata style Fish snack | Chef Ranveer Brar
description:
𝗙𝗜𝗦𝗛 𝗖𝗨𝗧𝗟𝗘𝗧 - (𝙎𝙚𝙚 𝙙𝙚𝙩𝙖𝙞𝙡𝙚𝙙 𝙩𝙚𝙭𝙩 𝙧𝙚𝙘𝙞𝙥𝙚 𝙗𝙚𝙡𝙤𝙬) Straight from my Kolkata street food memories..here's my favourite Fish Cutlet recipe. Kripsy on the outside and juicy from inside.

***********************
𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡  𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣
🛒RB Store - https://www.amazon.in/shop/chefranveer
📟Kitchen Appliances - https://bit.ly/KitchenAppliancesIUse
🔪Knives I use - https://amzn.to/4kzSJVe

***********************
𝗥𝗘𝗖𝗜𝗣𝗘 𝗙𝗢𝗥 𝗙𝗜𝗦𝗛 𝗖𝗨𝗧𝗟𝗘𝗧
Preparation time 10 minutes 
Cooking time 20-25 minutes 
Serve 2-4

Ingredients 
For Fish Marination
400 gms Indian salmon, with skin, रावस
1-2 tsp Lemon juice, नींबू का रस
1 tbsp Ginger Garlic paste, अदरक लहसुन का पेस्ट  
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
2 tsp Degi red chilli powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर
1 tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर

For Frying
2 tbsp Oil, तेल
Marinated fish, मैरीनेट की हुई मछली

For Cutlet Mixture
Remaining fried oil, बचा हुआ तेल
1 tsp Ghee, घी
3 no. Green chillies (less spicy & finely chopped) हरी मिर्च
1 inch Ginger (peeled & finely chopped) अदरक
3 medium Boiled potatoes (peeled & mashed) उबले हुए आलू
2-3 tbsp fresh Coriander leaves, finely chopped, धनिया पत्ता
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
Fried fish (debone, deskin & shredded) तली हुई मछली
1 no. Egg yolk, अंडे की जर्दी
1 tsp Black pepper powder, काली मिर्च का पाउडर
¼ tsp Garam masala, गरम मसाला

For Frying Cutlet
Remaining fried oil, बचा हुआ तेल
2 tbsp Oil, तेल
Prepared cutlets, तैयार किये हुए कटलेट

For Salad
½ large Onion, sliced, प्याज
1 medium Carrot, julienned, गाजर
1 medium Cucumber, sliced, खीरा
½ tsp Black pepper powder, काली मिर्च का पाउडर
1 tbsp Mango pickle, आम का अचार
2-3 tbsp fresh Coriander leaves, roughly chopped, धनिया पत्ता

Other Ingredients
1 cup Breadcrumbs, ब्रेडक्रम्ब्स

For Garnish
Fresh red chillies, sliced diagonally, लाल मिर्च
Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता

Process
For Fish Marination
● In a tray, add fish pieces, add lemon juice, ginger garlic paste, salt to taste, degi red chilli powder, turmeric powder and mix it well.
● Keep it aside to marinate for 4-5 minutes.

For Frying
● In a pan, add oil, once it's hot, add marinated fish and sear it for 7-8 minutes until cooked well.
● Transfer it to a tray and keep it aside for further use.

For Cutlet Mixture
● In a pan, add remaining fried oil, ghee, once it's hot, add green chillies, ginger and saute it for a minute.
● Add boiled potatoes, fresh coriander leaves, salt to taste and cook it for 2-3 minutes on medium flames.
● Transfer the mixture in a bowl, add shredded fish, egg yolk, black pepper powder, garam masala and give it a good mix.
● Divide the mixture into big lemon size balls and give it the desired shape.
● Coat with breadcrumbs and keep it aside for further use.

For Frying Cutlets
● In a pan, add remaining fried oil, oil, once it's hot, place prepared cutlets and fry them until golden in colour.
● Transfer it to a serving dish, garnish it with coriander sprig and fresh red chilli.
● Serve hot with prepared salad, kasundi and tomato ketchup.

For Salad
● In a bowl, add onion, carrot, cucumber, black pepper powder, mango pickle, fresh coriander leaves and mix it well.
● Keep it aside for further use.

***********************

title: Khasta Kachori Aloo Chaat | मज़ेदार कचौड़ी चाट ख़स्ता | unique Chaat | Chef Ranveer Brar
description:
𝗞𝗛𝗔𝗦𝗧𝗔 𝗞𝗔𝗖𝗛𝗢𝗥𝗜 𝗪𝗜𝗧𝗛 𝗔𝗟𝗢𝗢 𝗖𝗛𝗔𝗔𝗧 - (𝙎𝙚𝙚 𝙙𝙚𝙩𝙖𝙞𝙡𝙚𝙙 𝙩𝙚𝙭𝙩 𝙧𝙚𝙘𝙞𝙥𝙚 𝙗𝙚𝙡𝙤𝙬) Humaye Lucknow ki chaat bina Aloo ke incomplete hai :) Here's my all time favourite recipe for super Khasta (Flaky) Kachori with a mazedaar आलू चाट to compliment it.

***********************
𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡  𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣
🛒RB Store - https://www.amazon.in/shop/chefranveer
📟Kitchen Appliances - https://bit.ly/KitchenAppliancesIUse
🔪Knives I use - https://amzn.to/4kzSJVe

***********************
𝗥𝗘𝗖𝗜𝗣𝗘 𝗙𝗢𝗥 𝗞𝗛𝗔𝗦𝗧𝗔 𝗞𝗔𝗖𝗛𝗢𝗥𝗜 𝗪𝗜𝗧𝗛 𝗔𝗟𝗢𝗢 𝗖𝗛𝗔𝗔𝗧
Preparation time 10-15 minutes 
Cooking time 25-30 minutes 
Serve 2-4 

Ingredients
For Dough
½ kg Refined flour, मैदा
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
A pinch of carom seeds, अजवाइन
80 ml Oil, तेल
Water as required, पानी
½ tsp Oil (after kneading) तेल

For Aloo Chaat
2 tbsp Oil, तेल
½ tsp each Cumin seeds & Fennel seeds (जीरा, सौंफ़)
5 no. Boiled potatoes (peeled & roughly chopped) उबले हुए आलू
1 ½ tsp Coriander powder, धनिया पाउडर
½ tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर
½ tsp Degi red chilli powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर
½ tsp Black pepper powder, काली मिर्च पाउडर
A pinch of Asafoetida, हींग
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
A pinch of sugar, चीनी
A pinch of dry mango powder, आमचूर पाउडर

For Dal Stuffing
2 heaped tbsp Oil, तेल
½ tsp Cumin seeds,  जीरा
2 cups Urad dal paste, उड़द दाल का पेस्ट
¼ tsp Asafoetida, हींग
½ tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर
1 heaped tsp Degi red chilli powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर
1 tbsp dry Fenugreek leaves, कसूरी मेथी
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
½ tsp dry Mango powder, आमचूर पाउडर
Prepared dal stuffing, तैयार की हुई दाल की स्टफिंग

Other Ingredients
Oil for frying, तलने के लिए तेल

For Kachori Chaat
Prepared dough, तैयार किया हुआ आटा
Water, पानी 
Prepared dal stuffing, तैयार की हुई दाल की स्टफिंग

For Assembling 
Sweetened curd, मीठा दही
Prepared Aloo Chaat, तैयार किया हुआ आलू चाट
Green chutney, हरी चटनी
Tamarind chutney, इमली की चटनी
Fried kachori, तली हुई कचौरी

For Garnish 
Pomegranate pearls, अनार के दाने
A pinch of degi red chilli powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर
Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता

Process
For Dough
● In a bowl, add refined flour, salt to taste, a pinch of carom seeds, oil and mix it well.
● Add water as required and knead it into a semisoft dough.
● Apply oil on dough and leave it aside for a while.
● Divide the dough into medium lemon size balls and make a thin roti.
● Spread prepared dal stuffing evenly and cover it with another layer of roti.
● Cut with a knife and give it a desired shape.
● Heat oil in a kadhai, once it's moderately hot, add kachoris, fry them until crispy and golden in colour.
● Transfer it to an absorbent sheet and keep it aside for further use.

For Aloo Chaat
● In a kadhai, add oil, once it's hot, add cumin seeds, fennel seeds and let it splutter well.
● Add boiled potatoes, coriander powder, turmeric powder, degi red chili powder, black pepper powder, a pinch of asafoetida and cook it for 2-3 minutes.
● Add salt to taste, a pinch of sugar, dry mango powder and give it a good mix.
● Transfer the aloo chaat mixture in a tray and keep it aside for further use.

For Dal Stuffing
● In a handi, add oil, once it's hot, add cumin seeds, urad dal paste and cook it for 10-12 minutes on medium flames.
● Add a pinch of asafoetida, turmeric powder, degi red chilli powder, dry fenugreek leaves and cook it for a while.
● Add dry mango powder and give it a good mix.
● Transfer the stuffing to a tray and keep it aside for further use.

For Assembling 
● In a serving dish, add sweetened curd, prepared aloo chaat, green chutney, tamarind chutney, and place fried kachori.
● Garnish it with pomegranate pearls, sprinkle a pinch of degi red chili powder and coriander sprig.
● Serve hot.

title: Famous Mughlai Chicken | पुरानी दिल्ली की मशहूर चिकन मुग़लई | Mughlai Chicken Curry | Chef Ranveer
description:
𝗣𝗨𝗥𝗔𝗡𝗜 𝗗𝗜𝗟𝗟𝗜 𝗠𝗨𝗚𝗛𝗟𝗔𝗜 𝗖𝗛𝗜𝗖𝗞𝗘𝗡 - (𝙎𝙚𝙚 𝙙𝙚𝙩𝙖𝙞𝙡𝙚𝙙 𝙩𝙚𝙭𝙩 𝙧𝙚𝙘𝙞𝙥𝙚 𝙗𝙚𝙡𝙤𝙬) This one's straight from my heart and from the lanes of Old Delhi! Mughlai chicken from my Dilli memories.

***********************
𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡  𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣
🛒RB Store - https://www.amazon.in/shop/chefranveer
📟Kitchen Appliances - https://bit.ly/KitchenAppliancesIUse
🔪Knives I use - https://amzn.to/4kzSJVe

***********************
𝗥𝗘𝗖𝗜𝗣𝗘 𝗙𝗢𝗥 𝗣𝗨𝗥𝗔𝗡𝗜 𝗗𝗜𝗟𝗟𝗜 𝗠𝗨𝗚𝗛𝗟𝗔𝗜 𝗖𝗛𝗜𝗖𝗞𝗘𝗡 
Preparation time 10 minutes
Cooking time 30 minutes
Serve 2-4

Ingredients
For Gravy
3 tbsp Oil, तेल
2 tbsp Ghee, घी
3 no. Green cardamom, हरी इलायची
2 no. Bay leaf, तेज पत्ता
2-4 no. Cloves, लौंग
1 tsp Cumin seeds, जीरा
1 ½ inch Ginger (peeled & roughly chopped) अदरक
5-6 no. Garlic cloves, roughly chopped, लहसुन
2 no. Green chillies (less spicy & roughly torn) हरी मिर्च
3 medium Onions, roughly diced, प्याज
1 large Tomato, roughly diced, टमाटर
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
10-12 no. soaked Cashew Nuts, भीगे हुए काजू
Prepared curd mixture, तैयार किया हुआ दही का मिश्रण
Water as required, पानी
Remaining butter, बचा हुआ मक्खन

For Chicken Marination
1 kg Chicken leg, cut into half, चिकन
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
1 tbsp dry Fenugreek leaves, कसूरी मेथी
1 tbsp Degi red chili powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर
1 tsp Ginger Garlic paste, अदरक लहसुन का पेस्ट
1 tbsp Oil, तेल

For Curd Mixture
2 cups Curd, beaten, दही
1 tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर
1 heaped tbsp Degi red chili powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर
½ tsp Cumin powder, जीरा पाउडर
2 heaped tbsp Coriander powder, धनिया पाउडर

For Searing Chicken
2-3 heaped tbsp Butter, cubed, मक्खन
Marinated chicken, मैरीनेट किया हुआ चिकन

For Finishing Gravy
Seared chicken, भुना हुआ चिकन
Prepared gravy, तैयार की हुई ग्रेवी
1 cup Water, पानी
Prepared Tadka, तैयार किया हुआ तड़का
1 heaped tbsp Kewra water, केवड़ा जल
1 heaped tbsp Rose water, गुलाब जल
2 tbsp Coriander leaves, roughly chopped, धनिया पत्ता

For Tadka
1 tbsp Ghee, घी
1 large Onion, roughly diced, प्याज
4 no. Green chillies (less spicy & roughly chopped) हरी मिर्च
1 tbsp Tender Coriander stems, finely chopped, धनिये के डंठल
1 tbsp dry Fenugreek leaves, कसूरी मेथी
½ cup Water, पानी
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार

For Garnish
Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता
Chilli oil, चिल्ली ऑइल

Process 
For Gravy
● In a handi, add oil, ghee, once it's hot, add green cardamom, bay leaf, cloves, cumin seeds, ginger, garlic, green chillies and saute it for a minute.
● Add onions and saute it for 4-5 minutes until onion is golden in colour.
● Add tomato, salt to taste, soaked cashewnuts, prepared curd mixture and cook the masala for another 7-8 minutes until it's cooked well.
● Add water as required, remaining butter and let it simmer for a while.
● Transfer the mixture in a mixer grinder jar and grind it into a smooth paste.
● Keep it aside for further use.

For Chicken Marination
● In a bowl, add chicken, salt to taste, dry fenugreek leaves, degi red chili powder, ginger garlic paste, oil and give a good mix.
● Keep it aside to marinate it for a while. 

For Curd Mixture
● In a bowl, add curd, turmeric powder, degi red chili powder, cumin powder, coriander powder and give it a good mix.
● Keep it aside for further use.

For Searing Chicken
● In a pan, add butter, once it melts, add marinated chicken and sear it on both sides for 4-5 minutes until half cooked.
● Transfer it to a bowl or tray and keep it aside for further use.

For Finishing Gravy
● In a handi, add seared chicken, prepared gravy, water and let it cook it for a while until it's cooked well.
● Finish it with prepared tadka, kewra water, rose water, fresh coriander leaves and give it a good mix.
● Transfer it to a serving dish, garnish it with coriander sprig and chilli oil.
● Serve hot with roti or naan.

For Tadka
● In a pan, add ghee, once it's hot, add onion, green chillies, tender coriander stems and saute it on high flames for a minute.
● Add dry fenugreek leaves, water, salt to taste and give it a quick boil.
● Keep it aside for further use.

title: Walnut & Dates Halwa | सिर्फ 3 चीजों से अखरोट & खजूर का हलवा | Dry Fruits Halwa | Chef Ranveer Brar
description:
𝗪𝗔𝗟𝗡𝗨𝗧𝗦 & 𝗗𝗔𝗧𝗘𝗦 𝗛𝗔𝗟𝗪𝗔 - (𝙎𝙚𝙚 𝙙𝙚𝙩𝙖𝙞𝙡𝙚𝙙 𝙩𝙚𝙭𝙩 𝙧𝙚𝙘𝙞𝙥𝙚 𝙗𝙚𝙡𝙤𝙬) Kuch healthy..and tasty bhi :) I've received a lot of requests for a healthy and easy Dry Fruits halwa. So what better than a Walnuts and Dates (अखरोट & खजूर) Halwa for you all :)

***********************
𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡  𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣
🛒RB Store - https://www.amazon.in/shop/chefranveer
📟Kitchen Appliances - https://bit.ly/KitchenAppliancesIUse
🔪Knives I use - https://amzn.to/4kzSJVe

***********************
𝗥𝗘𝗖𝗜𝗣𝗘 𝗙𝗢𝗥 𝗪𝗔𝗟𝗡𝗨𝗧𝗦 & 𝗗𝗔𝗧𝗘𝗦 𝗛𝗔𝗟𝗪𝗔
Walnut & Dates Halwa 
Preparation time 10-15 minutes 
Cooking time 25-30 minutes 
Serve 2-4 

Ingredients 
For Boiling Walnut 
Water as required, पानी
250 gms Walnuts, अखरोट

For Walnut & Dates Halwa 
1 cup Ghee, घी
500 gms Dates, soaked, खजूर
Boiled walnut, अखरोट
¼ cup Ghee, घी
½ cup Orange juice, संतरे का रस
A pinch of salt, नमक स्वादअनुसार

For Garnish 
2 no. Dates, sliced, खजूर
4-5 no. Pistachious (blanched & slivers) पिसता
A pinch of cardamom powder, इलायची पाउडर
Walnut, अखरोट
Silver vark, चांदी का वर्ख

Process 
For Boiling Walnut
● In a pan, add water as required and boil it to a roaring boil.
● Add walnuts and cook them for 4-5 minutes until it's half cooked.
● Strain the walnuts and keep it aside for further use.

For Walnut & Dates Halwa
● In a lagan or non-stick kadai, add ghee, once it's hot, add dates and cook them for 10-12 minutes  until mushy.
● Add boiled walnut, ghee, orange juice, a pinch of salt and cook it for a while until ghee separates from the halwa.
● Transfer it to a serving bowl, garnish it with dates, pistachios, sprinkle some cardamom powder, walnut and silver vark.
● serve .

title: Parsi Chicken Curry | पारसी सल्ली मुर्ग़ | Jardaloo Salli Murghi | parsi Salli Chicken | Chef Ranveer
description:
𝗣𝗔𝗥𝗦𝗜 𝗦𝗔𝗟𝗟𝗜 𝗠𝗨𝗥𝗚𝗛/ 𝗝𝗔𝗥𝗗𝗔𝗟𝗢𝗢 𝗦𝗔𝗟𝗟𝗜 𝗠𝗨𝗥𝗚𝗛𝗜 - (𝙎𝙚𝙚 𝙙𝙚𝙩𝙖𝙞𝙡𝙚𝙙 𝙩𝙚𝙭𝙩 𝙧𝙚𝙘𝙞𝙥𝙚 𝙗𝙚𝙡𝙤𝙬) Chicken curry to बहुत khaayi होगी aapne, but I bet you wouldn't have tasted something like this. Parsi Salli Murgh is a unique dish that has spicy chicken curry served with crispy potato fingers!

***********************
𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡  𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣
🛒RB Store - https://www.amazon.in/shop/chefranveer
📟Kitchen Appliances - https://bit.ly/KitchenAppliancesIUse
🔪Knives I use - https://amzn.to/4kzSJVe

***********************
𝗥𝗘𝗖𝗜𝗣𝗘 𝗙𝗢𝗥 𝗣𝗔𝗥𝗦𝗜 𝗦𝗔𝗟𝗟𝗜 𝗠𝗨𝗥𝗚𝗛/ 𝗝𝗔𝗥𝗗𝗔𝗟𝗢𝗢 𝗦𝗔𝗟𝗟𝗜 𝗠𝗨𝗥𝗚𝗛𝗜
Preparation time 10 minutes 
Cooking time 25-30 minutes 
Serve 2-4 

Ingredients 
For Parsi Salli Murgh
2-3 heaped tbsp Oil, तेल
3 large Onions, finely chopped, प्याज
1 tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर
1 tbsp Degi red chili powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर
1 heaped tbsp Coriander powder, धनिया पाउडर
½ tsp Cumin powder, जीरा पाउडर
4 large Tomatoes, puree, टमाटर की प्यूरी
1 large Tomato, chopped, टमाटर 
1 tsp Tender Coriander stems, finely chopped, धनिया के डंठल 
1 kg Chicken (Drumstick & thigh with bones) चिकन
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
1 tbsp Ginger Garlic paste, अदरक लहसुन का पेस्ट
8-10 no. dried Apricots, सूखे जर्दालु
2-3 heaped tbsp Kolah vinegar, कोला सिरका
½ cup Water, पानी
2 tbsp Kolah vinegar, कोला सिरका

For Salli
1 large Frying potato (peeled, sliced & julienned) पहाड़ी आलू
Oil for frying, तलने के लिए तेल

For Garnish
Chilli oil, चिल्ली ऑइल
Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता

Process  
For Parsi Salli Murgh
● In a handi, add oil, once it's hot, add onions and saute it until golden in colour.
● Add turmeric powder, degi red chili powder, coriander powder, cumin powder and cook it for a minute.
● Add tomato puree, tomato and cook it for a while until cooked well. 
● Add tender coriander stems, chicken, salt to taste, ginger garlic paste and cook it for 10-12 minutes until chicken is half cooked.
● Finish it with dried apricots, kolah vinegar, water, cover it with a lid and allow it to further cook.
● Transfer it to a serving dish, garnish it with prepared salli, chilli oil and coriander sprig.
● Serve hot with roti.

For Salli
● Take a frying potato, cut it into thin slices with the help of a slicer.
● Take potato slices and cut it into thin juliennes and transfer it to a tray.
● Heat oil in kadai, once it's hot, add potato julienned, fry them until crispy and golden in colour.
● Transfer it to an absorbent sheet and keep it aside for further use.
