title: Famous Amritsari Nutri Kulcha | न्यूट्री कुलचा अमृतसरी अंदाज़ में | Soya Wadi Keema | Chef Ranveer
description:
𝗦𝗢𝗬𝗔 𝗪𝗔𝗗𝗜 𝗡𝗨𝗧𝗥𝗜 𝗞𝗨𝗟𝗖𝗛𝗔 - (𝙎𝙚𝙚 𝙙𝙚𝙩𝙖𝙞𝙡𝙚𝙙 𝙩𝙚𝙭𝙩 𝙧𝙚𝙘𝙞𝙥𝙚 𝙗𝙚𝙡𝙤𝙬) Ready for soem Soya Wadi magic? Soya chunks keema hai sabka favourite! आज बनाते हैं ek masaledaar Amrtisari style gravy and serve it with Kulcha. Hua na Nutri Kulcha?

***********************
𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡  𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣
🛒RB Store - https://www.amazon.in/shop/chefranveer
📟Kitchen Appliances - https://bit.ly/KitchenAppliancesIUse
🔪Knives I use - https://amzn.to/4kzSJVe

***********************
𝗥𝗘𝗖𝗜𝗣𝗘 𝗙𝗢𝗥 𝗦𝗢𝗬𝗔 𝗪𝗔𝗗𝗜 𝗡𝗨𝗧𝗥𝗜 𝗞𝗨𝗟𝗖𝗛𝗔
Preparation time 10 minutes 
Cooking time 25-30 minutes 
Serve 2-4 

Ingredients
For Cooking Soya
Water as required, पानी
130 gms Soya chunks, सोया चंक्स
150 gms Soya granules, सोया कीमा
1 tbsp Degi red chili powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर
1 tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
1 tbsp Oil, तेल

For Gravy 
¼ cup Oil, तेल
2-3 heaped tbsp Ghee, घी
1 tsp Cumin seeds, जीरा
3 medium Onion, finely chopped, प्याज
4-5 no. Green chillies (less spicy & chopped) हरी मिर्च
2 tbsp Ginger Garlic paste, अदरक लहसुन का पेस्ट
½ cup Tomato puree, टमाटर की प्यूरी
1 ¼ cup Curd, beaten, दही
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
2-3 tbsp Fried onion, तला हुआ प्याज
1 tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर
2 heaped tbsp Coriander powder, धनिया पाउडर 
½ tsp Cumin powder, जीरा पाउडर
2 heaped tbsp Degi red chilli powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर
1 cup Water, पानी
1 heaped tbsp Tender Coriander stem, finely chopped, धनिये के डंठल
Cooked Soya, पका हुआ सोया
3 no. Bhavnagri mirchi (seedless & roughly chopped) भावनगरी मिर्च
½ inch Ginger (peeled & julienned) अदरक
2 tsp Sugar, चीनी

For Double Tadka 
2 tbsp Ghee, घी
½ medium Onion, sliced, प्याज
¼ cup Raw mango (peeled & julienned) कच्चा आम
1 small Carrot (peeled & julienned) गाजर
1 no. Green chilli, diagonally sliced, हरी मिर्च
Prepared Soya Mixture, तैयार किया हुआ सोया का मिश्रण
¼ cup Water, पानी
½ tsp Garam masala (optional) गरम मसाला
½ tsp Black pepper powder, काली मिर्च का पाउडर
2 tsp Lemon juice, नींबू का रस

For Garnish 
½ medium Onion, sliced, प्याज
Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता

Process
For Cooking Soya
● In a pressure cooker, add water as required, soya chunks, soya granules, degi red chili powder, turmeric powder, salt to taste, oil and give it a good mix.
● Cover it with a lid and cook it for 2-3 whistles until cooked well.
● Strain the soya mixture and keep it aside for further use.

For Gravy
● In a handi, add oil, ghee, once it's hot, add onion, green chillies and saute it for 4-5 minutes until golden in colour.
● Add ginger garlic paste and cook it for a minute.
● Add fresh tomato puree, curd and cook it for a while until oil separates from the gravy.
● Add fried onions, turmeric powder, coriander powder, cumin powder, degi red chili powder and mix it well.
● Add water, tender coriander stems and give it a quick boil.
● Add cooked soya, bhavnagri mirchi, ginger, sugar and give it a good mix.
● Keep it aside for further use.

For Double Tadka
● In a shallow pan or tawa, add ghee, once it's hot, add onion, raw mango, carrots, green chilli and saute it on high flames for 2-3 minutes.
● Add cooked soya, water and cook it for another 4-5 minutes.
● Finish it with garam masala, black pepper powder, lemon juice and give it a good mix.
● Transfer it to a serving dish and garnish it with coriander sprig.
● Serve hot with kulcha, sliced onion and any pickle.

title: आसान काजू चिकन करी | easy Kaju Chicken recipe | Bohri style Chicken Curry | Chef Ranveer Brar
description:
𝗕𝗢𝗛𝗥𝗜 𝗖𝗛𝗜𝗖𝗞𝗘𝗡 𝗖𝗨𝗥𝗥𝗬 - (𝙎𝙚𝙚 𝙙𝙚𝙩𝙖𝙞𝙡𝙚𝙙 𝙩𝙚𝙭𝙩 𝙧𝙚𝙘𝙞𝙥𝙚 𝙗𝙚𝙡𝙤𝙬) For all of you waiting for an amazing Chicken curry after a long time, here's my favourite Kaju Chicken Curry or Bohri style Chicken Curry. Do try and let me know how you liked this chicken recipe :)

***********************
𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡  𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣
🛒RB Store - https://www.amazon.in/shop/chefranveer
📟Kitchen Appliances - https://bit.ly/KitchenAppliancesIUse
🔪Knives I use - https://amzn.to/4kzSJVe

***********************
𝗥𝗘𝗖𝗜𝗣𝗘 𝗙𝗢𝗥 𝗕𝗢𝗛𝗥𝗜 𝗖𝗛𝗜𝗖𝗞𝗘𝗡 𝗖𝗨𝗥𝗥𝗬
Preparation time 10 minutes 
Booking time 25-30 minutes 
Serve 2-4

Ingredients 
For Gravy
2-3 tbsp Ghee, घी
2 no. Bay leaf, तेज पत्ता
4-5 no. Green cardamom, हरी इलायची
3 medium size Onions, roughly sliced, प्याज
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
1 tbsp Ginger Garlic paste, अदरक लहसुन का पेस्ट
15-20 no. Cashew Nuts, काजू
2 cups Water, पानी
½ inch Cinnamon stick, दालचीनी
few Tender Coriander stems with roots, roughly chopped, धनिये के डंठल

For Chicken Marination
1 kg Chicken legs, चिकन
1 heaped tbsp Ginger Garlic paste, अदरक लहसुन का पेस्ट
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
2 tbsp Oil, तेल
1 no. Green chilli (less spicy & roughly torn) हरी मिर्च

For Cooking Chicken
½ tbsp Ghee, घी
Marinated chicken, मैरीनेट किया हुआ चिकन
½ cup Water, पानी

For Finishing Gravy
2 tbsp Ghee, घी
1 no. Green chilli, less spicy, हरी मिर्च
1 ½ cups Curd, beaten, दही
Prepared gravy, तैयार की हुई ग्रेवी
½ cup Water, पानी
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
1 no. Green chilli (less spicy & slit into middle) हरी मिर्च
Cooked chicken, पका हुआ चिकन
A pinch of Sugar, चीनी
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार

For Frying Nuts
1 tbsp Ghee, घी
10-12 no. Cashew nuts, cut into halves, काजू
½ tsp dry Fenugreek leaves, crushed, कसूरी मेथी
½ tsp Degi red chilli powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार

For Garnish
Black peppercorns, crushed, कुटी हुई काली मिर्च
Fried cashew nuts, तले हुए काजू
Fresh cream, ताज़ा मलाई
Chilli oil, मिर्च का तेल
Green chilli, slit into half, हरी मिर्च
Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता 

Process
For Cooking Gravy
● In a handi, add ghee, bay leaf, green cardamom, onions, salt to taste and saute it for 4-5 minutes.
● Add ginger garlic paste, cashew nuts and mix it well.
● Add water, cinnamon stick, tender coriander stems and cook it for a while.
● Transfer it to a mixer grinder jar and grind it into a smooth paste.
● Keep it aside for further use.

For Chicken Marination
● In a bowl, add chicken, ginger garlic paste, salt to taste, oil, green chilli and give it a good mix.
● Keep it aside to marinate for a while. 

For Cooking Chicken
● In a pan, add ghee, once it's hot, add marinated chicken and sear it for 4-5 minutes on each side.
● Add water and allow it to cook for a while.
● Transfer the chicken to a tray and keep it aside for further use.

For Finishing Gravy
● In a handi, add ghee, once it's hot, add green chilli, curd and let it cook for 5-6 minutes until curd is cooked well.
● Add prepared gravy and give it a quick boil.
● Add water, salt to taste, green chilli, seared chicken and cook it for a while until cooked well.
● Finish it with a pinch of sugar, salt to taste and mix it well.
● Transfer it to a serving dish, garnish it with black peppercorns crushed, fried cashew nuts, fresh cream, chilli oil, green chilli and coriander sprig.
● Serve hot with paratha or roti.
For Frying Nuts
● In a pan, add ghee, once it's hot, add cashew nuts and fry them until golden in colour.
● Add dry fenugreek leaves, degi red chili powder, salt to taste and toss it well.
● Keep it aside for further use.

title: Bharwaan Mirchi | बेसन से बनाएँ 3 बढ़िया Snacks | Bhakarwadi & Sev bonus | Chef Ranveer Brar
description:
𝟯 𝗧𝗬𝗣𝗘𝗦 𝗕𝗘𝗦𝗔𝗡 𝗦𝗡𝗔𝗖𝗞𝗦 (𝗗𝗜𝗪𝗔𝗟𝗜 𝗦𝗣𝗟) - (𝙎𝙚𝙚 𝙙𝙚𝙩𝙖𝙞𝙡𝙚𝙙 𝙩𝙚𝙭𝙩 𝙧𝙚𝙘𝙞𝙥𝙚 𝙗𝙚𝙡𝙤𝙬) Diwali party ho ya anytime snacking, Besan ke bina adhoora hai! Try these interesting recipes for Bharwaan / Stuffed Mirchi, Bhakarwadi and Sev.. Bilkul easy peasy :)

***********************
𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡  𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣
🛒RB Store - https://www.amazon.in/shop/chefranveer
📟Kitchen Appliances - https://bit.ly/KitchenAppliancesIUse
🔪Knives I use - https://amzn.to/4kzSJVe

***********************
𝗥𝗘𝗖𝗜𝗣𝗘 𝗙𝗢𝗥  𝟯 𝗧𝗬𝗣𝗘𝗦 𝗕𝗘𝗦𝗔𝗡 𝗦𝗡𝗔𝗖𝗞𝗦 (𝗗𝗜𝗪𝗔𝗟𝗜 𝗦𝗣𝗟)
Diwali Snacks 3 Types 
Preparation time 10-15 minutes
Cooking time 20-25 minutes 
Serve 2-4

Ingredients 
For Dough 
800 gms Gram Flour, बेसन
½ cup Rice flour, चावल का आटा
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
¼ tsp Asafoetida, हींग
1 tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर
1 tbsp Oil, तेल 
Water as required, पानी
1 tbsp Oil (after kneading) तेल

For Masala MIxture
1 cup Ghee, घी
200 gms Gram flour, बेसन
2 tbsp White sesame seeds, सफेद तिल
2 tbsp Carom seeds, अजवाइन
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
1 tbsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर
½ tsp Asafoetida, हींग
1 heaped tbsp Coriander powder, धनिया पाउडर
1 heaped tbsp Degi red chili powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
2 tbsp Fennel powder (optional) सौंफ पाउडर
2 tbsp Dry mango powder, आमचूर पाउडर
1 heaped tbsp Black pepper powder, काली मिर्च का पाउडर
1 cup Peanut powder (optional) मूंगफली का पाउडर

For Bhakarwadi
Prepared dough, तैयार किया हुआ आटा
Prepared Masala Mixture, तैयार किया हुआ मसालों का मिश्रण
2 tbsp Tamarind paste, इमली का पेस्ट   
A pinch of degi red chili powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर
A pinch of dry mango powder, आमचूर पाउडर
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार

For Sev
Prepared dough, तैयार किया हुआ आटा
½ tsp Degi red chili powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर
½ tsp Dry mango powder, आमचूर पाउडर
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार

For Bharwa Mirchi
12-15 no. Bhavnagri chillies, slit into middle, भावनगरी मिर्च
Prepared Masala Mixture, तैयार किया हुआ मसालों का मिश्रण
2 tbsp Oil (for shallow frying) तेल

Other Ingredients 
Oil for greasing, तेल 
Oil for frying, तलने के लिए तेल

For Garnish
Coriander sprig, धनिया  पत्ता

Process
For Dough
● In a bowl, add gram flour, rice flour, salt to taste, a pinch of asafoetida, turmeric powder, oil, water as required and knead it into a semisoft dough.
● Add oil, knead it well and keep it aside for further use.

For Masala Mixture
● In a pan, add ghee, once it's hot, add gram flour and roast it for 5-6 minutes on low flames.
● Add white sesame seeds, carom seeds, salt to taste and cook it for a minute.
● Add turmeric powder, asafoetida, coriander powder, degi red chili powder, salt to taste and mix it well.
● Add fennel powder, dry mango powder, black pepper powder, peanut powder and cook it on medium flames for 3-4 minutes.
● Transfer the mixture to a tray or bowl and keep it aside for further use.

For Bhakarwadi
● In a bowl, add prepared masala mixture, tamarind paste and give it a good mix.
● Take prepared dough, flatten it with a rolling pin and spread prepared masala mixture evenly.
● Carefully roll it like a swiss roll, apply water and seal the edge properly.
● Cut the roll into small slices and keep it aside for a while.
● Heat oil in a kadai, once it's hot, add prepared bhakarwadi and fry them until golden in colour.
● Transfer it to a tray, sprinkle a pinch of degi red chili powder, a pinch of dry mango powder, salt to taste and toss it gently.   
● Transfer it to a serving bowl and serve hot.

For Sev
● Apply oil in the chakli/sev mould, add prepared dough and seal the mould with the lid, gently drop the sev in the hot oil and fry it until golden in colour on medium flames..
● Transfer it to a tray, sprinkle a pinch of degi red chili powder, dry mango powder, salt to taste and toss it well. 
● Transfer it to a serving bowl and serve hot.

For Bharwa Mirchi
● Take bhavnagri chillies, slit the chillies from the middle and make a cavity.
● Add a spoonful of prepared masala mixture and stuff the chillies well.
● In a pan, add oil, once it's hot, add stuffed chillies and cook it for 7-8 minutes until it's cooked.
● Transfer it to a serving dish and garnish it with coriander sprig.
● Serve hot with steam rice, dal tadka.






***********************

title: Diwali spl Malai Sandwich | Bazaar जैसे चम चम बनाएँ घर पर | Cham Cham recipe | Chef Ranveer Brar
description:
𝗖𝗛𝗔𝗠 𝗖𝗛𝗔𝗠 (𝗠𝗔𝗟𝗔𝗜 𝗦𝗔𝗡𝗗𝗪𝗜𝗖𝗛) - (𝙎𝙚𝙚 𝙙𝙚𝙩𝙖𝙞𝙡𝙚𝙙 𝙩𝙚𝙭𝙩 𝙧𝙚𝙘𝙞𝙥𝙚 𝙗𝙚𝙡𝙤𝙬) That one mithai that always catches our eyes in any sweet shop - Cham Cham / Malai Sandwich, right? 😋 Now you can make this special मिठाई at home this Diwali 😎

***********************
𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡  𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣
🛒RB Store - https://www.amazon.in/shop/chefranveer
📟Kitchen Appliances - https://bit.ly/KitchenAppliancesIUse
🔪Knives I use - https://amzn.to/4kzSJVe

***********************
𝗥𝗘𝗖𝗜𝗣𝗘 𝗙𝗢𝗥 𝗖𝗛𝗔𝗠 𝗖𝗛𝗔𝗠 (𝗠𝗔𝗟𝗔𝗜 𝗦𝗔𝗡𝗗𝗪𝗜𝗖𝗛)
Preparation time 10 minutes
Cooking time 20-25 minutes
Serve 2-4 

Ingredients 
For Sugar Syrup
1 ltr Water, पानी
500 gms Sugar, चीनी
2 no. Green cardamom, हरी इलायची

For Rasmalai Mixture
700 ml Milk, दूध 
A pinch of cardamom powder, इलायची पाउडर
110 gms Powdered sugar, पिसी हुई चीनी
2-3 tbsp Saffron water, केसर का पानी
4 no. Bread slices (trim edges & cut into diced) ब्रेड स्लाइस
450 gms Milk powder, मिल्क पाउडर   
4 no. Bread slices (trim edges & cut into diced) ब्रेड स्लाइस

For Cham Cham Mixture
600 gms Paneer, crumble, पनीर
¼ cup Refined flour, मैदा
¼ tsp Baking soda, बेकिंग सोडा
2-3 tbsp Refined flour, मैदा
2 tbsp Semolina powder, सूजी का पाउडर

For Assembling
Prepared cham cham, तैयार किया हुआ चम चम
Prepared rasmalai mixture, तैयार किया हुआ रसमलाई का मिश्रण
Soaked rasmalai bread, भीगी हुई रसमलाई वाली ब्रेड
Tutti frutti, टूटी फ्रूटी
Almonds, sliver, बादाम
Silver vark, चाँदी का वर्क
Pistachios, sliced, पिस्ता
Candied cherries, cut into half, कैंडिड चेरी
Fresh rose petals, ताजे गुलाब की पंखुड़ियाँ

Process 
For Sugar Syrup
● In a saucepot, add water, sugar, green cardamom and give it a good mix.
● Let it simmer for 10-12 minutes on medium flames.
● Keep it aside for further use.

For Rasmalai Mixture
● In a saucepot or kadai, add milk, a pinch of cardamom powder and give it a quick boil.
● Add powdered sugar, saffron water and give it a good mix.
● Add bread slices and cook it for 2-3 minutes until bread absorbs the milk.
● Transfer the bread to a tray and keep it aside for further use.
● Add milk powder in the milk and mix it well. 
● Again Add bread slices and mix it well.
● Transfer the mixture to a bowl and grind it into a smooth paste with the help of a hand blender.
● Keep it aside for further use.

For Cham Cham Mixture
● In a parat or bowl, add paneer and mash it well until it's smooth in texture.
● Add refined flour, baking soda and give it a good mix.
● Add refined flour, semolina powder and knead it into a smooth dough.
● Divide the mixture in small lemon size balls and give it a desired shape.
● Transfer the cham cham balls in sugar syrup and cook it for 10-12 minutes until it's cooked well.
● Transfer it to a tray, pour prepared sugar syrup on the cham cham and keep it in a fridge to chill for a while.

For Assembling
● Take cham cham, layered it with prepared rasmalai mixture and place soaked rasmalai bread.
● Garnish it with tutti frutti, almond sliver, silver vark, sliced pistachios, candied cherries and fresh rose petals.
● Serve.

title: Spicy Veg Thukpa with Tibetan Laphing | वेज थुक्पा सूप | Tibetan Noodle Soup | Chef Ranveer Brar
description:
Veg Thukpa Soup with Laphing (𝙎𝙚𝙚 𝙙𝙚𝙩𝙖𝙞𝙡𝙚𝙙 𝙩𝙚𝙭𝙩 𝙧𝙚𝙘𝙞𝙥𝙚 𝙗𝙚𝙡𝙤𝙬) A warm, hearty noodle soup paired with cool, spicy Laphing,  the perfect yin & yang of flavours and textures :)

***********************
𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡  𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣
🛒RB Store - https://www.amazon.in/shop/chefranveer
📟Kitchen Appliances - https://bit.ly/KitchenAppliancesIUse
🔪Knives I use - https://amzn.to/4kzSJVe

***********************
𝗥𝗘𝗖𝗜𝗣𝗘 𝗙𝗢𝗥  Thukpa with Laphing 
Preparation time 10 minutes
Cooking time 20 minutes 
Serve 2-4

Ingredients 
For Gluten & Starch Batter 
4 cups Refined flour, मैदा
Water as required, पानी
1 tsp Yeast, खमीर
Water as required, पानी

For Chilli Oil 
2 cups Oil, तेल 
3 no. Bay leaf, तेज पत्ता
2 inch Cinnamon Stick, दालचीनी
2-3 no. Star anise, चक्र फूल 
¼ cup Chilli flakes, कुटी हुई लाल मिर्च
1 tsp Vinegar, सिरका
1 tsp Light Soy sauce, सोया सॉस 
¼ cup Toasted white sesame seeds, सफेद तिल
¼ cup Spring onion, chopped, प्याज़ पत्ता 

For Thukpa
1 tbsp Oil, तेल
2-3 no. Garlic cloves, crushed, लहसुन
6-7 no. Mushroom, roughly chopped, मशरूम 
2 large Carrots (peeled & chopped) गाजर
½ small Cabbage, chopped, पत्ता गोभी
Water as required, पानी
Spring onion, chopped, प्याज़ पत्ता 
½ inch Ginger (peeled & chopped) अदरक
1 no. Green chilli, finely chopped, हरी मिर्च
1 tbsp Tender coriander stems, finely chopped, धनिया के डंठल 

Other Ingredients 
Oil for greasing, तेल
Starch Batter, स्टार्च बैटर

For Assembling 
Prepared Laphing, cut into strips, तैयार किया हुआ लाफिंग
Seitan, roughly chopped, सेइटन
Chilli oil, तैयार किया हुआ चिल्ली ऑइल
Prepared Thukpa, तैयार किया हुआ थुकपा

For Laphing Roll
Prepared laphing, तैयार किया हुआ लाफिंग  
Seitan, roughly chopped, सेइटन
Spring onion, chopped, प्याज़ पत्ता 
Chilli oil, तैयार किया हुआ चिल्ली ऑइल

For Garnish 
Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता
Spring onion, chopped, प्याज़ पत्ता 

Process 
For Gluten & Starch Batter
● In a bowl, add refined flour, water as required, yeast and knead it into smooth dough.
● Leave it aside for 15-20 minutes for resting.
● Add water as required and wash the dough until the dough loses all its starch.
● Transfer the starch batter into the greased tray or plate and the remaining gluten transfer it into the plate.
● Now, place the plate into the steamer and cook for 10-12 minutes or until it's cooked.

For Chilli Oil
● In a saucepan, add oil, once it's slightly hot, add bay leaf, cinnamon stick, star anise, chilli flakes and cook for 2-3 minutes on low flames.
● Add vinegar, light soy sauce and cook for another 2-3 minutes.
● Now, add white sesame seeds, spring onion and give it a good mix.
● Transfer it into the bowl and keep it aside for further use.

For Thukpa
● In a saucepot, add oil, once it's hot, add garlic, mushrooms, carrot, cabbage and cook for 2-3 minutes on high flames.
● Add water as required and let it simmer for a while.
● Add spring onion, ginger, green chilli, tender coriander stems and give it a quick boil.
● Keep it aside for further use.

For Assembling
● In a serving bowl, add prepared laphing, seitan, drizzle some prepared chilli oil, pour prepared thukpa and garnish it with coriander sprig and spring onion.
● Serve hot.

For Laphing Roll
● Take a prepared laphing sheet, stuff it with prepared seitan, spring onion and drizzle some chilli oil and roll it tightly.
● Cut into desired shape and transfer it into the serving platter and garnish it with coriander sprig and spring onion.
● Serve hot with prepared thukpa.


***********************

title: Veg Manchow Soup | होटल जैसा वेज मानचाओ सूप बनाएं घर पर | spicy Soup recipe | Chef Ranveer Brar
description:
𝗩𝗘𝗚 𝗠𝗔𝗡𝗖𝗛𝗢𝗪 𝗦𝗢𝗨𝗣 - (𝙎𝙚𝙚 𝙙𝙚𝙩𝙖𝙞𝙡𝙚𝙙 𝙩𝙚𝙭𝙩 𝙧𝙚𝙘𝙞𝙥𝙚 𝙗𝙚𝙡𝙤𝙬) It's the change of seasons and the best time for soup! What better than a spicy Manchow Soup, just like you had at restaurants :)

***********************
𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡  𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣
🛒RB Store - https://www.amazon.in/shop/chefranveer
📟Kitchen Appliances - https://bit.ly/KitchenAppliancesIUse
🔪Knives I use - https://amzn.to/4kzSJVe

***********************
𝗥𝗘𝗖𝗜𝗣𝗘 𝗙𝗢𝗥 𝗩𝗘𝗚 𝗠𝗔𝗡𝗖𝗛𝗢𝗪 𝗦𝗢𝗨𝗣
Preparation time 10-15 minutes 
Cooking time 25-30 minutes 
Serve 2-4 

Ingredients
For Vegetable Stock
3-4 no. Mushroom, cut into half, मशरूम
2-3 no. Baby corn, roughly sliced, बेबी कॉर्न
1 large Carrot, roughly sliced, गाजर
1-2 tbsp Oil, तेल 
1 tbsp Tender Coriander stems, roughly chopped, धनिये के डंठल
1 heaped tbsp Black peppercorns, काली मिर्च के दाने
3 no. Bay leaf, तेज पत्ता
4-5 cups Water, पानी
1 no. Cabbage stem, cut into half, पत्ता गोभी के डंठल

For Manchurian Soup
1-2 tbsp Oil, तेल 
1 inch Ginger (peeled & finely chopped) अदरक
2 no. Green chillies (less spicy & finely chopped) हरी मिर्च
1 large Onion, finely chopped, प्याज
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
6-7 no. Mushrooms, optional, sliced, मशरूम
1 large Cabbage, finely chopped, पत्ता गोभी
2-3 no. medium Carrots (peeled & finely chopped) गाजर
15-18 no. French beans, finely chopped, फ्रेंच बीन्स
1 tbsp Tender coriander stems, finely chopped, धनिये के डंठल
Prepared Sauce Mixture, तैयार किया हुआ सॉस मिश्रण 
Vegetable stock, वेजिटेबल स्टॉक
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
2-3 tbsp Cornstarch slurry, कॉर्नस्टार्च घोल
Prepared manchurian balls, तैयार किया हुआ मंचूरियन बॉल्स
⅓ cup Spring onion, chopped, हरी प्याज 
2-3 tbsp Coriander leaves, chopped, धनिया पत्ता

For Manchurian Mixture
1 tsp Ginger & green chillies, finely chopped, अदरक और हरी मिर्च
1 cup Cabbage, carrots & french beans, finely chopped, पत्ता गोभी, गाजर, फ्रेंच बींस
1 tsp Black pepper powder, काली मिर्च पाउडर
¾ cup Refined flour, मैदा
1 tsp Dark soy sauce, डार्क सोया सॉस
½ tbsp Ginger Garlic paste, अदरक लहसुन का पेस्ट
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
½ tsp Baking soda, बेकिंग सोडा  
¼ cup Water, पानी
¼ tsp Vinegar, सिरका

For Sauce Mixture
1 tbsp Dark soy sauce, डार्क सोया सॉस
2 tbsp Green chilli sauce, ग्रीन चिली सॉस
2 tbsp Red chilli sauce, रेड चिली सॉस
1 tsp Vinegar, सिरका
1 tbsp Black pepper powder, काली मिर्च पाउडर
1 tsp Black peppercorns, crushed, कुटी हुई काली मिर्च
2 heaped tbsp Tomato ketchup, टमाटर केचप

Other Ingredients
Oil for frying, तेल तलने के लिए
Boiled noodles, उबले हुए नूडल्स

For Garnish 
Fried noodles, फ्राइड नूडल्स
Prepared manchurian balls, तैयार किया हुआ मंचूरियन बॉल्स
Spring onion, हरी प्याज 
Chilli oil, चिली ऑइल 

Process
For Vegetable Stock
● In a saucepot, add mushrooms, baby corn, carrots, oil and saute it for a minute.
● Add tender coriander stems, black peppercorns, bay leaf, water, cabbage stem and let it simmer for 15-20 minutes on low flames.
● Strain the stock and keep it aside for further use.

For Manchurian Soup
● In a wok, add oil, once it's hot, add ginger, green chillies, onion, salt to taste and saute it on high flames for a while.
● Add mushrooms, cabbage, carrots, french beans, tender coriander stems and cook it on high flames for 2-3 minutes.
● Add prepared sauce mixture and give it a good mix.
● Add prepared vegetable stock, salt to taste and simmer it for 5-6 minutes.
● Add cornstarch slurry, prepared manchurian balls and give it a quick boil.
● Finish it with spring onion and fresh coriander leaves.
● Transfer it to a serving bowl, garnish it with fried noodles, prepared manchurian balls, spring onion and chilli oil.
● Serve hot.

For Manchurian Mixture
● In a bowl, add ginger, green chillies, cabbage, black pepper powder, refined flour, dark soy sauce, ginger garlic paste, salt to taste, baking soda, water, vinegar and give it a good mix.
● Heat oil in a kadai, once it's hot, drop lemon size manchurian balls in hot oil and fry them until golden in colour.
● Transfer it to an absorbent sheet and keep it aside for further use.
● Add boiled noodles in hot oil and fry them until golden in colour.
● Transfer the noodles to an absorbent sheet and keep it aside for further use.

For Sauce Mixture
● In a bowl, add dark soy sauce, green chilli sauce, red chilli sauce, vinegar, black pepper powder, crushed black peppercorns, tomato ketchup and give it a good mix.
● Keep it aside for further use.

title: ऐसा आलू मसाला कभी न बनाया होगा | Aloo Butter Masala | आलू टिक्का/बटर मसाला | Chef Ranveer Brar
description:
𝗔𝗟𝗢𝗢 𝗕𝗨𝗧𝗧𝗘𝗥 𝗠𝗔𝗦𝗔𝗟𝗔 - (𝙎𝙚𝙚 𝙙𝙚𝙩𝙖𝙞𝙡𝙚𝙙 𝙩𝙚𝙭𝙩 𝙧𝙚𝙘𝙞𝙥𝙚 𝙗𝙚𝙡𝙤𝙬) Aloo & butter ka pyaar! Classic :) Bet you have not tried a pataka Aloo recipe like this one. Call it Aloo Butter Masala or Aloo tikka Masala or Aloo Lababdaar, jo bhi kaho, banaiyega zaroor!

***********************
𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡  𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣
🛒RB Store - https://www.amazon.in/shop/chefranveer
📟Kitchen Appliances - https://bit.ly/KitchenAppliancesIUse
🔪Knives I use - https://amzn.to/4kzSJVe

***********************
𝗥𝗘𝗖𝗜𝗣𝗘 𝗙𝗢𝗥  𝗔𝗟𝗢𝗢 𝗕𝗨𝗧𝗧𝗘𝗥 𝗠𝗔𝗦𝗔𝗟𝗔 
Preparation time 10 minutes 
Cooking time 25-30 minutes 
Serve 2-4

Ingredients 
For Cooking Gravy
2 tbsp Ghee, घी
2-3 heaped tbsp Oil, तेल
2-4 no. each Green cardamom & Cloves, हरी इलायची और लौंग
2 no. Bay leaf, तेज पत्ता
2 large Onion, roughly sliced, प्याज
4 large Tomatoes, टमाटर
2-3 tbsp Degi red chilli powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर
½ tsp Coriander powder, धनिया पाउडर
¼ tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर
1 heaped tbsp Ginger Garlic paste, अदरक लहसुन का पेस्ट
2-3 cups Water, पानी
10-12 no. Cashewnut, काजू
3 heaped tbsp Curd, beaten, दही
2 tbsp Ghee. घी
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
1 tsp Sugar, चीनी

For Marination
8-10 medium size Potatoes (peeled & diced) आलू
2-3 heaped tbsp Curd, beaten, दही
1 heaped tbsp Degi red chilli powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर
1 tbsp Ginger Garlic paste, अदरक लहसुन का पेस्ट
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
1 tsp dry Fenugreek leaves, crushed, कसूरी मेथी

For Roasting Aloo
2 tbsp Ghee, घी
2-3 tbsp Mustard oil, सरसों का तेल
Marinated potatoes, मैरीनेट किया हुआ आलू

For Finishing Gravy
2 tbsp Ghee, घी
2-3 tbsp Butter, cubed, मक्खन
1 tbsp Degi red chilli powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर
1 tsp dry Fenugreek leaves, crushed, कसूरी मेथी
Prepared gravy, तैयार की हुई ग्रेवी
2 tbsp Remaining oil, बचा हुआ तेल
1 cup Water, पानी
Roasted potatoes, भुने हुए आलू
3 tbsp Butter, cubed, मक्खन
Remaining smoked ghee, बचा हुआ घी
2-3 heaped tbsp Fresh cream (optional) ताज़ा मलाई
1 tsp dry Fenugreek leaves, crushed, कसूरी मेथी

For Smoke
Coal, कोयला
1 tbsp Ghee, घी

For Garnish
Fresh cream, ताज़ा मलाई
dry Fenugreek leaves, crushed, कसूरी मेथी
Chilli oil, मिर्च का तेल
Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता

Process 
For Cooking Gravy 
● In a handi, add ghee, oil, once it's hot, add green cardamom, cloves, bay leaf, onions and saute it for a minute.
● Add tomatoes, degi red chili powder, coriander powder, turmeric powder, ginger garlic paste and cook it for 4-5 minutes until tomatoes are mushy.
● Add water, cashewnuts, curd and give it a quick boil.
● Add ghee, salt to taste, a pinch of sugar, cover it with a lid and let it cook for 10-12 minutes on medium flames.
● Transfer the mixture into a mixer grinder jar and grind it into a fine paste.
● Keep it aside for further use.

For Marination 
● In a large bowl, add potatoes, curd, degi red chilli powder, ginger garlic paste, salt to taste, dry fenugreek leaves and mix it well. 
● Keep it aside to marinate for 5-10 minutes. 

For Roasting Aloo 
● In a non-stick pan, add ghee, mustard oil, once it's hot, add marinated potatoes, roast it until crispy and golden brown. 
● Place a small steel bowl in the pan, add burnt coal in the steel bowl, ghee, cover it with a lid and give smoke to the potatoes for a while.

For Finishing Gravy 
● In a handi, add ghee, butter, once it's hot, add degi red chili powder, dry fenugreek leaves and mix it well.
● Add prepared gravy and cook it for a while.
● Add remaining oil, water and let it simmer for 5-6 minutes.
● Add roasted potatoes, butter, remaining smoked ghee and cook it well. 
● Finish it with fresh cream, dry fenugreek leaves and give it a good mix.
● Transfer it to a serving dish,  garnish it with fresh cream, dry fenugreek leaves, chilli oil and coriander sprig.
● Serve hot with roti.

title: लाजवाब Sindhi Mutton Curry | सिंधी मटन करी | easy Pressure Cooker Mutton curry | Chef Ranveer Brar
description:
𝗦𝗜𝗡𝗗𝗛𝗜 𝗠𝗨𝗧𝗧𝗢𝗡 𝗖𝗨𝗥𝗥𝗬 (𝗣𝗥𝗘𝗦𝗦𝗨𝗥𝗘 𝗖𝗢𝗢𝗞𝗘𝗥 𝗠𝗨𝗧𝗧𝗢𝗡 𝗖𝗨𝗥𝗥𝗬) - (𝙎𝙚𝙚 𝙙𝙚𝙩𝙖𝙞𝙡𝙚𝙙 𝙩𝙚𝙭𝙩 𝙧𝙚𝙘𝙞𝙥𝙚 𝙗𝙚𝙡𝙤𝙬) Lajawaab and Zabardast still don't explain this recipe enough! Try this Sindhi style Mutton curry, that's super easy to make and pressure cooker friendly.

***********************
𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡  𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣
🛒RB Store - https://www.amazon.in/shop/chefranveer
📟Kitchen Appliances - https://bit.ly/KitchenAppliancesIUse
🔪Knives I use - https://amzn.to/4kzSJVe

***********************
𝗥𝗘𝗖𝗜𝗣𝗘 𝗙𝗢𝗥 𝗦𝗜𝗡𝗗𝗛𝗜 𝗠𝗨𝗧𝗧𝗢𝗡 𝗖𝗨𝗥𝗥𝗬
Preparation time 10 minutes 
Cooking time 30-35 minutes 
Serve 2-4

Ingredients 
For Sindhi Mutton
¼ cup Oil, तेल
4-5 no. Cloves, लौंग
1 tsp Black peppercorns, काली मिर्च के दाने
2-3 no. each Black cardamom & Green cardamom, बड़ी और हरी इलायची
3 no. Bay leaf, तेज पत्ता
2 large Onions, chopped, प्याज
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
1 kg Mutton with bones, मटन
2-3 tbsp Coriander leaves, roughly chopped, धनिया पत्ता
1 tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर
1 tbsp Degi red chilli powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर
1 ½ tbsp Coriander powder, धनिया पाउडर
3 large Tomatoes, finely chopped, टमाटर
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
4 large Tomatoes, puree, ताज़ा टमाटर की प्यूरी
¼ cup Water, पानी
3 no. Green chillies (less spicy & roughly chopped) हरी मिर्च
1 tbsp Tender Coriander stems, finely chopped, धनिये के डंठल
1 heaped tbsp dry Fenugreek leaves, crushed, कसूरी मेथी

For Garnish
Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता

Process
For Sindhi Mutton
● In a pressure cooker, add oil, once it's hot, add cloves, black peppercorns, black cardamom, green cardamom, bay leaf, onions, salt to taste and saute it for 3-4 minutes until onions are golden in colour.
● Add mutton with bones, coriander leaves and saute it for a minute.
● Add turmeric powder, degi red chili powder, coriander powder and cook it for a minute.
● Add tomatoes, salt to taste, fresh tomato puree and cook it for a while until oil separates from the gravy.
● Add water to adjust the consistency, green chillies, cover it with a lid and cook it for 7-8 whistles until cooked well.
● Add tender coriander stems and give it a good mix.
● Finish it with dry fenugreek leaves and mix it well.
● Transfer it to a serving dish and garnish it with coriander sprig.
● Serve hot with roti.

𝗥𝗘𝗖𝗜𝗣𝗘 𝗙𝗢𝗥 𝗛𝗬𝗗𝗘𝗥𝗔𝗕𝗔𝗗𝗜 𝗞𝗛𝗔𝗧𝗧𝗘 𝗔𝗟𝗢𝗢
Preparation time 10 minutes 
Cooking time 25-30 minutes 
Serve 2-4 

Ingredients 
For Hyderabadi Khatta Aloo
¼ cup Oil, तेल
1 no. Black cardamom, बड़ी इलायची
4-5 no. Dry kashmiri red chillies (broken into half & seedless) सूखी कश्मीरी लाल मिर्च
2-3 no. Cloves, लौंग
½ tbsp Cumin seeds, जीरा
2 large Onions, sliced, प्याज
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
1 kg large Potatoes, cut into half, आलू
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
1 tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर
2 tbsp Degi red chilli powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर
Salt to taste,  नमक स्वादअनुसार
½ cup Water, पानी
1 tsp Ginger Garlic paste, अदरक लहसुन का पेस्ट
1 tbsp Coriander powder, धनिया पाउडर
2 cups Tamarind water, इमली का पानी
2-3 heaped tbsp Prepared paste & 2-3 tbsp water, तैयार किया हुआ पेस्ट और पानी
1 tbsp Tender coriander stems, finely chopped, धनिये के डंठल
1 tsp Jaggery, गुड़
2 tbsp Sugar, चीनी
1 tbsp Ghee, घी

For Peanut Paste 
⅓ cup Peanuts, मूंगफली
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
¼ cup White sesame seeds, सफेद तिल

For Garnish 
Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता

Process 
For Hyderabadi Khatta Aloo
● In a handi, add oil, once it's hot, add black cardamom, dry kashmiri red chillies, cloves, cumin seeds and let it splutter well.
● Add onions, salt to taste and saute it  for 2-3 minutes until it's translucent.
● Add potatoes, salt to taste, turmeric powder, degi red chili powder, salt to taste and cook it for a minute.
● Add water, ginger garlic paste, cover it with a lid and cook it for 7-8 minutes until potatoes are 80% cooked.
● Add coriander powder, tamarind water, prepared paste & water and let it cook well.
● Finish it with tender coriander stems, jaggery, sugar, ghee and give it a good mix.
● Transfer it to a serving dish and garnish it with coriander sprig.
● Serve hot with roti.

For Peanut Paste
● In a pan, add peanuts, salt to taste and roast them for 2-3 minutes.
● Add white sesame seeds and roast it for a minute.
● Transfer it to a mixer grinder jar and grind it into a coarse paste.
● Keep it aside for further use.

title: Navratri Spl पकोड़े | Banana Flower Bhajia | केले फूल के पकोड़े - Vrat Recipe | Chef Ranveer brar
description:
𝗞𝗘𝗟𝗘 𝗞𝗘 𝗣𝗛𝗢𝗢𝗟 𝗞𝗘 𝗣𝗔𝗞𝗢𝗗𝗘 - (𝙎𝙚𝙚 𝙙𝙚𝙩𝙖𝙞𝙡𝙚𝙙 𝙩𝙚𝙭𝙩 𝙧𝙚𝙘𝙞𝙥𝙚 𝙗𝙚𝙡𝙤𝙬) Try out these almost viral Pakode made with Kele ke Phool, i.e Banana flowers. Plus you get bonus tips on how to cut Banana Flowers correctly.

***********************
𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡  𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣
🛒RB Store - https://www.amazon.in/shop/chefranveer
📟Kitchen Appliances - https://bit.ly/KitchenAppliancesIUse
🔪Knives I use - https://amzn.to/4kzSJVe

***********************
𝗥𝗘𝗖𝗜𝗣𝗘 𝗙𝗢𝗥  𝗞𝗘𝗟𝗘 𝗞𝗘 𝗣𝗛𝗢𝗢𝗟 𝗞𝗘 𝗣𝗔𝗞𝗢𝗗𝗘 
Preparation time 10 minutes 
Cooking time 25-30 minutes 
Serve 2-4

Ingredients 
For Boiling Banana flower & Water chestnuts 
3 cups Water, पानी
1 whole Banana flower, केले का फूल
½ kg Water chestnuts, peeled, सिंगाडा
1 tbsp Sendha namak, सेंधा नमक

For Vrat Ki Chutney
½ cup Coriander leaves, धनिया पत्ता
6-7 no. Green chillies (less spicy broken into half) हरी मिर्च
1 inch Ginger (peeled & sliced) अदरक
Roasted peanuts & cumin seeds, भुना हुआ मूंगफली और जीरा
1 tbsp Sendha namak, सेंधा नमक
1 tsp Sugar, चीनी

For Roasting
⅓ cup Peanuts, मूंगफली 
2 tbsp Oil, तेल
1 tsp Cumin seeds, जीरा

For Kele ke Phool Ke Pakode
Cooked Banana flowers & water chestnuts, roughly chopped, पके हुए केले के फूल और सिंगाड़ा
2-3 tbsp fresh Coriander leaves, धनिया पत्ता
2-3 no. Green chillies, chopped, हरी मिर्च
½ tsp Cumin seeds, जीरा
3 tbsp Curd, beaten, दही
1 tsp Sendha namak, सेंधा नमक
1 ¼ cup Buckwheat flour, कुट्टू का आटा

Other Ingredients
Oil for frying, तलने के लिए तेल

For Garnish
Lemon wedge, नींबू की फांक
Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता

Process
For Boiling Banana Flower & Water Chestnuts
● In a pressure cooker, add water, cleaned banana flower, water chestnuts, sendha namak and mix well.
● Cover it with the lid and cook for 2-3 whistles or until it's cooked.
● Turn off the flames and keep it aside for further use.

For Vrat Ki Chutney
● In a bowl, add coriander leaves, green chillies, ginger, roasted peanuts & cumin seeds, sendha namak, sugar and mix well.
● Transfer it into the mixer grinder jar and grind it into the smooth fine paste.
● Transfer it into the serving bowl and serve with prepared kele ke phool ke pakode.

For Roasting 
● In a pan, add peanuts and dry roast them for a while.
● Add oil, once it's hot, add cumin seeds and roast them until fragrant.
● Turn off the flames and transfer it into the bowl   and keep it aside for further use.

For Kele Ke Phool Ke Pakode
● In a bowl, add cooked bana flower & water chestnuts, fresh coriander leaves, green chillies, cumin seeds, curd, sendha namak, buckwheat flour and give it a good mix.
● Heat oil in a kadai, drop a small spoonful of pakoda mixture into the hot oil and cook until it's cooked well.
● Remove it into the absorbent sheet.
● Transfer it into the serving dish and garnish it with lemon wedge and coriander sprig.
● Serve hot with prepared vrat ki chutney.
***********************

title: NAVRAATRI मलाई कोफ़्ता | नवरात्री पे बनायें malai kofta | No Onion/Garlic recipe | Chef Ranveer Brar
description:
𝗩𝗥𝗔𝗧 𝗦𝗣𝗟 𝗞𝗔𝗖𝗖𝗛𝗔 𝗞𝗘𝗟𝗔 𝗠𝗔𝗟𝗔𝗜 𝗞𝗢𝗙𝗧𝗔 - (𝙎𝙚𝙚 𝙙𝙚𝙩𝙖𝙞𝙡𝙚𝙙 𝙩𝙚𝙭𝙩 𝙧𝙚𝙘𝙞𝙥𝙚 𝙗𝙚𝙡𝙤𝙬) If this doesn't tempt you what will! Trust me, the use of Raw Banana / कच्चा केला in this Kofta recipe adds a special dimension to the recipe. 

***********************
𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡  𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣
🛒RB Store - https://www.amazon.in/shop/chefranveer
📟Kitchen Appliances - https://bit.ly/KitchenAppliancesIUse
🔪Knives I use - https://amzn.to/4kzSJVe

***********************
𝗥𝗘𝗖𝗜𝗣𝗘 𝗙𝗢𝗥 𝗞𝗔𝗖𝗖𝗛𝗔 𝗞𝗘𝗟𝗔 𝗠𝗔𝗟𝗔𝗜 𝗞𝗢𝗙𝗧𝗔
Preparation time 10-15 minutes 
Cooking time 20-25 minutes 
Serve 2-4 

Ingredients
For Cooking Banana
Water as required, पानी
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
5 no. Raw banana (with skin) कच्चा केला

For Kofta Mixture
10-12 no. Cashew nuts, chopped, काजू
10-12 no. Raisins, chopped, किशमिश
4 no. Green chillies, chopped, हरी मिर्च
1 inch Ginger (peeled & finely chopped) अदरक
2-3 tbsp fresh Coriander leaves, chopped, धनिया पत्ता
Cooked bananas (peeled & mashed) पके हुए केले
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
1 tbsp Sama chawal (soaked for ½ hr) भीगे हुए समा चावल

For Paste
10-12 no. Cashew nuts, काजू
2-3 heaped tbsp Curd, beaten, दही

For Gravy
2-3 tbsp Oil, तेल
1 tsp Cumin seeds, जीरा
2 no. Green chillies, cut into halves, हरी मिर्च
½ inch Ginger (peeled & finely chopped) अदरक
2 tbsp Tender Coriander stems, finely chopped, धनिये के डंठल
2 cups Curd, beaten, दही
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
Prepared paste, तैयार किया हुआ पेस्ट
1 tsp Sugar, चीनी
1 cup Water, पानी
½ tbsp Ghee, घी

Other Ingredients
Oil for frying, तलने के लिए तेल

For Garnish
Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता
Chilli oil, मिर्च का तेल

Process
For Cooking Banana
● In a pressure cooker, add water as required, raw banana, salt to taste and mix it well.
● Cover it with a lid and cook it for 2-3 whistles until cooked.
● Keep it aside for further use.

For Kofta Mixture
● In a bowl, add cashew nuts, raisins, ginger, green chillies, fresh coriander leaves, cooked bananas, salt to taste, soaked sama chawal and mix it well.
● Divide the mixture into small lemon size balls and make it into a desired shape.
● Heat oil in a kadhai, drop koftas in oil and cook it until golden in colour.
● Transfer it to an absorbent sheet and keep it aside for further use.

For Paste
● In a bowl, add cashewnuts, curd, transfer it into a mixer grinder jar and grind it into a fine paste.
● Keep it aside for further use.

For Gravy
● In a handi, add oil, once it's hot, add cumin seeds, green chillies, ginger, tender coriander stems and saute it for a minute.
● Add curd, salt to taste and saute it for 7-8 minutes until oil separates from the gravy.
● Add prepared paste, sugar, water and let it simmer for a while.
● Finish it with ghee and mix it well.
● Transfer it to a serving dish, add fried koftas, garnish it with coriander sprig and chilli oil.
● Serve hot with sama chawal.

title: तंदूर जैसा लच्छा पराठा और मटर मसाला । Chur Chur Paratha with Matar | नायाब मटरा पराठा | Chef Ranveer
description:
𝗚𝗔𝗥𝗟𝗜𝗖 𝗟𝗔𝗖𝗛𝗛𝗔 (𝗖𝗛𝗨𝗥 𝗖𝗛𝗨𝗥) 𝗣𝗔𝗥𝗔𝗧𝗛𝗔 & 𝗠𝗔𝗧𝗔𝗥 𝗠𝗔𝗦𝗔𝗟𝗔 - (𝙎𝙚𝙚 𝙙𝙚𝙩𝙖𝙞𝙡𝙚𝙙 𝙩𝙚𝙭𝙩 𝙧𝙚𝙘𝙞𝙥𝙚 𝙗𝙚𝙡𝙤𝙬) If you are missing street style Matara Paratha, here you go. Also sharing quick tips for perfect Lachha Paratha, or the famous Chur Chur or Chur Mur Paratha! Served here with super yumm Dilli style Matara, I mean Matar Masala.

***********************
𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡  𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣
🛒RB Store - https://www.amazon.in/shop/chefranveer
📟Kitchen Appliances - https://bit.ly/KitchenAppliancesIUse
🔪Knives I use - https://amzn.to/4kzSJVe

***********************
𝗥𝗘𝗖𝗜𝗣𝗘 𝗙𝗢𝗥  𝗚𝗔𝗥𝗟𝗜𝗖 𝗟𝗔𝗖𝗛𝗛𝗔 (𝗖𝗛𝗨𝗥 𝗖𝗛𝗨𝗥) 𝗣𝗔𝗥𝗔𝗧𝗛𝗔 & 𝗠𝗔𝗧𝗔𝗥 𝗠𝗔𝗦𝗔𝗟𝗔
Preparation time 10-15 minutes 
Cooking time 25-30 minutes 
Serve  2-4 

Ingredients 
For Dough
350 gms Refined flour, मैदा
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
Water as required, पानी
1 tsp Oil, तेल

For Cooking Matara 
⅓ cup Mustard oil, सरसों का तेल
1 tsp Cumin seeds, जीरा
4-5 no. Garlic cloves, crushed, लहसुन
4-5 no. dry Kashmiri red chillies, सूखी कश्मीरी लाल मिर्च
2 cups White peas (soaked overnight) भीगे हुए सफेद मटर
½ tsp Asafoetida, हींग
1 tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर
1 heaped tsp Degi red chili powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर
1 tbsp Coriander powder, धनिया पाउडर
3 cups Water, पानी
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
Prepared tadka, तैयार किया हुआ तड़का
2 tsp dry Mango powder, आमचूर पाउडर

For Tadka
¼ cup Ghee, घी
1 tsp Cumin seeds, जीरा
½ tsp Fennel seeds, सौंफ
A pinch of Asafoetida, हींग
1 tsp Degi red chili powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर

For Garlic Flavoured Oil
3-4 no. Garlic cloves, finely chopped, लहसुन
2-3 heaped tbsp Ghee, घी
2 tbsp Oil, तेल

For Coating
¼ cup Semolina, सूजी
¼ cup Poppy seeds, खसखस
1 tbsp Degi red chili powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार

Other Ingredients
1-2 tbsp Oil (for coating dough) तेल
1-2 tbsp prepared Garlic flavoured oil (for cooking paratha) तैयार किया हुआ लहसुन का तेल

For Garnish
1 large Onion, finely chopped, प्याज
1 no. Lemon, cut into quarters, नींबू
4 no. Green chillies (less spicy & finely chopped) हरी मिर्च
2 tbsp fresh Coriander leaves, finely chopped, धनिया पत्ता
1 inch Ginger (peeled & julienned) अदरक
2 no. Green & red chillies, हरी और लाल मिर्च
A pinch of Chilli flakes, चिल्ली फ्लेक्स

Process
For Dough
● In a bowl or parat, add refined flour, salt to taste, water as required, oil and knead it into semisoft dough.
● Cover it with a damp cloth and leave it aside  to rest for at least 30 minutes.
● Take a large sized ball of dough, roll and flatten it.
● Roll it into a thin sheet, grease it with oil or prepared garlic flavoured oil.
● Fold it in pleats with the help of fingers. stretch and roll the pleated dough.
● Rest the roll dough for 10 minutes. 
● Take the rolled ball, place it into the coating mixture and coat it evenly.
● Roll the coated dough ball into a thin sheet and thoroughly  apply the prepared garlic flavoured oil on the paratha.
● Heat a tawa, add prepared garlic flavoured oil, place the rolled paratha and cook it on both sides until golden in color.
● Grease with ghee and crush the naan to form layers.

For Cooking Matara
● In a pressure cooker, add mustard oil, once it's smoky hot, add cumin seeds, garlic cloves, dry kashmiri red chillies, soaked white peas and mix it well.
● Add asafoetida, turmeric powder, degi red chili powder, coriander powder, water and give it a good mix.
● Cover it with a lid and cook it for 3-4 whistles until cooked well.
● Add salt to taste and give it a quick boil.
● Finish it with prepared tadka, dry mango powder and give it a good mix.
● Transfer it to a serving dish, garnish it with onion, lemon, green chillies, fresh coriander leaves, ginger and green & red chillies.
● Serve hot with prepared laccha paratha and curd.

For Tadka
● In a pan, add ghee, once it's hot, add cumin seeds, asafoetida, degi red chili powder and cook it for a minute.
● Turn off the flames and keep it aside for further use.

For Garlic Flavoured Oil
● In a pan, add garlic, ghee, oil and cook it for 5-6 minutes on low flames until garlic turns golden in colour.
● Turn off the flames and keep it aside for further use.

For Coating
● In a tray, add semolina, poppy seeds, degi red chili powder, salt to taste and give it a good mix.
● Keep it aside for further use.

title: बिल्कुल non veg जैसा पनीर | रसेदार पनीर भुर्जी मसाला | Paneer Bhurji keema Masala | Chef Ranveer
description:
𝗣𝗔𝗡𝗘𝗘𝗥 𝗞𝗘𝗘𝗠𝗔 𝗣𝗔𝗩 - (𝙎𝙚𝙚 𝙙𝙚𝙩𝙖𝙞𝙡𝙚𝙙 𝙩𝙚𝙭𝙩 𝙧𝙚𝙘𝙞𝙥𝙚 𝙗𝙚𝙡𝙤𝙬) This is not your regular Paneer Bhurji, trust me! Ye है world famous Paneer Keema Pav. Juicy Keema ka मज़ा paneer के साथ.

***********************
𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡  𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣
🛒RB Store - https://www.amazon.in/shop/chefranveer
📟Kitchen Appliances - https://bit.ly/KitchenAppliancesIUse
🔪Knives I use - https://amzn.to/4kzSJVe

***********************
𝗥𝗘𝗖𝗜𝗣𝗘 𝗙𝗢𝗥  𝗣𝗔𝗡𝗘𝗘𝗥 𝗞𝗘𝗘𝗠𝗔 𝗣𝗔𝗩 
Preparation time 10 minutes 
Cooking time 25-30 minutes 
Serve 2-4 

Ingredients 
For Frying Paneer
½ kg Paneer, large cube, पनीर
Oil for frying, तलने के लिए तेल

For Ginger Garlic & Green chilli Paste
2 inch Ginger (peeled & roughly chopped) अदरक
2 no. Green chillies (less spicy & chopped) हरी मिर्च
3-4 no. Garlic cloves, लहसुन 

For Masala
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
1 heaped tbsp Black peppercorns, काली मिर्च के दाने
1 tbsp Coriander seeds, धनिये के बीज
½ tbsp Fennel seeds, सौंफ
1 tbsp Cumin seeds, जीरा

For Paneer Kheema
2 tbsp Ghee, घी
1 tsp Cumin seeds, जीरा
Prepared ginger garlic & green chilli paste, अदरक लहसुन और हरी मिर्च का पेस्ट
1 large Onion, finely chopped, प्याज
1 tbsp heaped tbsp Tender Coriander stem, chopped, धनिये के डंठल
1 tsp Degi red chilli powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर
½ tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर
2 tsp Coriander powder, धनिया पाउडर
6-7 no. large Tomatoes, puree, ताजे टमाटर की प्यूरी
A pinch of Sugar, चीनी
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
1 cup fresh Green peas, हरे मटर
Fried paneer, crumble, तला हुआ पनीर
½ cup Water, पानी
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
1 large Tomato, finely chopped, टमाटर
1 tbsp dry Fenugreek leaves, crushed, कसूरी मेथी
2-3 heaped tbsp Prepared masala, तैयार किया हुआ मसाला
Little water, पानी
2 tbsp fresh Coriander leaves, finely chopped, धनिया पत्ता
1-2 tbsp Ghee, घी

Other Ingredients
1 tbsp Ghee, घी
6 no. Ladi pav, लादी पाव 
A pinch of Degi red chilli powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर

For Garnish
Lemon wedge, नींबू की फांक
Green & red chillies. Cut into halves, हरी और लाल मिर्च
Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता

Process 
For Frying Paneer
● In a pan, add oil, once it's hot, add paneer and fry them for a while until golden brown.
● Transfer it to an absorbent sheet and keep it aside to cool down at room temperature.
● Transfer the paneer into a chopper and grind it coarsely.
● Keep it aside for further use.

For Ginger Garlic Paste
● In a mortar pestle, add ginger, green chillies, garlic and grind it into a coarse paste.
● Keep it aside for further use.

For Masala
● In a pan, add salt to taste, black peppercorns, coriander seeds, fennel seeds, cumin seeds and roast them for a while until aromatic.
● Transfer it into a mixer grinder jar and grind it into fine powder.
● Keep it aside for further use.

For Paneer Kheema
● In a handi, add ghee, once it's hot, add cumin seeds, prepared ginger garlic & green chilli paste and saute it for a minute.
● Add onion and saute it for 2-3 minutes until translucent.
● Add tender coriander stems, degi red chilli powder, turmeric powder, coriander powder and cook it for a minute.
● Add fresh tomato puree, a pinch of sugar, salt to taste and cook it for 7-8 minutes until oil separates from the masala.
● Add green peas, fried paneer, water, salt to taste and let it cook for a while.
● Add tomato, dry fenugreek leaves, prepared masala, little water, cover it with the lid and cook it for another 3-4 minutes on medium flames.
● Finish it with fresh coriander leaves, ghee and mix it well.
● Transfer it to a serving dish, garnish it with lemon wedge, green & red chillies and coriander sprig.
● Serve hot with toasted pav.

For Toasting Pav
● In a pan, add ghee, once it's hot, add a pinch of degi red chilli powder, place ladi pav and toast them on both sides.
● Keep it aside for further use.

title: Veg soya Kofta Masala | इस कोफ्ते के आगे बाकी सब फेल | Soya Kofta curry | सोया कोफ्ता Chef Ranveer
description:
𝗦𝗢𝗬𝗔 𝗞𝗢𝗙𝗧𝗔 𝗖𝗨𝗥𝗥𝗬 - (𝙎𝙚𝙚 𝙙𝙚𝙩𝙖𝙞𝙡𝙚𝙙 𝙩𝙚𝙭𝙩 𝙧𝙚𝙘𝙞𝙥𝙚 𝙗𝙚𝙡𝙤𝙬) Calling all Kofta lovers :) Soya chunks are rich in protein and a common favourite with all. What if you could make an easy and creamy Kofta with it? Here's my simple yet interesting Soybean Kofta recipe with quick tips too.

***********************
𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡  𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣
🛒RB Store - https://www.amazon.in/shop/chefranveer
📟Kitchen Appliances - https://bit.ly/KitchenAppliancesIUse
🔪Knives I use - https://amzn.to/4kzSJVe

***********************
𝗥𝗘𝗖𝗜𝗣𝗘 𝗙𝗢𝗥  𝗦𝗢𝗬𝗔 𝗞𝗢𝗙𝗧𝗔 𝗖𝗨𝗥𝗥𝗬
Preparation time 10-15 minutes 
Cooking time 25-30 minutes 
Serve 2-4 

Ingredients 
For Cooking Soya
2 tbsp Oil, तेल
1 tbsp Ghee, घी
1 tsp Cumin seeds, जीरा & 10-12 no. Black peppercorns, काली मिर्च के दाने
2 no. Garlic cloves, crushed, लहसुन
1 large Onion, roughly sliced, प्याज
3-4 no. dry Kashmiri red chillies, सूखी कश्मीरी लाल मिर्च
2 medium Potatoes, cut into diced, आलू
1 tbsp Ginger Garlic paste, अदरक लहसुन का पेस्ट
½ tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर
1 heaped tsp Degi red chili powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर
1 tsp Coriander powder, धनिया पाउडर
1 tbsp dry Fenugreek leaves, कसूरी मेथी
200 gms soaked Soya chunks, सोया वड़ी
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
1 cup Water, पानी
½ cup Chana dal, washed, चना दाल
¾ cup Water, पानी

For Soya Wadi Kofta Curry
2-3 tbsp Oil, तेल
½ tsp Cumin seeds, जीरा & ½ tsp Fennel seeds, सौंफ
1 large Onion, finely chopped, प्याज
2 no. Green chillies (less spicy & finely chopped) हरी मिर्च
1 inch Ginger (peeled & finely chopped) अदरक
1 tbsp Tender Coriander stem, chopped, धनिये के डंठल
½ tbsp Coriander powder, धनिया पाउडर
½ tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर
2 tsp Degi red chili powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर
1 cup Curd, beaten, दही
1 ½ cups fresh Tomato puree, ताजे टमाटर की प्यूरी
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
2 cups Water, पानी
1 tbsp Cooked soya mixture, पका हुआ सोया का मिश्रण
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
   
For Kofta Mixture
Cooked soya mixture, पका हुआ सोया का मिश्रण
1 tbsp dry Fenugreek leaves, crushed, कसूरी मेथी
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
1 tsp dry Mango powder, आमचूर पाउडर
1 cup Soya chunks, powder (breadcrumbs / sooji) सोया वड़ी का पाउडर

Other Ingredients
Oil for frying, तलने के लिए तेल
2-3 tbsp Soya chunks (powder & coating) सोया वड़ी का पाउडर
     
For Garnish
Green chillies, cut into diagonally, हरी मिर्च
Ginger, julienned, अदरक
Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता

Process
For Cooking Soya
● In a pressure cooker, add oil, ghee, once it's hot, add cumin seeds & black peppercorns, garlic, onion, dry kashmiri red chillies and saute it for 2-3 minutes.
● Add potatoes, ginger garlic paste, turmeric powder, degi red chili powder, coriander powder, dry fenugreek leaves and cook it for a minute.
● Add soaked soya chunks, salt to taste and cook it for a while on medium flames.
● Add water and give it a quick boil.
● Add chana dal, water, cover it with the lid and let it cook for 2-3 whistles until it's cooked.
● Keep it aside to cool down at room temperature.
● Transfer the mixture into a mixer grinder jar and grind it into fine paste.
● Keep it aside for further use.

For Soya Wadi Kofta Curry
● In a handi,add oil, once it's hot, add cumin seeds, fennel seeds, onion and saute it for a while until  golden in colour.
● Add green chillies, ginger, tender coriander stems and saute it for a minute.
● Add curd and cook it for 2-3 minutes until oil separates from the masala.
● Add fresh tomato puree, salt to taste and cook it well for a while.
● Add water and let it simmer for 7-8 minutes on medium flames.
● Finish it with cooked soya mixture, salt to taste and mix it well.
● Transfer the gravy into a serving dish, place fried koftas, garnish it with green chillies, ginger and coriander sprig.
● Serve hot with roti.

For Kofta Mixture
● In a bowl, add cooked soya mixture, dry fenugreek leaves, salt to taste, dry mango powder, soya chunks powder and give it a good mix.
● Divide the mixture into small lemon size balls and coat it with soya chunks powder.
● Heat oil in a kadai, add prepared koftas and fry them until golden brown.
● Transfer it into an absorbent sheet and keep it aside for further use.


***********************

title: Best Mixed Veg Curry | ऐसे बनाएँ मिक्स वेज करी | Unique Drumstick recipe | Chef Ranveer Brar
description:
MIXED VEG DRUMSTICK CURRY - (𝙎𝙚𝙚 𝙙𝙚𝙩𝙖𝙞𝙡𝙚𝙙 𝙩𝙚𝙭𝙩 𝙧𝙚𝙘𝙞𝙥𝙚 𝙗𝙚𝙡𝙤𝙬) Whether you love Drumsticks /Moringa or you don't, this unique Mixed Veg Drumstick Curry will make you a Drumstick lover forever! 

***********************
𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡  𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣
🛒RB Store - https://www.amazon.in/shop/chefranveer
📟Kitchen Appliances - https://bit.ly/KitchenAppliancesIUse
🔪Knives I use - https://amzn.to/4kzSJVe

***********************
𝗥𝗘𝗖𝗜𝗣𝗘 𝗙𝗢𝗥 𝗠𝗜𝗫𝗘𝗗 𝗩𝗘𝗚 𝗗𝗥𝗨𝗠𝗦𝗧𝗜𝗖𝗞 𝗖𝗨𝗥𝗥𝗬
Preparation time 10-15 minutes 
Cooking time 25-30 minutes  
Serve 4-5 

Ingredients 
For Cooking Dal 
2-3 tbsp Ghee, घी
1 inch Ginger (peeled & sliced) अदरक
1 tsp Cumin seeds, जीरा  
3 no. Drumstick, remove edge and cut into 1 inch long, सहजन
1 no. Green chilli (less spicy & broken into half) हरी मिर्च
2 cups Yellow Moong dal, soaked, पीली मूंग दाल
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादानुसार 
½ tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर
A pinch of asafoetida, हींग
1 tbsp Ghee, घी
3 cups Water, पानी

For Spice Mixture 
½ cup Water, पानी
2 heaped tbsp Coriander powder, धनिया पाउडर
1 ½ tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर
2 tbsp Degi red chilli powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर
1 tsp Dry mango powder, आमचूर पाउडर

For Drumstic Curry 
2-3 tbsp Ghee, घी
1 tbsp Oil, तेल
1 tsp Cumin seeds, जीरा 
1 inch Ginger (peeled & chopped) अदरक
4 no. Green chillies (less spicy & roughly chopped) हरी मिर्च
¼ tsp Asafoetida, हींग
Prepared Mixture, तैयार किया हुआ मिश्रण
2 medium Carrot (peeled & large diced) गाजर
2 medium Potato (peeled & diced) आलू
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादानुसार 
Cooked Dal, पकी हुई दाल
2 cups Water, पानी
Salt to taste,  नमक स्वादानुसार 
1 cup Water, पानी
1 medium Cauliflower, florets, फूलगोभी
10-12 no. French beans, roughly chopped, फ्रेंच बीन्स
2-3 heaped tbsp Ghee, घी
2 heaped tbsp Tender Coriander stem, finely chopped, धनिये के डंठल
1 large Tomato, diced, टमाटर

For Garnish 
Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता 

Process 
For Cooking Dal
● In a pressure cooker, add ghee, once it's hot, ginger, cumin seeds and let it splutter well..
● Add drumstick, green chilli, yellow moong dal, salt to taste, turmeric powder, a pinch of asafoetida, ghee and mix it well.
● Add water, cover it with the lid and cook it for 2-3 whistles until cooked.
● Keep it aside to cool down at room temperature.
● Transfer the mixture into a mixer grinder jar and grind it into a smooth paste.
● Keep it aside for further use.

For Spice Mixture
● In a bowl, add water, coriander powder, turmeric powder, degi red chili powder, dry mango powder and mix it well.
● Keep it aside for further use.

For Drumstick Curry
● In a handi or kadai, add ghee, once it's hot, add cumin seeds, ginger, green chillies, asafoetida and let it splutter well.
● Add prepared mixture, carrots and cook it for 5-6 minutes.
● Add potatoes, salt to taste, cover it with the lid and cook for a while on medium flame.
● Add cooked dal, water, salt to taste and simmer it for 10-12 minutes.
● Add water, cauliflower, french beans and cook it well.
● Finish it with ghee, tender coriander stems, tomato and give it a quick boil.
● Transfer it to a serving dish and garnish it with coriander sprig.
● Serve hot with steam rice.


***********************

title: ऐसा पराठा कभी न बनाया होगा | Pav Bhaji Paratha | पाव भाजी का मज़ा पराठे में | Chef Ranveer Brar
description:
PAV BHAJI PARATHA - (𝙎𝙚𝙚 𝙙𝙚𝙩𝙖𝙞𝙡𝙚𝙙 𝙩𝙚𝙭𝙩 𝙧𝙚𝙘𝙞𝙥𝙚 𝙗𝙚𝙡𝙤𝙬) Calling all Pav Bhaji and Paratha lovers..If you are craving for both, you can have them both! Street style Pav Bhaji ka mazaa in a paratha!

***********************
𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡  𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣
🛒RB Store - https://www.amazon.in/shop/chefranveer
📟Kitchen Appliances - https://bit.ly/KitchenAppliancesIUse
🔪Knives I use - https://amzn.to/4kzSJVe

***********************
𝗥𝗘𝗖𝗜𝗣𝗘 𝗙𝗢𝗥  𝗣𝗔𝗩 𝗕𝗛𝗔𝗝𝗜 𝗣𝗔𝗥𝗔𝗧𝗛𝗔 
Preparation time 10 minutes
Cooking time 20-25 minutes
Serve 2-4 

Ingredients 
For Dough 
2 cups Whole wheat flour, गेहूं का आटा
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
A pinch of carom seeds, अजवाइन
½ tsp Oil, तेल
¾ cup Water, पानी
1 ½ tsp Oil, after kneading, तेल

For Pav Bhaji Stuffing
2 tbsp Ghee, घी
1 inch Ginger (peeled & finely chopped) अदरक
4 no. Green chillies (less spicy & finely chopped) हरी मिर्च
1 cup fresh Green peas, हरे मटर
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
¼ cup Water, पानी
1 large Carrot (peeled & grated) गाजर
Little water, पानी
2 medium Boiled potatoes (peeled & grated) उबले हुए आलू
2 tbsp Butter, cubed, मक्खन
2 heaped tbsp Pav bhaji masala, पाव भाजी मसाला
1 tbsp Degi red chili powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
1 tbsp Butter, cubed, मक्खन
¼ cup fresh Coriander leaves, finely chopped, धनिया पत्ता
1 tsp Lemon juice, नींबू का रस

For Cooking Paratha
2 tbsp Ghee, घी
Prepared paratha, तैयार किया हुआ पराठा
    
For Garnish
Fried chillies, तली हुई मिर्च
Butter, cubed, मक्खन

Process
For Dough
● In a bowl, add whole wheat flour, salt to taste, a pinch of carom seeds, oil, water and knead it into the semisoft dough.
● Add oil and knead it nicely. 
● Cover it with damp cloth and keep it aside to rest for a while.
● Divide the dough into medium lemon size balls and make a cavity in the middle.
● Add the spoonful of prepared stuffing in the cavity, seal the edges and roll it with the help of a rolling pin.
● Keep it aside for further use.

For Pav Bhaji Stuffing
● In a pan, add ghee, once it's hot, add ginger, green chillies and cook it for a minute.
● Add fresh green peas, salt to taste, water, cover it with the lid and let it cook for a while.
● Add carrots, water and saute it for 4-5 minutes.
● Add boiled potatoes, butter, pav bhaji masala, degi red chili powder, salt to taste and mash it well.
● Finish it with butter, fresh coriander leaves, lemon juice and give it a good mix.
● Transfer it to a tray and keep it aside to cool down the temperature.

For Cooking Paratha
● In a tawa, add ghee, once it's hot, place prepared rolled paratha and cook it evenly on both sides.
● Transfer it to the serving dish, garnish it with fried chillies and butter.
● Serve hot.

***********************

title: Chunky Soya Pulao | सोया वडी का मसालेदार पुलाव | Achaari Raita bonus | Chef Ranveer Brar
description:
SOYA PULAO - (𝙎𝙚𝙚 𝙙𝙚𝙩𝙖𝙞𝙡𝙚𝙙 𝙩𝙚𝙭𝙩 𝙧𝙚𝙘𝙞𝙥𝙚 𝙗𝙚𝙡𝙤𝙬) If you're missing your good old Mutton Pulao amidst vegetarian options or vegetarian 'season' then try this chunky Soya Pulao. Soya chunks have the perfect texture that go with just about any dish. 

***********************
𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡  𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣
🛒RB Store - https://www.amazon.in/shop/chefranveer
📟Kitchen Appliances - https://bit.ly/KitchenAppliancesIUse
🔪Knives I use - https://amzn.to/4kzSJVe

***********************
𝗥𝗘𝗖𝗜𝗣𝗘 𝗙𝗢𝗥  𝗦𝗢𝗬𝗔 𝗣𝗨𝗟𝗔𝗢
Preparation time 10 minutes
Cooking time 30 minutes
Serve 2-4 

Ingredients 
For Soya Pulao
2-3 tbsp Oil, तेल
1 ½ tbsp Ghee, घी
2 large Onions, sliced, प्याज
2 no. Bay leaf, तेज पत्ता
1 ½ inch Cinnamon stick, दालचीनी
4 no. Green chillies (less spicy & roughly chopped) हरी मिर्च
2 tbsp Tender Coriander with stem, chopped, धनिये के डंठल
1 heaped tbsp Ginger Garlic paste, अदरक लहसुन का पेस्ट
2 cups Curd, beaten, दही
2 tbsp Degi red chilli powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर
1 tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर
2 tbsp Coriander powder, धनिया पाउडर
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
2 cups Soya chunks, सोया वड़ी
2 large Carrots (peeled & roughly diced) गाजर
½ cup fresh Green peas, हरे मटर
4 cups Water, पानी
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
2 medium Tomatoes, cut into diced, टमाटर
700 gms Sella basmati rice (soaked for 30 minutes) भीगे हुए सेला बासमती चावल
1 cup Water, पानी
2 tbsp Ghee, घी
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
A pinch of sugar, चीनी
1 tsp dry Fenugreek leaves, crushed, कसूरी मेथी
2 tbsp fresh Coriander leaves, roughly chopped, धनिया पत्ता

For Raita
1 tbsp Cumin seeds, जीरा
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
1 heaped tbsp White sesame seeds, सफेद तिल
1 ¼ cups Curd, beaten, दही
2 tbsp Pickle, अचार
½ cup Cheese, grated, चीज़

For Garnish
Fried onions, तले हुए प्याज
Mint sprig, पुदीना पत्ता
Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता

Process
For Soya Pulao
● In a handi, add oil, ghee, once it's hot, add onions and saute it until golden in colour.
● Add bay leaf, cinnamon stick, green chillies, tender coriander stems and saute it for a  minute.
● Add ginger garlic paste, curd, turmeric powder, degi red chili powder, coriander powder, salt to taste and let it cook for until oil separates from the gravy.
● Add soya chunks, carrots and saute it for 7-8 minutes until it's cooked well.
● Add fresh green peas, water, salt to taste, tomatoes and give it a quick boil.
● Add soaked sella basmati rice, water, ghee, salt to taste, a pinch of sugar and give it a gentle mix.
● Cover it with a lid and let it cook for 12-15 minutes on low to medium flames.
● Finish it with crushed dry fenugreek leaves and fresh coriander leaves.
● Transfer it to a serving dish, garnish it with fried onions, mint sprig and coriander sprig.
● Serve hot with prepared raita.

For Raita
● In a pan, add cumin seeds, salt to taste, white sesame seeds and roast it for a minute.
● Transfer it to a bowl and keep it aside to cool down at room temperature.
● Add curd, pickle, cheese and give it a good mix.
● Transfer it to a serving bowl and serve with prepared soya pulao.

    


***********************

title: गणेश Chaturthi spl झटपट खीर & लड्डू | Instant Kheer recipe | Ladoo recipe Bonus | Chef Ranveer Brar
description:
INSTANT KHEER & LADDU - (𝙎𝙚𝙚 𝙙𝙚𝙩𝙖𝙞𝙡𝙚𝙙 𝙩𝙚𝙭𝙩 𝙧𝙚𝙘𝙞𝙥𝙚 𝙗𝙚𝙡𝙤𝙬) Here's a special recipe for the festive season ahead, straight from the heart ♥️ 

***********************
𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡  𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣
🛒RB Store - https://www.amazon.in/shop/chefranveer
📟Kitchen Appliances - https://bit.ly/KitchenAppliancesIUse
🔪Knives I use - https://amzn.to/4kzSJVe

***********************
𝗥𝗘𝗖𝗜𝗣𝗘 𝗙𝗢𝗥 𝗣𝗢𝗛𝗔 𝗞𝗛𝗘𝗘𝗥 & 𝗟𝗔𝗗𝗢𝗢
Preparation time 10 minutes
Cooking time 20 minutes
Serve 2-4 

Ingredients
For Poha Kheer
1 ½ ltr Milk, दूध
2 no. Green cardamom, crushed, हरी इलायची
7-8 no. Almonds, chopped, बादाम
3 cups Poha, washed, पोहा
1 cup Condensed milk, कंडेंस्ड मिल्क
¼ cup Sugar, चीनी
Fried nuts, तले हुए मेवे

For Frying Nuts
2-3 tbsp Ghee, घी
10-12 no. Raisins, किशमिश
10-12 no. Cashew Nuts, काजू

For Poha Ladoo
2-3 tbsp Ghee, घी
3 no. Ripe Bananas (peeled & sliced) केले
1 cup Jaggery, गुड़
½ cup Dessicated coconut, optional, नारियल का बुरादा
½ cup Almond powder, optional, बादाम का पाउडर
1 ½ cups Poha, washed, पोहा
½ tsp Cardamom powder, इलायची पाउडर
Few Saffron strands, optional, केसर

For Garnish
Pistachio powder, पिस्ता का पाउडर
Almonds, sliver, बादाम
Few Saffron strands, केसर

Process
For Poha Kheer
● In a saucepot, add milk, cardamom, almonds and let it boil for a while.
● Add washed poha and cook it for 5-6 minutes until it's cooked.
● Add condensed milk, sugar, and give it a quick boil.
● Finish it with fried nuts and give it a good mix.
● Transfer it to a serving bowl, garnish it with pistachio powder, almonds sliver and a few saffron strands.
● Serve hot.

For Frying Nuts
● In a pan, add ghee, once it's hot, add raisins, cashew nuts and toss until golden in colour.
● Keep it aside for further use.

For Poha Ladoo
● In a pan, add ghee, once it's hot, add ripe banana, jaggery and cook it until the jaggery is cooked.
● Add desiccated coconut, almond powder and saute it for a minute.
● Add washed poha, cardamom powder, a few saffron strands and give it a good mix.
● Transfer the mixture into the tray and leave it aside to cool down at room temperature.
● Divide the mixture into small lemon size balls and make it the desired shape.
● Transfer it to a serving platter, garnish it with pistachio powder, almonds sliver and a few saffron strands.


***********************

title: Trending Korean Chicken Burger | कोरियन चिकन बर्गर | Fried Chicken Burger | Chef Ranveer Brar
description:
KOREAN CHICKEN BURGER - (𝙎𝙚𝙚 𝙙𝙚𝙩𝙖𝙞𝙡𝙚𝙙 𝙩𝙚𝙭𝙩 𝙧𝙚𝙘𝙞𝙥𝙚 𝙗𝙚𝙡𝙤𝙬) Doesn't get yummier than this! Korean style Chicken in a burger! 

***********************
𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡  𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣
🛒RB Store - https://www.amazon.in/shop/chefranveer
📟Kitchen Appliances - https://bit.ly/KitchenAppliancesIUse
🔪Knives I use - https://amzn.to/4kzSJVe

***********************
𝗥𝗘𝗖𝗜𝗣𝗘 𝗙𝗢𝗥 𝗞𝗢𝗥𝗘𝗔𝗡 𝗖𝗛𝗜𝗖𝗞𝗘𝗡 𝗕𝗨𝗥𝗚𝗘𝗥
Preparation time 15-20 minutes 
Cooking time 15-20 minutes
Serve 2-4

Ingredients
For Chicken Marination
1 Whole egg, अंडा
1 tsp Ginger garlic paste, अदरक लहसुन का पेस्ट
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
1 tsp Light soy sauce, सोया सॉस
600 gms Chicken thighs (boneless) चिकन

For Salad 
½ medium Cabbage, shredded, पत्ता गोभी
1 medium Cucumber (seedless & sliced) खीरा
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
1 tbsp Prepared korean sauce, तैयार किया हुआ सॉस
2-3 heaped tbsp Mayonnaise, मेयोनेज़

For Instant Korean Sauce
¾ cup Water, पानी
¼ cup Schezwan chutney, शेज़वान चटनी
1 tbsp Gochujang Paste, गोचुजांग पेस्ट
3 tbsp Tomato ketchup, टमाटर केचप

For Coating
1 cup Refined flour, मैदा
⅓ cup Rice flour, चावल का आटा
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार

For Toasting Buns
1-2 tsp Oil, तेल
2 no. Burger buns, cut into half, बर्गर बन्स

For Assembling Burger
Toasted buns, टोस्टेड बन्स
Prepared salad, तैयार किया हुआ सलाद
2-3 no. Green leafy lettuce leaves, roughly torn, सलाद पत्ते
Fried chicken, फ्रायड चिकन
Prepared korean sauce, तैयार किया हुआ सॉस
Fried chicken, फ्रायड चिकन
Prepared korean sauce, तैयार किया हुआ सॉस
Prepared salad, तैयार किया हुआ सलाद
Toasted buns, टोस्टेड बन्स    
Flavoured chips, चिप्स

Other Ingredients
Oil for frying, तलने के लिए तेल

Process
For Chicken Marination
● In a bowl, add egg, ginger garlic paste, salt to taste, light soy sauce, chicken thighs and mix it well.
● Keep it aside to marinate for a while. 

For Salad
● In a bowl, add cabbage, cucumber, salt to taste and mix it well. Leave it aside for a while to release its moisture. 
● Squeeze out the moisture properly and transfer it to a bowl.
● Add prepared korean sauce, mayonnaise and give it a good mix.
● Keep it aside for further use.

For Instant Korean Sauce
● In a pan, add water, schezwan chutney, gochujang paste, tomato ketchup and give it a quick boil.
● Transfer it to a bowl and keep it aside for further use.

For Coating
● In a bowl, add refined flour, rice flour, salt to taste and mix it well.
● Add marinated chicken and coat it well on all  sides.
● Drop the chicken pieces in hot oil and fry them until the chicken is tender and crispy.
● Transfer it to an absorbent sheet and keep it aside for further use.

For Toasting Buns
● In a pan, add oil, once it's hot, add burger buns and toast them for 2-3 minutes on medium flames.
● Transfer it to a tray and keep it aside for further use.

For Assembling Burger
● Take toasted buns, spread some prepared salad, place green leafy lettuce leaves, fried chicken and drizzle a  spoonful of prepared korean sauce.
● Place another piece of fried chicken, a spoonful of prepared korean sauce, prepared salad, flavoured chips and cover it with another slice of burger buns.
● Transfer it to a serving platter, serve hot with prepared korean sauce and salad.



***********************

title: Chilli paneer Momo | एकदम पटाका चिल्ली मोमो रेसिपी crispy chinese paneer Momo recipe | Chef Ranveer
description:
𝗖𝗛𝗜𝗟𝗟𝗜 𝗠𝗢𝗠𝗢𝗦 with 𝗣𝗔𝗡𝗘𝗘𝗥 stuffing - (𝙎𝙚𝙚 𝙙𝙚𝙩𝙖𝙞𝙡𝙚𝙙 𝙩𝙚𝙭𝙩 𝙧𝙚𝙘𝙞𝙥𝙚 𝙗𝙚𝙡𝙤𝙬) For all of you who voted for more Paneer and more Kripsy snack recipes, here's a combination of both! Chili Paneer or Paneer Chilli and momo ka mazaa.

***********************
𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡  𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣
🛒RB Store - https://www.amazon.in/shop/chefranveer
📟Kitchen Appliances - https://bit.ly/KitchenAppliancesIUse
🔪Knives I use - https://amzn.to/4kzSJVe

***********************
𝗥𝗘𝗖𝗜𝗣𝗘 𝗙𝗢𝗥  𝗣𝗔𝗡𝗘𝗘𝗥 𝗖𝗛𝗜𝗟𝗟𝗜 𝗠𝗢𝗠𝗢𝗦
Preparation time 10-15 minutes
Cooking time 15-20 minutes 
Serve 2-4

Ingredients
For Dough
2 cups Refined flour, मैदा
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
A pinch of Sugar, चीनी
¾ cup Water, पानी
2 tbsp Oil (after kneading) तेल

For Stuffing
2 medium Carrots (peeled & finely chopped) गाजर
½ small Cabbage, finely chopped, पत्तागोभी 
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
A pinch of Sugar, चीनी
1 tbsp Light soy sauce, सोया सॉस
3 no. Green chillies (less spicy & chopped) हरी मिर्च
1 inch Ginger (peeled & chopped) अदरक
500 gms Paneer, पनीर
2-3 tbsp fresh Coriander leaves, chopped, धनिया पत्ता
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
1 tsp Black pepper powder, काली मिर्च पाउडर

For Sauce Mixture
2 tbsp Vinegar, सिरका 
2 tbsp Light soy sauce, सोया सॉस
1 heaped tbsp Green chilli sauce, ग्रीन चिली सॉस
1 heaped tbsp Red chilli sauce, रेड चिली सॉस
1 tbsp Sugar, चीनी
1 inch Ginger (peeled & chopped) अदरक
2 tbsp Tender Coriander stems with roots, finely chopped, धनिये के डंठल
2-3 heaped tbsp Tomato ketchup, टोमॅटो केचप
¼ cup Water, पानी

For Paneer Chilli Momos
2 tbsp Oil, तेल
4-5 no. Dry kashmiri red chillies, chopped, सूखी कश्मीरी लाल मिर्च
2 small Onions, cut into diced, प्याज
1 medium Capsicum, cut into diced, शिमला मिर्च
Prepared sauce mixture, तैयार किया हुआ सॉस का मिश्रण
Fried momos, तले हुए मोमोज

Other Ingredients
Oil for frying, तलने के लिए तेल

For Garnish
Toasted sesame seeds, भुने हुए तिल
Spring onion greens, finely chopped, हरा प्याज  
Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता

Process
For Dough
● In a bow, add refined flour, salt to taste, sugar, water and knead it into a smooth dough.
● Drizzle some oil and keep it aside for a while.

For Stuffing
● In a bowl, add carrots, cabbage, salt to taste, a pinch of sugar, light soy sauce and mix it well.
● Keep it aside for a while until vegetables lose their moisture.
● Squeeze out the moisture  and transfer vegetables into a bowl.
● Add green chillies, ginger, paneer, fresh coriander leaves, salt to taste, black pepper powder and mix it well.
● Keep it aside for further use.

For Sauce Mixture
● In a bowl, add vinegar, light soy sauce, green chilli sauce, red chilli sauce, sugar, ginger, tender coriander stems with roots, tomato ketchup, water and give it a good mix.
● Keep it aside for further use.

For Frying
● Take prepared dough, divided into small lemon size balls, flatten with the rolling pin and add a spoonful of prepared stuffing.
● Close the edges, shape them by making pleats on one side and sticking on the other side. Make it a crescent or any desired shape.
● Heat oil in a kadai, add prepared momos in oil and fry them until crispy and golden in colour.
● Transfer it to an absorbent sheet and keep it aside for further use.

For Paneer Chilli Momos
● In a wok, add oil, once it's hot, add dry kashmiri red chillies and saute it for a minute.
● Add onions, capsicum and toss it on high flames.
● Add prepared sauce mixture and cook it for 2-3 minutes.
● Add fried momos and saute it on high flames for a while.
● Transfer it to a serving dish, garnish it with toasted sesame seeds, spring onion greens and coriander sprig.
● Serve hot.



***********************

title: Teekhi Aloo Biryani | मसालेदार आलू दम बिरियानी | Bohri style 'Veg' Dum Biryani | Chef Ranveer Brar
description:
𝗔𝗟𝗢𝗢 𝗗𝗨𝗠 𝗕𝗜𝗥𝗬𝗔𝗡𝗜 (𝗕𝗢𝗛𝗥𝗜 𝗦𝗧𝗬𝗟𝗘) - (𝙎𝙚𝙚 𝙙𝙚𝙩𝙖𝙞𝙡𝙚𝙙 𝙩𝙚𝙭𝙩 𝙧𝙚𝙘𝙞𝙥𝙚 𝙗𝙚𝙡𝙤𝙬) Biryani ka mood है, socha ek 'Veg Biryani' हो jaaye! That too Bohri Style Dum Biryani. Ingredients में kya रखा hai? Mazaa तो Biryani ka है 😎

***********************
𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡  𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣
🛒RB Store - https://www.amazon.in/shop/chefranveer
📟Kitchen Appliances - https://bit.ly/KitchenAppliancesIUse
🔪Knives I use - https://amzn.to/4kzSJVe

***********************
𝗥𝗘𝗖𝗜𝗣𝗘 𝗙𝗢𝗥 𝗕𝗢𝗛𝗥𝗜 𝗦𝗧𝗬𝗟𝗘 𝗔𝗟𝗢𝗢 𝗗𝗨𝗠 𝗕𝗜𝗥𝗬𝗔𝗡𝗜
Preparation time 10-15 minutes 
Cooking time 25-30 minutes 
Serves 2-4

Ingredients
For Chilli Paste
1 cup Water, पानी
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादानुसार 
1 tbsp Oil, तेल
¼ cup Degi red chili powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर
1 tsp Jaggery, गुड़
1 no. Black cardamom, बड़ी इलायची
1 tbsp Ginger garlic paste, अदरक लहसुन का पेस्ट
1 tbsp Oil, तेल

For Bohri Style Aloo Dum Biryani
2-3 tbsp Oil, तेल
2 sprig Curry leaves, कड़ी पत्ते
1 tsp Cumin seeds, जीरा  
7-8 no. Garlic cloves, chopped, लहसुन 
2 no. Green chillies (less spicy & chopped) हरी मिर्च
1 inch Ginger (peeled & chopped) अदरक
800 gms Baby potatoes, peeled, छोटे आलू
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादानुसार
½ cup Fried onions, तला हुआ प्याज
1 ½ cups Curd, beaten, दही
2-3 no. each Green & Black cardamom, हरी और बड़ी इलायची
4 no. Cloves, लौंग
Prepared chilli paste, तैयार की हुई मिर्च का पेस्ट
¼ cup Water, पानी
Cooked rice, पके हुए चावल
¼ cup Fried onions, तला हुआ प्याज
2-3 tbsp Saffron water, केसर का पानी 
2-3 tbsp Rose water,  गुलाब जल
2-3 tbsp fresh Coriander leaves, roughly torn, धनिया पत्ता
2 tbsp Ghee, घी
½ tbsp Garam masala (optional) गरम मसाला

For Cooking Rice
Water as required, पानी
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार 
3 no. Bay leaf, तेजपत्ता
10-12 no. Black peppercorns, काली मिर्च के दाने
2-4 no. each Cloves & Green cardamom, लौंग और हरी इलायची
1 tbsp Ghee, घी  
600 gms Sella Basmati rice (soaked for 20 minutes) सेला बासमती चावल 

For Raita
2 tbsp Oil, तेल
7-8 no. Garlic cloves, crushed, लहसुन
¼ cup Peanuts, मूंगफली
4-5 no. dry Kashmiri red chillies (deseed & roughly chopped) सूखी कश्मीरी लाल मिर्च
2-3 tbsp fresh Coriander leaves, chopped, धनिया पत्ता
2 cups Curd, beaten, दही
Salt to taste,  नमक स्वादअनुसार 

For Garnish
Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता
Mint sprig, पुदीना पत्ता

Process
For Chilli Paste
● In a pan, add water, salt to taste, oil, degi red chili powder, jaggery, ginger garlic paste and cook it for 4-5 minutes until cooked well.
● Add oil and give it a good mix.
● Keep it aside for further use.

For Bohri Style Aloo Dum Biryani
● Heat oil in a handi. Once it's hot, add curry leaves, cumin seeds, garlic, green chillies, ginger and saute it until translucent.
● Add baby potatoes, salt to taste, fried onions and sauté it for 2-3 minutes.
● Add curd, green & black cardamom, cloves and let it cook for a while until cooked well.
● Add prepared chilli paste, water, cover it with the lid and cook it for 10-12 minutes on medium flame.
● Layer it with cooked rice, fried onions, saffron water, rose water, fresh coriander leaves, ghee, garam masala, cover it with the lid and cook it on the dum for at least 15 minutes on slow flame.
● Transfer it to a serving dish, garnish with coriander sprig and mint sprig.
● Serve hot with prepared raita.

For Cooking Rice
● In a saucepot, add water as required, salt to taste, bay leaf, block peppercorns, cloves & green cardamom and ghee.
● Once the water gets to a roaring boil, add soaked sella basmati rice and cook it for 7-8 minutes until rice gets 80% cooked.
● Strain the rice and keep it aside for further use.

For Raita
● In a pan, add oil, once it's hot, add garlic and sauté it for a minute.
● Add peanuts, dry kashmiri red chillies and cook for another 2-3 minutes.
● Strain the garlic, peanuts, dry kashmiri red chillies, transfer to a mortar pestle and grind it into a coarse paste.
● In a bowl, add fresh coriander leaves, curd, salt to taste, prepared chutney mixture and give it a good mix.
● Transfer it to a serving bowl and serve with prepared biryani.

title: शादियों वाला पनीर चंगेज़ी बनाएं घर पर | 'Pataka' Paneer Changezi | spicy Paneer recipe | Chef Ranveer
description:
𝗣𝗔𝗡𝗘𝗘𝗥 𝗖𝗛𝗔𝗡𝗚𝗘𝗭𝗜 -  (𝙎𝙚𝙚 𝙙𝙚𝙩𝙖𝙞𝙡𝙚𝙙 𝙩𝙚𝙭𝙩 𝙧𝙚𝙘𝙞𝙥𝙚 𝙗𝙚𝙡𝙤𝙬) After all the love for Aloo Changezi and Chicken Changezi, how can Paneer be left behind! Here's my recipe for Paneer Changezi, do try it and let me know :)

***********************
𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡  𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣
🛒RB Store - https://www.amazon.in/shop/chefranveer
📟Kitchen Appliances - https://bit.ly/KitchenAppliancesIUse
🔪Knives I use - https://amzn.to/4kzSJVe

***********************
𝗥𝗘𝗖𝗜𝗣𝗘 𝗙𝗢𝗥 𝗣𝗔𝗡𝗘𝗘𝗥 𝗖𝗛𝗔𝗡𝗚𝗘𝗭𝗜
Preparation time 10 minutes 
Cooking time 25-30 minutes 
Serve 2-4 

Ingredients 
For Marination
800 gms Paneer, cut into large cube, पनीर
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
1 ½ tsp Degi red chilli powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर
½ tsp Coriander powder, धनिया पाउडर
2 heaped tbsp Curd, beaten, दही
1 tsp Oil, तेल
1 tbsp Ginger garlic paste, अदरक लहसुन का पेस्ट

For Frying Onions
½ cup Oil, तेल
3 medium Onions, roughly sliced, प्याज

For Paste 
Fried Onion, तले हुए प्याज
10-12 no. Cashewnut, काजू
1 tbsp Coriander powder, धनिया पाउडर
½ tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर
1 tbsp Degi red chilli powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर
Few Coriander stem with roots, धनिये के डंठल
4-5 no. Green cardamom, हरी इलायची
1 no. Mace, जावित्री 
3-4 no. Garlic cloves, लहसुन 
2 no. Green chillies, less spicy & broken into half, हरी मिर्च

For Frying Paneer 
Remaining oil, बचा हुआ तेल
Marinated paneer, मैरिनेटेड पनीर

For Paneer Changezi 
½ tsp Cumin seeds, जीरा
2 no Green cardamom, हरी इलायची
3 no Cloves, लौंग
1 no. Bay leaf,  तेज पत्ता
Remaining oil, बचा हुआ तेल
1 ¼ cup Tomato puree, ताज़े टमाटर की प्यूरी  
½ cup Curd, beaten, दही
½ tbsp Ginger garlic paste, अदरक लहसुन का पेस्ट
Prepared paste, तैयार किया हुआ पेस्ट
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
1 ½ cups Water, पानी
1 tbsp Fried onion oil, तले हुए प्याज का तेल
Fried paneer, तला हुआ पनीर

For Smoke 
Coal, कोयला
2-3 no. Cloves, लौंग
1 tsp Ghee, घी

For Garnish 
Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता
Chilli oil, मिर्च का तेल
Fried onion, तले हुए प्याज

Process
For Marination
● In a bowl, add paneer, salt to taste, degi red chili powder, coriander powder, curd, oil, ginger garlic paste and give a good mix.
● Keep it aside to marinate for a while.

For Frying Onions
● In a pan, add oil, once it's hot, add onions and fry them until golden in colour.
● Transfer it to an absorbent sheet and keep it aside for further use.

For Paste
● In a bowl, add fried onions, cashewnuts, coriander powder, turmeric powder, degi red chili powder, coriander stems with roots, green cardamom, mace, garlic, green chillies and mix well.
● Transfer it to a mixer grinder jar and grind it into a smooth paste.
● Keep it aside for further use.

For Frying Paneer
● In a pan, add remaining oil, once it's hot, add marinated paneer and shallow fry them on all sides until golden in colour.
● Transfer it to a tray and keep it aside for further use.

For Paneer Changezi
● In a handi, add cumin seeds, green cardamom & cloves, bay leaf, remaining oil and let it splutter on high flames.
● Add tomato puree, curd and saute it for 5-6 minutes until oil is separated.
● Add ginger garlic paste, prepared paste and cook it for a while.
● Add water to adjust the consistency and let it simmer for a while.
● Finish it with fried onion oil, fried paneer and cook it for 4-5 minutes on medium flames.
● Turn off the flames, place a small steel bowl into handi, add burnt coal in the steel bowl, add cloves, ghee, cover it with a lid and give smoke to the gravy for a while.
● Transfer it to a serving dish, garnish it with coriander sprig, chilli oil and fried onion.
● Serve hot with roti or naan.

title: Famous Mutton Pulao | मसालेदार मटन पुलाव | मुज़फ्फरनगर की तहरी | मस्त Mutton recipe | Chef Ranveer
description:
MUTTON TAHARI /PULAO - (𝙎𝙚𝙚 𝙙𝙚𝙩𝙖𝙞𝙡𝙚𝙙 𝙩𝙚𝙭𝙩 𝙧𝙚𝙘𝙞𝙥𝙚 𝙗𝙚𝙡𝙤𝙬) Yaadon ki 'teh' se ek 'Teheri/Tahari' की Recipe, khaas आपके लिए 😎 This Mutton Teheri is neither a pulao, nor a Biryani, it's just major weekend goals justified 😋

***********************
𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡  𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣
🛒RB Store - https://www.amazon.in/shop/chefranveer
📟Kitchen Appliances - https://bit.ly/KitchenAppliancesIUse
🔪Knives I use - https://amzn.to/4kzSJVe

***********************
𝗥𝗘𝗖𝗜𝗣𝗘 𝗙𝗢𝗥 Mutton Tahari 
Preparation time 10-15 minutes 
Cooking time 35-40 minutes 
Serve 4-5 

Ingredients 
For Mutton Tahari
3-4 tbsp Oil, तेल
3 tbsp Ghee, घी
4 large Onion, sliced, प्याज
1 ½ kg Mutton with bones, मटन
Prepared ginger garlic paste, अदरक लहसुन का पेस्ट
1 ⅓ cup Curd, beaten, दही
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
1 tbsp Degi red chilli powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर
½ tbsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर
1 inch Cinnamon stick, दालचीनी
2-3 no. Bay leaf, तेज पत्ता
2 no. Black cardamom, बड़ी इलायची
5-6 no. Green cardamom, हरी इलायची
2-3 no. Cloves, लौंग
1 ½ cups Water, पानी
4 large Potatoes (peeled & diced) आलू
1 cup Water, पानी
1 tbsp Tender Coriander stem, chopped, धनिये के डंठल
5-6 no. Green chillies (less spicy & roughly chopped) हरी मिर्च
2-3 tbsp Coriander leaves, roughly torn, धनिया पत्ता
1 kg Sella Basmati rice (washed) सेला बासमती चावल
2 cups Water, पानी
5-6 no. Bhavnagri chillies, roughly chopped, भावनगरी मिर्च
3 large Tomatoes, roughly chopped, टमाटर
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
1 tbsp Mango pickle, आम का अचार (optional) 
4-5 cups Water, पानी

For Ginger Garlic Paste 
4-5 no. Green chillies (less spicy & cut into half) हरी मिर्च
2 inch Ginger (peeled & sliced) अदरक
12-15 no. Garlic cloves, लहसुन

For Onion Salad 
3 medium Onions, sliced, प्याज
5-6 no. Green chillies (less spicy & chopped) हरी मिर्च
2 tbsp Lemon juice, नींबू का रस
2-3 tbsp Coriander leaves, chopped, धनिया पत्ता
Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
½ tsp Degi red chilli powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर

For Garnish 
Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता
Fried onion, तले हुए प्याज

Process 
For Mutton Tahari 
● In a handi, add oil, ghee, once it's hot, add onions and saute until golden in colour.
● Add mutton with bones, prepared ginger garlic paste and saute it for 4-5 minutes on high flames.
● Add curd, degi red chili powder, turmeric powder, salt to taste and cook it for 10-12 minutes.
● Add bay leaf, black cardamom, green cardamom, cinnamon stick, cloves, water and mix it well.
● Cover it with a lid and cook it for a while until cooked well.
● Add potatoes and let it cook for a while. 
● Add water, tender coriander steams and mix it well.
● Add green chillies, coriander leaves, sella basmati rice, water, bhavnagri chillies, tomatoes, salt to taste, mango pickle and water.
● Cover it with a lid and cook it for a while until cooked well.
● Open the tahri and let it rest for a few minutes.
● Transfer it to a serving dish and garnish it with coriander sprig and fried onion. 
● Serve hot with onion salad.

For Ginger Garlic Paste 
● In a mortar pestle, add green chillies, ginger, garlic and grind it coarsely paste.
● Keep it aside for further use.
 
For Onion Salad 
● In a bowl, add onion, green chillies, lemon juice, coriander leaves, salt to taste, degi red chilli powder and mix it well. 
● Transfer it to a serving bowl and serve with prepared mutton tahari.

 
***********************
